authorBio:
I write about places I have never visited, experiences I have never had, people I have never met, events I have never witnessed, and emotions I have never felt. I travel through time and space with my stories, but the best part of it all to me? I get to bring ALL of you along with me.

Hi, my name is Lily Orevba (pronounced Leelee Oreva like saying 'forever' but without the 'f'.)

I'm human, and I think that's all that matters but if you want to know where I'm from, then hello Naija *wink*. I live in a very imperfect world (we all do), but my stories give me (and you too if you'll like to come along) a way of escape. The message is, 'there is always a happy ending' not just for my characters, but for my readers as well. There is the storm, and there's always the calm.

I am a lawyer.

I was born to write. I have never been more certain about anything like I'm certain about this fact.

I absolutely love God (christian) and I'm proud of Him. I co-author my books with Him.

title: Stolen Voices ✓
description:
BOOK ONE in the Stolen mental health series. 

---

"You're kinda weird," she says after a minute, smiling softly as she takes a step towards the fiction section, "it's cute."
  
She possesses a type of attraction that goes overlooked at first, a beauty that makes you take a second glance at her on the streets. He was entranced by this, but he couldn't tell her.
  
Mara Gray is an enigma. The first you see of her will also be the last.  The first thing to be noticed by Elias James as she explodes through the doors of the public library he works at, singing recklessly, making him wish he were deaf.

Elias James had his life flipped upside down two years ago and he hasn't spoken since.  Not because he doesn't want to, simply, a defense mechanism he adapted. The last sound to leave his lips was a scream, and then he was speechless.
  
 ---

This is the story of Bipolar Disorder and the aftermath of Sexual Assault, between two kids that find each other in the chaos of it all.
  
#1 in Nightmare 2/17/2021
#1 in Third Person 2/24/2021
#1 in Awareness 6/15/2021
#5 in BoyxGirl 11/9/2021
#1 in Slowburn 12/3/2021

I'm a nomad at heart so I'm always moving onto the next thing. My passion is romance writing and I love reusing old ideas from my past failed writing. My favorite part about writing books is actually creating the characters, but most importantly, picking their names.

A B O U T  M E:
My name is Nia and I'm just a teen who enjoys the art of life and writing. I write novels for fun, mostly romance. I live vicariously though my characters and love to see the impact they have on myself as well as all of you.

I write a lot about mental health as well. I think it's important that we talk about it and not hide behind shadows.

title: Backroom Deal [ongoing]
description:
Nova Akhran and Julian Maxwell can't stand each other. At all. As CEOs of rivaling Fortune 500 companies, they've been at each other's throats for long enough. Since they want nothing to do with each other, they're also incapable of ever seeing eye to eye on anything. 

However, things take a turn when a frustrating ultimatum threatens their coveted CEO positions. Forced to scramble and protect everything they've worked for, they're cornered with a desperately volatile solution: holy matrimony.

But sharing temporary and meaningless vows shouldn't be a problem since it's mutually beneficial. Right? Because when one really and truly wants something, they must take risks and sacrifices along the way...even if some of those risks are costly. 

If these two knew what they were really getting from the start, maybe things would've been different. Because they're surely in for a ride when fate has a cruel sense of humor. After all, you can't avoid what is inevitable in matters of the heart.

title: Kace
description:
[COMPLETE]

"Stop, please!" she begged me not to hit her boyfriend again. "Please."

I looked down at her as she looked at me pleadingly. Her hand was still holding onto my arm. I never took orders from anyone but her grasp was enough to make me loosen my grip on Danté making him tumble to the floor.

"What do you think you're doing?" He asked her furiously. 

I looked back at him and with my guard down he punched me across the face making my head turn. That was when I knew that he was a dead man. Sayd's eyes widened as she looked from me to Danté and I rolled my fist into a ball again and clobbered him onto the ground. 

"Nooo," She complained and Sonny tried to yank me off of him as the crowd cheered me on. 

"That's," hit 

"For," hit

"Touching," hit 

"A female," hit



Kace Cohen. Born in a power hungry pack, he has been on the run his whole life from his father who is also the alpha. He demand his obedience as he has to take on the alpha responsibility after his father. But his brother believes the title should be his. He takes off with his mother and Luna into a small town where they find you peace. Kace's priorities are set: make sure mom is happy, graduate from college and simply blend in. Until he spots Sayd Pierce, his human mate and an addition to the priority list. However, he is determined to keep her out of his world to protect her but fate has different plans for them.
Will Sayd come to terms with the fact that her soulmate is a werewolf?
Will Kace let her into a world that isn't supposed to exist to her?
And most importantly, will love conquer all?



#1 in Fantasy-Romance - 12/01/24

title: Lena's Love
description:
When Lena relocates to the small town of Ivywood, she just wants to finish high school and keep her head down. 

She doesn't imagine getting involved with the insufferable Ajax, who is also her next door neighbour. Popular, hot and kind of famous for being the singer in his band, The Decree, he isn't the type of boy she usually gets involved with - there is too much of a risk involved. Not to mention the other girls that throw themselves at him. 

She doesn't seem to be able to stay away from him  though - or more correctly him away from her - as they share classes together and she looks after his sweet little sisters. 

What starts out as dislike turns to friendship and soon starts developing further, but will she open her heart to him?

Add in his charismatic band mates, new friends and jealous exes and Lena isn't getting the quiet senior year she hoped for...

authorBio:
"A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies."

Hey guys! Come stalk my profile!

I am a (somewhat) ordinary, whimsical 20 year old who divides her time between England and America. The joys of having parents who hate each other, am I right? I love to write stories and play the piano, and I am a real girly girl who loves reading a good romance. I have about 6,000 story ideas in my head; it's just finding the time to unpick and write them!

I have been writing since I could pick up a pen, and as a child I would always get in trouble for reading in places and at times I shouldn't be! One excellent example of this was at my great aunt Gertrude's funeral... oops! I was eight at the time though, and had only seen her once or twice! 

Please check out my books, and either comment on mine or message me so that I can check out yours!

Maddie xoxo

My books are a mixture of royalty, werewolf, teen lit and and adult ❤️

    ❝You're frowning,❞ he murmured, tapping his forefinger on one corner of her mouth. ❝I hate it when you frown. It makes me want to tear to pieces whatever has upset you.❞

		❝Then tear down that armour, Asa,❞ she told him, leaning her face into his palm because it was starting to feel like home and it terrified her, but also brought her peace. ❝Tear away that outer skin and wear the one you were born with like its gold, because it is.❞ She brought up her free hand to cover his one that was holding her face. ❝Because right now, that is what's upsetting me.❞

•••


In which Asa San Román, popular swimming champion of Reichenbach High, is afraid his looks are all that he'll be liked for... but then meets Carmen West, the girl with midnight hair and thundercloud eyes, who reminds him that beauty is soul-deep instead.

title: The Cutting Edge
description:
Small town girl Song Hyejin grew up with a pair of scissors in her hand, spending her high school days in her father's barber shop cutting crew cuts for young men who were about to enlist in the army; this was how she was intending to spend the rest of her life. When top star Ares Hwang walks into the shop one rainy day demanding that she give him a haircut even though it's past opening hours, her life gets thrown straight into a raging hurricane known as the world of showbiz.

========

Enter Kang Hyunwon, hairstylist to the celebrities, touted by all the country's fashion magazines as the golden hands that could catapult anyone, literally anyone, from obscurity to stardom. When his limelight gets stolen unceremoniously by the head of hair atop one Ares Hwang (whom he had callously rejected to style just days before), his ego takes a beating that he will never forget.

When he finds out who it is who was responsible for his humiliation, he vows to show this clueless suburban girl what it truly means to be hair-raisingly good with a pair of scissors...

========

Cover adapted from the artwork by @ClarissaNorth

title: A Grace of Crowns | ☑ Queenkiller, Kingmaker #1
description:
❖ QUEENKILLER, KINGMAKER Book 1 ❖

Feudal Southeast-Asia filled with magic, daemons, and a royal conspiracy.
  
This is Isla's quest for the truth, and her slow spiral into becoming her very own worst nightmare.

When the gods ascended thousands of years ago, they left behind the divine gift of theurgy. Its powers still echo amongst men, but run fiercer yet in the blood of kings and queens. And one of them will stop at nothing before Isla is dead.

A betrayal lures her out of refuge and into her journey home, where she must unmask her enemies before they unmask her. The theurgy that she has had to keep hidden for many years can be her greatest ally or her most lethal foil.

Only her wits can guide her through the dangerous politics of the Surikh court. But amidst the plots and schemes bubbling around her, she uncovers something far more sinister than the identity of her enemies. Something that can change her entire life; indeed, entire kingdoms.

title: Dark Divide ✓ [WLW]
description:
Blamed for a lethal disease she did not cause, a reclusive necromancer sets out to cure the sickness and save a town before any more victims perish.

                                                                                               ***
Draped in a cloak of blood and deemed a wicked monster, Evylyn is an immortal necromancer, feared enough to silence any mention of her name. As the accused source of a deadly disease, paired with her infamy in necromancy, she avoids the town of Ensceas at all costs.

But Evylyn's fate is decided by a coin toss, and she's forced to break free from her chains of destiny, nearly paying with her life. She's rewarded by a bounty hunter tracking her down, hungry to give her the sanguinary death she deserves.

In her eleventh hour, a fellow demigoddess gives her two things: a second chance, and a way to weasel her way into the hearts of those that despise her. Simply, she must remedy the incurable disease that she allegedly caused, preferably before the entire town of Ensceas falls victim to its sickness.

Thankfully, Evylyn's infamy didn't come from thin air, and if there's anyone that can rival death, it's her.

title: The Bad Boy with a Heart of Gold
description:
Formerly known as Make a Scene / Aurora (aka Rory), the good girl and Sawyer, the bad boy in school, must overcome the history between their families to discover in each other that they are more than what their parents and the world paints them to be.

***
Aurora (aka Rory), a good girl on paper, is not poised to win the award for best sister, but she's certainly shooting for the college scholarship that being best in her class will give her.

Enter Sawyer (aka Trouble). The resident bad boy has bathroom stall graffitis dedicated to him. He also has a secret that could put him in danger were it to be discovered.

When the school counsellor pairs them together for Rory to lift up Sawyer's grades, the friction between them will create sparks that will blow up hidden truths between them. 

This will end in tears.

DON'T MISS MY NEWEST GxG BOOK! https://www.wattpad.com/story/302574264-love-and-other-magical-adventures

I write about things you maybe wouldn't find in other books; life is not sugarcoated and I strive to be true to that. My characters struggle and suffer and have faults and question themselves. I'm a sucker for happy(ish) endings though.

All of my books are love stories on some level (or many levels), but none of them are typical. You will find slow-burning ships and runaway ships and surprise ones. Many best friendships, which can certainly be love stories in and of themselves.

Life is diverse and so are my books and characters. If you're looking for gxg especially, you're in the right place.

Thanks so much for reading! I LOVE comments! Don't hold back. Please don't ever read out of a sense of obligation.

I will totally delete any comments that are racist, homophobic, transphobic, contentious to me or other readers, trashing my characters, or otherwise not cool. One doesn't have to relate to the character to be polite. If you don't like the book for whatever reason, feel free to stop reading 🤗

There's something about Mr. Black that Michael cannot point out.  When he started working for him, buried memories are now starting to resurface and the nightmares are coming back. The man from the past and his boss are not the same person but he's seeing a lot of similarities. Either he's just imagining things or Mr. Black is definitely hiding something.

title: How to (Not) Date a Popstar |✓|
description:
How (Not) to Date a Pop Star is now published as a Paperback, Hardcover, and E-book with W by Wattpad Books!            

                                                                                                   *****

Aaliyah has a hard choice to make when her ex-best friend Tyler Moore, now a world-famous popstar, suddenly comes back into her life and says he wants to be with her. Can she handle the jealous fans and paparazzi? Most of all, can she trust her heart with someone who has so many secrets and lies? 

                                                                                                    *****

Tyler is no longer the guy he used to be. Aaliyah knows that, but she can't deny the spark that still exists between them. She won't let him distract her from pursuing a dance career in New York - no matter how well he kisses or how often he sings his way into her dreams. But Tyler has decided that being the world's heartthrob isn't enough - he wants Aaliyah, even if it means he has to face his darkest truths.

[[word count: 90,000-100,000 words]]
Cover designed by Holly Thurston
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Last Dragon Shifter
description:
Naomi Cliffton believed she would go her whole life hiding her true identity. To the people of Tyrra, she is someone barren of magic and a social pariah. In reality, she is the last dragon shifter: a lone survivor of a race that was killed off for being a threat to Tyrra's hierarchy.

In fear of being persecuted like her ancestors, Naomi has never revealed herself, until a chance encounter with one boy changes everything. Malcolm is not the simple guy he claims to be when they first meet, but the prince of Tyrra, escaping from the castle to avoid his royal duties. When street thugs uncover his ruse, they seek to abduct Malcolm and cross Naomi off as collateral damage. Desperate to save them both, Naomi transforms, unleashing her inner dragon.

Exposed, Naomi has to accept the pact the king offers: her freedom in exchange for becoming Malcolm's bodyguard. Naomi joins Malcolm at his elitist school where she deals with prejudice from her classmates and growing animosity towards Malcolm's pretentious ways. But when someone tries to murder Malcolm, Naomi must put their differences aside to uncover the conspiracy against the royal family. As more threats stack up, one thing is clear: with a determined assassin after the prince's life, it's up to Naomi whether or not the killer succeeds.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I attended NYU's Tisch School of the Arts, majoring in film and television.  As a screenwriter, I have been a quarter-finalist twice in the The PAGE Awards. I have also worked as a literary editor on several series and as a blogger, with my work featured on sites like Collider.com.

While I love screenwriting, television, and these other vocations, working on novels has always been close to my heart. All my life, I've been dreaming up make-believe worlds that I love to write about.

title: The Baseball Player Next Door
description:
Formerly known as Hall of Fame / Peyton loves baseball. Losing his ace pitcher brother turned Santiago away from the game. Can she make him fall for it again without risking her heart or future?

***

Peyton O'Hare loves baseball more than anyone. Too bad she's a girl and can't pursue it professionally. Santiago Miranda has the game running through his veins. Too bad he's not interested in playing anymore since his superstar brother died last summer. 

Peyton won't waste her senior year on pesky things like not being able to play for the school team, not when she can use Santiago to reach her dreams. Too bad she didn't factor in that he may be playing his own game, not with a baseball but with her heart.

title: Sky Woman: Book One of The Empress Saga
description:
Enfri is the last sky woman of her village. She is a healer, herbalist, and midwife. The day she is visited by Jin, a beautiful assassin in service to the king, Enfri starts down a path towards the truth of her heritage and the reason why she has been condemned to die by the crown. Using her wits and the magic of a scholarly dragon to survive, Enfri flees into the desert from a coterie of beast-eyed killers.

(New and revised version is now available in paperback and Kindle on Amazon.)

authorBio:
Hello, Drahcirwolf here. I am an author and a volunteer creative writing teacher. I'm a fan of sci-fi and fantasy stories, primarily adventures with fun world-building.

You can also find me at fanfiction.net, fictionpress.com, and my tumblr url is space-arcanist. But tumblr is dead now, so you'll have more luck finding me on twitter as drahcirwolf.

About the user name, drahcir is richard spelled backwards. Richard is not my name, nor my middle name. Drahcir is how my brother and I clandestinely called each other dicks while playing Halo without getting in trouble. Once, someone I was editing (jokingly) called me a "real dick-wolf" for pointing out her overuse of the word "moist"- bleh, please avoid- and I claimed it as my username forevermore.

I love diversity in fiction. When I read a story starring someone other than Beef McStrongjaw, I get super excited. I love reading about women, people of color, neuroatypical characters, and LGBTQ+, and I endeavor to feature them in my own works. I have a heartfelt belief that it is the responsibility of creators to spearhead representation in media, so you'll often find me championing books, movies, and tv shows that have diverse casts without being harmful.

One last thing. I adore steampunk. Holy crap. I love it.

Campaigns: #DiverseLit / #DiverseFiction / #TalkthePOC / #FreetheLGBT / #ProjectCharacter / #ProjectWomanUp

Updating: Royal Assassin, sprinting to post as much as possible during NaNoWriMo

title: Reckless Entitlement
description:
*COMPLETED* Fresh out of foster care Maya Scott is finally ready to live life on her own terms, she has her own apartment, a job that she loves, and three great friends she's ready to crush her senior year. Not one for attention or affection, she's content with being alone and doesn't need, or want anyone. Or at least she thought she didn't until she met Nick. 

With two absent parents and a mansion all to himself, Nick Ainsworth has learned to live alone. He's found solace in fixing cars and hanging out with his two best friends. Surrounded by people who are only focused on material possessions and their social status, he feared that he would never meet someone who understood him. Until he met Maya.

*This is a standalone novel, but for an introduction to other characters, you may want to read East Chapel Academy first.

title: The Fire and the Sky (Book 3 of the Starborn Series)
description:
Separated from her Starborn girlfriend, Em, and the rogue group of Wishes known as WIND, May Alana knows she can't go back to life she once knew. Now, armed with a family secret that could help put an end to the chaotic power of the ruthless Loyals once and for all, May strikes out in search of the long lost fallen wishing star. Without Em at her side, May must rely on her own strength and determination, and put her faith in friends old and new, in order to return the star to its rightful place. The safety of all Wishes-and her future with Em-depends on it.

title: Twizzlers (MxMxM)
description:
Aaron Kingston believed in fate. No, he didn't just believe in it; he saw it. He saw the red strings of fate that connected soulmates to one another. He saw everyone's but his own, and that was okay. He didn't mind the surprise.

That is, he didn't mind until he found his mates - yes, mates - during the worst possible time. Because The Eye was coming for him and his kin. They were not going to pause for him to explain to his mates what made him...different. And that might take a while. A long while.

No, the enemy was growing impatient. So impatient, that they were willing to do anything. 

Anything.
~~~
BOOK 2
Please read Blueberry Scones before reading this or you will be very lost!

title: Reborn: The Boy Who Discovered He Wasn't
description:
They tell me this  is where I am supposed to tell you what this story is about.

The title, a single word, "reborn". Maybe it's just enough to make you want to read the book. Probably not. 

Maybe the following will help convince you :

Could you imagine what you would do if a simple accident, a bicycle wreck, led to you learning something potentially life altering about yourself, something that totally rocked your world and everything you thought you knew about your life, something that could totally alter the trajectory of rest of your life?

Would you have the courage to make the life altering decision you are being advised to make, by those you trust, and completely reorder your future if it meant the possibility (not promise, just possibility) of a better life? 
What if a nagging voice in the back of your head feared the worst and kept trying to advise aginst it? 


©  2017 by Sabrynabrooklynne.

IF this synopsis has caused you to decide to read the book, could you do me a favor and add me to one of your public reading lists? You will be helping me gain exposure and that in turn, encourages me to continue writing. Also, be sure to like and comment on each chapter. Let me know what you liked and didn't like and your thoughts on the chapter. 

 

 

All rights reserved.

No part of this publication may be reproduced, distributed, or transmitted in any form or by any means, electronic or mechanical, without the prior written permission of the author, except in the case of brief quotations embodied in critical reviews and certain other non-commercial uses permitted by copyright law.

All characters, locations, and events in this story are fictional and a product of the author unless otherwise stated and any resemblances to persons living or dead is purely coincidental unless stated otherwise.

title: Folding the Sky
description:
"If ever something was lost...Zuri Ayim was the one who could recover it."
_____________________________________________________________
Twelve years ago, a meteorite fell among the seven city-states of Kiro, and birthed a new legend. They are called Celestials: normal people given supernatural abilities from the meteorite's impact. Eighteen-year-old Zuri Ayim received the ability to look into people's minds when the meteorite struck, and since then has used her power to make a business for herself, in the hopes of paying off her father's debt before it's too late.

But Zuri's life changes quickly when the Queen herself asks Zuri to find something for her: a talented weaver who is said to stitch the future into his tapestries. With the help of four other Celestials, Zuri sets out on a lengthy journey to locate him.

Except, complications soon arise when they discover that this man's power isn't so simple. 

That, and they're not the only ones looking for him.
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Updates every Saturday. As always, vote and comment if you enjoy!

title: LEMONS / 𝗺𝗹𝗺 (✓)
description:
Kalen couldn't stop himself in time, before he asked in a whisper, "What are you so afraid of, Hwan?"

And it felt like hours passed before Hwan spoke. 

"I don't want to be alone," he said then, and Kalen thought it looked like it physically hurt him to say it. "But I'm not sure...if I deserve not to be."

***

Or, Kalen is in love with the taste of lemons and the scent of rainy summer days and kind hearts.
Suddenly he sees everything he loves in Hwan.

title: Illusion ➵ Zach Mitchell
description:
COMPLETED

"You never had control, that's the illusion! I was overwhelmed by the power of this place. But I made a mistake, too, I didn't have enough respect for that power and it's out now."

After ten years, Jurassic World, the multibillion dollar amusement park is thriving. But, with the loss of interest among the visitors, the bioengineering company InGen, founded by the late John Hammond, wants a better dinosaur in order to entertain its new and old customers. Jurassic World's owner, Simon Masrani, is hoping to use the opening of the new attraction to rekindle his relationship with his estranged daughter, Marella "Mari" Masrani. 

Mari, despite having a famous father, likes to keep to herself, spending most of her time on her computer or reading. But what her father doesn't know is that she's a hacker, and the leader of AnitGen, a corporation wanting to stop the making of dangerous GMO's (Genetically Modified Organisms).

So when her father calls, welcoming her to the park, she can't resist the chance to takedown InGen for once and for all. She'll do whatever it takes. Even if that means running farther, breathing harder, and screaming louder than she's ever had to in her entire life. Not to mention meeting some hot guy who thinks he's all that. Nope, she's definitely not going to let some 'scary' dinosaurs and an annoying, but undeniably attractive, guy ruin her chances.

Highest Rankings: 
#12 in Action - April 6th, 2016
#15 in Action - April 5th, 2016
#127 in Fanfiction - August 2015

title: The Art of Being Alone (Together)
description:
Delena is determined to have a good time at summer camp and forget about her backstabbing ex-best-friend Mei. But when Mei shows up at camp too, suddenly revenge looks a lot more appealing than forgetting.

* * * * * 

As far as 17-year-old Delena Torres is concerned, friendship is nothing more than a quick way to get hurt. This has been her mindset for the past two months anyway, ever since her best friend Mei ditched her and started hanging out with her arch enemy.

She's more than ready to spend summer vacation alone-- then her parents surprise her by signing her up for a photography course at Camp Create It, the summer camp she and Mei always dreamed of attending. Still, even if she has to be surrounded by other campers, Del's determined not to get attached to anyone. She'll spend the summer by herself, honing her photography skills and forgetting about Mei. Easy, right?

Maybe, if it wasn't for the fact that her quirky cabin-mate seems deadset on becoming friends. Or if she could stop running into the cute guy from the kitchen staff. Oh, and if she wasn't in the middle of a prank war after one stupid attempt at revenge, since Mei just happened to show up at camp, too.

Yeah, this "lone wolf" thing might be harder than she thought.

title: Touch The Sky | ✓
description:
Cora Westfield is pretty happy being single. As a chief design editor at Garth Publishing, she doesn't have much interest in dating again, but when she reluctantly agrees to go on a date set up by her friend and meets Seth Gregory, she wonders if she's had it wrong this whole time.

Seth Gregory fled to New York after disaster struck years ago and has been there ever since. His focus is solely on his hockey career with the New York Stallions, but when he meets Cora, she blows him away. 

A relationship in the spotlight can be difficult. Throw in Cora's family problems and Seth's baggage, it makes for a complicated mess. Will the two of them learn to hold on to each other, or will they crumble when the pressure's on?

authorBio:
"When I see effects and I'm unable to discern the cause, my faith in reason and consequences is shaken."
"Then what happens?"
"Two plus two equals four. I put sugar in my coffee, and it tastes sweet. The sun comes up because the world turns. These things are beautiful to me. There are mysteries I will never understand. But everywhere I look, I see proof that for every effect there is a corresponding cause, even if I can't see it. I find that reassuring."
"And life is good again."
"Life is very good."

title: The Gift From Ghymora
description:
At a young age two unlikely friends set forth on a path to change the world. 
James, an outgoing extrovert, and Jacob, a sheltered genius could not be more different from one another, but as they grow older their friendship only grows with them. 
The Gift from Ghymora follows James, Jacob and the people closest to them as they make their way through the early years of life, and towards the pinnacle of human achievement. . .
But life doesn't always go as planned. The Earth is struck by a catastrophe that should not have slipped through the cracks, and in its wake an even darker fate is discovered. 
In their newfound positions of power, the two must utilize all of the resources available to help prevent the coming threat and save our world from certain doom.

title: Project Heart(h) ✓
description:
Junak Baruah wants to win the prestigious short film competition in his university. But with hundreds of participants and a stellar jury on board, winning means making a film that's never been made before. 

And that means breaking the rules and taking the biggest risk of his of life.
 
Project Heart(h) takes him to his grandparent's village, a small place tucked between rivers and hills. What seems like a quaint village soon brings with it an annoying stranger from Junak's forgotten past. Sparks are not supposed to fly for multiple reasons but mostly because their families are tied to an age-old rivalry twisted in secrets and betrayals.

But the heart wants what it wants and Junak's is set on a certain man with mischief in his eyes.

Set near bonfires and rivers, sprawled under starlit skies and surrounded by fireflies, it is a story about stepping off the highway, trekking through an unknown terrain and still finding one's way back home...

~~

title: Rune Knight: Book Two of The Empress Saga
description:
In the southern realm of Altier Nashal, a kingdom of frozen seas and vast forests, a civil war between three rival factions sparks the beginning of a foretold doom. Ban Karst, paladin and scrivener, is the noble son of the Lord Regent and declared a traitor by all sides. Ban's betrothed is left to hold a kingdom together while he must contend with dragons, goddesses, and goblins. His failure has been ordained by fate, and his battle is lost before he can raise his blade. There is no one for him to turn to save for a pair of fugitives, a healer and an assassin.

authorBio:
Hello, Drahcirwolf here. I am an author and a volunteer creative writing teacher. I'm a fan of sci-fi and fantasy stories, primarily adventures with fun world-building.

You can also find me at fanfiction.net, fictionpress.com, and my tumblr url is space-arcanist. But tumblr is dead now, so you'll have more luck finding me on twitter as drahcirwolf.

About the user name, drahcir is richard spelled backwards. Richard is not my name, nor my middle name. Drahcir is how my brother and I clandestinely called each other dicks while playing Halo without getting in trouble. Once, someone I was editing (jokingly) called me a "real dick-wolf" for pointing out her overuse of the word "moist"- bleh, please avoid- and I claimed it as my username forevermore.

I love diversity in fiction. When I read a story starring someone other than Beef McStrongjaw, I get super excited. I love reading about women, people of color, neuroatypical characters, and LGBTQ+, and I endeavor to feature them in my own works. I have a heartfelt belief that it is the responsibility of creators to spearhead representation in media, so you'll often find me championing books, movies, and tv shows that have diverse casts without being harmful.

One last thing. I adore steampunk. Holy crap. I love it.

Campaigns: #DiverseLit / #DiverseFiction / #TalkthePOC / #FreetheLGBT / #ProjectCharacter / #ProjectWomanUp

Updating: Royal Assassin, sprinting to post as much as possible during NaNoWriMo

title: Is He A She?!
description:
Going back to my old title 'Is He A She?!' instead of the Tapas one 'Testoster-zone.'




                             _______



❝Sometimes you don't have to be Superman or Spiderman to save a soul. You just have to dress as a guy.❞


                              _______


Parents and troubled looks are always a bad combination. 

Just like how getting bankrupt and asking to dress as a guy are a bad combination.

Mission objectives: 

1. Befriend unfriendly, cold, rich loner.

2. Make him social.

3. Get the hell out of this all boys school. 

But some things go unplanned just like how the mission gets altered a 'teeny' bit. 

Like, for e.g., 

1. Make friends.

2. Become one of the boys. 

3. Make her roommate 'life of the party.'

4. Have the time of her life.

5. And maybe, just maybe... fall in love.

title: The Night the Vampires Came
description:
Ailith has had a secret crush on popular girl Holly since high school. When vampires kill everyone they ever knew, will Ailith finally get a chance to tell Holly how she feels? Who is the little boy who keeps appearing in Ailith's dreams? More importantly, will Ailith survive the rainstorm that is turning the entire world into blood-drinking monsters?
***
Editor's Choice November 2020, August 2021 | Watty Paranormal Winner 2020
***
Ailith Ying is a college student whose family is turned into vampires during a toxic rainstorm. Her only hope of saving them is to find an elusive and rare medicine known as a Lumin pill. Unfortunately, she is kidnapped and taken to Miami by two of her friends who are on the run from the vampire horde. Soon, as the infection spreads across America, Ailith must find her way back to her family and save the world.
****
Our world is dying. We thought the end of times would come from the plague, from disease, from war - it came from beneath the Black Waters.

title: A slow fall
description:
It was gradual. Lucas had always been there, but it was always as his brother's friend, not his own. Not really. When they began hanging out more, Caleb began realising there was a lot he never knew about the boy, and he began wanting to learn everything he could about him.  

With his brother's both having moved away for school, Caleb had the chance to learn more about Lucas than ever before. He didn't stop to think that that goes both ways, but maybe that's just what he needed. Maybe the love he sought was right there in front if him.

---

Find out how Caleb slowly falls into to despair and love. Is that not an oxymoron? Which emotion is stronger?

Seriously, it's a slow burn. Slow is in the title.

*This is a bxb that deals with sensitive themes and mature subjects. Take care.*

title: Warmagic
description:
Krigsgaldr - "War Magic"

Tyr was the son of the leader in a small village of Southern Svealand. A faith that came with obligations he did not want. 

Freke was a wolf shapeshifter, a descendant of Fenrir some would say, and they were both loved and hated for it.

Their lives were connected. As the heir of the Jarl and a Vitki in training, best friends since childhood and lovers of late they spent all their time together. 
But will their love for one another be weakened or strengthened by Tyr's uncles arrival, his mother's plans of his upcoming marriage and the destiny the Gods have set for them both?

------------------------------------------

This is a fantasy novel inspired by Norse mythology and the history of my country, Sweden. In this book I mix real historical facts with fantasy. 

This book follows the Wattpad guidelines and is not rated as mature, though there are some violent scenes and a lot of Norse religious believes in this book, polygamy  and LGBTQ+ characters.

------------------------------------------

The cover is made by the talented Lotur Norn.

title: Beautiful People | wlw
description:
Perpetual quitter Vera Kwan thinks she's got it made when her style blog catches the attention of narcissistic actor Carmen Juarez, but after egos ignite a gossip war, Vera has to learn to balance her flighty ambitions and her attraction to Carmen's prickly, gorgeous manager Sharise before her Hollywood dreams fall apart like a cheap polyester blouse.

*****

It's not Vera Kwan's fault that she can't hold down a job. A fashion school dropout, she dreams of becoming a famous designer, but the life of a style influencer is more grind than glamour. She just needs one big break, one chance to prove her styles are red carpet worthy.

When a snarky post about her celebrity crush Carmen Juarez catches the actor's attention, Vera wins her ticket to stardom. As Carmen's stylist, she sets out to prove that she's more than just pretty clothes and the right filters, and maybe even win the affections of Carmen's aloof manager, Sharise, who she quickly finds herself falling for.

After a clever fashion stunt goes viral, Vera is suddenly the most sought-after stylist in Hollywood. She even gets a job offer from Carmen's rival. But her style success may not be getting her any closer to her designer dreams, and secrets are beginning to fray her sense of purpose. If Vera can't figure out what's important enough to see through to the end, even when it seems impossible, she risks losing both the professional relationship that made her and the romantic relationship that might be the one thing that matters to her as much as fashion.

*****

Complete at 100k words.

title: Worst Cupid Ever
description:
Genevieve had a crush on her boss. Yes, HAD. After witnessing how much of a cold, dead-on-the-inside grinch he was, she gave her interest in the man a firm kick in the butt and promptly moved on with her life. 
So it was a little more than a surprise when she woke up one morning to a girl claiming to be a cupid and begging her to please fall in love with her killjoy boss. 

Adarosa has never gotten a match right, not when the couple had a 50% success rate or even a 99%. But when her existence as a cupid gets threatened, Adarosa is determined to do whatever it takes to make her final match work.

authorBio:
Female writer of stories.

Cheers to reading novels way into the night and feeling like a zombie the morning after. Worst best feeling ever.

I hope you enjoy my stories enough to read them way into the night. ❤
.
.
.

On the other hand...

Imagine chilling in your house and a stranger bursts in, yells some random bs, flings a flyer at your face then buzzes off all the while confident you'd do exactly what their flyer says. Hilarious huh? 😐

That's how advertising stuff on my message board or stories feels like. Hella annoying.

I will say this gently: I do not accept reading requests nor wish to check out your fantastic new writing platform. All I want is world peace.

You're free to hop into my message board to say hi, tho. I'd def say hi back and see how you're doing. *huggies*

title: (#1) Roommates by Day, Enemies by Night
description:
WARNING: CONTAINING AMOUNTS OF SASS PREVIOUSLY UNKNOWN TO MANKIND

In the city of NYC---

Ok. Hold up. First of all, New York City. What, are ya gonna assume everyone here knows what NYC is? Anyway, this is about two people. I can almost hear you rolling your eyes. Another cliché teen fiction with a bad boy and a good girl? Nope. This is about superheroes. I can still hear you rolling your eyes. Superheroes. Like in comic books? Like people with super speed and mutant powers? Yes. But this isn't about the fight they have. More about the lives they lead without the masks. But just keep in mind, people who live in the world have all different skin colours. Do not assume my characters are of one unless I state them explicitly. and diversity is welcome here in my novel! 

Anyhow, back to the story. Ever wonder where supervillains go after their fight with the hero? What about the other side of the story? It's not like they sit in their lair cackling all day and planning how to kidnap reporters. What about the lives they lead? And instead of just focusing on that, what if the superhero and the supervillain knew each other? I mean, can they see behind the mask? No, so their identities are secret. So what if the hero and villain were best friends? What if they were roommates? What if they were falling for each other? And what happens when they find out? 

Now, I assume you know all of these questions will be answered in this book. But hold on. It's going to take a while. You're in for a bumpy ride. And if any of you got any of the references in this description, give yourself a pat on the back. That is a beautiful thing. And if you can name all the references in this book, you truly are a gift to mankind. 

Fangirl out.

title: Trust Me✔
description:
BWBM
♤♤♤♤♤
Darius picks me up from my seat and pushes me against the wall. 

"It's hard to concentrate with that enticing smell coming off of you in waves," he says as he presses himself against me. I can feel him poking my lower stomach.

"What smell? I don't think I worked out hard enough to smell that bad."

Darius grinds himself against me as he runs his lips along my neck. "I can smell your arousal sweetheart," he practically purrs in my ear.

I blush from embarrassment, trying to push him away. I can't move an inch though, he has me locked up tight.
"I-I don't know what you're talking about," I whisper.

"Oh, I think you do." He growls out and bites my ear...

♤♤♤♤

Darius Scott: Badass, mysterious, and a werewolf 

Alex Edwards: Kind hearted, fiesty, and a little crazy 

 Put the two together and what do you get? Complete and utter chaos, with a smidge of love ;)

Both Darius and Alex have their own secrets, even if they don't know it themselves. 
Let's just hope they can trust each other despite the challenges that lay before them.

title: Moonrise
description:
A young fairy's desire to break free from the restraints tethering her to her world, pushes her into the arms of a charming, young wolf, whose world benefits from keeping her shackled.

*****

Sixteen-year-old Ellette longs to know what the world is like outside of the Woodlands, home to all Fae. As the black sheep of her family, her curious and stubborn nature makes it difficult for her to adhere to the strict ways of her people. One night while running away, Ellette stumbles upon Michael, an injured werewolf. She makes the choice to save his life, and intends to send him on his way once he recovers. But the more Ellette gets to know the intriguing, young wolf, the more reluctant she is to let him go.

And letting him go would certainly be in her best interest.

Not only is Michael an intruder in the Woodlands, but the very creature all Fae have good reason to fear. As his forbidden presence threatens the safety of all Fae, Ellette finds herself torn between following her heart or doing right by her people.

title: Access Denied
description:
Run, Steal and Survive. 

Genevieve Wilfred has only known those three things for as long as she could remember.

But now, the people who she's been running from have caught up. Law Enforcement has her cornered for all the crimes she has committed. And it doesn't seem like she can survive on her own much longer.

Blind-Spot Agency has offered Genevieve a deal. And in return they want her help. She has to catch the very people she has been hiding from. The most dangerous, ruthless people she has ever encountered. Redstone. 

Genevieve's world is about to be flipped when she sets out on a case along with a newly-made leader, a crazy bomb specialist, a drunk shooter, and a brooding assassin.

What she doesn't know is that everything happens for a reason. And there was a reason she was put on this case. What she thought would be a Chase is turning out to be plans of utter destruction. The future seemed easier once, but not anymore.

Not when every secret is revealing.
Not when all the doors are closing.
Not when all Access is denied.
------------
"Check your wallet."

 She held it in front of her to show the room her wallet. "It's still here, you are not much of the thief-" she opened her wallet to find it empty.

"I needed the money," Genevieve pulled out a few dollar-bills out of her jacket pocket. "The wallet was worthless."
------------
 [This is the First Book in the Access Series]

title: Deliciously Deadly: a Red Riding Hood retelling

When stupid little Lottie threw a stick to throw off a monster (spoiler: it didn't work), she did not expect that it would lead her down the path of an unordinary life with a very unordinary husband.

✽ ✽ ✽

All Lottie had ever wanted was to live an ordinary life out of the shadows of the mistakes she had made as a seven-year-old.

After a stranger shows up in the village offering to marry her, she gets exactly what she wished for: a normal, peaceful life with an ordinary husband. They might not have love or kids between them, but life goes on, right?

Until a series of unfortunate disasters strike (as they do) and puts her on the doorstep of hell.

title: Inscribed In The Stars
description:
SEQUEL TO WRITTEN IN THE STARS

Dalia Al-Ruwaisi, eldest Princess to the Kingdom of Rughad, has aspirations to lead her people. But her father, the King, has greater plans. In order to avoid conflict, she has no choice but to marry the King of Balqaas, their long-time rivals. Dalia must leave everything behind; her dreams, aspirations and loved ones.

It may be the closest chance she has at becoming Queen, but Dalia must also face the prejudice against her as the Queen Consort, whilst also bearing the secret her father entrusted to her.

The newly crowned King of Balqaas, Harun Abdul Rabbani, detests the thought of having to open up his heart to another woman. But he can no longer avoid it when the duty arises to save his people. And just when he thinks he has settled onto the throne, a familiar threat arises once more in Balqaas threatening the safety of his new wife, his family and his Crown.

Will the two royals be able to unite under one banner to dissolve the threat that endangers them both, despite their generation-long hatred?

DISCLAIMER: This story does have Muslim characters but in no way is meant to depict how Muslims really are or how they should be.

title: Faith
description:
Working for a rich family like the Thompson's, knowing that she was just like them once was hard for Amelia. The fact that she now had nothing left after losing her money, her friends, her boyfriend, her parents and her life caused Amelia to have no other choice but to accept her fate as a maid. She made the best of it, she made friends who always managed to put a smile on her face if only for a minute. It all changed for Amelia when a figure of her past slides it's way back into her life so suddenly that she didn't even know real from fake. It was too much for her and it was blamed all on faith. Faith she had to choose from. Ignore it, run and hide again or face it and fix the past. Suddenly the future wasn't so simple and  predictable as Amelia thought it was, she couldn't even see into tomorrow. Would she run again or would she take the bull by it's horns and think of it as a second chance of happiness? She couldn't even see happiness in her future, how would she survive?

title: North Star
description:
In the tranquil waters of Hawai'i, Hokulani and Nikau wonder if it's possible for a song to go on forever. 


                                                                  	                         *****


For as long as Hokulani can remember, she's always felt like she's treading water. Everything she loves becomes a means to escape from what's happening around her or, worse, the unsteadiness of her mind. She even finds her passion for music slipping through her grasp, though she tries her best not to completely let that go. And even though the arrival of an up-and-coming musician from Aotearoa causes waves, she's unable to fully enjoy her life. Unable to release that breath she feels like she's been holding onto ever since her father passed away. 

When her family is hit with complicated news, the Kahananui woman must make difficult decisions for themselves, including one Hokulani isn't sure she fully understands. But even when their choices are made, they bring up memories they've all been trying their best to forget, forcing them to face the reality deep inside the family's hearts.

Hokulani takes refuge in the comfort her shared feelings with Nikau bring, but just because she wants something, doesn't mean it's enough. She knows she has a lot to work through on her own, and with the understanding that his year on the island will eventually come to an end, the two of them spend endless nights wondering if they can somehow make a song go on forever.

title: Traces of Delilah
description:

After moving to Connecticut to room with her best friend for the summer, Chastity Blake doesn't know what to think of the charm bracelet she finds, caught under the floorboards in her new bedroom; with the initials D.K. engraved into it.

But ignoring the bracelet's origins isn't an option when she begins to live out strange scenarios as a young woman named Delilah. And when these scenarios start cutting too close to reality, she can't help but suspect they're memories. She quickly realizes though they're not her memories.

They're Delilah Kim's memories -- a girl who was believed to have committed her family's murder, then suicide. But her memories tell a different story other than what everyone else in town seems to know. And it's up to Chastity to place the missing pieces of the puzzle together.

title: Femme Empire
description:
Book 2 in the Boss Lady Series

Ex-CEO, businesswoman, mother and lover. Which one is she supposed to be? 

Sana Bianchi has lost everything and more. She was once nothing, then everything and now is nothing again. But, her enemies have forgotten that this is where she becomes a feral bitch, the survival instincts she had honed to razor-sharpness in the slums of Brazil. 

Betrayal has saturated the air. Everything is on the line. Lives straddle the line of death and then there is the doctor, who changed everything. 

Love doesn't stand a chance. Relationships are dealt the death blow. The world of fashion is turning over the new leaf. Change is coming fast. 

But she stands burning in the middle of it all in her heart's inferno, The Daughter of Fire. The one with flames in her heart. 

Trial by fire seems to be the only way to know.

title: Unveiling beauty " Ambw"
description:
Originally pub 2014 & edited and republished 


Abena and Ki, were childhood pen pals whose lives were irrevocably changed by a tragic accident, placing Abena, then known as Nani in a seven year coma, just months before college and the death of Ha-na -Abena's sister and Seong-ho-Ki's brother. With Abena and Ki reunited in adulthood under complicated circumstances. 

They are both grappling with past traumas and a resurgence of feelings they thought were long buried. Ki, now a successful lawyer, finds himself inexplicably drawn to Abena, his new coworker, but is unable to recognize her as his former confidante.

Abena, on the other hand, struggles to reconcile her past emotions for Ki while navigating her newfound life in Seoul, including an uncertain engagement to a man who sees her more as a friend than a prospective wife. Overwhelmed by her precarious circumstances, she must wrestle with whether to reveal her true identity to Ki and possibly unravel the fragile peace they have constructed.

As secrets are unveiled and past misdeeds resurface, Abena and Ki must confront their shared past and decide whether their intertwined future is worth the potential heartbreak

title: Komoreby
description:
𝗪𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗬𝗦 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟮 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗟𝗜𝗦𝗧 · EDITOR'S PICKS · AMBYS 2022 WINNER · A quirky Asian high school story fused with sci-fi, romance and mystery |

A lonely, small-town gamer girl dreams big when she enters Komoreby High in a glamorous eco-city. When the first day hits rock bottom and a science anomaly zips her to a parallel universe, she must reforge life and love while solving the mystery to find her way home.

***

Komoreby is the metropolis of the future--an eco-city brimming with stylish urban life, where dreams are forged into reality. It's everything Evanna Zeller's quiet, old town was not. 

Nerdy in mind and whimsical at heart, Evanna is a lonely girl with dreams far bigger than herself. She's darkly inclined with sunshiny kawaii, and she's herbivorous with a taste for video game blood. Evanna's adventure of a lifetime is her move to Komoreby, where she reunites with her childhood bestie at the city's most prestigious high school. When she expects a brilliant new start, pranks and betrayals sink the very first day to rock bottom. As if that isn't bad enough, a school tour of the city's high energy physics lab, home to a gargantuan particle collider, takes a bizarre turn.

Now she's trapped in a parallel universe of draconian rules and warped versions of everyone. As she spins down a rabbit hole of mind-boggling quantum physics, can she find her way home through the murk of the unknown? All the while weaving through a social web of potential friends, foes and a mysterious rocker guy she's relentlessly drawn to.


© 2021 Su Vida | Exclusively on Wattpad

***

FEATURED @Anime @ScienceFiction + 25 more
BOOK 1 of the Komoreby series
WC: 108,000

This tale is loosely a sci-fi Alice in Wonderland. The strict school is based on real Asian schools (chap 4+). The ban on romance, classroom raids and shadow education are real. Expect shoujo/kdrama vibes, slowburn ship, gaming, rock music, real science and veganism!

title: Constellation (OCS) !
description:
Long ago, Fortuna, the goddess of fate, nurtured Earth with her divine power until she mysteriously vanished into the void. With her disappearance, the Astral Crystal-a sacred stone forged from star fragments to protect Earth-shattered into twelve pieces, scattering across the world.

As humanity advanced into the modern era, they remained bound by the past, still yearning for something greater-an elusive destiny beyond their understanding.

From this enduring belief, Fortune, an ancient organization devoted to Fortuna, rose to prominence. Originally a religious order, their mission evolved into recovering the twelve fragments to restore their lost goddess. Yet, their true purpose may be far more complex, woven into fate's hidden tapestry.

Opposing them is the Necromancer Agency, or ANC, a shadowy faction seeking the same fragments. However, their goal is far darker: to revive their own deity, Mother Marie, as the new goddess of fate, granting them absolute control over existence and overturning life's natural order.

Caught in this everlasting conflict are three unsuspecting girls from Alder Academy: Eleanor Feyrey, Mya Delarosa, and Leona Schneider. Drawn by curiosity and a love for uncovering mysteries, they become entangled in a struggle far greater than themselves when Eleanor encounters Rhys Bauer-a rogue ANC operative with plans that defy both his agency and Fortune, setting fate itself into motion.

authorBio:
"Never put off till tomorrow what may be done the day after tomorrow just as well."

#EndRomanticizedAbuse (my Wattpad pet peeve- I HATE it) #StopSlutShaming (another Wattpad pet peeve) #CivilWarTeamIronMan #SamGirl #FemAntihero #PitbullAwareness "hate the deed, not the breed!"

JK Rowling is my heroine- I love that woman so much I'd happily build her an altar and worship her for life.

Thank you to the amazing @dborr686 for all the support, encouragement and motivation she gives me (and she's f#cking awesome) <3

My fave fictional character is Hermione Granger as #1. Following her are Severus Snape, Harry Potter and Tom Riddle (such an A+ villain!) and I also have a great fondness for the Mad Hatter, the Cheshire Cat, Elspeth Gordie, Valkyrie Cain, Skulduggery Pleasant, Thowra & Neil Josten (& Sam Winchester, Gabriel, Tony Stark, Buffy, Spike & Harley Quinn if we're including the silver screen).

Beyoncé is the Queen and Lady Gaga is my longest-lasting crush next to Emma Watson.

Fun Fact: I actually don't like Stephenie Meyer's books even though I've written Twilight (crossover) fanfiction. The series had an interesting plot, a well-crafted world and characters with powerful potential but in the books I don't like Bella and Edward at all and their relationship even less. I also have a deep loathing of love triangles. I love poly relationships- they solve so many problems. People need to be more open minded.

title: Sincerely, Mysterious
description:
Adrian Gonzalez knows the painful truth about liking someone you have no chance with-they never like you back and you're left heartbroken. Ever wonder why it's called a 'crush?'

But when the hopeless crush he has is on Parker Thompson-nonbinary school heartthrob with an impeccable fashion sense-he can't help but wish things would turn out differently. Staring at Parker from two seats behind in Biology is fine, and praying he doesn't get a boner when Parker jogs ahead of him in gym class is less fine-
-but neither are as satisfying as he wishes they were.

A class group chat is all it takes to intertwine Adrian's and Parker's lives. And one impulsive, stupid, never-wish-I-typed-it reply is the turning point for Adrian's love story.

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

title: Better Than The Movies
description:
In this world, there are some people who get their happily ever afters and others who don't. Those who get their magical fairytale romance, cherish it for as long as it lasts while the others never get to enjoy the wonders of a fairytale. Instead, they are forced to stay inside their hopeless reality and grow old thinking about what they did to deserve never getting their once upon a time.

I think those are the ones who wanted it bad enough. They craved a fairytale more than life itself. Devoted their lives to Disney movies and romance books just to be let down by the real world.

I think I'm destined to be one of those people.

Then he showed up.

And fucked up everything I thought I knew.

title: Sasha Of Halos (The Halos Saga, Book 1) - Rewriting
description:
Original Titles - The Mystique Of A Feeble & The Mystique Series: Feeble
  
  BOOK ONE: Haunted by her Mom's comatose state, Sasha has nightmares of losing her. Two years ago, the news broke that Legendary singer Marie got into a fatal car crash in 2009. She would've been known as the tragic singer whose light went out. Thankfully, she survived. However, those two years made Sasha a bit bitter. The stresses built up over time with the coma and what her mother left behind have put Sasha and her family a lot to deal with. Because of the rising controversies surrounding her older sister Layla, Sasha Lawrence must maintain her reputation by living a normal life away from the public's eyes. Just like her mother, Sasha wanted to become a singer like her. The stage was no match for her since many factors came into play that hindered her chances such as Layla being one of them. Furthermore, Sasha attends college to begin a new chapter fulfilling her Grandma Chioma's dreams. 

Just believing things were going well, Layla disappears. This situation drives Sasha to find answers amid the strange events dawning on her shoulders. Prior to these events, Sasha encounters a Scottish man named Mr. Goldwind who claims to be her Guardian Angel. After receiving a vision from the gentleman, Sasha must become the Knight of Halos to defend the little town of Foscowe from the coming darkness. Inspired by JOAN OF ARC and BUFFY THE VAMPIRE SLAYER comes with twists and turns for the twenty-year-old. Sasha must find her sister and save Foscowe from the forces of darkness before it's too late. Will she accept her true calling?

title: Fake It All the Way
description:
When Ph.D. candidate Scarlett is forced to play loving wife to her mentor's playboy son, the last thing she expects is to fall for the fantasy herself.

                                                                      *****

Scarlett Rong has dedicated her life to anthropology, and she wouldn't have it any other way, even if her overbearing Ph.D. mentor makes a social life impossible. Dr. Alexeev has the power to make or break Scarlett's career and there's no way she's risking that. Even if it means getting roped into a holiday scheme that can't possibly be university policy. When Maxwell, the rebellious son of Dr. Alexeev's ex-husband gets into a car accident that leaves him with amnesia, Alexeev is far from heartbroken - in fact, she sees it as the perfect opportunity to find out why he's planning on signing his billion-dollar company away to his best friend for pennies. Before she knows it, Scarlett finds herself playing doting wife to the infamous playboy to find out the truth. But as the lies become more entangled, Scarlett finds herself questioning her involvement in this scheme, and more importantly, what her true feelings are for the handsome billionaire. A fake marriage was hardly on Scarlett's wish list this year, but maybe Maxwell is more of a gift than she initially suspected...

title: Into the Black Hole
description:
In the near future, humans have colonized Mars, joined pirates in space, and divided Earth into two vastly different nations: The United Empires and Liansa. When a mission to Mars goes awry, Ailee Chambers---a Sergeant in Earth's Interstellar Force---is left for dead in a spaceship with no life support, and an alien contraption wrapped around her neck.

She is rescued, but there's no cause for celebration, because her saviors are pirates, disgusting monsters who kill Martians and Earthers for sport. Yet, when the Captain of the pirates' ship, Felix Oringo, enlists her help to unravel the plans of Boss---the leader of all pirates---Ailee begins sympathizing with her snarky captor. Boss claims he will liberate Liansans from their dictatorship, but Ailee remains unconvinced. After all, what do men in power want? More power. 

However, in her quest to unveil the leader's plans, the irresistible Boss falls for her, complicating her relationship with Felix, her loyalty to the United Empires, and matters of the heart. For the first time in history, Mars and Earth combine forces to eliminate Boss and retrieve Ailee---why is she so important?---and it's a toss up as to who makes it out alive.

* * *

title: For Just a Moment
description:
What do you do when your smart, handsome, well-liked step brother and two of his friends force you to have sex with them in your own bedroom? Do you tell? And what if no one believes you? Or worse yet, what if the adults and even the friends that you count on think that it's somehow your fault?

Sixteen-year-old Molly Kerrigan has a horrible secret, one so painful that she tries her hardest to forget it. Starting over at a new school, she does all she can to remain anonymous. But a well-meaning social worker hoping to help Molly come to terms with her troubled past, forces her to participate in an every-other-day lunch group. It is here that she meets Ali, who is figuring out her own sexuality, Trinity, so neglected at home that she seeks solace in the arms of older men, Rubi, a Mexican immigrant with her hands full, between her dying mama and younger, special needs sister, and Layla, the richest, most beautiful, and most manipulative girl in the school. Molly also draws the attention of charming soccer player, Noah Nazarian, after he sees her accidentally defending his freshman brother from bullies on the first day of school. Desperate to be left alone, Molly invents a pretend boyfriend. The only problem is that he ends up being not so pretend, and now Molly finds herself as one half of a fake relationship that is the obsession of the most popular clique at school.

title: Royal Assassin: Book Five of The Empress Saga
description:
Princess Jin Algara has left her life and true love behind. Aimless, she seeks a purpose for her broken soul and finds it upon the edge of her sword.

Ban Karst prepares his legion and the Arcane Knights for war, and he is no longer certain of which side he will be commanded to fight for.

Joshuan Krayson works against the secretive plots of the old masters. From the depths of the Spired City to the scarlet steppes of Teularon, he will pay whatever ransom is demanded of him to stop the coming of Paradise.

Reyn of Rosewater must keep an infant empire together as she looks to the west, where her most hated enemy approaches with an army like none other in the world.

Enfri the Yora First Summit, Dragon Empress of Shan Alee, faces a choice. To hold true to her convictions or claim her ancient birthright as the one true sovereign of the Continent.

The doom has arrived, the Spired City burns, and at the pinnacle of a broken tower, the empress and the assassin face each other with weapons drawn to decide the fate of the world.

authorBio:
Hello, Drahcirwolf here. I am an author and a volunteer creative writing teacher. I'm a fan of sci-fi and fantasy stories, primarily adventures with fun world-building.

You can also find me at fanfiction.net, fictionpress.com, and my tumblr url is space-arcanist. But tumblr is dead now, so you'll have more luck finding me on twitter as drahcirwolf.

About the user name, drahcir is richard spelled backwards. Richard is not my name, nor my middle name. Drahcir is how my brother and I clandestinely called each other dicks while playing Halo without getting in trouble. Once, someone I was editing (jokingly) called me a "real dick-wolf" for pointing out her overuse of the word "moist"- bleh, please avoid- and I claimed it as my username forevermore.

I love diversity in fiction. When I read a story starring someone other than Beef McStrongjaw, I get super excited. I love reading about women, people of color, neuroatypical characters, and LGBTQ+, and I endeavor to feature them in my own works. I have a heartfelt belief that it is the responsibility of creators to spearhead representation in media, so you'll often find me championing books, movies, and tv shows that have diverse casts without being harmful.

One last thing. I adore steampunk. Holy crap. I love it.

Campaigns: #DiverseLit / #DiverseFiction / #TalkthePOC / #FreetheLGBT / #ProjectCharacter / #ProjectWomanUp

Updating: Royal Assassin, sprinting to post as much as possible during NaNoWriMo

title: Falling For Mr. Sundae | ✔
description:
[watty's longlist 2018]

Elisa Robinson has only one thing on her Summer to-do list: Go to Jamaica with her best friend.

But after an ignorant tweet sent in the heat of the moment, her parents threaten to make her get a job so she could see life through a different set of eyes.

Elisa was against the idea until she realized it was kind of perfect. If she stayed home, she could keep an eye on Adam, her boyfriend. She knew they were drifting a part and leaving the country might not improve things.

So instead of sunbathing on an island, Elisa was scooping ice cream for rowdy kids. The only thing keeping her sane was her co-worker, Julian.

He was the polar opposite of Adam and served as the perfect distraction from her failing relationship.

An innocent friendship soon turns to something more as Elisa spends more and more time with Julian.

Is it just a rebound or is she really falling for him?

title: The Thing about Falling ✓
description:
When dynamic duo Owen Watson and Athena Calimeris head off to college, things sailed as smoothly as a baby's bottom yet there are things that even they cannot stop from happening.

Being paraplegic sure has quite a long list of downsides; more so when Owen is a college freshman far away from home. Adjusting isn't quite as easy as the university pamphlets say they are and newer obstacles kept going in the way of Owen's ambitions. 

Athena, on the other hand, was starting fresh. Finally freed from her former trauma caused by an unforeseen event in the past, she was ecstatic to finally thrive in college with a new life on a new campus with her beloved, angsty boyfriend, Owen. The future looks bright for this former child prodigy but how sure is she that everything will stay the same?

title: Erica's Special Night (Prom Changed Her Life)
description:
It's a special night in all girl's lives, Prom Night,  a night that takes weeks of preparation and for Erica Sanders it was no different, except, when she left the house and her parents, for prom, she was wearing one thing and when she arrived at the event, something entirely different. 

You see, Erica wanted tonight to be special, perfect, unforgettable, her dream, and for her parents to know what she had planned would ruin it. They would most likely NEVER have allowed her to attend the way she had been planning for months. This was her night, her debut, her chance to express who she wanted to define herself as and nothing was going to get in her way; not her parent's idea about her, nothing. 

The only other person who knew Erica's plans was her best friend and next door neighbor, Rachel, who had been helping her plan this night for months. Now the night is here and everything is going wonderfully. But, will it continue to once the night is over, she returns home and reveals to her parents her new look, the new Erica? How will it go? 

Will they accept the new Erica or will they reject her and insist she go back to who she was?...

title: What Rose Above
description:

[UNEDITED]

After finally learning to accept his ability for what it is, Tyler returns to question the origins of it, starting with the mysterious curly-haired woman in his dreams. However, his plans are soured when his older brother, Christian, asks for his help after three dead bodies turn up in an abandoned lake house.

But the case only becomes more bizarre when they both notice the victims are missing their tongues; leaving both of them to come to the realization that Lake Bellinor has its very first serial killer, in years, on the loose. And Tyler soon learns there's more to his ability than he originally thought when he finds himself prey, caught in the serial killer's web.

title: Necromancy In D Minor ✔️
description:
Sin and symphony. That's all a necromancer needs.

Octavia is a woman of many hats -- a maestro, an educator, a wanderer and an accomplished liar, and she wears all of them at once if need be. Masquerading as a music teacher, she travels the world on a mission to rid it of the netherborne -- a scourge from beyond the grave. 

When her travels take her to the tiny island of Hedalda, she finds a town on its knees, under the heel of the netherborne, and a people who believe necromancers are the worst thing to happen to humanity.

Wit and a song, necromancy through music, was all she ever needed. But this time it isn't enough. The scourge looms larger with each song Octavia plays, and to save Hedalda she must navigate a web of deceit, look beyond sin and symphony, all while keeping her true identity a secret.

Awesome cover was made by @scmimi
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Dark-skinned black women are underrepresented in literature. I'm here to rectify that.

Call me Tempest. I am unapologetically black, an islander, a lover of video games, music and sleep. I began my writing journey on the 16th of December 2015. I've been Wattpading since 2014 but didn't have the courage to upload anything until 2017. I'd like to call myself an author, but I don't believe I'm quite there yet.

I am a lover of Fantasy, but I plan to venture into Paranormal and Sci-Fi in the near future. Feel free to browse my selection of stories. Or not, it's your life.

No Solicitors.

Interesting factoids about me:
- when I was 12, I wanted a prosthetic leg
- I studied constitutional law for four years, but I'm not a lawyer
- I studied Marine Science for three years but I'm not a Marine Scientist
- I used to work in a morgue
- I grew up on a farm

title: Sincerely, Nova ✓
description:
[completed] Nova Carter knows exactly what the next few years of her life will look like: she will work harder than anyone else (as she didn't get into New York University to slack off); she'll be keeping her head down and prioritizing getting her affairs in order; and she'll ultimately make her parents proud by being the living proof of anyone with a disability being able to make their dreams come true.

Little does she know that her carefully planned path is about to take a detour into the extraordinary.

After all, she hadn't quite anticipated befriending the son of famous billionaire Sergei Macarevich on the first day of her orientation week, nor meeting the son of equally famous billionaire Hudson Wilder that same night. And she definitely hadn't anticipated tumbling right into the inner circle of New York's elite (disability, clumsiness, inexperience and all).

As Nova navigates this new life, she finds herself forming an unconventional family around her. With her childhood best friend by her side, Nova immerses herself in the lives of her newfound wealthy friends, an exuberant roommate, and a spirited group of NYU's disabled rebels led by their eccentric counselor - finding love in forms she'd never dreamed of on her way.

A romantic, heart-warming and diverse coming-of-age with a Spotify playlist and characters' social media posts.

Achievements :)

#2 in campus
#2 in cerebralpalsy

title: Disarming Dakota | ✓
description:
Why wasn't I moving anymore? I'd gone still, muddled as what I should do. My eyes swept up off my body and on to the boy, catching a breath in my throat when he smirked in my direction, flicking two fingers two in the air.

"Hi," I read his lips. Helplessly, I become entangled in his soft spoken greeting, taking the first leap to the captivating boy in the corner.

I decided he was beautiful enough to become my distraction. My own little addiction until I left the safety of the pretend world we were all playing make-believe in. 

---------

Right when Silvia Ellington is about to start her senior year, her mother decides to have her move in with her aloof father and his "perfect" family in California.  
          She promises to be on her best behavior, and for the most part, she's able to keep her snappy attitude in check...until she ends up going to a party one chilly night. 
          In the adolescent madness, she finds a tattooed boy named Dakota. He's ungodly tall and has crystal blue eyes that can sway any good girl to do bad things. 
        When they first meet, he makes it his job to show that he doesn't like Silvia. And he's got reasons.
         All she has to do is disarm this bad boy and unlock the secrets he's keeping deep inside. Before they know it, Silvia and Dakota embark on an emotional roller-coaster of a relationship that is bound to ruin a few lives. 
        But when Silvia's own secrets come knocking on her door, will it tear them apart or will love prevail?

    HIGHEST RANKING: 
    #1 in Action 
    #2 in Humor 
    #2 in Teen Fiction 
    #1 in Drama 
    #8 in Romance

title: Captive in Plain Sight
description:
Mila is the obsession of a dangerous man with a grudge. After a traumatic incident, she's started over in Seattle with a new job and her first serious relationship. But everything is poised to crumble when she meets Alec Laurent, a controlling psychopath set to push her limits. As she tries to keep her loved ones from danger and stay a step ahead of her captor, she realizes there's more to their relationship than he's letting on. The key to her freedom is finding out exactly what it is.

#1 Mystery/Thriller
Featured as a 💎 Mystery Gem by Wattpad Outreach

                                                          *****

Her heart skipped a beat when she saw it. High-definition surveillance footage played on the television.

Her mother talking on the phone in the grocery checkout.

Her brother playing video games with friends.

Her best friend driving her car.

Her boyfriend commuting on the bus to work.

Her dad playing basketball at the gym.

She dropped the vase, shattering what was left,  putting her hand to her mouth in horror.

"Sit down, Ms. Black." he said. "We have a lot to cover."

title: SKIN (WATTYS UNDISCOVERED GEM)
description:
❝All wolves are the same.
 Some are closer to a real monster, and others hide in sheep skin.❞

Lennox Armstrong is a twenty-six-year-old Alpha who controls one of the biggest packs in the Northern hemisphere. The one difference between him and every other werewolf?

He's less human and more wolf.

With his pack house located at the other side of a college campus, it's inevitable that he meets Schuyler Bradshaw: a quirky nineteen-year-old, past-help, obsessed-with-anything-and-everything-to-do-with-wolves girl who happens to be on a date with his Casanova-of-a-best-friend.

Overcome by the drive to fulfill the inevitability of mating with the human girl or drive his more primal thoughts back down- betrayal, murder and something to dig your teeth in unfolds itself as Lennox is forced to learn if he's truly a monster that hides in sheep's skin.

BOOK #1 of BLOODLINES trilogy
