title: WitchHunter ✔️
description:
A WitchHunter with a glorious destiny.
An assassin desperate for freedom.
A stable boy with a dangerous secret. 
A friend with a hidden family.
A brother who craves vengeance. 
~~~
The deceit is this: The Hunter has a Lochri daughter. The stable boy has a secret curse. The WitchMaster isn't what he appears. 
No one knows how or why the Lochri came into being. Some believe it was the work of gods. Others, many, many others, believe they are spawned from something much darker.
WitchHunters, employed at Hunter's guilds, live their lives in search of these monsters, these unnatural beings who dare to question the order we have kept in place for centuries. I do not hold the title of WitchHunter, however, for I am something far more sinister. I am Alice, the Demon Raven of Kindleridge, and I'm their Ace. 
~~~
They call her the Ace, the assassin owned by Velius Dag, highest ranking WitchMaster in the Kingdom. For six years, the Ace has lived mostly unbothered, but all that will change when Hale Arsen, Velius's adopted son, returns to the Ridge, and the Ace is assigned to protect him, as he will one day become the future WitchMaster. Tensions rise as the two clashing personalities come together time after time in feud, but with the Lochri problem growing ever stronger, and secrets begin to unravel themselves, these two opposing forces will have to realize that working together may be the only way to keep the world from figuring out the truth that could spell disaster for them all.

What happens when you realize you might be the bad guy?

title: Callie and Lexi's Kiss List | ✓
description:
When twins Callie and Lexi were kids, they wrote a list of all the boys they wished to kiss when they started high school. Flash forward a year later, Lexi packed her bags and moved with her father to Melbourne in the wake of their parents' umpteenth separation.

Yet after an unfortunate turn of events, Lexi finds herself moving back in with her mum and estranged sister in their final year of high school. Upon unpacking her things into her old room, she comes across the old kiss list and decides to challenge Callie to complete the list with her before they graduate, in the hopes they reconnect through it.

However, Callie and Lexi both have their own obstacles that could see them kissing none of the boys on that list.

Firstly, Lexi is a closeted gay to her sister and mother, unable to out herself to Callie in fear that she won't do the list with her.

And Callie... well, she only has one leg. Callie believes girls with one leg are destined to never get a boyfriend when surrounded by girls who have two.

Follow Callie and Lexi's journeys reuniting through much lip-locking, sister-bonding, and soul-searching.

Callie and Lexi's Kiss List is a spin-off from Positive 1 and 2, following the story of Lily's and Cory's children. [Reading Positive 1 and 2 is not necessary to enjoy this story.]
Tous Droits Réservés

title: BLIND DEVOTION : The Misconceptions of Me | B o o k 1 [EDITING]
description:
Status: Complete ✔ | Editing process ⏸
      
      Tell me what's the perfect picture of young adults life nowadays. Would you say a countless number of friends? Going to a party every month? To be in a love relationship? To study and make money? If it's what you think it really is, you could call Melanie Hill a solitary.
      
      At 22 years old, she still struggles with the society' "standards" for a woman of her age. However, it might change this time; new encounters and goals will transform her life forever. It's going to be a rollercoaster.
      
      A discovery of the feeling to love for the first time, and to be loved. An uncommon devotion breaking the stereotypes. It won't be easy, but it will be worth it!
      
      
      "Too often we underestimate the power of a touch, a smile, a kind word, a listening ear, an honest compliment, or the smallest act of caring, all of which have the potential to turn a life around." by Leo Buscaglia
      
       This is going to be a long journey, be prepared!


[Completed: March 22nd, 2017.]

title: Mystical (Mystical #1) (Revising)
description:
Gentle ripples passed over her, a watery caress that contrasted with her growing unease. Blinking slowly, Eliza tried to make sense of her situation. She found herself submerged, an unexpected aquatic world unfolding around her. Panic crept in as her ankles remained bound, immobilized as if by an unseen force.

An attempt to move her arms yielded no results - they were ensnared in an unyielding grip. Seaweed, sinuous and trailing, wrapped itself around her legs with an almost possessive hold. Every movement was thwarted by the constricting tendrils, her struggles mirrored by the rippling sea plants.

An urgency to breathe set in, her chest tightening in a desperate plea for air. But the very element that should sustain her had become a stifling barrier. A strand of slimy seaweed clung to her lips, smothering her mouth and nose. It seemed as if the water itself had turned against her, a sinister transformation that threatened to consume her.

title: Erivale: The Lost Princess
description:
Amberleigh had been recklessly traveling between realms for years (accidentally, of course) unsure of how or why she continually found herself in a world called Erivale. Stuck in a not so great situation in the human realm, she escapes by literally falling into Erivale once again - although this time is different.

A mysterious man traveling with a pack of wolves snatches her from the edge of death and claims to know her history. He also wants the bounty on her head. Leave it to the cold-blooded stranger to not so subtly break the news - Amberleigh was an Elf. Of course, it couldn't just stop there; she was an Elven princess. 

Cue adventures, sword battles, etiquette lessons, and magic. Amberleigh will need all the help she can get to make it through. The world of Erivale isn't as magical as it seems, and a mystery is unfolding - one that threatens Amberleigh's life and the freedoms of those around her.

The Lost Princess is returning to Erivale, and no one, not even she, is ready for what is to come.

Currently being edited.

The Warrior Awards Third Place 3/28/2020

title: Chasing Death
description:
When Hell and Earth collide, sparks are bound to fly. Saddened by the death of her lover, Tora tries to take her own life only to learn that her name is missing from the system of the Fates. She sets out on a journey to correct the glitch but lands herself in trouble, becoming a wanted criminal on the run. Trapped in a dangerous realm, making friends and foes and trying to evade eternal punishment, Tora finds safety in the arms of Death himself. Will this forbidden love survive the test of time? Life, Death or Immortality - what will Tora choose in Pataal Lok? And are the legends of good vs evil, as straight as they're narrated to us?

title: johnlock: forgive and forget
description:
//COMPLETED//JOHNLOCK//

Sherlock is gay. John isnt gay. Or his he? What would you do for your best friend who's supposedly dead? Would you forgive him? If you forget something can you revive that memory just as easy as forgetting it? 
A/U no Mary, Sherlock's mind palace is a bit more... sophisticated. 

A few plot twists I guess and I wouldn't read this if you get triggered easily. This is your warning.  If it's really triggering i will put a warning on the chapter. there is a use of offensive slurs in it so if you feel uncomfy with that don't read this. There is also some smut implications but I won't actually write any smut as like just no. People know me in this app :)

Andd this is my first johnlock story or any fanfic for that matter so please don't be to mean and try to ignore any loose threads I may leave! And please comment and vote so I know you like the story! Love you all 💚

title: Earth, After ✔️
description:
Some fates are worse than death--survival is one of them. 

In the two hundred years since humanity left the Earth's surface to live in the sky, life on the ground faded to a myth, a tragic memory from which they severed themselves to survive. They floated above continents turned to sand and lands swallowed by the seas, watched storm after storm rage against their cities and their monuments until they broke apart the last vestiges of civilization in penance for generations of human greed. 

As a lightning harvester charged with flying her ship into these storms for energy, Raina has seen more of the planet than most. She has spent her entire life soaring above its craters and scars, studying the gaping wounds of human devastation, as she honed her skills and became the youngest captain in storm-chaser history. 

Her ship has flown for generations. Her skills are unparalleled. 

But none of that matters the day they go down.

~

Praise for Earth, After: 

"I'm so not ready for this ending. I will reread this for sure. It's honestly my favourite work on wattpad ever, and among my best reads in general, it's insane. I love your creativity!"

"Sometimes tearing my eyes away from the page is torture. Gosh...!!!!"

"This is literally a movie - the images are so clear!"

"oh my god... it has been such a long adventure [...] Youve dried up your surviving characters until the very last drop before giving the end, and my, Im speechless. Out of this world."

~

title: Royal Academy Diaries I
description:
Students come from around the world to attend four specialized and prestigious schools - The Kings' Alliance Royal Academies. They are the future of royalty, defense, magic, and the arts. 
 
But everything is not as it seems. Rumours circulate about everything from vampires, forbidden love, and even ancient magic hidden within the castles. 
 
 
Read twenty-two unique and exciting mini-stories featuring a diverse cast! 
 

In this book:
Sririta, the orphan princess. 
Darius, the rebel with a heart of gold. 
Gia, the musician with a broken heart. 
Ivan, the prince who's not what they think. 
Avantika, the aspiring sorceress. 
Eirik, the prince determined to conquer. 
Svetlana, the plain ballerina.  
Marc, the resident prince charming. 
Raelynn, the knight proving her metal. 
Baltasar, the heroic enchanter. 
BONUS mini story: Dren, the charming criminal.




 
{Please note that while this story is loosely based around the 1930's, it is in a world and time of its own and will not really be historically accurate.}

title: WHEN YOU HEAL
description:
[AMBYS 2023 Top picks in humor novellas ✨️]

Lee Cook is heartbroken; his wife left him for another woman after twelve years of marriage. He vows to never fall in love again until his dying day.

Sana Gulati is befuddled; her boyfriend left her for a woman ten years younger than her. She vows nothing; she's just pissed and consoling herself with anything sweet and comestible.

He lives in London, she in Paris. 

They've met once; one walked out after drenching the other's face with beer. Since the two only see each other virtually on the Zoom meetings, their company loves to schedule every two days.

When Sana replies to Lee's offensive PM, an odd stalking game begins between the two. Before they know it, they connect. 

Here's a simple story of Woman meets Man where Wifi is key, and where some vows are hard to keep.

@ContemporaryLit Fall Awards 2021 longlister.

title: Show Them What You Can't Tell Them
description:
Alexis has a life-altering dream and desperately wants to talk to mom about it, but that's not going to be an easy task. Alexis' mom is not the easiest person to talk to nor does Alexis even think mom would understand anyways. One day, encouraged by someone in an internet chat room, Alexis sees an opportunity and decide that the time is now, it has to be done, but when words wont do, what is Alexis to do? . . . Show her what you can't say.......

title: The Ghost of Ontario
description:
|PART 1 · 10TH GRADE DRAFT · 3X FEATURED| 

|NEW DRAFT WAS CONSIDERED FOR THE WATTPAD ORIGINALS PROGRAM IN 2024! I DECLINED BECAUSE OF THE VENTRICLES.|

Fifteen-year-old Kylie Juniper is not excited about attending a week-long canoe trip with her family in the depths of the Lady Evelyn-Smoothwater Provincial Park. After she learns the legend of the Ghost of Ontario, she meets a First Nations boy who is just as mysterious as the ten-year-old ghost.

                                                                                                   ***

Ten years ago, a little boy went missing in the Lady Evelyn-Smoothwater Provincial Park. Legend has it that he died and became the Ghost of Ontario. When fifteen-year-old Kylie learns of it, she vows to uncover the mystery, but things become extra interesting when she and her family meet an amnesic hermit, Ihaan, in the park. 

Ihaan has no memories of his past. All he remembers is his life with Canada's wild animals. However, it changes when he meets Kylie. Suddenly, he is desperate to find his lost memories, so he joins Kylie and her family on their canoe trip, much to Kylie's mother's displeasure.

As the trip progresses, Kylie and her family learn new secrets about Ihaan and try to help him get home. Ihaan, though, is eager to stay in the provincial park after living alone there for a long time. When mysterious happenings begin, such as "Lucilla" and voices in the forest, Kylie starts to wonder... Is Ihaan the Ghost of Ontario himself?

                                                                                                    ***

Note: Ihaan is pronounced "Ian".
(IMPORTANT! Just FYI, this is very poorly written. I wrote it in 10th grade but needed somewhere to store it.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Writing is a process, and that's why it's just as powerful as a star gone supernova."

*Published through SC!*
*Proud Wattpad Creator!*
*Former Wattpad Outreach Ambassador!*
*Judge and Reviewer!*
*151X Featured writer!*
*Ambys 2022/2023 winner!*
*Grand Winner of the 2023 Nano Watt Awards!*
*ONC 2024 Longlister/Ambassadors' Pick!*
*I prefer original over cliché and shorter chapters.*
*My stories are screenplay-like, plot and character-driven, and different.*

Hello, everybody! My name is Viktoria Fyodorova, and I'm so happy to know that there is a website like Wattpad where I can share some of my favorite writing pieces! Ever since 4th grade, I've loved to write. Writing is the "Hakuna Matata" of my life. I forget all my worries when I write because I get so lost in my worlds and worlds from movies, books, and TV shows I love.

My favorite genre to write is Fantasy, but I also like Fanfiction and the occasional Science Fiction.

After fourteen years and eight drafts, I was officially published through South Carolina on October 8th, 2024. Currently, I'm writing a Coming-of-Age Fantasy, Claxton, about two fairies who embark on an epic quest to stop the heinous Octopus Man! It's been my passion project for 10+ years.

I tragically lost my older brother in 2021, which left me with PTSD, but it also inspired my Scarlet and Violet fanfic, Infrared. For the longest time after he died, I thought I would never return to writing, but I did as a coping method for dealing with grief.

I'm a 2022 Ambys Awards winner with my short story, Messummer, and a 2023 Ambys Award/Nano Watt Grand Winner with Infrared! I'm also a judge and reviewer because I love to help authors improve their craft. I never judge somebody based on their writing style because we all have our own.

My favorite fandoms are Pokémon, Star Wars, HTTYD, and Harry Potter.

I hope you enjoy the stories and fanfics I post on Wattpad. If you can, please give me tips on how to improve my writing.

title: Dancing With The Masquerade
description:
Twenty-six-year-old Kasiemobi Ejindu knows something sinister has been moving on with her for as long as she could recall even though she's oblivious of its true threats but a shocking revelation regarding her ancestral background and her sudden encounter with a young Hispanic-American pastor might just be her first true direction to finding salvation and love.

* * *

It's Christmas holiday, a time of joy, relaxation, thanksgiving and being with family but not for Kasiemobi, well, at least not this year.

Twenty-six-year-old Kasiemobi Ejindu is conscious of the fact that something sinister has entwined with her life for as long as she could recall, and even though she is oblivious of the true threat it poses, she has learned to live with it. That is until a week before Christmas when her fiancée abruptly breaks off their engagement and she eventually travels to her hometown alone on major account of her young cousin's wedding. There, she meets Cergio Suarez, a young Hispanic-American pastor whose company she eventually grows fond of but their relationship-and ultimately her life is threatened by forces beyond her control and if she doesn't give into its demand, she stands a chance of losing her entire family and what they stand for.

2021 ©️

title: After the Fall
description:
Connor and Vince fight their forbidden attraction as they attempt to rescue themselves and fellow residents of the underground Refuge facility from a toxic breach.

                                                                           *****
Connor Nichols spends his days alongside several young cadets training to become a future peacekeeper of the underground Refuge facility, but his nights are spent dreaming of his forbidden romantic past with best friend Vince Moore.

Risking his quality reputation among Dr. Randolph and the leaders, he pursues a secret relationship with Vince until a sudden toxic breach threatens to poison the occupants of the facility and places Vince in immediate danger. 

To give him and Vince a fighting chance at a solid future together, Connor puts his life and love on the line to expose the truth about the toxins, the leaders, and the history of the Refuge.

                                                                           *****

CONTENT WARNING: Contains some language, mild violence & mild sexual references.

title: Letting Go [complete - expanding chapters during rewrite]
description:
My name is Chloe.  I live in a world where your land of heritage determines what kind of Wereanimal you'll be, and a mate can be anyone of them.  The children of two different animals may be able to change into both, a huge advantage.  There are also purists who think that a blood line of only one kind of animal will have stronger children, but ignoring your mate can have mental health consequences.  
	I dream of having my own family someday, but I'm rejected.  When the opportunity comes to marry my mate's twin brother I grab on with both hands in spite of not knowing anything about him.  How bad can it be?


Chapters are short because I posted everyday, and each chapter represents a days work.

A/N in the first draft the numbers in the chapter headings were spelled out.  During the expansion the chapter numbers will be digits.  That way you should be able to see how far I've come.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: "Writing a book is an adventure to begin with, it is a toy and an amusement; then it becomes a master, and then a tyrant.  The last phase is that just as you are about to be reconciled to your servitude, you kill the monster and fling him out into public." - Winston Churchill

title: My Summer Love Story | ✔️
description:
Reeya Advani cannot wait to go on a two week vacation to Costa Rica to not only escape the atrocious and stressful life of living in New York City, but also to forget about her ex-boyfriend, who cheated on her with her own roommate in front of her own eyes. It's pretty safe to say that the poor girl deserves a break, considering the fact that she also got fired from her job on the same day.

But when she reaches there, Reeya does not expect to run into the cocky and enigmatic man known as Akash Tailor, the same man she supposedly spilled a drink on and got into a heated argument with couple of weeks ago. 

In other words, the next two weeks for her are going to be absolutely interesting.

~

WARNING: This story contains language, alcoholic abuse/violence, sexual scenes, and adult partying.

title: Hunting Sunsets
description:
"When your brother finds out what I do to you behind his back we're dead."

"Then maybe I should stay on my knees so he doesn't notice."

***

Everyone wants to see the sunset. It's something so beautiful and enthralling; so close but so far. I've been running after my sunset like my life depended on it. He's in my bed but not my heart, and I don't think he will ever be. If he was, we would both pay an unimaginably penalty. 

Then again, don't the best things come from under dangerous circumstances, waiting for the hatchet to drop?

So I'll keep hunting, but some prizes are never meant to be captured.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Authors are just people who like to have conversations with themselves.

title: Hunter
description:
Sequel to Hunted
............
Alexander Black, or at least that's what the tombstone said, woke up in a coffin and dug himself out of his grave. He has no idea who he is or how he died and he doesn't wish to know. A voice in his head tries to convince him that he isn't human. That he has to go out and find what it calls his 'mate' but he doesn't want to. It's been two years and he's started a new life in Rosemore, Minnesota. He has a job, a new name, a family of sorts, a house and has started to contemplate giving his housemate Yua a chance even though part of him doesn't want to. That is until a man comes into the diner claiming to know him. Alistair Black looks exactly like Xander, so he doesn't question it when he says he's his father and decides to go with him. 

An attack on Alistair's home leads to him being kidnapped by a girl on literal fire and her five annoying friends. Xerxes knows who they are and ruins every attempt Xander makes to escape. Everything they tell him contradicts everything his father did. He doesn't want to admit they may be right. Because then he'd have to admit that maybe in this story he's the villain.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: For My Next Trick... ✔
description:
At twenty-four, Mason Chamberlain had it all. When scandal leaves him with a broken heart, not much could make him believe in love again...until the new governess for his eight-year-old sister arrives.

He's drawn to her. Despite Mason's good lucks and coveted status, he can't break through her chilly facade. She wants nothing to do with a duke's son. It slowly becomes clear to him that she's running from her past.

Her secret puts his family in jeopardy, but is this love worth the risk?

title: Bane of the Wolves
description:
Humans live tedious lives under the thumb of the Wolves, and their King, subjected to their rules and regulations. If one was to break their laws, there were consequences.

Nineteen-year-old Lenora Grosvernor knew all about their consequences. It left her fatherless and her mother a widow. 

It caused hatred to fester, and it ran deep. 

When Lenora fights back after being seized for a curfew violation, it lands her in front of the Wolf King, who sentences her to thirty-five days as a servant in his castle to learn respect and obedience. Little did she know schemes would consume her days as she joins a plot to end the wolves reign - even if it meant embracing her identity as the wolf prince's mate.

When push comes to shove, Sutton enlists the assistance of a certain CEO, by the name of Keegan Beauguard to help make Silas jealous. And in exchange, she'll help him gain his company back from his manipulative father. 

The plan seems to work perfectly. 
 
But when business and pleasure starts to mix in delicious ways, all you're bound to get is heartbreak, ruined plans, and a mess of dirty sheets.

title: Colors of Us
description:
After months of therapy, Garrett Delko is still struggling to cope with his brother's suicide. The only time he finds peace is on the pitching mound and with a mysterious girl he's been obsessed with since the first week of college. One night, he sees her jumping off a bridge and it leads to an unexpected connection neither can deny. Garrett resolves to stay away, but as their paths intersect, he wonders if she's the answer he's looking for. 

Arianne Zhang is no one's magic remedy. She has her own troubles and doesn't need an adorable baseball player messing up her hard-earned anonymity. However, as they confide in each other, she begins falling for him. Then Arianne's secrets are exposed, and both must face tough choices. Can they find the strength to let go of their insecurities to help each other? Or will the colors of their past blind them to the truth?

It's difficult to save someone who doesn't want saving, particularly when they're lying to you.
...

Claudia and Jake Cairns have lost their mother, their home, and their innocence. 

After surviving a catastrophic bushfire in rural Australia, the 16-year-old twins relocate to Sydney. Forced to move on, Claudia accepts her new life, embracing therapy, school and her new friends. But Jake is less willing to forget.   

As information about the fire emerges, ghosts from their past reappear, and Jake grows increasingly self-destructive, Claudia realises she only knows half-truths about what actually happened the day smoke rose over the trees and their world caught alight.

title: Storm {BWWM}✔️
description:
-------Winter 2017------

Cover by Ellipticall***
  
  Evelyn Williams just wants to be a lawyer. She doesn't know what "kind" yet - but she will be a lawyer. She has the brains and the grades to do so. The girl made all A's - with the exception of that one B, damn professor Waller for that - The girl is truly talented. She can also juggle between choosing a filter for her Instagram post while drawing conclusions for a scenario presented in her sociology class. She seems to have it all, but this "total package" comes with a heavy toll - more like a sharp tongue. Yeah, she has one of those and wastes no time using it.
  
  George Mills, also known as "Flynn" - a nickname given to him in high school because of a terrible prank gone haywire - just wants to be a scientist. He is just no good in science. He also has the competence to make soaring grades while still managing to keep up with Lebron "King James" James, basketball stats. Some say he is talented. Even when he has changed his major "fifty fucking times because I just can't get shit right." He seems to have it all - no, really he is a great kid. With this "total package" comes a heavy toll - more like an endless buffet of annoying verbal comebacks. Yeah, he is one of those and wastes no time letting everyone know.
  
  One thing brings them together and one thing tears them apart. The storm that happens in between may not be the hardest to solve, after all, what would be a storm without lightening and thunder?
  
  These two are more alike than they may believe and "Storm" will help us find out just how alike they truly are. 
  
  ------
  
  Welcome to the "Storm" series.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Who Is Marilyn Edmond?

She is a U.S. Army Veteran. Currently in Physical Therapist Assistant school. Personality wise, she considers herself pretty down to earth- always offering a bright smile. She also absolutely loves and adores  Michael Jackson! (May he rest in peace).
               
Mission Statement:

My mission on Wattpad is to read and write. I want to expound my interest and feed my curiosity through pages of others works and through my own writing.

                     Extra Information

I am currently working on the trilogy of my Jesse and Michael series: Inhaling Alongside You. The series started as a nice book cover and ended up as a nice book in a matter of three weeks! title: My Virtual Darcy 🏆 2021 Wattys Shortlister
description:
What would you give up to dive into your favourite story?

Romantic, sharp-tongued, with a tendency to fall in love with tall, dark-haired, brooding men--Leah is the archetype of the "Pride and Prejudice" fan. TV series, movies, comics, musicals: she has seen and read them all.

For her birthday, Leah's friends and family pool together to get her the ultimate Janeite gift: the Bridge, a virtual-reality gaming device.
By granting access to her five senses, she can live her favourite novel as the iconic Elizabeth Bennet!

As she explores Regency England and quarrels with the infamous Darcy, Leah cannot help but digress from the original plot to suit her modern-woman convictions.
The longer she plays, the weirder her beloved characters act, until the lines between fiction and reality blur.

⚠️ Content and/or trigger warning ⚠️

This story contains one scene of (unsuccessful) sexual coercion, and mentions domestic violence and death by domestic violence, which may be triggering for some readers.

title: See You in San Francisco
description:
After her best friend is found dead in a motel room with no clear answers, Sofia Wineheart is determined to uncover the truth--even if it shatters everything she thought she knew.
 
                                                                  	*****
 
It's a quiet October morning in Palo Alto, California, when the news break out--June Beaumont was found dead in a motel room, and no one knows what happened, not even her family. Sofia Wineheart, confused and devastated, takes it upon herself to pick up everyone's pieces--her friends', June's brother Meridian, but not hers--and figure out exactly what happened that night for the sake of closure. 

The little leads she finds all connect to one place: San Francisco. There's no telling what it will bring, or if it will bring up any answers, let alone those she's hoping she'll get.

[wattpad editor's choice]

title: How to Escape an Assassin
description:
When Tristan Fabiano, an antisocial, cold-blooded government assassin, takes a particular interest in his brother Felix's target, he will stop at nothing to protect her from his brother and their agency.

Tristan Fabiano is known as "Ghost" in the assassin world. A merciless killer, he is emotionless and detached from everything to the point that he moves like a ghost. But Milan Lee, a naïve, kind-hearted 22-year-old preschool teacher wakes a dormant part in the depths of his core. 

But old habits sure die hard, don't they? Tristan is unpredictable and distant; cold and heartless as he plays on the strings of Milan's heart.

*A slowburn action love-hate romantic drama*

title: Casters (Book One: Star Caster)
description:
Emery Ellison thinks she has the world all figured out. According to her magic users are enemy number one. They are a superior class of people who use their powers to manipulate things in their favor. After getting into a fight with a magic-user Emery finds herself in hot water as she has been chosen to become a magic-user herself. Now she will have to get along with magic users and learn the ways of the star caster.

authorBio:
Follow me on Twitter: @AndrM

Some stuff about me:
Preferred pronouns: (She/her)
I love writing! My specialty is young adult lesbian romance stories mostly because I feel like heterosexual romance is overdone and boring at this point. 
I also love to write magic, vampire, paranormal, supernatural, and dystopian-type things too! All of my works include LGBTQIA and POC REP. All my books are told from a female perspective. Most of my work falls into the Young Adult category.
My current passion project is the Caster's series, I am working very hard to rewrite and perfect the book so I can either get it published or publish it myself.

For any thoughts, comments, questions, or concerns feel free to message me. I try to reply quickly and love hearing feedback from you guys.

PSA for those who used to follow my old Wattpad account:
Yes, my old Wattpad account got deleted for violations they never made known to me. All my attempts to recover that account were ignored and I could not get in contact with an actual real person. The apparent violation is that one of my works (I don't know which one) was too explicit. Which I think is really stupid since I've seen way worse. Regardless, I am going to be leaving all of my more "explicit" stories over on my tapas account. The stories I will post here will be rewritten and more pg13.

You can go to my tapas account to see all my works unedited and pick up where you left off on stories that I haven't been able to add here yet.
https://tapas.io/MCAndr

title: True Affair
description:
"You and I can get in a lot of trouble girl"

Isabelle Shae is a decorated lawyer with all the academic requirements to be the head of her current law firm. Due to the fact that she is a woman, and a highly skilled one at that, men of higher power haven't given her the chance to prove her self with high-class cases, simply because they are intimidated. Determined to prove that she is more than capable, Isabelle fights for the newest murder case. When her husband snags her desired case, leaving her to a case involving a popular artist, she is furious. 

Unaffected by his fame and irritated by his presence, Isabelle struggles to get the case over and done with. Attracted to her dignity, intelligence and confidence, Michael playfully flirts with his lawyer. When Isabelle starts to know the man behind the fame, will his words start together have an affect on her?

This story is not only about an intelligent married woman, struggling to earn respect and a man too famous for his own good, falling into an unpredictable affair. This story is also about Michael and Isabelles painful discovery of truth about the people they surround themselves with. How 'truthful' can an affair be? That's up to you to decide.

--

Thank you @softly90s for helping with the photo for the cover. I love you, girl.

authorBio:
Hello, my name is; Mimi, Myra, Moomoo, Darling Mimi, Bambi. What ever floats your boat, really.. Just don't call me Grand central station.

1/3 Oreo Triplets ❤️ So thankful for my girls.

Songs you should check out: Young Boy Blues by Ben. E. King, Sentimental Reasons Nat King Cole, If You're Not Back In Love By Monday by Millie Jackson, Slip Away by Clarence Carter, Damn U by Prince, Darling Nikki by Prince, Can't Let Her Get Away By Michael Jackson

I'm a singer who's inspired by legends ❤️

I enjoy making unique stories with diversity and inclusion!!

I have a whole lot of book ideas, mj fanfictions and other genres. I can't use them because I already have a lot of books on the go. If you want a book idea, PM me and I'll gladly give you some (I really need to rid my brain of all these ideas).

I love you all, moonwalker or not, feel free to chat with me. I have made the greatest friends on here and I'm more than open to make some more!

title: The Porn Identity
description:
There's something odd about Evie's latest case. Ashley Pham has been hacked by an anonymous blackmailer who's threatening to leak her nudes if she doesn't pay up. She goes to Evie Harper, café owner and part time private investigator, in hopes of catching the creep before he can make good on his promise. As Evie digs deeper into the case, she discovers the blackmailer is not only more prolific than expected, but also closer than imagined.

        When he's discovered dead the police set their sights on Ashley. After all, she was the last person he threatened. But Evie has a hard time believing the timid woman could stand up for herself let alone pull a trigger. Not when there's three other suspects who had the motive and opportunity to pop the pervy extortionist themselves. All Evie knows is whoever it was won't stop at one murder to keep their dirty little secret. And what's done in darkness, will come to light by the time she's done with them.

title: Beinteha
description:
In the opulent world of modern-day Pakistan, Layla Malik, once the wild heiress to a political dynasty, has transformed herself into a formidable force of ambition and revenge. Her heart scarred by betrayal, she stands at the helm of her family's empire, determined to consolidate power and make her enemies pay.

Enter Azaan, the charismatic lawyer, the youngest scion of the influential Mughal family, who becomes enamored with Layla's guarded heart. As passion ignites, Layla's icy walls begin to crumble. But love is a dangerous game, and Layla is not ready to give in to its call.

Meanwhile, the return of Layla's estranged cousin, Zaroon, sets the stage for a gripping power struggle. With secrets, scandals, and dark ambitions swirling, Layla must navigate treacherous waters to protect her legacy, even if it means keeping dangerous secrets.

As love and ambition entwine, and the line between right and wrong blurs, Layla, Azaan, and Zaroon are set on a collision course. Will Layla dare to give love a second chance, or will her thirst for power and revenge consume her?

Will Layla's heart thaw, or will ambition be her ultimate downfall?

❝ "the stars, the moon, the sun, they don't change. why is it that we do?" 

    "do the stars, the moon, the sun, live in us?" 

    "no, they don't." 

    "however, there are some people who they choose to live in. because they're just too miraculous. and it's those people who don't change."

     "do you know of any such people?" 

     "didn't know until now. but i found one. and i'm willing to be her dark sky." ❞ 

.
.
.

Afra Aazeen wishes to get her name enrolled in the Scientific Technology Valley, Dhahran which happens to be one of the leading aeronautical universities of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. 
Her dreams require more than just her abilities to stand up against the society's barren and narrow minds. It gets even more challenging when her parents are Christians and she is a revert, trying to hold onto her new faith while adjusting her lifestyle according to the new principles.
Just like any hurdle that pops up without a prior warning, her life takes a twist for the worst. Leaving her hanging at a cliff with obstacles worser than death itself.

title: Red Skies | The Prime Archives #1 ✓
description:
When 6 students are gifted superhuman abilities, it's up to them to prevent a bio-terrorist group from releasing a world-changing chemical into Earth's atmosphere. 

                                                                      *****
 
While attending a party in the woods, six highschoolers are captured by international terrorist group Kismet. Kane, the leader of Kismet, reveals them all to be potential Primes (someone with superhuman abilities). In an attempt to escape, they are rescued by Atlas - a private military company - but in the process are exposed to the element Primonium which officially gives them their superhuman abilities.

The six are taken to Atlas' headquarters where they learn of Kismet's plans to release Primonium into the planet's atmosphere, ending human life as we know it. In an effort to stop them, the six work alongside Atlas to try and stop them. Will they be able to utilize their newfound powers to save the world, or will they remain at the mercy of Kismet forever?

[BOOK ONE IN THE PRIME ARCHIVES TRILOGY]

title: The Queen of Elysium
description:
Book 2 (Complete) - A game of Queen's conquest is set to be played across Elysium and in the four corners stand Elissa's suitors:
-    The High King - he insists that they are a perfect match, but will she agree?
-    The Dark King - bound by blood, but will she surrender to the dark elf within?  
-    Prince Aren - her first true love, but can he be the man she needs?
-    Lord Kai - she kindled a fire within him, but do they have a future together?

Who will win the heart of the Queen?

However, Elissa has more than love and betrayal to contend with. The mantle of power and the legacy of the Light of Elysium weigh heavy upon her shoulders. Meanwhile, shadows are stirring in the east and the gods are meddling.

...................

Cover by me

PG13 - some scenes may be disturbing, although not graphic.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I have always been a dreamer. I guess a prerequisite given that my parents named me after the goddess of illusion!

As a child I tried out several wardrobes looking for Narnia, but no luck. Now I escape into another world through books. My favourites are fantasy and paranormal romance.

I'm working on a High Fantasy series set in a magical kingdom of Elysium:

- The Light of Elysium - complete - highest ranking 16 in Fantasy; 4 in Adventure; 5 in Romance and 1 in High Fantasy

- The Queen of Elysium - complete - highest rank 45 in Fantasy, 5 in High Fantasy

- Heirs of Elysium - in progress- Sunday updates

Music is a big part of my life, so each chapter has a music video.

I am happily married - hubby is a businessman by day, musician by night. We have 2 amazing children & 4 cats.

title: Magika [Completed]
description:
[Watty's 2017 Shortlisted]

Every cape needs a magician, and every magician a cape. That's what Aldeheid was told. A cape killer, an exiled Prince. That's what Aldeheid had become.

After being banished from his home at the Etheria Bastion, Aldeheid finds himself homeless and hopeless. But a chance encounter with the mysterious Kitaya the Unwanted gives him the opportunity to set himself on a better path.

However, determination alone isn't enough to prepare for the danger ahead, and a looming doom that threatens to change the very fabric of earth.

As he and Kitaya fight their way through the realms, Aldeheid will find himself caught between a past the keeps haunting him, and an uncertain future. For earth was meant to be his new home. His new beginning.

But earth is on the brink of destruction.

***

Awesome cover was made Zuko @Ideologically
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Dark-skinned black women are underrepresented in literature. I'm here to rectify that.

Call me Tempest. I am unapologetically black, an islander, a lover of video games, music and sleep. I began my writing journey on the 16th of December 2015. I've been Wattpading since 2014 but didn't have the courage to upload anything until 2017. I'd like to call myself an author, but I don't believe I'm quite there yet.

I am a lover of Fantasy, but I plan to venture into Paranormal and Sci-Fi in the near future. Feel free to browse my selection of stories. Or not, it's your life.

No Solicitors.

Interesting factoids about me:
- when I was 12, I wanted a prosthetic leg
- I studied constitutional law for four years, but I'm not a lawyer
- I studied Marine Science for three years but I'm not a Marine Scientist
- I used to work in a morgue
- I grew up on a farm

title: The imperfection we called our love | ✔
description:
And when I had informed Finn of my obvious concerns, -
He had pulled me up against him so close that I could feel his breath on my cheek, - and whispered in my ear ; "Baby no one's going to catch us. - " 
And for those few seconds I seemed to have bought every word. 


Emily Harrison, has started a new chapter in her life not too long ago; High School. And high school is the type of place where it either breeds change into you or those around you. So far it hasn't been her

Torn between doing the right things and wanting the wrong means, witnessing her parents marriage crumbling right before her,  her best friend of  years now deciding she cares more about climbing  up the social ladder than her friendship With Emily, and a sudden interest in a boy named Finn who is rougher than the streets and a flirt in a heartbeat. - Everything seems to be happening so fast, and all that Emily can do, is hold on.

But with everything else crashing down around her
she finds herself needing Finn more than she cares to believe

Finn is exactly the type of guy she'd try and stay far away from:
The type that's no good for you, with a charm that's too good to be true. Haunted by his past and the choices he has made, it might be too late for him entirely, - that is until he meets Emily

Finn and Emily are exactly what the other needs 

But in the end, even love sometimes can't fix all.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Last Daughter of Elysia
description:
BOOK ONE IN THE ELYSIAN TRILOGY

A stolen grimoire. 
A court of lies and secrets.
A dangerous game of betrayal. 

Seventeen-year-old Morgana lives in Golah Court, one of the two fae courts in the magical and dangerous land of Elysia. Adopted by Golah Court's fae king when her parents died in a mysterious cottage fire, Morgana is human in a world where the fae rule and the land's magic is deadly to her kind. To survive Morgana must take a special elixir all whilst navigating court life, dangerous fae, and the mysterious Prince Caliath from Aeperos Court. 
But on her eighteenth birthday the elixir starts to fail, endangering Morgana's life.
In a race to escape death, Morgana unearths secrets about her heritage and a betrayal so shocking that it has her questioning those she loves and all that she stands for.

title: Ascension of the Hunters | 18+ ✔
description:
[COMPLETED]✔ 

The Blood Magic Series |Book 3|

2017 Fiction Award Winner for Best Series. 

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

Orion has silently sat in the shadows, watching the centuries go by as he built an underground society that has kept hunters safe. The hunters had to relinquish their freedom above ground in order to keep them safe, that is why many did not follow him. Their deaths were imminent.

Left to die in 1865 at the hands of Enos and Locaine, Orion was the first hybrid born of two hunters, solidifying the fact that their race could go on without the purebloods.

After discovering that his ranger, Enock, had his plans foiled in killing a pureblood with blood magic, Orion learns that her name is Evicka and she is the daughter of Locaine. He wonders how she possesses the trait of hunters.

He believes hunters and vampires can coexist, only once every last pureblood has been eliminated. Orion's goal; to speak with Evicka and learn everything he can about her. If they cannot come to terms, he has no problem killing the daughter of his enemy.

Can the hunters and vampires coexist? Or will Orion raise the hunters from underground, taking back the Earth for the humans and killing Locaine for leaving him to die?

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

title: Silent Voice
description:
Unable to speak, autistic Claire fears she will never be hired. Then an autism organization offers her a chance to realize her dream: to publish her writing and share her voice with the world.
  
 It's a dream come true, right? But Claire's father can't shake the feeling that something is off, and 17-year-old Claire must figure out what this opportunity truly means.

Winner of the "Dream Job" contest on Episode Interactive

authorBio:
I'm Luna (she/her), the writer of Silent Voice and Thousand Dollar Friend.

I'm not super active here due to work and being an auntie.

I'm autistic and I study autism a lot. I also really enjoy illustrating my work! (All art is by me unless specified otherwise.) Writing fiction has always been a dream of mine, so feel free to poke around and enjoy what I've placed here.

My stories are inclusive for people with disabilities, LGBTQIAPN+ people, people of all religions, people of color, and others. Combative or intolerant behavior will get a warning (if your intent is unclear to me) or an instant block.

title: Unlikely🌻
description:
Meet Taliha, a renowned introverted bookworm with a haunting past and a secret alter ego as an up-and-coming Islamic writer. Her peculiar and unconventional reactions to life's twists and turns have left her questioning her very existence, as the world seems like a treacherous place for her.

Will she ever summon the courage to stand up for herself and find acceptance in society's embrace?

Little does she know, there is more to her than meets the eye, a hidden depth waiting to be discovered.

Enter Arif Soydan, a fearless and brilliant individual who crosses paths with Taliha at their university. Their initial encounter sparks a fierce rivalry, fueled by Taliha's ascent to the top of the class.

But now, Arif seeks to forge an unexpected friendship with Taliha, driven by motives unknown.

Can he achieve his objective without succumbing to the allure of his rival? And how will Arif react when he uncovers the truth that his nerdy crush next door is actually his academic adversary?

Will he embrace her for who she truly is?

Embark on a heartwarming journey as we delve into the captivating tale of Taliha and Arif, where friendship and love intertwine amidst the walls of academia and the secrets of the heart.


Copyright © 2022

title: The Billionaire and His Intern (A Christian Romance)
description:
Arielle Burnes, worked all her life to get to where she was now. Four years in college with more extracurricular activities than classes on her report sheet made all of this possible. She was now an intern at the large AMI building that she would watch longingly as she walked to and fro from her NYC dorm to the park that was nearby. She would work their soon, she promised herself.


Alexander Marquee is a 30 year old, self made billionaire. He did not always have it easy. Blood, sweat, and tears, got him to the top and he would not allow any of his rivals to take him down without a fight. A fight that he always won. He just needed to stay focused. As focused as he could, regardless of the new distraction in his office who went by the name Arielle Burnes.

title: After Goodbye
description:
[September Editor's pick- 2021]

After taking a nannying job, Grayson never expected to fall for Rosie, the lawyer who employed him. But she's not looking for love, and he's scared to love again. Can they let go of the goodbyes that have hurt them in the past in order to embrace a future together? 

****

Grayson had a good life. He was happily married, loved his job as a nurse and maintained great ties with his family. What he didn't expect is that three years later that life would be shattered, with nothing motivating him to wake up in the mornings. 

Unemployed and on the brink of homelessness, Grayson's only options are to return to his mother's home, or find a job and maintain it. Grayson opts for the latter.

Rosie Bhatt had her life planned out. She worked hard, built her family and was entering her thirties, excited to see what the future had in store. But soon the struggle of being a single-parent becomes too much as she juggles the life she wants and the life she has. With limited time on her hands, she chooses to employ Grayson as a nanny for her six-year daughter Anni. What she doesn't expect is the realization that someone else understands her pain. 

With both Grayson and Rosie suffering from the loss of goodbyes, tensions rise, and the importance of love, life and family is thrust upon them, challenging them to seek what really matters. 


Though Goodbyes were their beginning, can a new After become their future?

* Content warning - This story contains dark elements including discussions on alcoholism, mental health and bereavement*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside of you" - Maya Angelou

***

It was this quote by Maya Angelou that I resonated most with. We live in a world where a quick Google will tell you the answers, the perspective of others and the history we have not lived. But Google cannot fathom the stories we hold inside, and thus my own stories were born.

I'm an extrovert. A crazy chatterbox, whose job is to help people find their voices, and an avid coffee drinker. I'm a proud Brit with south Asian roots and watch just as many shows as I read books. Pineapple pizza is my favourite food, but you can usually find me on the couch, with a tub of ice cream and my tablet, raring to go.

About my  stories:
- Charlie and Dia - Wattys Winner 2020 (completed)
-After Goodbye - September 2020 Editor's Choice (completed)
- Licence to Choose - YA (completed)

Diversity and heritage are often weaved into my stories that can only be described as glimpses in time. They're slow burners that voice the thoughts and emotions of the protagonist, as they meet new characters, face hurdles that they may, or may not overcome, and readers are the witness to this. We grow with the characters as they make their journeys, choose their decisions and face adversities and propositions that the world wishes to offer. I can only hope you enjoy being present for the ride.

So that's a little bit of me,
Happy reading!
Aamenah x

title: Pulse
description:
-Editor's Choice! Dec 2019 -

17-year-old Lucille Monteith wants nothing else to find her brother, who, despite what everyone says, she refuses to believe is dead. She'll do anything to locate him, to bring him back home safe, though it begins to dawn on her that she's hopeless in her investigation.
  
  After a tragic accident, brothers Cian and Vincent Horne were torn from their normal lives. Vinny stuck as an earthbound spirit and Cian becoming an angel of death, the two roam the earth together, unafraid of death and its meaning. When Vinny discovers that Lucie can see him, however, it changes everyone in the trio's lives, and Lucie finds she may not be so hopeless after all.
  
  Embark on this journey as an angel, a ghost, and a teenage girl search for a loved one, battle their demons, and fight to keep pulses beating.

title: Hushed Confessions | ✔
description:
A witty Muslim, a hot cop, a hilarious band of friends, and a psycho killer. What could go wrong? 

* * *

Meet Sajdaa Taha. A sassy, hilarious, and intelligent seventeen year old Muslimah. Being a Muslim in a society where majority of the people see Muslims as terrorists has got to be hard. It gets worse when Sajdaa starts to receive letters and texts from a psychopathic killer terrorizing her town. 

When authorities refuse to believe her, Sajdaa is forced to track down the killer and put a stop to the madness or else the people she loves might be killed. It doesn't help that the cop she's working with is the extremely attractive Officer Malik, who seems to have taken a special interest in her.

Join Sajdaa and her friends on their hysterical journey to find a bloodthirsty killer who will stop at nothing to see them dead.

title: The True Born Huntress✔
description:
[COMPLETED]✔ 

The Blood Magic Series |Book 9|

2017 Fiction Award Winner for Best Series. 

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

It is said that a true born hunter is to be feared above all else, sparking the initial hate between the vampires and the hunter race through Erebus' first born son Gage. Their strong desire to protect the human race often causes their actions to speak louder than words, trying to take back control for those who can do nothing for themselves.

With the world teetering on the edge of complete chaos between the supernatural races, a pure blood vampire has always claimed dominance and rule of this world since Locaine took the world for the vampires years ago. With a different day and age, can what the vampires once feared be the balance that the world seeks?

Are the vampire hunters really meant to be the balance between those seeking to live in peace?

Once entitled as the supernatural police after the treaty between the hunters and the vampires was formed, could the balance be restored through them entirely?

What secrets lie within a true born hunter?

The world holds its breath, waiting to see what Maverick's heir Mavis will become.

Will she become like Gage?

Will she reach her full potential and set the balance back into place before the bloodshed consumes the world?

Or, perhaps another way to seek peace is in the most unlikely places with the most unlikely alliances.

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

title: Malpractice Makes Perfect
description:
When heiress Alexis Dupont asks part-time P.I Evie Harper to search her sisters room for an expensive missing heirloom it seems like an easy gig to give Evie a little pocket change and a look into the life of one of her business idols. Instead, Evie finds a family haunted by the death of their matriarch, whose sporadic ramblings point to murder. But why would someone risk killing a woman rapidly dying of disease? And can Evie prove there was a murder when her body is already dead and buried? With the go ahead from Alexis, Evie is determined to put to rest all doubts into Diana Dupont's odd death and give the family the closure it needs. But did the illness take her, or was there foul play? And most importantly, will she ever get paid?

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 4

title: Mirror Me
description:
[Mirror Me Series Book 1] 
Hope Martinez was taught to fear her reflection, but the magical world on the other side is too tempting. Descended from those who can use mirrors as weapons, Hope has many dangers to face if she wants to get home before an ancestral curse destroys everything she loves.
_________________________________________________

After a frightening incident leaves her family shaken, Hope Martinez promises her mother to never look at a mirror again. 

Three years later, Hope stands between two worlds - the world of her mother, a contrived and constricted set of rules ignoring their family's Hispanic heritage and abolishing all things reflective from the home, and the world of her abuelita, which is said to contain a mysterious power that members of the family are fated to discover. 

When high school bullying and peer pressure start pushing Hope's limits, she finds no other choice but to gain normalcy and break her mother's promise. She soon discovers a hidden magical world beyond her reflection, one filled with strange beasts, enchanted cities, and flying walnuts. Why would such a wonderful place be kept from her? The reason - Hope's family has a terrible destiny waiting to be unleashed. 

Young Adult ■ Fantasy ■ Sci-Fi

title: Rehash
description:
He is nothing but an urban legend. The ghost from a past which we would rather forget. 

But our ghosts don't forget about us. 

The singularity war between humans and renegade androids ended in 2049. Twenty-five years ago. Humans emerged victorious, but only with the help from loyal androids who did not turn their back on humanity... and as a 'reward' for their service, they were shut down. Deemed too dangerous to be part of society.

Camilo, a twenty-two-year-old college student, is a vocal protestor against the decision to terminate all androids after the war. Of course, this has nothing to do with his admiration of spectre model Z-3293, also known as 'Zed.' An android who saved the entire European continent from a bioweapon airstrike which would have wiped out all life. 

Nowadays, 'Zed' is seen as nothing more than trite pro-android propaganda. Nobody took Camilo seriously until one day he found model Z-3293, fully up and functioning, behind his apartment building.

title: Loving Damilola✔
description:
"Finding happiness within because that's where true joy lies."



Damilola Amarachi Oyelowo is an independent doctor forging a new life for herself in the city of Lagos, Nigeria. Behind her smiles is a troubled heart and she pours her heart, mind and soul into her career as a coping mechanism.

Unexpectedly, she meets billionaire CEO, Demola Davies, the son of her elderly patient, Mr Chidi Davies. He disrupts her plans to stay alone and mind her own business.

title: PAKISTANI FACE CLAIMS
description:
Hey loves! I compiled a series of face claims so y'all can stop using Sajal Aly and Ahad for literally everything. Cheers!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tell me, if you knew someone who made sure you ate whenever you were hungry so you'd never die of starvation, made sure you could cry and let out the hurt, when your eyes were heavy, literally destroyed whatever ailed you, kept you warm when you were cold, kept you cool when you were burning up, wouldn't you want to love them?

Then why don't you love your body?

Why won't you love your body?

//////////////////
I am me, and I change everyday. I grow and I learn. I make mistakes and I forgive myself. I have finally learned to love myself. I smile, and I laugh, and I even cry. That's me. I'm the girl I was, the girl I am, and the girl I will be. Isn't that great?

/////////////////

A friend, a sister, a daughter, a scientist, a writer, an avid reader, an army, a potterhead, a batfam and DC enthusiast, and hopefully a good person.

/////////////////

So if you've read this far done: congratulations. This is a special note I wrote for my reading list to the right. I am very particular with the books I add here and they are a blend of both incredibly adept writing skill as well as a heart touching themes and amazing creativity. They all have a special place in my heart and I'd love to share them with you.

title: Come Hell or High Water | mxm
description:
Recovering alcoholic Sam isn't quite ready to let go of his failing marriage. Gord gave up his dream to care for his dying father, and now he's trapped by an inheritance he doesn't want.

When Sam's new job sends him to Gord's remote farm in the heart of the Canadian prairies, it isn't long before the two find themselves leaning on each other in ways neither expected; but between flood and wildfire and the echoes of the past, love and happiness aren't always as simple as finding someone who might want to be your second chance.

title: Dear Intruder | (Completed)
description:
Could you fall in love with someone you never met, saw or spoke to? Sounds unlikely?  

                                      ***
Ella is an overworked college student whose only plan is to complete her degree swiftly & proficiently. Sounds simple enough- but when she comes across a personal diary that sparks her curiosity, it is suddenly proven a little more than a speed bump. 

Ella is intrigued, maybe even enamored.... But definitely in denial. 

Hooked by the writer's endearing charm, sharp wit & beautiful penmanship, she begins an anonymous correspondence and with every confession, every single quip and joke, he wins her heart little by little while she loses herself in those letters.

Even though she has a pile of college assignments demanding her time, Ella makes it her mission to search for the unknown writer. 

She defenestrates her logical plans & tortures herself by indulging in a nail-biting & probably a tad bit unhealthy mystery as she sets out on an expedition that would only come to an end when she finds the enigmatic scribbler. 

And that just might be the most terrifying project she has ever taken on.

(FULL SYNOPSIS INSIDE)
***************
Highest Ranks: #Prose, #Humor, #Letters,#Anonymous, #Poetic

Don't forget to leave a vote if you enjoyed it/them, and follow me if you would like to get notified every time I update or share some interesting news. Go ahead and read another one of my book that you haven't yet, that'd be much appreciated.

I try my best to edit and fix any mistakes I can find in my stories, but despite my best efforts some errors can slip past my eyes and the spell check, so... a little heads up, the stories might contain mistakes and if you find them you can notify me by mentioning them in the line comments, just don't be rude, please.

My characters are like real people, they are flawed, they are immature at times and unreasonable too, but I will not tolerate hate in the comment section towards the characters, authors or other readers. Constructive criticism is welcome, but leaving hurtful comments is not acceptable.

If you want to make book covers for me... I would be really grateful and excited and overwhelmed, so don't hesitate, you can send it on my email: vineewriter@gmail.com I'll try to use them as much as I can.

I started an Instagram Page, you can follow me https://www.instagram.com/ineffable_idiosyncrasies

Thank you so much for visiting my page. If you want to chat or need any help, or writing advice, just dm me!
Have a nice day or night or whatever time it is at your place.
Saranghaeyo!

title: The Art of Breathing Underwater
description:
𝐖𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐘 𝐖𝐈𝐍𝐍𝐄𝐑 𝐘𝐀 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟏  For bipolar fifteen-year-old Aaron, growing up in '90s Dublin, being gay is a choice. It is a choice between risking alienation from his conservative Catholic family and close-minded friends or drowning under the weight of his secrets. So discovering he is falling in love with his witty, bi-racial best friend, Robbie, an aspiring actor, plunges Aaron into a sea of confusion. Swimming against the tide of expectations, the young men set a course through sex, drugs and Bowie concerts, an outlet from a world that doesn't understand them.  

But weighted under the pressure of maintaining a double life, Aaron sinks into a deep depression. When a shocking incident puts his life in perspective, Aaron must decide whether staying silent and invisible is worth losing the only love he has ever known for.

title: Dishonoring Jack
description:
Wattys Awards Winner 2019 - Historical Fiction

Jacqueline "Jack" Harrison is perfectly content with her reputation as an eclectic spinster with a penchant for trouble. Between volunteering at the post office and working in the local munitions factory, Jack keeps herself busy supporting the war effort. But when Donovan, the mysterious Native American with a troubled past, shows up in her victory garden one afternoon, he piques Jack's curiosity. Donovan's arrival brings both thrilling excitement and harrowing danger as Jack has to choose whether she'll stand with Donovan against the ghosts of his past or return to the independence she no longer craves. 

Historical Fiction || Romance || Action || Interracial || New Adult

title: The Love Between US [BxBxB]
description:
Who ever said being married to two was easy? Especially with five little ones watching your every move.
Re-Enter the life of the famous Matthias, Thomas, & Luca Jackson as their lives drastically change with four toddlers running loose and the three men taking responsibility for them even when the public eyes doubts whether their trio is good for the babies. Constantly under fire, unable to escape the intense scrutiny small cracks start to form but one thing never changes.
The love between them all. 

The third and final novel in The Secret Between US series.

title: Witches Beware
description:
Jupiter Wallace knew who she was before she knew about boys and puberty.... how great her powers can be and how deadly they can become. However, she never understood her world. Years of being protected from the dark arts and supernatural side of life, Jupiter has fallen into the webs of friends and foes after the one person who protected her from such devious things dies by the same hands who is also trying to kill her and take over the city.

*Will be a mix of supernatural facts; such as containing to vampires, demons, and werewolves, etc. Some will be the same and most will have my own twist to it.*

**Will update every Saturday or Friday**

authorBio: My other account @Fantasy_differ

description:
"Nothing can intervene a heart that knows what it wants." -quote from the book.

Johannesburg, South Africa, 1976 during the darkest period in South African history. Where Race determines your lifestyle : black maids, caretakers and handymen are ill-paid to raise white children and tend to white houses, but from which their services are no longer needed after dark. 
      
eighteen-year-old Nolwazi Ndlovu, born in the township, Soweto, finds herself working in the city of gold (Johannesburg) to provide for her family. Just when she thought working for Mr and Mrs Muller had its own  challenges, the sudden arrival of their son, Henri, makes for a rollercoaster of emotions and experiences. 
      
 As Henri and Nolwazi fall deeply inlove, they soon begin to realize that following your heart has its own consequences. And when a Tragic uprising erupts in Nolwazi's hometown, their relationship is truly put to the test of time and loss.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey man, if you like what I write, that's really sweet and if you don't? That's sweet, too.

I'm a little too obsessed with action and crime stories with sexy bad guys that make being bad look so good! *think Thomas Shelby of the peaky blinders ;)

But I also have an obsession with historical romance stories. take me to a time where the world was different, less advanced but filled with adventure, passion and good fortune. *Think Outlander

at this moment, those are the only stories I'm willing to write about. BUT...I hope to write an anime fan fiction in the near future. but for now, Enjoy my 2 bodies of work

title: A Crook In The Sand
description:
"YOU FOOLISH GIRL, NOT EVEN YOUR STORIES CAN SAVE YOUR BEAUTIFUL THROAT."



Khai killed 1000 girls before he got to her. And he would make sure she would die like the others. His beautiful hands demand blood on them.

Mazeeda would make sure that she'll be the last girl Khai would ever kill. Her beautiful neck will not be touched by a blood-coated blade. She will take her friends place.

If Mazeeda cannot save her own life with trained hands, she will do it with her quick mind and sly mouth. During the night, she weaves stories never told before to Khai; in the morning, she roams the palace to escape. With each tale she tells, the more she realizes these aren't just stories; but something much greater.

Something that Khai is keeping from her, things he does not want to be let out.

Somewhere a 1000 miles across the sand kept land, three brothers are plotting something that'll end the reign of the monster and save their sister.

title: Suicide, Skittles and Skates [✓]
description:
Alex Bates has had more than enough of life. 

Plagued with the agonising guilt of being the cause for his sister's recent death, he's heading down a destructive path. But just as he is about to give into the urge to jump in front of an oncoming train, he's interrupted by a girl. Shy and observant Kalila Woods knows that no words can stop him so she only hands him a packet of Skittles and walks away. 

And so begins an unlikely friendship. She's on a mission to convince him of the many reasons to live and he's on a journey to find himself along the way. And maybe, just maybe, Alex will realise that dying isn't quite worth it.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hiya, I write under the name S Hana and have been on Wattpad since I was a teenager in 2013. All these years later, I still have so many characters and stories in my head and one day, I want to bring them all back to life, re-writing everything. Until that day comes, I'll stick to reading other people's work.

title: Sanditon 2 - Web Of Lies
description:
Sanditon Fanfiction - After returning to her home in Willingden,  Charlotte Heywood receives news that leaves her devastated and bent on a path of revenge.   While struggling with choices he made after the Sanditon fire, Sidney Parker will face the repercussions of the destructive acts unbeknownst toward him.
Disclaimer:  This is my work of fan fiction using the characters from the great Jane Austen's novel Sanditon as was portrayed in the ITV's version of the unfinished novel.  I own none of these characters but only wish to continue their love story and honor those who I greatly admire.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Call Me Vi | ONC 2024
description:
One is a journalist who writes about movie stars. The other is a movie star who hates journalists. Now their worlds are colliding.

Reagan Porter is a small town journalist married, in every sense of the word, to her work. When everything that could go wrong before her Valentine's Day vacation does, she jets off early to the mountains in Asheville, North Carolina for some well-earned peace and quiet. But she'll have to work for it.

Violetta "Vi" Dawson is bold, beautiful, and boisterous. At least, that's what the tabloids are calling her. Hoping to get away from the spotlight and her recent break-up with her long time boyfriend, Violetta seeks out The Bearside Hotel which she hopes will allow her some time away to think and reflect.

When the two meet after a drunken mishap, Reagan and Violetta immediately butt heads. How else are a journalist and a movie star supposed to get along? On a chance weekend, The Bearside Hotel might just offer each of them a chance at what they've really wanted all along: true love.

---
ONC Prompts:
9. After some long months of working harder than ever, you finally get to your well deserved vacation getaway but when you arrive at the hotel, there is this one star that brings all the paparazzi and trouble with them and makes your vacation one to remember.

24. A desperate wish, made from the heart, is always answered. Sooner or later.
---

title: Something To Fear | Glenn Rhee
description:
Glenn Rhee was once a man filled with optimism and hope. He was once the light in the dark for the rest of his group. He was the one person who had not let the apocalypse break him.

Until finally, it did.
   
Trapped in the lonesome Virginian woods and surrounded by Saviors, Glenn is forced to watch as everything he's loved and built for himself is violently taken away. In this thrilling alternative take, Glenn isn't the one to die that night. But he will be the one to exact his brutal and bloody vengeance on the man who created it. 

Even if it means heading down a dark and horrific path.

Featured on Wattzombie, Fanfic and Fright!

(Cover by Malak--)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
_______________________________

🕸🕸🕸

━━━  About Me

I'm M. Parkers (she/her), a now TWICE featured Wattpad and TWICE Wattys shortlisted author who writes fiction aimed at young and new adults. As you can probably see, I am a huge fan of Tom Holland as well.

━━━  What to Expect

I'm a huge fan of diverse literature, so expect to see characters of all different backgrounds featured in my stories. Though most of my stories fall under the Horror, Thriller, or Speculative genres, I do write lighthearted comedies once in a while.

title: Aegis (Book Three)
description:
Zana Black lives in Circa City, an unforgiving city, built on the edge of an old nuclear disaster site, the crime rate is high, and the homeless population is even higher. With few memories and more questions than answers, Zana finds herself staying with T an empathetic, and honest woman who takes her in. But with things finally calming down, Zana finds her superhero persona constantly being thrown into more danger; and things only continue to escalate as the Mavericks are thrown in the mix. Doing the only thing she knows, Zana follows her instincts as things unravel rapidly around her and she finally learns the truth of where she came from; all while trying to be a normal teenager.

*Book Three of the Mavericks Series
** Sequel of Arlington (Book One) and Faith (Book Two)

title: Calling For Summer [GirlxGirl]
description:
"Keep love in your heart.  A life without it is like a sunless garden when the flowers are dead." - Oscar Wilde

 ///\\\
      
       "Winter Alexander. Blonde hair, blue eyes, suspiciously extroverted, and somehow friends with everyone. It was in my very nature to despise her with all I had in me. I didn't dislike her because I was jealous. That's not even close. The main reason I hated her was because of the undeniable fakeness her persona projects. I mean, there's no way she's actually friends with nearly the entire school. I would go insane if I had that many friends, and so would any normal human being. Also, her near-white blonde hair cannot be natural. Not to mention her eyes. They're so bright and blue that they rivaled Nash Grier's. Those had to be contacts (along with the previously mentioned trash can's, but that's beside the point)."

///\\\

Winter Alexander, a friend to everyone, is head over heels for Jade Summers, a bitch to everyone (there's no point in lying). Luckily Winter likes the challenge, and she has ever since freshman year. With a life that only spirals downward, a question is posed: Will Jade open up?

[Co-writing with my friend Dani]

title: More Poison in Your Coffee?
description:
Evelyn's day couldn't get any worse, until a local news anchor drops dead in her café. If that weren't bad enough the police suspect her former drug dealing cousin as the culprit, and Evie's not someone who just sits by while her family's in trouble. Putting on her sleuth hat she's in a race to find the true killer; not an easy task considering the deceased was a total ass to just about everyone he knew. Was it his neglected wife, sick of the constant verbal abuse? His pretty assistant, tired of being sexually harassed on a daily basis? Or was it his brother, jealous of the success he could never find himself? Hell, maybe it's that strange new guy that's only a quarter-step from being a bum. If Evie thought today was a hot mess, she's in for ride of her life.

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 1

title: Because You're Different ✔
description:
What if your body doesn't always do what you want it to do?

For June, this isn't a question, but a daily reality. As a fourteen-year-old with cerebral palsy, frequently dropping stuff and being stared at by complete strangers is nothing out of the ordinary. Other than that, life is great, until her parents decide to move to California. 

With all her friends miles away and nobody there to protect her from boys stealing your lunch, school becomes a lot more complicated than it had been. Then, she befriends Sam Redstone, a shy boy who'd always been invisible to others.

June's days improve drastically with Sam by her side, and when she meets his older brother Nathan, she finally believes her cousin Valentina might have been right about sexy California guys. Slowly, she and Nathan develop a unique friendship, one that, June finds herself hoping, might someday turn into something more. But as the years go by, she's starting to think she might never be with him that way, or with any other man for that.

Started: 29 January 2019
Completed: 16 May 2020
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Erin, a 27-year-old translator from the Netherlands, and I've been writing since I was 7.

I'm a disabled lesbian, and most of my books feature disabled and/or queer characters. You can expect my books to be slow-burn romances.

Currently, I'm working on a Young Sheldon fanfic about Mary Cooper, who is definitely very straight and has no feelings whatsoever for her childhood best friend Jeanie Lucas. Ahem. (This story can be read even if you're unfamiliar with the show.)

My first completed novel, "Because You're Different", tells the story of June, a girl with cerebral palsy, who falls in love with her best friend Sam's older brother Nathan, but she wonders if anyone will ever love her back.
(This is a straight romance, written when comphet was still messing with my head).



✨🌟🌙💫⭐️⭐️💫🌙🌟✨

title: Nigerian Girl
description:
Chizaram's life is simple. There are only three things that matter to her.

Number one is her Family, which is also the most important.

Number two is the not very strict, not very adhered rules that her parents have put in place for her and her siblings

And number three, trying her best to be a good person to everyone around her despite the blatant rudeness of the people in her life.

When things around her begin to change she is forced to see that sometimes families separate, and rules are just things that tell us how to live our lives and sometimes we end up doing more harm than good to those we intend to help.

Sometimes doing good things doesn't make us good people, just like doing bad things doesn't make us bad people.

Life is no more black and white...at least to her not anymore.
