title: The Beautiful You
description:
Seventeen-year-old Apollo Reyes-Perez is struggling to understand two things: his identity and his best friend's suicide. But when Amory Hartmann, the new boy in town, catches his attention, he discovers that the answers to those questions may be more complicated than he had anticipated. 

......

After the passing of his best friend, Apollo is left in an unfamiliar world, or perhaps one he never understood. Swimming, friends, and family. That was Apollo's universe. Until one day it wasn't. His friends expect too much, his parents don't talk enough, and swimming feels wrong. It only took one day for his life to change. 

Isn't the world supposed to stop when the person closest to you is gone? That's what he believed. But when the realities of growing up as a Mexican-American teenager hurdle towards him, he must accept the simple fact that life goes on. This becomes abundantly clear when Amory Hartmann enters his life, forcing Apollo to face the parts of himself he intended to keep hidden. Pieces of himself he's been too afraid to share with a boy. 

Will Apollo learn to leave the past behind him and move towards the future, or will his demons keep dragging him back to the darkest point of his life?

Featured by @TeenFiction

🥇1st place LGBTQ+: The Novelists Awards 2022-2023

🥉3rd place Romance: The Pride Awards 2023

💜 @YARomance Undiscovered Book of The Month {November 2022}

title: Crushin' on Him (YA Romance)
description:
Jasmine tries to get the attention of her longtime crush and popular football player Desmond, while outside forces try to stand in her way.
----
Jasmine "Jazz" Mills is starting her senior year of high school. Nothing great has happened over the years. The only thing keeping her excited about school was her crush Dezmond "Dez" Graham.

He's a star football player and too popular for her. That is until the night of his party, where she invades his bedroom and his personal space. Sparks fly instantly, causing the two to begin a whirlwind love affair.

The only problems are other people, and outside forces, trying to come between the two of them.

Jasmine and Dezmond must prove their love is worth fighting for no matter what.

That's easier said than done when you have an ex-girlfriend, ex-boyfriend and a controlling father in the picture.

title: The Segment (Completed)
description:
*Watty's 2018 Longlist*

Farrah Khan is stuck in a dead end job - 26 and still an intern at the British Broadcasting and Communication Systems (BBCS); all she wants is a chance to prove herself. 

Getting laughed at by Prince Richard, seventh in line to the throne, wasn't part of the plan but she wasn't one to let the opportunity of a lifetime slip by.


***********************************************************

Farrah Khan is your typical British born Pakistani girl; she has big dreams and she is not afraid to run after it. This passion was fueled by the death of her mother which opened up her eyes to the perils of ignoring depression.

Richard remembers the last time he cried he was told that men don't cry. Burying his grief under layers of smiles and pretense, Richard has no choice but to face it all when he can't get Farrah Khan out of his mind. The beautiful journalist wants to change how people view depression and to help her do that, he needs to change how he views himself.

As they work together on the segment, they find that they each need to face their fears. The only things is, will they do it together or separately?



*UNEDITED*

authorBio:

-----

When Azar gets laid off from her position as a head pastry chef, in anticipation of the bakery's demolishment date, she finds herself with no other choice but to succumb to her mother's wishes: to be engaged to a man she's never met. Except what they don't know, is that the eligible suitor is already knee-deep in his own engagement, ready to be whisked off to another girl in a month. This requires East Han, the second eldest son, to call off the engagement with the Seo family. Determined to earn his parents' trust back, he agrees to follow through with this task. Up until he meets Azar herself, glowing in all her beauty and witty remarks that he knows he'll never get enough of.

So other than not telling them the news, he does the one thing he wasn't planning on doing: he falls for her.

authorBio:
She/her, demiromantic ace, technical editor and Wattpad Creator with cerebral palsy

When it comes to fiction, I primarily write fantasy stories for both adults and children, often involving animals, baking, and tons of puns. I also dabble in other genres, and have posted hundreds of bite-sized poems that are the perfect read if you only have a minute to spare.

My short stories and poems have appeared in Daily Science Fiction, Bronzeville Bee, Cicada, Short Édition, and various other publications. I'm a proud member of Rainbow Book Club, Dreamland Raid, and Dreamland Hunt. I'm also the founder of the Triple A Community.

title: After September 23rd
description:
Victor Courrier is set to capture the culprit who killed his parents but he wants more than the truth to come out, he wants to take away something or someone the killer loves the most, her daughter. He plans to assassinate Mikaela Yuki. As the years pass he's ready to set his plan into action but the principles he was raised with prevent him from following his plan. While studying at Eamonn Preparatory, Victor learns more about the world hidden from the public. His world. The puzzles, deceptions, and inhumane projects the Aristocratic Families from our world, and the Evarants have done to each other. All while learning to live with Mikaela Yuki.

title: A Royal Ruse
description:
Princess Zita has been abducted - stolen in the middle of the night from her palace in the kingdom of Arnoa. 

However, not everything is as it seems, as she soon finds out that a mysterious queen from a neighboring kingdom is behind her capture. 

Trapped in a foreign land, the naive, young princess is quickly thrust into a world of deception, hostile royals, and romance.
Will true love lead her back to Arnoa? Or will living a life of lies force Zita to choose between her heart and her home?

title: Ivy of Our Hearts
description:
Trapped in the woodlands, Ivy's only hope of going home is to escape the faerie who enchants her into loving him, blinding her to what he is--monstrous.

***

A dark fortress of trees twisted and crippled by time, the Clearwater, Connecticut, woods is no place for two teenage girls. The legends claim it's haunted. Fed up with being kept inside after dark, fearing the monster will take them, sixteen-year-old Ivy Farewell and her best friend Margaret set out to prove everyone wrong--that the ghost of Clearwater isn't a ghost. And the voice that has been calling to Ivy after dark is simply a trick of the wind.

But the woods are deeper than Ivy imagined, each turn bringing them farther from home. When they end up lost their only hope is in each other. All seems undone when Ivy falls ill with a fever, until a stranger persuades them back to his cabin. Under his spell, Ivy falls into a deep and complicated love, a love so treacherous it blinds her to what he truly is--a monster.

Copyright © 2023 T.A. Joseph
All rights reserved

Hello and welcome to my little corner of Wattpad! I'm Tracey, tea enthusiast and animated movie devotee. The genres I love to read and write most are fantasy, paranormal, contemporary, and sometimes historical fiction, all with a dash of romance. I'm a fan of beautiful prose, I often have crushes on fictional men, and faeries are my favorite magical creature.

Thanks for visiting me!

title: Less Than Perfect
description:
He treaded on a path of destruction, lost among a sea of souls, and then he was drowning in her perfection. 

* * * * 

Kanza never expected much from life. She lived through the tragedy of losing her beloved, lived in silent fear of love, lived only to please Allah. Through her perfect mask, she created a viral YouTube channel, one that followed Muslim fashion and streaming games, two giant platforms. She didn't expect it to be popular, nor did she expect a secret admirer. 

A man of few words and the brother of her best friend leads her to a path of desire and decorum as the two play a game of cat and mouse. Little did Kanza know that two imperfect people were more than capable of being perfect together. 


(Book Three in the American Muslimah Trilogy, but can be read as a stand alone)

description:

Meet Risa Yamamoto, the ultimate right-hand gal of the White Tiger gang, and a budding actress. She is successful in her career, but deep down, she's aching for something more. It all changes when a blast from her past swoops back into her life. Could this long-lost love be the key to unlocking happiness at last? Stay tuned to find out!

authorBio:
Hi, my name is Aini, I love reading books, especially books that contain romance and also maybe some fantasy werewolves or age gap stories.

I used to like bad boy stories and maybe I still do but with certain limits to them, I would like stories with more equity between men and women with a sense of fairness to it, but I would like to read more stories that have good guys or guys with dominant traits but are not bad boys since I feel that the bad boy element in stories have become a little of hand.

I have 3 books in my work right now, and one of them is just full of short stories. Please read them if your are interested in fantasy or romance.

If you are new here and want to start writing but you don't know where to start, please feel free to message and I can help you get started on your stories as a helping guide.

I know that starting your first story can sometimes be frustrating so I can help you guys get started.

So I think that's all I wanted to say heheheheheh :)

title: Immortal Sin |✓|
description:
❝Your secret is a painting?❞ I took a few cautious steps; the hairs on my arms stood on end.

❝Not just any painting.❞ Dorian approached the easel, shadows on his face as he touched the cloth protecting it. ❝It's a dark object, the manifestation of my curse. The reason I shall always live and never die.❞

I swallowed. ❝Show me.❞

                                                                                      *                  *                *

When Dorian Gray dies, and returns to life, Amelia Thorne is introduced to the world of the supernatural. Here, monsters exist and paintings become portals to other worlds. Amelia learns Dorian's most precious secret - an evil painting that holds the key to his immortality, and his dark side. When the painting is destroyed, his inner monster is unleashed. Soon, Amelia finds it hard to separate her feelings for Dorian and the demon he created. Especially when destroying his evil twin means destroying Dorian as well...

title: Asher ✓
description:
Boys with bone diseases shouldn't race motorcycles.

⋆☆⋆

Asher Delrov knows he's fragile.

He's known this since his diagnosis in infancy with osteogenesis imperfecta: imperfect bones. When racing offers him all the freedom, confidence and adventure he grew up without, the young prodigy doesn't hesitate to win competitions and break records under the watchful, loving eyes of the general public.

But is a boy so fragile ever meant to fly?

title: Bleed for the Camera
description:
It's been smooth sailing for Evie Harper lately. Business at her café is booming and her new man seems to be on a mission to keep a smile on her face. But when her actions directly lead to one of her clients getting murdered her happiness quickly turns into guilt. Even worse, the older woman died before Evie could get paid! Just when she's about to cut her losses, opportunity comes knocking in the form of a woman begging Evie to find the killer before things get even more out of hand. Now, Evie's got to race against the clock to find a murderer, help a kidnap victim, and ease her guilt for causing all this in the first place. Being the good person she is, of course she takes on the case out of the goodness of her heart...not to mention a three thousand dollar bonus waiting if she succeeds.

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 3

title: Crossing The i's And Dotting The t's
description:
It may feel good to be pretty, but the problem with being beautiful is that there are thousands of people who look like you. Ugliness, however, is unique.

-------------------

One girl, a walking-talking example of contradictions -- ambitious but naive, kind but blunt, social but awkward -- is living in perhaps the most competitive society in this world. 

She has a dream, a fairly conventional and acceptable dream, one which every parent would approve of. Unfortunately, millions of others share this dream, and in order to fulfill hers, she has to eliminate her competition, literally.

Throw in a fair share of drama. Friends and family, crushes and exes, decisions and choices, and the life story of an Indian teenager would be complete.

----------------------

The last few years of school are the most memorable; grades, stress and career mixed with friends, fun and dreams. But most of the time when we are planning our awesome candid picture-perfect life, we end up crossing the 'i's and dotting the 't's.



------------------------------------
COMPLETED ON JULY 14, 2018

Featured in the teen fiction reading list of Wattpad India!

title: The Search for Juno
description:
When nineteen-year-old Angie Nohl accidentally kills a man in a skirmish one night, she never would have guessed that man could be the god Poseidon.

A heavenly bounty now on her head, Angie is a fugitive at large. When the trickster god Hermes comes to her aid, however, the two spring up a wild idea: pin the disaster on another person, and take the prize money for themselves.

The feat certainly won't be easy, especially not when two of Angie's childhood friends, hired by the gods to locate her, see right through her plan. 

Follow the unorthodox journey of a god, a part-time online college student, and a wood nymph as they attempt a divine deceit for the ages.

-will likely have occasional strong language, just as a warning. As always, like and comment if you enjoy! -

title: Prodigy (Complete)
description:
The greatest tragedy the world has ever known turned out to be the ultimate catalyst for change. In the wake of World War III, which decimated most of the world's population, the remaining survivors vowed to not continue to repeat the same mistakes of the past. Fortunately, they had something previous generations did not have - advanced technology.
  
The year is 2117 and this once shattered civilization has become prosperous again. Innovative forms of technology have enabled them to abandon the old model and re-engineer a better way of living for all. Brain implants and genetic modifications have made an entire population educated, healthy, and kind.
  
Despite the benefits of this technology, it has created some unforeseen side effects that threaten humankind's existence. When technology proves to be inept at solving the world's problem, a new hope emerges in the unlikeliest form - a young orphan girl.

***

Cyberpunk, dystopian, technology, future, futurism, scifi, heroine, prodigy...

The World Famous Plato's Academic Blog can be read on http://platosacademic.wordpress.com and www.EdwardMullen.com.

Edward Mullen is a novelist, podcaster, and blogger from Vancouver, Canada. His debut novel, THE ART OF THE HUSTLE, was published on August 2, 2012 with critical acclaim. With a steadily-growing fan base thirsty for more, he released his second book - a non-fiction book titled DESTINY AND FREE WILL, which explores the belief that everything happens for a reason. One year after his debut novel, his highly anticipated second novel was released - PRODIGY - a futuristic tale focusing on the unforeseen effects of technology.

Born and raised in beautiful British Columbia, Edward developed a love for the wilderness. This love, combined with an innate curiosity about all things, eventually spawned a healthy imagination for storytelling. He continued to follow his natural passion through to university. Despite spending a lot of his time indoors writing, Edward continues to enjoy the outdoors. He is an avid tennis player, mountain biker, snowboarder, runner, and traveller.

title: RÊVERIA
description:
I used to feel so simple and free
When you'd remained so close to me
You've now left me with memories
Memories that's turned into reveries

*   *   *   *   *   *   *

When Wolf meets her lover after about ten years of both of them being separated from each other, she does not seem quite surprised to find herself telling each and every one of the stories of their adventures together all over again, to recover precious old memories of gold and hemlock that had been hopelessly forgotten within just fleeting moments when something rather unfortunate had happened earlier.

Now, the only question both these lovers have, deep down within each of their own souls, is that is it really possible for those lost reveries to be recovered from just storytelling?

Yes, it's absolutely possible...

title: KINGSLAYER
description:
𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐈𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓 𝐀 𝐒𝐔𝐂𝐂𝐄𝐒𝐒 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐘. 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐈𝐒 𝐀 𝐑𝐔𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍.

It's the beginning of a new age when Jaylah Imperatrix seemingly returns from the dead to reclaim her throne. And in perfect timing. 

In her absence, evil has begun to rise. Ruthless and bloodthirsty Seifer Daggen will stop at nothing until he usurps the Oceanic throne. He is also relentless in his plans to eradicate Jaylah before she finds him and attempts to end his life.

With the help of mercenary Alexander Khan - whose allegiance is terrifyingly unclear - Jaylah may have a chance to save her nation from the rapidly growing threat.

Jaylah soon finds that her criminal partner can stir up suspicion in her just as easily as he can make her cold heart feel things she's never felt before. But the shakily allied Alexander is not her only concern. The Queen must travel to distant lands, build her court, face an unknown deceiver and realize who she truly is before quenching the fire of revenge in her heart.

Her throne, people, and life depend on it. A crown can be a bloody burden.

( BOOK 1 : completed )
( BOOK 2 : updated fridays 2pm pst )

title: Sun Kissed
description:
"They become like us, but beautiful. Dangerously beautiful. Oh yes. And they can make the sky do their bidding. They cast spells with their music that can take away your willpower. And their hair . . . is the color of blood."

***

There's a legend in the Amazon that tells of attractive and dangerous shapeshifters known as Encantados. When Sofia Aguilar meets one in the flesh, her life is turned completely upside down. Can she reunite a legendary shapeshifter with his past without losing touch with her own reality?

***

"We call them . . . Encantado."

The word was familiar, yet it tickled Sofi's inner ear in a way that only foreign sounds could. It felt like a name from another world. Somewhere far and lost. Somewhere that should have never been or perhaps might never be.

title: Protectors of Umbra [Umbra's Fate #1] ✓
description:
One day darkness came and made everyone's hearts it's home. 

                                                            ***

The village of Umbra has always been known for its beautiful landscape and the peaceful lifestyle of its inhabitants, but everything changed when the Devil appeared. Now, if they want to survive against the demons that walk between them, the villagers have to use the powers the Devil gave them and fight. 

Will they be able to hold onto their lives for a whole year? What would they do when the line between allies and enemies starts to fade? Is it possible to find love in the middle of death or will the darkness consume it all?

title: GuiTara
description:
*Completed*
Becoming a big-time pop music sensation was the last thing Tara Henrie expected when she moved to Mexico City.

After getting fired for assaulting her co-worker due to a personal issue, 22-year-old Tara has to move all the way from Ghana to Mexico to work for her bossy older sister. But on Tara's first day as a waitress, things take a horrid turn for the worse when a clumsy mistake results in her immediate dismissal. Upset with everything and everyone, Tara makes the quickest decision to return home. But those plans fly out the window when she meets Shaun Perez, a dashing young man with a daring secret, who looks past all of Tara's mistakes and encourages her to share her music with the world.

Come join GuiTara on her rocky path to fame, a stronger friendship and maybe...love?

title: Bulletproof Hearts
description:
Freya Arsov sits on top of a world of diamonds and sports cars. Her father is a billionaire, head of a world-renown company, her mother, an esteemed lawyer. She attends the most prestigious boarding school in England. She has four amazing best friends and a dreamy boy who was in love with her.

Except, none of these things make up for what happened last summer.

Matthew al Nassar has fallen far. After the death of his father, he finds himself involved in a world of gangs and guns and has no way out. 

When these childhood neighbours clash, bullets fly. 

Love is a girl pointing a gun at the boy who owns her heart.

Or at least, in this story, it is.

[Book #1 in the Bulletproof Series]

[loosely inspired by the myth of Persephone and Hades]

title: Abhaya Bhairavi #Wattys2020
description:
🥇 First place in The Casia Flair Awards 2020.
🥇 First place in The Rare Awards 2020.
🥈 Second place in The Thriller Awards 2020.
🥉 Third place in The Aspirants Awards 2020.
🥉 Third place in The Trickster Awards 2020.
🥉 Third place in The Lunar Awards 2020.
🥉 Third place in The Upcoming Writers' Awards 2020.

After surviving an accident which claimed the lives of her beloved parents, Bhairavi's maternal grandmother comes to live with her. But she has already forsaken her voice, her friends, her relationship, her studies, even her laughter. Barely does her grief become bearable when strange things begin to happen. Being a girl of the Twenty-First century, she has seen all superhero and supernatural movies to know that this is unlike any of those scenarios. As her powers become stronger, her perception of reality begins to unravel, all people are not human, and all immortal monsters are not evil, but when it becomes evident that there is something fishy regarding the accident she miraculously survived, Bhairavi takes matters into her own hands. Supported by the unlikeliest allies, she sets out to find the truth. But does the truth always set one free?

A fresh, modern take on Hindu mythology. If you think talking lions, friendly demons, and the power to make sexual offenders painfully ejaculate uncontrollably, sounds cool, then this is the book for you!!

title: King & Kween Kang (The Rise Of Kang's #1)
description:
The King Of Joseon was known for many things, but his possessiveness was known throughout the whole land. And it was not of woman he was possessive of, it was his people's trust and his crown. He was so possessive that he did not even allow foreign rulers or people to come into his land to trade goods, for he feared they would leave and never come back. So when the year of drought came, and the lands water and food sourced diminished the people began to loathe him. Without foreigners' help, the kingdom would fall.

Now when he hears whispers of being overthrown he immediately gathers his advisors on what he should do next. They gave him a 'simple' answer: to marry a foreign girl who is the daughter of a king who rules a smaller kingdom, and then they could overtake the land by war. 

The king without hesitation agreed, and so he sent a declaration to many lands around the world of those whose daughters wished to be married. For a year or so many daughters came and visit, but none of them wished to wed him for he was selfish and heartless.

When all hope seemed lost, a young woman from the island of Jamaica accepted to marry him without even meeting him. The advisors were against this for many reasons, but the king did not care he wanted his people's trust again, so he called for her and some of her people to come and stay in the palace. Little did he know that this woman with lovely doe eyes was not the quiet princess he imagined.


(Under Minor Revising, Pardon The Mistakes)

title: Mary's Bones
description:
Angie, a grieving expectant mother, must help the spirit of a little girl find the remains of twelve other children who mysteriously disappeared three years ago.

                                                                      *****

After the death of her twin brother, Angie Abernathy immersed herself in her painting to help her deal with her overwhelming grief. When her husband, John, finally convinces her to sort through some of Cory's belongings, she unexpectedly finds the closure she needs in the form of a map and a journal full of cryptic notes. When the notes lead her to the bodily remains of six-year-old Mary Drake, the first of thirteen children who went missing three years ago, Angie finds herself caught up in her own investigation and quickly starts to believe that Mary's bones aren't as dead as they seem to be...

Content warning: This story contains mature themes, including references to the murder of children

title: It Starts Here / 𝗯𝘅𝗯 (✓)
description:
Felix smiles when Ares asks, "Do you like it?"

Felix glances at him and Ares looks so excited to hear what he has to say, so happy, that Felix almost tells him right there and then.

I like boys. Felix feels the words in his mouth. I like you.

But writing about two girl dinosaurs falling in love and wanting to be friends with a boy who's gay are two different things, Felix guesses, so he chooses to leave it at, "I loved it. It's one of my favorites."

And Ares smiles so brightly that Felix's heart starts to ache.

***

Felix Vuong meets Ares Sanchez when they're both eight years old. At age thirty-one, they're still in it together.

They love each other for twenty-three years.

title: So You Might be Soulless
description:
A cynical Necromancer with a terrible secret. 
An optimistic Crown Prince crumbling under the pressure.
A talented mage living in the shadow of his younger brother.

                                                                                             ******

There are always three sides in a fairy tale. The villain, the hero and the spectator. 

Diya spent her entire life being the villain of everyone's story- simply because of something she couldn't control. 

She is given one last chance to prove herself. One final mission which would throw the Empire into disarray, but mean she could gain precious information about her past. A chance encounter throws her into the Imperial life where deception lies at every turn and the charismatic Imperial family are hiding more than they seem. 

With the threat of a war rising and ugly secrets coming to light, can Diya ever get her happily ever after? Or is she doomed to remain the rest of her life as soulless?

title: The Rich Boy in a Rock Band
description:
Formerly known as We The Young / Vera, a singer held back by her size, and Ashton, a songwriter looking to stop failing himself, team up to achieve their dreams by forming the greatest rock band of our time.

***

Vera has always dreamt of being a singer, but is held back by her judgmental mother, a former singer herself who shames Vera for her size.

Ashton is no longer afraid of letting his parents down, and when he meets Vera he realizes that with her voice and his songs maybe he can stop being a disappointment to himself.

Together, they set out to become the best rock band of our time because We, The Young have sh*t to say.

title: Her Four Shifter Mates : Betrayed
description:
Three weeks ago, my parents went insane. It wasn't even my fault. They won't listen. They threw out all my stuff. They packed up our house. They moved halfway across the country without telling me where. My life is a living hell but I get to go to school. As long as I don't break any rules. Rule #1: no boys. Especially not my four shifter mates.
❁

title: RED | A dark retelling of Red Riding Hood | WATTYS 2021 SHORTLIST
description:
In a dark and deep land lives young Marjorie, a woman desperate for something more than her conventional life in her tiny village, Core. She aches for something dangerous, something like the dark forest, Mirkwood, which borders her home. 

Yet, there is a curse which haunts her people: a Wolf. For the last eighteen years, he takes one innocent life. Fate seems to change at the hands of Vivian, a Wardeness who promises Core a safe passage through Mirkwood. 

For a moment, Marjorie has everything she has ever wanted: An escape from a fate set in stone... until the Wolf set its dark intentions on her. 

Now, she is forced to decide: Will she defeat the Wolf or will she willingly be devoured? 
__________________

The stranger turned to face her. This close, it was easy to see his handsome features. From his high cheekbones to his piercing gray eyes, he was unlike any sully-faced villager. Instead, he wore his beauty with a casual grace, as if he were clueless to the plumpness of his lips or the flat, smooth surface of his chest. 

"Am I a what?" The man cocked a thick, dark brow up. He pushed his right hand into the pocket of his trousers, but not before Marjorie caught a glimpse of the heavy jewels on his fingers. He drowned in an opulence few villagers could afford. 

"I take that as a no," she said. "What is your name, stranger?" 

He looked to her, and then his gaze traveled to where men and women continued to fling themselves around the heat of the bonfire.

You don't belong here, she thought.

title: Dark And Light (Bwwm)
description:
"Joy." He calls out to me. I can feel the way he craves my attention to be drawn on him. So I do exactly the opposite and turn away.

"Joy!" He speaks again this time with much more authority it shook the walls of the room. I stop dead in my tracks and wait for him to speak.

"Turn around love and come back over to me." 

Out of defiance again I keep walking hoping to get further but that didn't last long as he speeds right in front of me.

Slowly looking up his body I analyze the long, jagged spikes protruding out his back. I look down at his arm which is such a deep navy color that it almost looks black along with his slender fingers that have pointy, white claws that he gently wrapped around my throat.

I rolled my eyes at his antics sighing soflty. His almost 8 foot frame looks down on me smiling with his just as razor sharp teeth.

"Now why are you trying to leave me Joy? We both know you can't. I can feel your desire for me love. I know you want to stay." He says with playfulness behind his words.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

title: Imperial
description:
Shah Jamshid al-Hassan, king of the Sazian Empire, is dead. He is succeeded by three heirs: Esfandar, the crown prince; Soraya, the forgotten daughter; and Roshani- the one who killed him.   

Roshani felt no remorse shoving her sword through her father's heart. Nor does she have any doubts about imprisoning her cunning grandmother in the depths of the royal prison, where she can't cause any more trouble. The tyrannical tendencies in the young empress only seem to be tempered by Kasra, her infant half-brother born shortly before the coup. To protect Kasra, Roshani is determined to kill her other siblings and end this conflict once and for all. But spies and betrayers abound in the palace, and Roshani may have more enemies within than without.

Esfandar's mind has always been more attuned to war than to the politics behind it. Shocked and outraged by his sisters' betrayals, he seeks to reclaim the throne that is rightfully his. His troops rally in support of their emperor, retaking the north from Roshani's forces. Yet doubt soon creeps into the young prince's mind. As his armies forge ahead, Esfandar will discover that governing and conquering are not one and the same.

The large personalities of Esfandar and Roshani have always outshone Soraya in the palace. Neither the shah nor the other palace lords ever concerned themselves with the quiet girl hiding behind her mother's skirts. But now, having escaped Roshani's coup, the empire has been forced to consider Soraya a threat. Protected by the priests and magis of the fire temple, Soraya's claim to the throne is the weakest. Her only hope is a strange power from the gods, one she's not even sure she can control.

Three siblings.
Three armies.

One crown.

title: The Doll Garden
description:
[THE DOLL GARDEN WILL BE REMOVED ON DECEMBER 31ST]

***

The Harrington family was what everyone in the picturesque town of Runswick, Rhode Island aspired to be, until their eldest child Jenna, tumbled down a flight of stairs, leaving her with little to no memories, including the distinct screams of women from her father's garden.

And these vague, yet disturbing childhood memories soon become reality when the three Harrington siblings are forced to return to the estate six years later; where she finds the preserved, doll-like remains of three women, one of which resembles Jenna to an uncanny extent.

Now, Jenna is forced to question everything about her childhood up to that night. But time is ticking as her family's dark past comes into play. And it isn't until she spots a woman roaming the garden with her lips sewn shut, that she realizes all the painful truths behind her father's estate starts with her look-alike, Marisol.

title: Fortune Favors the Cursed
description:
Badriya As-Sahra is sick of piling up camel dung and picking people's pockets for a living. Her world discriminates against women and orphans, and it is only her damned luck that she happens to be both. She yearns for more but can't do anything else unless she wants to rot in the streets. 
 
Ayaz Shahrayar balances two lives: one of defiance, where he aids his people suffering from the Sultan's rule, and one of obedience, where he plays the role of a naive prince and heir in public. But his thirst for vengeance drives him more reckless by the day, and he knows that he might do something that could threaten his inheritance and his life. 

When the Sultan of Zecaj, desperate for more wealth to start a war, declares a country-wide hunt for a powerful artifact lost in legends called the Jewel of Opulence, Badriya jumps at the chance for the promise of reward. When the Sultan threatens Ayaz of losing the very thing he is meant to have, he has no choice but to join the hunt.  
 
As Badriya and Ayaz cross paths on their quest, they must learn to work together to find the Jewel and uncover the truth of its power. Only that it proves to be more difficult when the threat of betrayal and the spark of attraction try to distract them from their opposing goals.



| 90,000 - 100,000 words. Second, rough draft. |

She marks her wrist with the letters 'N' and 'O' to remind herself of the self-control she seeks. Her only friend is very concerned because he doesn't want to see her falling down a very unhealthy rabbit hole. But Phoebe doesn't see a single thing wrong with her actions. That is, until she finds herself waking up in the hospital bed with no recollection of how she got there.

title: Never Not Yours
description:
Choice has always been a stranger to Gustavo. As the son of the illustrious Count of Marcliff, everything is chosen for him from his favourite pastime, riding, to the length of his beard, never past the chin. And when it comes to school, his desire to go to Cambridge is overshadowed by his father's choice: Oxford. 

But one rainy afternoon at Oxford, fortune smiles on the young count-to-be, landing him in a tailor's shop where the lovely Miku's smile makes him forget Cambridge even exists. 

Every moment spent by Miku's side causes Gustavo to hope--no, to presume--that he will have the choice of asking her to be his bride. But a letter from his father quickly dashes that dream to pieces: Gustavo is engaged to marry a duke's daughter. 

He has followed his father's wishes his whole life, always striving to preserve the Dinamarca name. But this is one step too far. He will not abandon Miku for some stranger his father picked out. No matter how well-connected she may be. 

Beset by a tempest of anger, grief, and confusion, Gustavo meets a mysterious fortune-teller who knows what he needs to do. He needs to convince Miku to marry him. And if she agrees, they will need to make it to Scotland before Lord Marcliff can stop them. 

Even if they can evade his father, the path to the Scottish border is fraught with obstacles that will shake their love to its foundation.

+++
Based on Prompt Number 6 - ONC 2022

title: Kiss Me Twice ✔︎
description:
As an exchange student from Scotland, a whole new world opens up to Darren Green when he moves to the United States. He'll live with a host family, start at a new school, and he'll have to make new friends. However, what won't be a part of this new life is love. Love is nothing but the attribution of physiological arousal to attraction, and it distracts him from what he should be focusing on: getting into Princeton. So, when a kiss cam forces him to kiss a stranger, and that stranger kisses him twice, he goes along, but only for the sake of exploring this new American life.

However, he can't help but get caught up in the life of this mysterious stranger named Dakota. As he navigates life in the States, he keeps finding himself close to her, going on adventures he'd never dared to dream of. However, he convinces himself it isn't love. It's just friendship -- friendship that started with a kiss.

authorBio:
My love for stories began before I can even remember. At first, stories were being read to me before I went to bed, then I learned to read myself and would always have a book in my hands. When I was 9, I found out books were written by actual people (it was a big revelation, truly), and I wrote my first story that I submitted for a national contest, which I won too. Now, ten years later, I can officially call myself a Watty winner. My love for writing has not ceased one bit since the first time I found out about the wonderful world of writing, and I hope to be able to share many more stories over the following years on this platform.

title: Hostiles (BWWM)  2/3
description:
Embittered by betrayal, Greek Tycoon Dionysius Plutarch finally tracks down the elusive Makenna Lewasi five years and eighty-two days after she vanished. In her absence, Dionysius discovered her true motives-Makenna had been involved with one of his board members and had only been with him for his car design company's potential, now a billion-dollar empire. Seeking revenge, Dionysius seizes control of her perfumery, demanding the "majority-stakeholder treatment." His plans falter, however, when a young boy calling Makenna "mama" appears, a boy who looks startlingly like Dionysius.

Believing the child might be his, Dionysius gives Makenna an ultimatum: a prenuptial agreement or a custody battle. Reluctantly, Makenna agrees to the prenup, and Dionysius sets a wedding date. Despite their unresolved passion, their relationship remains tumultuous, with Dionysius yearning for more than legal bindings-he wants Makenna's heart.
But as he delves into the truth behind Makenna's departure, he uncovers a web of family secrets and a love that refuses to be extinguished.

Discover the irresistible mix of passion, intrigue, and the power of love in "Hostiles." the line between vengeance and reconciliation blurs. Can their shattered trust be restored, or will their reunion spell certain disaster? Available now for an unforgettable reading experience.

title: No Good Witches | ONC √
description:
I'M GOING TO START EDITING THIS PROBABLY.

If you go to Our Lady of the Black Veil Academy, chances are you know the names Cass Landry, Rebecca Lovelace, and Mallory Meksawan. Cass Landry being the mysterious new girl with a tendency to practice magic illegally, Rebecca being notorious for lighting up every room she walks into, and Mallory being the second in command it-girl of Black Veil, as famed as she is feared.

After a magical attempt to escape detention goes terribly, horribly wrong and their ethics teacher winds up dead (ironic, they know), Cass must band together with Rebecca, the girl she "totally doesn't like", and Mallory, another girl she doesn't like (but like...for real this time) to find a spell that can bring their teacher back to life before her situation becomes permanent.

A spell of this caliber, however, requires that they venture into the underground world of their picturesque town, striking a deal with a powerful gang leader that not only raises the stakes, but gives them an even tighter timeline. And though as a witch Cass has personal experience with life and death, the pressure that she's facing now might just be too tough to handle. 

Luckily, she's not alone. And with the three baddest witches of Black Veil, who knows what could happen.

title: SANCTUM (Supernatural-Romance)
description:
***Licensed under Typewriter Publications. Ebook and paperback version of Sanctum is now available on Amazon for purchase. Grab a copy now and you won't be disappointed. ^_^***


High-class demon exorcisms were Father Azrael Traugott's specialty. He was so damned good at it he does it without breaking a sweat. His exorcism rites however were unconventional. No use of a bible or a crucifix or even holy water, but the ecclesiastical community didn't seem to mind.

Called for a meeting one day, the Holy Pope instructs him to investigate a recent, of the many, demoniacal attacks in an orphanage house of St. Therese. Once there, he quickly discovered the cause, but never had he expected it to come from an unlikely source: a woman, who had broken his protective walls in more ways than one....

~ 0 ~

For as long as Aurora Alexis Clave remembered, living in the orphanage house had been peaceful. Despite being bullied as a child because of a birthmark on her neck, she remained steadfast and compassionate. When the demon possessions started pouring in, she began to wonder how she could help.

When opportunity came to do just that, she quickly grabbed it. However, she hadn't anticipated she'd have to deal with an alluring exorcist priest whose attitude was as labile as the direction of the wind.

As their paths collide, attraction between them arises and dark secrets were soon uncovered. Dark secrets that involved realms beyond her human mind could handle....

'There's a new badass in town, and it's an exorcist priest.'

title: Under the V.E.I.L
description:
In a world where secrets are deadly and trust is a luxury,Lena Mendoza is on a mission to uncover the truth behind her parents' mysterious deaths. Desperate for answers, she lands a job at V.E.I.L, a covert organization with more ties to her past than she could ever imagine. As she dives deeper into her investigation,Lena crosses paths with Liam, the older brother of her best friend, and discovers they share a dark connection-Operation Blackthorn, the mission that claimed both their parents' lives.

With danger lurking at every turn, Lena must rely on her skills and newfound allies, including her close friend William, to navigate the treacherous waters of espionage and betrayal. But as tension builds and secrets unravel,Lena and Liam find themselves drawn to each other, their simmering attraction threatening to complicate their mission.

In this high-stakes game of deception, can they uncover the truth without losing themselves-or each other-along the way?

title: Forgetting Billions | ✓
description:
A WATTPAD FEATURED STORY

❝Love pays no attention to color❞

Jasmine Karesh never thought she'd spend her senior year of high school struggling to accept her Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder diagnosis, a disease that forbids her from forgetting the school shooting that led to her uncle's murder. She never expected that her parents would turn on her either, not when she was finally coming to terms with her blood-stained past. 

The last thing she needs is for an anonymous letter to fall out of her locker, penned by a vigilante who knows her history much too well and is more than willing to use it against her.  It's the only way they can avenge the other life lost during the tragedy- the shooter's. 

Jasmine must identify her threatener before they pick off the remaining survivors of the shooting, one by one. As she tries to stop them, she is faced with a crippling secret- she has fallen for her childhood best friend, a boy that goes against everything her family stands for.

title: Perception  ✔
description:
Stories are written by the winners. Winners who never fail to paint themselves in a 'favorable' light. I've been called evil. Twisted. Strange. Heartless.

All fair assessments; I dispute none of these claims. In fact, I hold my head high while confessing to the evil, twisted, strange, and heartless things that I've done. The things, those ignorant of the truth, would condemn. But all people are capable of all things under the right conditions, good or bad.

Don't believe me? I dare you to read my story and tell me if you would have--could have--done things differently.

One of your most beloved fairy tale classics retold. Get all sides of the story.

title: The Billionaire Is An Ice Queen
description:
"I'll break down your walls one by one and sneak into the gates of your icy heart before crushing it into tiny pieces." He murmurs mercilessly as his lips lightly brush my ear, the contact eliciting an indescribable sensation through every inch of my body.

The proximity is maddening and despite my unwillingness to submit, he knows he's got the upper hand as a sardonic chuckle escapes him. 

He tightens his grip around my waist from behind, reducing my options of escaping his entrapment.

His fingers gently tuck my loose strands behind my ear before he foreshadows, "I'll make you regret ever leaving me and once you come crawling back to me, it'll be too late."

title: Access Denied: The Bullseye
description:
Kleptomaniac, thief, scum... Genevieve Wilfred had been called a lot of things. But never 'target'. And right now, she was at the top of the Redstone hit list and everyone knew it. 

Five months ago, she had been on a mission that had changed the very way Genevieve lived. Now, she was no more than a bargaining chip. Whoever had her, had the upper-hand.

The newbie leader, crazy bomb specialist, drunk shooter, and brooding assassin, are back. And along with them came the genius that faked his own death. The Redstone files are open again and team's sent in for the mission. 

The only problem? Lines between good and bad are blurred. Nothing is sure anymore. Nothing is right. There are three teams in this game, all willing to kill or die. There is one goal-get the chip. And there are only two rules: keep your enemies close and don't trust anyone who gets too close.  

Friends will turn on each other. Enemies will have to work together. Family will have to mend broken ties.  And the only way to win? 
Hit Bullseye.

title: HOTSPOT
description:
Teddy lives in a world where chemical warfare has left behind hotspots that turn humans into festering, mutated creatures with no sense of reason. Things have calmed down for her, however-she and her girlfriend live in a multistory car park along with others, a group of survivors managing a struggling existence alongside their decaying earth. Teddy, however, finds herself bored; itching for a fight. Things are too good. Too peaceful.

Her secret wish comes true in the form of an attack by a neighbouring group and the arrival of a teenage boy in search of his brother. Overwhelmed, the group suddenly finds itself reeling, crippled and unguarded. In the wake of tragedy, her new companion holds a deep vendetta, and tensions between Teddy and her girlfriend are on the rise. Is it worth the war she so desperately craves?

title: Children of the Boss
description:
Dean, Kenneth, Carmen, Eve, and Gabriel - the children of Lafayette Jeff-Lane and Emerson Jeff-Lane, the power couple of the world, have grown into young adults and are taking on the world.
  
As the children of the boss grow up in a world where everyone knows their dad, they learn to deal with the pressure that comes with being a part of the most powerful family in the world.
  
Dean struggles with his relationship with his father and the pressure to become the new exemplary CEO, all while getting involved in an unrequited love with an older woman.
  
Kenneth and Carmen, having grown up the same age in the same grade, struggle understanding their feelings and boundaries. Kenneth tries to gain more independence while Carmen battles with her identity as an adopted Latinx woman.
  
Eve struggles finding herself and her role in the world, but once she finds a path she's set out on after falling in love with a girl, she's willing to do anything to reach her new goal, even if it means hurting her own family.
  
Gabriel, the youngest of the family, growing up gay with gay fathers, learns there's more to life than appearances as he finds himself falling for a very different kind of boy.
  
All the while, your favorite characters Emerson and Lafayette are dealing with their own struggles beyond parenthood as they age everyday.
  
Through affairs, love, heart break, death, and family - learn what happened to these five children who are emerging as young adults as the world around them caves in. 
      
[This story contains mature content: violence, sexual content, and language]

[You do not have to read The Boss in order to understand this story]

title: The Writer's Love Affair
description:
❝Writing was the love of my life until I met you.❞

• • •

Christopher Wells is a screenwriter and accomplished novelist. Being a New York Times best-selling author of steamy and controversial books, he is praised by women all over the world. Leslie Quinn thought she knew everything about being pushed to her limits until she begins working for him as his editor. Full of demands, he breaks the fantasy she has of him being a man of carnal chivalry. It's all pitchfork and fire until Leslie unknowingly becomes the main character in his latest book, all the while trying to bring his taboo acts written on page to life. But that becomes a challenge in and of itself with how surprisingly pure he is.

title: RUDE [George Weasley||Draco Malfoy]
description:
"Can I have your daughter for the rest of my life?"
"No"
"FATHER WHY?"
"You are already promised"

---
To marry someone usually means to attach yourself to someone you love, someone you trust, someone you could see yourself spending the rest of your life with. But what does that all mean when your parents have a different plan for you. A plan they never even told you about and caught you off guard with. They didn't only catch you offguard- no- they also caught your boyfriend. 

Alkyone- Ally- Denver was a strong Ravenclaw girl and usually doesn't take any bullshit, but even this time she  doesn't know how to escape those fine strings her parents built around her. Does she have to give up her love, George Weasley, for someone she doesn't even know?

---

"I don't even know him!"
"You'll will soon enough."
"I can't marry someone I don't even know, no matter of what use it is!"
"You can - just as many others around the world- and you will."

title: Painted Pretty ♡
description:
In a twist of fate, Ariah Martin's world flips upside down when she receives an invitation to a Christian summer camp. 

Little does she know that the charming guy she's been texting on a dating app, specifically made for trans people, is none other than the pastor's son.  

Step 1: Avoid him at all costs. Step 2: Repeat Step 1. But just when she thinks she's got it under control, Bryan Nguyen enters the scene, leaving her heart in chaos, but she hasn't disclosed to him yet. 

Caught between love and war, Ariah must navigate the unpredictable waters of summer romance, where keeping secrets might be her downfall or her saving grace.

title: Stiletto Sisterhood
description:
Stiletto Sisterhood is now published by W by Wattpad Books, available in paperback and E-book!
As a Wattpad reader, you can also access the Wattpad Published Edition here upon purchase, or read the Wattpad Original Edition for free.

                                                                       *****

When they first met, best friends Priya, Isobel, Caitlin, Eshe, and Shayne swore a vow: Chase dreams not drama. Now, years later . . .

                                                                       *****

Priya Seth is determined to win the coveted one-year mentorship with her idol at New York's hottest law firm. Her rival? Last night's hookup, Hadrian Marek. Despite having a privileged upper hand, Hadrian is willing to form an alliance. Priya's only condition? No sex.

Isobel Morgan is planning the perfect wedding, fighting to get the promotion she deserves, and caring for her dependent father. But when a video of her cheating fiancé goes viral, her world comes crashing down until she gets an offer that merges her passion for news and activism. The caveat? Long hours and travel away from her father.

As these young women discover that achieving dreams is often erratic, and drama is as inevitable as adulting, the foundation of their friendship begins to crack, putting their sisterhood to the test


[word count: 90,000-100,000 words]

description:
Black folks aren't a monolith. Black is a culture with subcultures. Black is rich, Black is poor... Black is peace, Black is war... Black evolves, Black creates... Black wasn't forced on us, we created Black by combining scraps of traditions lost to us with a twist on the Eurocentric wasteland we were stolen to. If Black ain't powerful? If Black ain't Black?!

i got something for all of us.

An anthology of thought.

title: Babineaux Bléu
description:
Siani Babineaux's plans were simple: finish her senior year at LSU, pursue her career as a freelance artist, and live happily ever after with her long distance boyfriend. Lyle Riperton, her then 4th-grade bully, changes all of that.
  
Entering her life eleven years later a reformed man, Siani has no problems of letting go of the past and building a friendship with the boy who made her life a living hell. 

But when Siani's proposal of camaraderie is taken as an opportunity for Lyle to jeopardize her current relationship and turns her world on its head, she wishes she'd never come in contact with him again.

title: The Road Of Autumn [Interracial/WWBM]✔️
description:
Autumn is a of many perfections and of course blemishes. "Keep your head up, and nothing will go wrong" is her motto. She lives her life as a successful visionary, dabbling in writing and freelance painting. An Irish background fuels her passion for whatever she pours her heart into. She has confidence, arrogance and a lot of spice. Sound's like the ideal person for a happy life huh? Guess again. 

Timothy is a well positively arrogant man with a "heart of gold" as most put it. Although an " entrepreneur of happiness" would be the correct terminology. His philosophy in life is simple: "Live and love and you'll forever be happy" and although he has had a rocky past where love is concerned, he keeps his heart open. He has confidence, uncensored banter and a lot of nice. Sounds like the total package that can handle anything. Maybe not so much.

These two have different focal points in life, but have a mutual need. This need can only be suppressed by a quirky doctor with arrogant comebacks and a fiery redhead with a smart mouth. 

When these unlikely two meet, they find more than what they bargained for. But, somehow between themselves, they find the spectacular thing that will bind them - love.

**WARNING:

Mild language, sexual situations, violence and clichè love story sequences. Do read at your own risk. Not advised for those  under the age of  thirteen.**

title: Cobweb Head
description:
Will hears things -- the fears and phobias of those around him. And when he's sent away to a foreign boarding school after an incident he caused with the new and dangerous side to this ability, he begins to realise there may be more to the school than he'd originally thought.
                                                                                                        |||

Windsor's Boarding School collects struggling kids from all over the globe -- and William Moore wants nothing to do with it. But when he finds a dangerous secret society living on the school grounds, one that uses nightmares as a way of magic, he realises they might be connected to his freakish ability. 

A stolen dream. An exiled student. A brewing war.

Making a risky deal with one of the members, Will finds himself drawn to the danger of his power and uncovers exactly what the society would do to him if they found it out.

[UNDER EDITING]

title: Like Lambs Led
description:
[ Former Wattpad Picks: Editor's Choice]
[2019 ONC Ambassador Pick]
[Open Novella Contest Longlist]
[Completed]

Moriah Hanlon is a new, biracial girl in Pachuck, Oklahoma trying to come to terms with her twin sister's death while also adjusting to her mom's psychotic episodes. 

When a foreign exchange student goes missing, Moriah discovers unsettling things about Pachuck's dark past. Things like kidnappings, sacrifices, and a weird obsession with hogs. After a secret club leaves letters addressed to her, claiming to "watch her", she fears she'll meet the same fate as the missing foreign exchange student. Now, Moriah has 24 hours to figure out who's behind the kidnappings, or she might be next.

Inspired by a writing prompt from The Open Novella Contest, Like Lambs Led gives us a glimpse into an Oklahoma town that's willing to kill for their secrets...


🐺 🐺 🐺

After competing on 'American Idol' and becoming a semi-finalist on 'The Voice', many of folks asked me when I'd write my story. I always found this curious since people didn't know I liked writing fiction in my spare time.

So after taking a brief sabbatical from releasing music, (shameless plug: you can find me on Spotify, Apple, SoundCloud, Pandora, etc.) I've decided to write Teen Fiction with themes that reflect my personal journey,



My works:



'Like Lambs Led',  (a Wattpad Featured Story) part of The Open Novella Contest,  is a teen thriller about a small Oklahoma town willing to kill for their secrets. Completed. 🐺

'They Shall Take Up Serpents', also part of The Open Novella Contest, is a teen paranormal thriller about a deadly, religious cult. On-going. 🐍

Mariana Martin, an introverted, sarcastic and pessimist girl's diary gets stolen and instead of looking for it, she takes this as a golden opportunity to erase her dark past and leave behind all her horrifying memories. She starts to recollect all the moments which warmed her bitter soul and she's mildly surprised that nearly all of them has her childhood ex-best friend in it, Isaac Connor. title: Betrayed ✔️
description:
Forced to team up with her hot-tempered nemesis, a cynical Analyst with a dark past must rescue a missing Agent in order to clear her name of murder. 

                                                  ***
Ada has done a damn good job of staying under the radar. Which is impressive considering she works at an organisation that is supposed to catch people who stay under the radar. She's created a facade so perfect that she's almost tricked herself into believing it's real.

But when Ada gets accused of murder, everything she has worked so hard to keep a secret comes spilling out. 

To add insult to injury, Ada must work with her enemy- Special Agent Jay Carter- to clear her name. They are soon tangled in a web of secrets and lies, not knowing who they can trust- not even each other.

Features: 
@humor DiverseLit Sept 2024

title: Catching Ara
description:
"Hello, Arabella." 

Even though I've only ever heard that deep, calm voice over the phone, I would recognize it anywhere. 

"Luca," I acknowledge as I meet the stunning, yet vicious gaze of my fiance.

"I would say it's lovely to finally meet you in person. However, given the circumstance, it wouldn't be appropriate," he said.

Then I heard him take off the safety of the gun that was now pressed against my head.


***

Arabella has always been privileged. She has never had to sacrifice a single thing in her eighteen years of life. So when she discovers that she's to be the sacrificial lamb that saves her family from ruin by way of marriage, she's outraged and unwilling. Thus, she creates an elaborate plan in which she steals four million dollars from her father before venturing off on her own not knowing when or if she's coming back. 

However, things are far from easy for her when her would be fiance ensues a manhunt to find and capture his unwilling bride.

***
Luka has always had the uncanny ability of getting whatever he set his sights on whether it be through his use of charm or more frequently, his ruthless and cruel nature.  As the heir to not one, but two major crime families, ruthlessness and cruelty comes easily to him.  However, what isn't coming to him easily is his little bride to be. Unwilling to allow the escape of the girl he's been promised, Luka ensures the return of his bride by placing a bounty on her head worth ten million dollars. He soon realizes that Arabella is far more elusive than he originally thought, but he will stop at nothing to get her back.
Tous Droits Réservés

About author:-

A 20-year-old who loves to live in delulu.
Having a passion for photography/cinematography but ended up pursuing the medical field 🙃👍🏼    (10-15 years from now, you might come across a short film/web series recorded/directed by me)


Writing journey:-

Wrote my first work in December 2021, hiding it in the notes app of my phone;

Finally, in June 2023, gathered enough courage to publish;

Not knowing that soon it will turn into what people call a hobby.

I happily admit that I found my first hobby at the age of 19;

I wish I had found it earlier; how much better I would have been at writing by now.

But nevertheless, as people say, better late than never.

So here I am trying to get better at my first hobby until I find the next one;

Right now, my work is pretty mediocre, but so am I in every field of life. There's nothing bad in it as long as I am trying to improve :)

So I request you to please always share your honest feedback to help me get better at my first hobby :D

title: Back to Us
description:
Claudia Mori only has one goal in order to survive winter break: Avoid being home at all costs. So when she runs into Lucas Elwood, her old crush who she hasn't seen since high school, she can't resist hanging out with him - even though she knows she should be staying far, far away.
  
What Claudia doesn't know is that Lucas already has big plans for them. And when those include spending time together at her family's log cabin in the middle of nowhere, Claudia can't decide whether it's going to be a complete disaster or the best two weeks of winter break ever. 
  
Only one thing is for certain. First love never dies.

title: Something lived, Something felt
description:
It's said you are likely to find a partner where you study or work, I beg to differ. Some wouldn't mind a partner from another tribe or race but a lot more trust to marry from their tribe. Most people find it unrealistic and somewhat impossible to be open to interracial relationships. But with the hate going on in this world the least we can do is fall in love where ever love finds us, we shouldn't push people away solely because of their tribe or race. Some can't even stand being friend with other tribes or race. Let's spread love as far as we can and at the end of it all we will realize that we couldn't be tribalist or racist even if we wanted because we would all finally be one. At least that is the dream, And dreams starts from some where.

****
This is a story about diversity and building bridges. Finding love and putting faith in Allah to guide the halalway. The bittersweet life offers, the stuggle families go through and the strenght and love they have to over come the pain and the obstacles.

title: Did You Get Your Period?
description:
YOU CAN NOW LISTEN TO THE HINDI AUDIOBOOK, just on Audible!

[ FEATURED ON WATTPAD INDIA'S JANUARY 2020 READING LIST: TEEN FICTION]


A typical Indian family. A bit conservative, quite pushy and forcefully loving. 

And in the middle of that sits Shweta. She's a spunky eighteen year old with a mind of her own and a sassy mouth to match. She's got her own views about her life and doesn't hesitate letting other people know about it. Only it doesn't often bode well for her.

This time, Shweta's really done it. She's done the unforgivable deed and lost her virginity to a boy who isn't even her boyfriend. Yet. 

If that wasn't enough, her period's gone missing.

What happens when Shweta tells her mother the truth? Drama, of course. Only she hadn't expected things to fall apart as drastically as they do.

Join Shweta as she tries to brush off slut shaming, keep her head high and try to find a place for herself in the judgy, conservative world.

Will she succeed? Or will she bow her head and allow society to bend her into shape like countless before her?

A coming-of-age story.

[WORD COUNT: 51,000 WORDS]

COMPLETED.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"You, yourself are enough reason to write."

Grew up in the hills. Loves cats, sunny mornings, oranges in winter and literature. Hopeless romantic. Vibes with the Dark Academia aesthetic, is in Ravenclaw.

I write because writing feels like home.

I write because I thought I lost myself but in between commas and rhythmic parameters I learnt how to be whole again.

I write because I have something to say.

Thank-you, if you've made it till here. And thankyou if you're one of my precious readers.

title: The Lady Penitent
description:
"It is an army of one purpose: the destruction of the world of men."

It has been a thousand years since the Revealing and the shattered world remains as bitterly divided as ever. Magic, rare and dangerous, rules the battlefield alongside knights in armor. Demons of a forgotten age hunt the darkness. Dragons and monsters stalk the wilderness. In the west, an ancient evil stirs and only a few stand between the world and the brink.

At the center of the storm is the Lady Penitent, Holland Cea Trădată, a former servant of the demon lords now caught between a love she can never have and the echoes of an ancient prophecy. More sorcery than woman, she can feel the call of demons in her half-hollow heart. The lines blur, loyalties war, and the whispers of the Deceiver threaten to corrupt her soul...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I do not do well writing about myself, which is why I live in fictional worlds instead of writing much in a journal. I've been writing for a while now (read: years) and I unfortunately don't have as much time to read or write as I'd like at the moment. title: Astral Genealogy: Shadows of Etheria
description:
Faernia and Eris: two great civilizations ruled by fairies and dragons respectively. Rune, the Oshawott crown prince of Eris, is tasked with revitalising a peace treaty to prevent war between the two planets. He is thrust from a comfortable life of royal pampering and into a dangerous journey to marry a woman he has never met.

As the pressure of the public challenging laws set by legendary Pokémon grows, Rune must change the course of tradition and forge a new legend in this tale that spans his childhood, adulthood, and fatherhood beyond. No matter when or where, shadows of conflict will test more than his ideals and will for peace.

-2017 HaruMiju-

title: Soft Body
description:
Ruby Rios is fat(ish) and needs a job. Her nights of wine and Netflix don't pay the bills and don't help her get fit. She applies everywhere, including various gyms, or: the last places she'd ever want to work. Coworkers who talk about protein powder and bulging veins? Pass. That is, until the older and very attractive Tucker DiAngelo gives her a call.

Tucker DiAngelo is the owner of Roman Elite Fitness, a rapidly growing chain of gyms that are rapidly giving him more and more headaches. To make things worse, his ex-wife and semi-business partner is making a power play that he can't quite figure out yet. He just wants a little pleasurable peace... and maybe an exciting girl to share it with.
*****************************************************
"Do you like to show pride in your work, Ruby?" The question came out of his mouth before his brain could stop it.
	"Are you asking me professionally or personally?" She put her hand on her hip and rested her hand on the mop. There was authority in the stance. Tucker loved it.
	"Personally. We don't have to be professional anymore, Ruby."
	"Oh no, Tucker? Be careful with that. I might tell you all my secrets," Ruby said. She looked him dead in the eye, unflinching, confident. Tucker felt seen and he didn't care. He wanted to know all her secrets and create more for her. With her.
	She turned from him and started mopping again. Her butt wiggled with every stroke now, like she wanted him to watch her. So much sass in such a mundane movement.
	"Ruby, I mean it."
	She looked back at him over her shoulder, her eyes wide and eyelashes batting. She gave a tiny shrug with her whole body.
  	"I don't doubt that you do, Tucker."
	She turned around, narrowly missing Tucker biting his fist in raw frustration.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm too cool for the Midwest, I've decided.

I am terrible at commitments and excellent at spotting attractive people.

All my stories are mature because I write real life and real life is hardly G rated.

I'm not here for stories with obnoxious titles, no matter how popular they are, nor am I here for rude ass behavior.

Currently pretending like I'm not a hopeless romantic.

title: The Paradox of Us
description:
For Evan Kieth, 17, moving in with the Travis family seemed that it was going to be nothing out of the ordinary for him. He had been weaving throughout the foster system for years after a life-altering accident left him in a wheelchair and without a stable home. What he wasn't expecting, however, was his introverted personality and rough exterior to be broken by the perky teenage girl next door. 

Sophie Portman, 16, had lived in coastal South Carolina her whole life. She's your typical lively, captivating, and caring spirit that inspires. The summer after her junior year of high school seems like it is going to be her best yet. A week into summer break, her plans change when a new foster boy moves in with the family next door. 

Sophie and Evan are thrown out of their comfort zones when they come together. To anyone, the collision of these opposite souls might seem groundless. But with some bold moves and self-growth, they find that their bond might not be catastrophic. Maybe, just maybe, it could result in something that exceeds either of their expectations. 

Life is full of paradoxes, and this is the story of theirs.

title: Flytrap | WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST
description:
When men vanish around the city, a young, paraplegic detective takes it upon herself to uncover the truth and soon realizes the culprit might be a lot closer to home than she imagined. 
  
****

Barbara Gordon thought her career as a promising young detective ended after she was left crippled in a tragic accident. But when men start disappearing around the city, Barbara is given one more opportunity to fulfill her dream. Convinced her dad's new fiancee is not who she seems, Barbara begins her own investigation and discovers she might be responsible for the recent string of disappearances. 

But a darker truth lies just below the surface. If this once would-be detective wants to solve the case, then she must accept the help of some even more mysterious--and possibly dangerous--allies.

title: Forgiving  You (Dublin Sisters #2)
description:
She was abandoned on her wedding day. 

The groom disappeared. 

There were accusations. 

Her honour was at stake. 

Her family was to be ruined. 

One man saved her from all this misery or was it to be yet another trial that she will face... 

Nawal Ahmed has been the adoring sister of her three brothers. She was pampered and spoiled. She was loved and doted on. She was loud, mischievous and sometimes wild. Her wedding was set. Her groom was a loving successful man. Or was it all an illusion. 

Salman Siddique had been admiring his cousin since childhood. He loved her passionately. He was amused by her outgoing character. He never wanted to see tears in her eyes. It was he who saved her from ruination. But did this mean that his dream was to come true. 

Read and find out how Nawal's innocence and troublesome personality will lead her to deception and deceit. And Salman's love is to be tested.... 

Content Warning: Some of the content may not be appropriate for young or sensitive people as there is an implicit reference to sexual activity, physical violence and strong language. Although, the book should pass for PG15.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Some stories are not told but read"

Books are not only my hobby but my passion. Love reading happy endings - there are too many hardships in life to read any sad endings.

Writing has become an addiction. My books focus on aspects of our lives that are ignored or too ashamed to speak of but nevertheless they affect us in more ways than we can imagine. I would advice that some of the content in my books is mature so most of my books are PG15.

Dublin Sisters Series:
1. Finding You (Currently editing)

authorBio:
I grew up in a small town in Appalachia in the twenty-teens and now live in New York City's Greenwich Village. Way more exciting! I love to write about masculine athletic gay males, older teens and new adult, depicting them as they really are without stereotype or trope for a realistic story.

title: A Giant's Hands [ON HOLD]
description:
"Nᴇᴀʀʟʏ ᴀʟʟ ᴍᴇɴ ᴄᴀɴ sᴛᴀɴᴅ ᴀᴅᴠᴇʀsɪᴛʏ, ʙᴜᴛ ɪғ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴀɴᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴛᴇsᴛ ᴀ ᴍᴀɴ's ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ, ɢɪᴠᴇ ʜɪᴍ ᴘᴏᴡᴇʀ." ― Aʙʀᴀʜᴀᴍ Lɪɴᴄᴏʟɴ 
        
      ❉❉❉
        
  When you are 5 inches tall, who can you trust?
        
Bᴇɴɴᴇᴛᴛ ᴍɪɢʜᴛ mean her no harm when he discovers a tiny young woman in his kitchen, but faced with something he never believed possible, he now finds himself having to fight an inner battle to suppress a whole host of strange new impulses and desires.
He wants to do what is right, but when you literally hold the life of another in your hands, it just seems so easy to do what you want instead...
Aɴᴅ ᴡʜɪʟᴇ Bennett must yet discover if he is Man or Monster, Martin is running for his very life trying to escape his former captor, only to suddenly find himself at the mercy of a stranger... 
        
      ❉❉❉
        
A ʀᴀᴄᴇ ᴏғ ᴛɪɴʏ ᴘᴇᴏᴘʟᴇ has been living their lives on the fringes of the human world.
They don't remember where they came from, or how they lived before. 
Only one thing is certain: 
Their society is falling apart. 
        
Tʀɪʙᴇs ᴀɴᴅ families are split by accidents, never to find each other again, others get lost, with no way of returning home in a world that is too vast for them to conquer on their own.
        
Fᴏʀ sᴏᴍᴇ, revealing themselves to humans and relying on the help of those gigantic creatures might be the only chance they have.
For others ... not so much.
        
Tʜɪs ɪs ᴛʜᴇ sᴛᴏʀʏ ᴏғ ᴡʜᴀᴛ ʜᴀᴘᴘᴇɴs, ᴡʜᴇɴ ᴛʜᴏsᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ sᴇᴇᴍɪɴɢʟʏ ᴜɴʟɪᴍɪᴛᴇᴅ ᴘᴏᴡᴇʀ ᴍᴇᴇᴛ ᴛʜᴏsᴇ ᴜᴛᴛᴇʀʟʏ ᴡɪᴛʜᴏᴜᴛ.
Enjoy!
        
[FULL AUDIO will be included in future] - [WARNING: Cᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ʙᴇɪɴɢ ᴇᴅɪᴛᴇᴅ]

title: The Girl With The Sunset Eyes {Historical Interracial Romance/ #1 Blake Series}
description:
{London 1795} Katherine Ayim is resold illegally after running away from her master.  Her new owner is known for his benevolent nature and approachable character. But, the middle class business man is overly protective of his investment. How good can a man be if he buys a slave? Or will be able to let go of the girl with the sunset eyes?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Forewarning: I love talking and I think my intro shows that. Sorry!

I started writing in May 2011, after fruitlessly pursuing other past times. But, writing has become a release, a love and an art to me. I hope to one day write a historical fiction novel which makes wider audiences think beyond their own problems because there are so many. I hope to do this with relatable characters, fascinating eras in history and a little bit of luck.

I keep my cringe earlier works because it shows where I started from. My readers feed my writing soul. I thank every one of you. My pledge from 2016 is I will read and cherish and reply to every comment and vote. Apart from that, I'd say my books reflect my growth as a writer and there's not much else for me to say...

Regarding reading requests: I adore undiscovered literature/ authors so I will take requests but I might take a day or two. Also just message and say hi.

Outside writing, I'm a second year medical student :) Medical doctor in 2021 if all goes well!

Yours,

Meepy ©

Admin:

Blake Series: A 2 part series following William Blake and Katherine Ayim. No 3rd part due to other commitments. Youtube trailers are below:

The Girl With Sunset Eyes: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YYfuv2kttp0
The Man In Silk Chains: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mdlrozd9PyA

Current Updates Summer 2016:

I am replying to comments from 2011-2016 now because I was applying to medical school so I was focusing on my application. I came from an underprivileged school and I am the first person in my family to go to university. I was just exhausted and writing and replying was too much.  But, that's not an excuse. I love hearing back and I will be a lot better now.

Current Story: Coming of Age (also interracial historical romance) called Workshop of the World. Weekly to Biweekly updates

Editing: UHW and TGWTSE

title: Bitches Broken Hearts
description:
Get ready for teen drama, messed-up relationships, deep secrets and murders with these bitches broken hearts!
  
  ~

  Lena and Rowan; the popular duo.

  Michelle and Joseph; the strong relationship.

  Tony and Wyatt; the gay partners.


  These are the most well-known couples from Katerina High since they started freshman year. Literally, everyone knows that no one can break such beautiful and precious bond between the three couples. No one.

  Well, they thought wrong.

  The three most valuable couples from their high school are separated - forever. Out of nowhere, Lena, Michelle, and Tony become single in a normal day. What happened? The school never truly knows the reasons, or at least they know that the rumors going around are too unbelievable. 

  Are they?

  Never leave broken hearts unloved because once they fully shatter, everyone around them gets cut by their pieces.
