title: HONEYDEW (A murder mystery)
description:
#1 What's hot list


Aleena is extremely distraught by her father's tragic death. But what follows is a series of bone-chilling occurrence. She is watched. Her every action is tapped. A mysterious man lurks in the dark. The thriller unravels dark secrets, Romance, Murder and a traitor.

******

It was time to leave the wedding venue and Aahil took brisk strides towards me. He looked as fresh and elegant as he had at the start of the ceremony while I felt spent and drained with exertion.

As we walked towards the exit with my hand firmly held by Aahil, he bent his head and spoke in a barely audible whisper, "You really want to find out what it is like being married to me?"  he bit out with a flash of pure fire in his mesmeric gaze.

"You will wish every minute of the day that you stayed where you belonged and you will be begging to be out of this relationship before the reason for which I had to go through this charade comes to an end!"

authorBio:
Assalamu alaikum.

**Welcome to the family of voracious readers**

Content / Engagement Ambassador / Outreach.




******


To be a part:

*Leave behind volumes of comments on my books. 
*You could write #voracious reader on my message board.


******
~A little talent is a good thing to have if you want to be a writer. But the only real requirement is the ability to remember every scar~


Stephen King


******

'I am a beautiful princess who lives in a castle of a faraway land with my handsome prince.' lol :)

I am introvert or extrovert depending on the people am dealing with.

Reading books till late night, drinking coffee, gaining Islamic knowledge, going on long drives and day dreaming are my love.

Caffeine is bae.

Purple is mesmerizing.

I am someone who could eat all the dishes in the world and not put on an ounce.

Currently my favourite word is 'Commented' (I hope you know why) **smiles**

I could still read famous five, Mallory towers, Nancy drew, fairy tales lol. I could gobble up huge volumes of books in a single go.

Harry potter is a all time favourite too (I practically cried the whole day while Sirius passed away).

I have found my Mr.darcy ;) The knight in shining armour lol. Alhamdulillah I'm married and a happy mother of an year old twin boys:) 

Last but not the least I hope to become a better muslimah with each passing day.

-------------

There are a thousand hardships I face,
A million times my heart breaks.

A never ending darkness I see,
And it owerpowers and weakness me at my seams.

But still there is a ray of hope in my fate,
Which has the power to diminish all calamities with ease.

And whose promise can be so unbreakable and true,
Other than my lord who says 'Surely after hardship comes ease'.

-voracious_writer.






I do take reading requests.

A retelling of the colonization period like you have never heard before!
  
  Halia never knew the Elders' ancient way of life. She was a nymph born in a dark alley of a human town, far from nature, and had never left it. One day, in 1534, a frenzy took over the community as they are offered a new life in a newly discovered world.
  
  They hoped for the best but, as they soon found out, things wouldn't turn out the way they had hoped.

authorBio:
THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR YOUR SUPPORT, DEAR READERS! I COULDN'T DO IT WITHOUT YOU ALL! ;)

Born in Quebec, Canada from French speaking parents, I have an unconditional love for languages (I speak French, English, Spanish and Portuguese), nature, gastronomy and literature. My passion for writing first manifested at age 13 when I wrote my first poems to describe my feelings of alienation from the other kids my age. 

I have published three books in French so far:

- A short book of poems written after being the victim of a rape (La hantise du secret : poèmes écrits suite à un viol);
- A memoir dealing with my childhood, my anorexia and difficult relationship with my mother, (Larmes d'espoir : Une adolescence brisée). I received very good critics for this book, which is being sold in Canada, France, Belgium, Switzerland, Togo as well as some francophone stores in the U.S and the U.K.
- An anthology of famous and less famous fairy tales (Il était une fois...Une anthologie de contes merveilleux).

My name was featured in several magazines, namely L'Express Toronto, Hollywood and Vine Magazine and Le Cliché in Togo.

In 2005, I participated and won a poetry contest in college which enabled me to receive a scholarship to pursue my studies.

CHECK OUT MY WEBSITE :)  http://alexisstclement.blogspot.ca/
#DiverseLit

title: Resisting Aaron Wells
description:
Zoey Jones falls head over heels in love with a man she met in a grocery store, someone who quickly became a close friend to her. 

Aaron fell deeply in love with a woman he approached in a grocery store, whom he just had to get to know. Little did he know she'd end up becoming the centre of his life. 

Little did they both know that their friendship would erupt after one hot steamy night. One night neither regret but Aaron would regret the morning after. 

Left alone in a bed too ashamed to tell the tale of being left after a night of passion, what happens to the pair when Aaron is reintroduced into Zoey's life but this time as... her best friends partner. 

-

"We shouldn't be doing this," I breathed out, his face a mere centimetre away from mine, "April could walk in at any moment." I rasp turning my face from his.

I didn't want him to move, I needed to feel his lips on mine once more. It had been far too long since I had felt them. 

"I know," His breath fans my neck, "But I don't care," he lifts my head slowly our noses touching, "I've stayed away from you for far too long. I need you, Zoe."

As if setting a light his touch ignited my core and I almost let out a moan as he grabs me. Holding me in place as his lips connect with mine and the fire in my pit returns. 

I do nothing to stop the guilt that tries to pull at me for betraying my best friend, instead I reach my hands up and tug at his curls. Oh how I've missed them.

*warning: quite a bit of sexy time in this one.*

Copyright © Mbalii 2020

title: Hana & Hanaan | ✓
description:
Sisters torn apart by the fragility of the heart, how can love possibly hurt so much?

Hana Junaid decided two years ago, distance would make her younger sister Hanaan more independent but Hanaan's love and yearning for Hana during this time has drowned not just herself but also Hana in a series of Instagram messages with a boy who listens and converses with her so well. What shows on the screen is not what's behind it and the chaos that follows with photoshopped pictures tests Hana's patience and endurance. 

Added to the mess is the dynamic Nashwa, fighting her own love battles. Hanaan's cerebral palsy, rendering her coordination haphazard. Young boys daring to be more than themselves in big lawyer conspiracies. Hearts shall certainly flutter wild. 

So when the strings of the heart are tangled with so much sophistication, Hana's integrity hangs on a hook and Hanaan is deep in a coma after her online friend turns to a vile foe, will love survive or will fragile compassionate hearts be shattered furthermore?

They say the sensitive do not make it far in this cruel cruel world.

This is a story that aims to change precisely that.

#LoveYourself #FeelThePain

A WATTPAD FEATURED STORY ⭐

title: Celestia
description:
Celeste is the daughter of the Citizen Principia, but when she stumbles upon a conspiracy and is kidnapped by rebels, the future of Verium rests in her hands.
 
                                                                      *****
 
Celeste Navarie is the sixteen-year-old daughter of the Citizen Principia, which means she lives a life of privilege in a dystopian world that allows no personal freedom. Celeste dreams of adventure and smuggles herself beyond the walls regularly, to purchase books and documents from the outside world. During her journeys, she uncovers a conspiracy: members of the palace staff are part of the rebellion, and she finds evidence her father is a murderous tyrant. Not sure who to trust, Celeste is kidnapped and has no way to escape. The future of Verium rests on Celeste's shoulders, and if she makes a mistake it will doom not just her, but everyone.

description:
[COMPLETED] ❝Sometimes two people have to fall apart to realize how much they need to fall back together.❞ 

 Celeste Sawyer and Archer Rossi have been best-friends since childhood. That is until a heartbreaking event, Archer is involved in a dreadful accident that wipes his entire memory clean of everything in the past... including Celeste. Celeste watches Archer rise to popularity, watches as he befriends the popular kids, and watches as he forgets all about her. Until Celeste is tired of just watching and decides to attend her childhood best friends family barbecue, after months of ignoring the family, in hopes of rekindling their friendship. Celeste is willing to do absolutely anything possible to get her best friend back. 

Will he remember her? Or continue to forget? Will they continue to drift apart? Or will Celeste realize he's not only her best friend but the love of her life?

title: Counterfactual
description:
Rowan was just here to be a ghostwriter. Investigating a small town's folklore and its connection to a real life murder wasn't part of his contract.       
 
                                                                  	*****
 
Rowan Underwood promised himself he'd do one last gig as a ghostwriter, tired of hearing everyone say how good of an opportunity it is. Bags packed, he moves to a small town in Nova Scotia, hands full of mythology and folklore books to write the work of a lifetime, and even has the help of Isla Guerreiro, small and fierce. When the myths become reality, when he's not entirely sure reality is what it appears to be, Rowan must do everything in his power to find out the truth about a murder before his name cannot be cleared any longer.

title: The Class Reject: A Damsel in Disguise (Featured Story)
description:
It didn't take long for junior Miren Eze to realize that high school is just an academic cover up for hell.

Especially when she is terrorized daily by Penelope van Helsing, a friend turned evil nemesis. After a cruel prank at an assembly for a coveted award leaves Miren scholarship-less and practically expelled, she's left with no options until her best friend Chara suggests she transfers to the neighboring all-boys school. With the help of Chara's computer hacking boyfriend, they devise a plan that is stupid, risky, and requires plenty of gauze.

But what seems like a bad plot of a rom-com ends up having harsher ramifications than Miren could have ever anticipated. Especially when Jeno, her handsome but cold roommate, discovers her secret - and sees the disguise as the perfect opportunity to get revenge on Penelope. 

MEAN GIRLS meets SHE'S THE MAN in a humorous, but darker tale of identity and redemption.

title: Brushstrokes In The Big Apple
description:
Nandi, a gifted Xhosa artist from South Africa, moves to New York City with dreams as vibrant as her paint palette. Juggling art school, cleaning opulent penthouses, and pulling shifts at a lively café, she fights to make her mark in a city that thrives on ambition and creativity.

Nico, a free-spirited musician born into privilege, yearns for a life outside the gilded cage of his wealthy family. When a chance encounter brings Nandi and Nico together, their connection feels like destiny-a blend of brushstrokes and melodies that create a masterpiece neither expected.

As their love blossoms amidst the bustling streets of the Big Apple, they must navigate the challenges of their contrasting worlds. Can they find harmony in their differences, or will the city's demands tear them apart?

A heartwarming tale of love, resilience, and self-discovery, Brushstrokes in the Big Apple will inspire you to chase your dreams no matter the odds.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: "I write worlds I've never seen, dreams I've only imagined, and scenarios that linger in my mind. I craft conversations I've never had, comebacks I've never voiced, and words I wish I could take back. Through writing, I live the life I long for and share the deepest parts of me-so you can see them too."

title: Icebound
description:
The harsh winters and freezing blizzards of the tundra are all familiar to Anyu. Living amongst her tribe in the frozen wasteland, she has learned to survive and fend for herself. But when she is lost in a strange blizzard, Anyu finds herself in a world of creatures, spirits, and magic that she has only heard of in legends. Led by her mysterious guide Kano, Anyu searches for a way back home. But before she can leave, she will have to discover the truth about herself and the land she calls home. What has Anyu's tribe been keeping hidden? What is her connection to this strange new world?

And what are the secrets hidden beneath the ice?

title: Cyberpunk Heart
description:
In Neo Milano, where megastructures block out the sun and survival is measured in credits, Luca Rossi shares a tiny apartment with his mother Sofia, holding onto pieces of their Italian heritage in a world dominated by corporate control. By day, he's a data entry clerk for CyberTech; by night, he dreams of something more than the dim existence of the low levels.

Everything changes when he meets Marcus Zhang at a charging station, minutes away from a fatal heart shutdown. In a world where every credit counts, Luca's impulsive act of kindness sparks something neither man expected: hope. But Marcus harbors dangerous secrets about the corporation that keeps them all surviving, and some truths, once learned, can never be unknown.

As their romance blooms in the shadows of the megacity, Luca discovers that the corporate world he thought he knew holds darker truths than he ever imagined. Now he must choose between staying safe in the dark or risking everything to bring light to the levels that corporate power forgot. But in Neo Milano, even falling in love might be an act of rebellion.

"Cyberpunk Heart" is a gay romance set in a gritty cyberpunk future, where love becomes an act of resistance, family ties run deeper than corporate loyalty, and the most dangerous thing you can do is trust someone else with your heart.

[Content Warning: This story contains themes of corporate control, loss, technological body modification, and subtle hints of violence within a cyberpunk setting. It also features LGBTQ+ romance, strong family bonds, and themes of resistance against oppression.]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Zachary Steele is a storyteller with a passion for weaving tales that blend the extraordinary with the deeply personal. From the magical streets of modern-day cities to the neon-lit futures of tomorrow, Zachary's novels explore love, identity, and the complexities of the human condition, often through the lens of speculative fiction. With a flair for creating immersive worlds and unforgettable characters, Zachary's stories invite readers to escape the ordinary and dive into the heart of the unknown.

Zachary's work spans genres, including supernatural mystery, science fiction, and contemporary romance, always with an emphasis on emotional depth and character-driven narratives. Whether it's an android learning to feel, a witch trying to find their place in the modern world, or a young man discovering long-buried family secrets, Zachary's books captivate readers with their unique blend of adventure, intrigue, and heartfelt emotion.

When Zachary isn't writing, you can find him exploring new ideas, working on his latest novel, or connecting with readers who share his love of all things speculative and romantic.

title: Behold the Scalded
description:
Wattys Shortlist 2022! | Kyla Shepard, a sixteen-year-old orphan who conjures massive ink-like creatures with her thoughts, must learn to tame the monsters before they consume everything in their path, including her. 

                                  ****

While surviving in the blackened two-mile radius within the quiet city dubbed The Scalded, Kyla Shepard befriends fellow survivors, Lilac and Hermit, who attempt to help her tame her imaginings before they run rampant and destroy everything with a pulse, including them.

But when a group of city men infiltrate The Scalded to kill anything living and take back the land, Kyla attempts to fight fire with fire by training her imaginings to defend the place she calls home. As the monsters grow in strength, her attempts to tame the beasts might not only place the city and its residents in danger but cause her to lose the one thing she needs to succeed ... her power.

title: You Are Most Welcome Alpha
description:
"Mine!"

"Okay. Yeah, that's great and all, but you see things are more complicated than you just growling 'mine' and with me becoming yours."

"My Mate," He growled again, making me face palm myself from his failure to understand how bad the situation actually was.

"I heard you the first time but allow me the honors to repeat myself. I can't just become yours upon said words!"

That last bit seemed to enrage him more but he kept it from rising in his tone as he gradually had backed me into the bark of a tree. He had that terrifying coldness that could've haunted me for ages with what he said next. "Why?"

"Why! Because I'm brown!"

....

Growing up different in a community of desi people is hard. Mani has grown up with traditional teachings and values, but is unable to speak the language even if her life depended on it. She wouldn't have minded being different but it's the perspective of others that shape an individual's identity in her city. Struggling to find an identity for herself at her local high school and traditional community, imagine what would happen if a certain Alpha were thrown into the equation. 

Since the beginning she'd desired to be the Mate of one but how could she get him to understand the hardships of being brown?

title: The Maad Doctor [The Maad Series #1]
description:
On a night where everything changes, Don and Sky are on separate missions that take place at the same event. By the end of the night, the two become the talk of Virtue City without anyone knowing who they really are. And by the next day, they are the most wanted people in Sin City.
        
Every second that passes, someone new and desperate joins in on the bounty to catch them--dead or alive. So when the two cross paths and realize what the other has done, they embark on an adventure full of steam-powered gadgets and machinery, all in an attempt to stay alive for as long as possible. 

But what they don't know is: On that fateful night in Virtue City, their actions gave birth to The Maad Doctor.

title: The Wolf Among Us (Completed)
description:
Estera Montenegro grew up knowing one thing: she needs to be a wolf to survive. 

As an Enforcer in her community, it's her job to face off with law-breaking members in an arena while citizens watch. But when fate takes a drastic turn, she finds herself injured and homeless.

That is until she crosses paths with Magnus Juarez. 

His community supplies electricity to the entire region, which makes them vital in the wasteland. Little does he know he just allowed a wolf through their gates because Estera is willing to do anything to survive and she's hungry for revenge on the people who wronged her. 

* 
* 
*

authorBio:
Cofounder of @WritersConnx
🅦🅐🅣🅣🅟🅐🅓 🅢🅣🅐🅡 2019-2023
🅒🅡🅔🅐🅣🅞🅡 2022-Present

I'm an insomniactic daydreamer (that's me in the photo). I'm married, a mother of 2 rambunctious Terrier breeds, I'm a proud Aunt, y soy Latina 🇳🇮🇲🇽 My stories contain Latin MCs and usually take place in San Francisco since it's my hometown, so naturally, I think it's a spectacular setting. I write in whatever genre the wind steers me, but always with morally grey characters in chaotic settings.

When I'm not reading and writing, I'm working in healthcare analyzing cardiac arrhythmias. It's something I'm very proud of, considering my struggles with ADHD and Dyslexia. So no matter what people tell you, don't give up!


Some of my accomplishments on Wattpad:
● Top 5 Winner (4th place) in final round of Open Novella Contest 2021
● Round One Winner (2nd place) Open Novella Contest 2021
● Paid Anthology - The One That Got Away
● Featured writer.
● Top 20 in 2019 Standouts
● 2018 Wattys Shortlist.
● 2nd place in 2017 A Step Forth contest.
● Top 25 for Lenovo Back to School contest.
● Winner of the Scifriday challenge #18

If you happen to come across my stories, please feel free to leave a comment. I'm always looking to improve them and make sure they flow well or make sense. Writing is very personal, and it takes guts to take what you've manifested in your thoughts and formulate them into actual words for people to judge. You're allowing readers into your mind. So have courage and be kind to one another :)

Hopefully, you'll enjoy my contribution to the Wattpad world! Cheers.

title: Hopelessly Hung Up On You
description:
Jacob who has been a hopeless romantic his whole life and just broke up with his first boyfriend Max decides to use his winter break to de-stress from the craziness of last semester and step back from his love life. He ends up meeting Derek, a new co-worker at his uncle's comic book store, and quickly catches feelings for him. The chemistry between the two seems to be undeniable but the only thing is...Jacob and Derek can't be together. No matter how hard he tries, Jacob tries to get over Derek and he just can't. No matter what his head says he can't ignore how his heart feels. "Hopelessly Hung Up On You" is a story about love, introspection, and life. It focuses on Jacob's journey in this game called life, against one of his biggest rivals, love, and is sure to be a wild ride.

title: Dragons of Marak: Book 1, Wings & Sword
description:
[Revised as of 10/01/2020]

Ana Perez comes from wealth and power. But her father, a business tycoon in the land of Marak, hates dragons. That makes things a little complicated when she runs into a water cobra dragon named Cee, and bonds with him.

Still, she would not give him up for anything. Marak is a land where the dragons exist in all shapes and sizes. Cee is blue, snake-like, and wet. Others are stony, with turtle shells and dragonfly wings. A few have crimson scales, fur, and long limbs. Some are as large as a carriage, others twice that size, and others as small as a gartner snake.

Cee is overconfident, dogged, and charismatic. Ana is smart, good-hearted, and stylish. They form an unbreakable bond. Partners for life.

The dragons of Marak can equip to their partners as weapons. But Cee is more than just an object to Ana. He's a friend. As she spends time with him, she grows. But there are secrets in Marak. Not everyone sees dragons as friends. Ana's naive. The wealth and power among her country's industrialists is a front for small hearts and stubborn men. Ana can't stay blind forever.

[ NOTE: Story is complete!! This is a first draft and I am open to critiques on it as I have plans to revise. NEW NOTE: I am working on another round of revisions right now! I will update the story on here in mid to late September, when I complete all revisions. NEWEST NOTE: Updates DONE!]

authorBio:
"When I see effects and I'm unable to discern the cause, my faith in reason and consequences is shaken."
"Then what happens?"
"Two plus two equals four. I put sugar in my coffee, and it tastes sweet. The sun comes up because the world turns. These things are beautiful to me. There are mysteries I will never understand. But everywhere I look, I see proof that for every effect there is a corresponding cause, even if I can't see it. I find that reassuring."
"And life is good again."
"Life is very good."

title: The Enemy Beside Me + The Liar Beside Me (Book 1 and 2)
description:
In a not-so-distant future, the world has been divided. The prospering countries label themselves as Zones, while the defeated are left behind to fend for themselves.

Sixteen-year-old Jaxon "Jax" Evans belongs to Zone 3, previously known as the United Kingdom. And like the unaffected survivors, he is arrogant and lavishes his privileges. This soon might change when his mother sends him to Zone 1, formerly known as Japan.  Unlike the other Zones, Zone 1 takes humility and discipline rather seriously.

Still thinking he has no reasons to change, Jaxon does what he does best: being a brat. Fate laughs at him as a mysterious and quiet child named Eien tells him he is a dangerous person. And the kid might be right. Luckily for him, he finds a group that can teach him how to control his raw power. Or is he indeed lucky when anyone could be his enemy?

"The element of surprise, suspense, culture and diversity and humour blend to form a novel with a wonderful plot and so much promise!"
- Z's Choice...Of Words 

"Your story is flawless in terms of plot and you present an image of being completely aware of this world you're playing with already, which is brilliant." 

"Believable, well-thought-out and definitely something to spend an evening and coffee on."
-The Book Review Shop

"You have a lot of strengths in writing, and it does show. Your writing style holds a mark, and I found it to be quite distinctive."
-ElysiumKingdom Diamond Review Shop 

"I haven't read such a well-written book in a long time. Your story is just fantastic! I love the way it flows, the storyline...everything."
-The Premiere's review shop

"There's so much suspense and mystery that leaves the readers wanting more."
- Kanna Script Review Shop

title: Piece Simul ✔
description:
Russ, a former janitor, is now second-in-command on a mission to find a cure for The Storm. The Storm eradicated those sixty and older. There might be a cure, but not on Earth. After each newly discovered planet, a team finds their minds and bodies changing. They're haunted by their pasts, and by the fanatical Green-Eyed faction. Decades into their journey, they must decide if they can complete the mission parameters, or default to back-up protocol. 

This star-bound research team stumbles upon what it means to exist in the vastness of space, against the ticking clock of a dying planet.

simul /ˈsɪməl/ noun 1. a shortened form of simultaneous
2. a display in which a player plays a number of games simultaneously against different opponents.

title: Jonna's Fantastical Sexcapades
description:
Jonna's life as a teacher is all routine, until she receives an online invitation from a near stranger, Zachary, and drops everything for a weekend of fun.
  
 As the weekend evolves into much more, Jonna explores many facets of herself, with another stranger: the amazing Laney.
 
Jonna juggles her job, her little brother's nosey girlfriend, all while contending with a stalker-ex husband. In the end, she has to choose the steamy uncertainty with Zachary, the wonderfulness with Laney, or the fun of being single.

Sidenote: 
*If you liked "Sex/Life" from Netflix or "Mrs. Fletcher" from HBO, you'll like this story.

title: The House Above the Sea
description:
When sixteen-year-old New York City native Neo O'Reilly is dropped off with his extended family in Hawaii for the summer, he's terribly out of his element. And with his militaristic aunt, over-excited older cousin, and a small town swimming with total strangers, he's not sure he'll ever get used to it. 

This plain, happy-go-lucky town just isn't for him. After all, Neo has a secret: He's taken something he shouldn't have.

Yet, Neo realizes the town is not so simple as he thought when he meets Kit Kawamoto: a mute boy living in the abandoned house at the top of the hill. What follows is a whirlwind of secrets revealed, destinies questioned, and love realized.

Two boys, a stolen item, and a curse: this is The House Above the Sea.

title: class of 2013 ✓
description:
Remiya Siu is just trying to get through her senior year in one piece. Between writing articles for the school's newspaper, her part-time job at a local diner, and the piles of assignments she has to plow through for her AP classes, she barely has time to breathe. The pressure will be worth it, though. Because ultimately, it's going to help her get into Harvard--the college of her dreams.

Except it doesn't. She's deferred, and she's crushed.

By a stroke of pure luck, an opportunity arises when the annual Grand Achievement award is up for grabs for the first time ever, and she's one of two eligible students. This is what she needs to win so she can (finally) get off Harvard's waitlist once and for all.

There's only one problem: competition comes in the form of Blaise Yang, her childhood nemesis, and he refuses to back down.

title: Blood
description:
Vampires don't really exist, of course, but... When Falcon plays hockey on the high school boys' team, the opposing fans chant, "Get the Girl! Get the Girl!" She doesn't know why it got to her so badly in her last game, but when two players went for her she took them out...and after tasting their blood, she took out the rest of their team too. Able to anticipate others' moves with ease, Falcon is a natural athlete, or is she something more? Soon strange things are happening and she is on the run with her best friend since first grade, Hedges. But why does the scent of blood make her canines elongate into retractible fangs, and who exactly are those teams of men who seem to be hunting her?

There are myths about vampires, of course, but the truth is far simpler: A human subspecies with heightened reflexes and specialized canines who were capable of taking down large prey during the ice age, but are no longer valued by ordinary humans. The Valukar still live among us, but they stay carefully out of sight. Or at least they're supposed to...

description:

Class is in session and failure isn't an option.
      
      Isabeth Ovien is the campus do-gooder with a sinister secret. Faith Payson is the campus bitch. And Benjamin Lemen is the outcast they all try to avoid.
      
      But when students at their elite boarding school start dying they have to do the unthinkable; work together.  Old wounds are reopened. title: Prospect: Paradigm
description:
A young archeologist is launched on the adventure of her life when she joins a mixed crew of humans and aliens on a mission to atone for the failings of Earth.

***

The Terra Prospect Mission offered humanity a chance at space travel, technological advancement, and enlightenment courtesy of its alien benefactors who made first contact thirty years ago. Daran Chree brought that mission to a fiery end when he crashed the Terra Prospect spaceship into Gate Delta Eleven. Now, it's humanity's second and final chance to prove they're ready to journey into the stars. Nineteen-year-old studying archeologist Sofeta Prenares finds herself not only drawn to the mission, but on a collision course with the fate of the galaxy.

2019 Watty Awards Winner For Sci-Fi!

Content warning: This story contains reference to self harm and intense combat scenes.

authorBio:
Welcome to Story & Soul!
Founded by @cooloutb ✨

Managed by @CrazyKatiexox

We are a vibrant book club and community dedicated to uplifting and celebrating Black writers, creatives, and the stories that reflect our rich culture.

Here, we explore powerful narratives, support one another on our creative journeys, and foster a space for authentic connection.

Whether you're a writer, reader, or just love great stories, you belong in StoryandSoul. No mater the genre, we'd LOVE to read it!

Join us as we dive into literature that speaks to the heart of our experiences.

✨ Let your voice be heard, and your story be told.✨

title: Wicked Ways to Ruin a Boy
description:
Wicked sorceress Cora must ruin someone's life before her eighteenth birthday or lose her magic forever, a task made tricky when she falls for her chosen victim. 

***

Cora Emerson is a magical misfortune who just can't get the hang of being a wicked sorceress. Being wicked would be easy if she couldn't help being good instead. But her eighteenth birthday is fast approaching and if she can't ruin one person's life by then a curse on her family warns she'll lose her powers for good. Just when she thinks she's found the perfect victim, naive and unassuming, the unthinkable happens. She falls for him. Love and magic would be simple if she didn't have a crush on the boy whose life she's meant to ruin. 

As Cora would say, "For the love of crows."

Copyright © 2023 T.A. Joseph
All rights reserved
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my little corner of Wattpad! I'm Tracey, tea enthusiast and animated movie devotee. The genres I love to read and write most are fantasy, paranormal, contemporary, and sometimes historical fiction, all with a dash of romance. I'm a fan of beautiful prose, I often have crushes on fictional men, and faeries are my favorite magical creature.

MORE ABOUT ME:

➵ I have faith in Jesus Christ
➵ A daydreamer through and through
➵ I'm obsessed with Pinterest and Studio Ghibli (Howl's Moving Castle is my favorite)
➵ Period drama and fairytale addict
➵ I'd love to write as lovely as the movie Atonement looks because I'm obsessed



And I'm sorry, but I don't take translation requests. 

I also don't take reading requests. I understand that people want their stories read but there are so many stories to read, and I can't get to them all on top of writing and the stories I read off Wattpad.

Thanks for visiting me!

title: To Build a Home
description:
Lu Hearsch has spent his whole life conforming. After a negative elementary experience, he does his best to fit into the crowd. 

During an intervention organized by his mother, he's dragged from Connecticut to Toronto, kicking and screaming. 

Will he ever come to call "Hermes' Home for Troubled Young Men" home? Or will he flee as soon as his mandatory three month stay comes to an end?

---

WARNINGS ::
• This is a book centered around a potential queer polyamorous relationship. 
• There are heavy depictions of mental health in this book.

title: White Crystal Butterflies | Wattys 2021 Shortlist | ✔
description:
❖ Interstellar pilot and ex-adventurer Alex Gallegos must keep their team safe on an icy moon as sentient storms threaten to repeat the tragedy that ended their last career. ❖


Everyone in the United Inhabited Solar Systems (for some reason, UIS for short) knows to stay away from Mahaha. The icy moon is notorious for failed probe landings and research missions that end in tragedy: the only people to ever venture to its surface needed rescuing after just two weeks. 

When a prestigious research group decides they want a turn, they ask Alex Gallegos to lead the team. Perfectly qualified and haunted by their past, Alex accepts, hoping to make up for old mistakes and get just a little further from the earth they've left behind. 

Two months into the seven-month mission, the team is struggling with discontent, damaged equipment, and blizzards acting less and less like normal weather. As Mahaha moves out of range of help and the storms take on a more malicious character, Alex must face the one foe they could never have prepared for.

Mahaha may or may not be alive.


❖❖❖

Complete. Wattys 2021 Shortlister. Standalone sequel (Rocks Can Dance) coming in 2023.

Comments and critiques are both welcome and appreciated. I write characters from many different backgrounds, with many different experiences. If you share those traits and find that I have misrepresented anything, please let me know! I am feedback-friendly and here to learn  :)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
✣ ┅ ABOUT ┅ ✣

Wattys 2023 Winner
Multi-Featured Author
5x Wattys Shortlister
2x ONC Honourable Mention

You can call me August, but I will also be summoned by cool pond bugs and/or pictures of cats.

I'm a queer spec fic writer with a fondness for tossing characters into things they think they aren't prepared for. Most of my work is Dark Fantasy or Horror, but I cross paths with Sci-Fi, Paranormal, and Romance more often than not.

If my books have anything in common, it's wild settings, happy endings, casual rep, and kickass disaster queers being disasters but also kickass!

In the normal world, I work for the UN, wait on two cats, and keep Carassius and Corixidae in outdoor aquaria. I am five years old inside.

I wasn't kidding about the pond bugs.

✣ ┅ BOOKS ┅ ✣

I have a lot of books. For update schedules, quick synopses, series order, and more, check out the link below─it should have the most up-to-date info!

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gtPNUKgPM9vbCELEOpXwEZWK1ksjwVLyWWygS_QBtjM

I also have a newsletter:
https://dashboard.mailerlite.com/forms/902526/118359436508005762/share

Support me on Patreon:
https://www.patreon.com/user?u=66164404

For administrative news, blog posts, and general chaos, see the profile-updates book in my first reading list.

If you still have questions, my DMs are open, or you can drop a post on my wall. I don't bite  :)

✣ ┅ LOGISTICS ┅ ✣

He/him

✔ = Complete
❖ = Updating Now
❍ = Patreon Teaser

Books with a rainbow sticker have a queer main character.

While many of my characters are POC, I am white. Please extend any diversity-related opportunities to authors of colour.

Comments and critiques are both welcome and appreciated.

Come join me on Discord! https://discord.gg/UD7t7pN

Profile pic by the ridiculously talented @kataraqui

I write offline, update weekly, and always finish my books. If you choose to stick around, welcome  ❤

title: Should He Matter? (BXB)
description:
Adrien - Mr Popular. Got so many issues, I can't even begin to list them. But he's a true Tsundere. 
Ethan - The bullied kid who is just trying to catch a break. 
Luke - Funny, caring, loyal. Is it true that the happiest people are usually depressed? 
Trevor - The silent type, just trying to get through each day. 

Four teenagers struggling to navigate through all the shit life throws at them. They're all just trying to make it through school so they can finally move out of the shit hole of a town they live in. 

This book will explore numerous different themes: friendship, love, death, loneliness, coming out, religion, faith, race, and mental health. There will be many ups and downs. 

A bit of a slow burner. Also should make it clear this is a bxb not bxbxb or bxbxbxb. I love fluff and wholesome content, so just know this book will focus more on that than any sexual content, but we warned it is a bit of sad book.

title: Royal Academy Diaries II
description:
Students come from around the world to attend four specialized and prestigious schools - The Kings' Alliance Royal Academies. They are the future of royalty, defense, magic, and the arts. 
 
But everything is not as it seems. Rumours circulate about everything from vampires, forbidden love, and even ancient magic hidden within the castles. 
 
 
Read twenty-two unique and exciting mini-stories featuring a diverse cast! 
 

In this book:
Claire, the commoner prodigy. 
Andrae, the circus boy.  
Faraja, the imperial witch. 
Jeong-wu, the artist with a favourite muse. 
Devna, the strongest princess. 
Aten, the sorcerer with a deadly secret. 
Laora, the competitive champion. 
Rolf, the enemy's ambassador.  
Sabrina, the princess with a disputed duty. 
Teyrn, the mage hunting for a throne. 
BONUS mini story: Zaina, the lost princess.

 


 
{Please note that while this story is loosely based around the 1930's, it is in a world and time of its own and will not really be historically accurate.}

title: The Ocean's Heart (The Dragons of Flareia Book 2)
description:
The Avalonian Coup and assassination of the Venti Queens has left Northern Flareia in turmoil. Olivier, Flae and Kylan decide to turn to the other Flareian countries for help, with the intention of forming a Flareia-wide alliance against Tommel, the False King on the Avalonian Throne. However, with the Gaian and Venti Dragonheirs missing, an alliance is not something that can be made easily. 

As they travel to Anemasi for help from the Spirit Dragon, hysteria is spreading across Umbrasse. Emperor Nequami insists the Dragonheir perished in the coup, but a rumour begins to spread that he is alive, and willing to help. With the shadows spreading more rapidly across Flareia, and his country pushing more than ever to overthrow their Emperor, Kylan must make a choice - to follow his wishes of not becoming Emperor himself, or leave many of his friends to die.

authorBio:

title: Awks. ✓
description:
***
                    
"*Sobs* I'm so happy to have a character that's exactly like me." - @TakenUsernameSoz.
      
"This story is so normal that it's unique; a breath of fresh air! Gives us normal girls hope, hi hi!" - @LocalSlayer 
    
"This book is seriously my inspiration to not be afraid to show who I am." - @Who_Says_Duh
                  
"THAT IS SO ME!!!!! IS THIS SOME TYPE OF VOODOO, MAGICAL BOOK OR SOME SHIT?!?!" - @ThePanther10101.
                    
***
                          
Let's face it, none of those cliché situations from movies between a guy and a girl ever happen in real life. I'm not going to end up accidentally bumping into my future husband in a café, spilling a latte over him. I'm not going to go up to some random stranger and ask him for directions and he'll become mesmerised by the colour of my eyes and fall in love with me. The window of my bedroom doesn't happen to be situated opposite to that of a 'bad boy neighbour'.
                          
I was daydreaming, again. Something I do on a daily basis. Nothing different, right? Well, let's just say I didn't snap out of my little 'trance' until I saw a guy waving frantically at me, smiling.
                          
Oh shit, he's hot. He probably thinks I was checking him out.
                          
Great, now he's coming over.
                          
Kill me.
                          
***
                          
• Highest rankings: 

#1 in Modeling - #1 in Awkward - #3 in Humor.

title: Sunset Serendipity
description:
Amidst the vibrant city of Cape Town, South Africa, Amahle and Leho's lives intersect in a whirlwind of chance encounters. As they navigate love, loss, and self-discovery, they find themselves bound by an inexplicable connection.

Amahle, a free-spirited artist, struggles to overcome her past, while Leho, a charming entrepreneur, hides secrets behind his captivating smile.

As sunset paints the city's skyline, they must confront their fears, embrace their true selves, and surrender to the serendipity that brought them together.

Will their love prevail, or will the shadows of their pasts tear them apart?

title: Bone Diggers (Paperback out now!)
description:
When everyone IRL lies, the only person you can trust is an NPC.

Thanks to Bone Diggers like Owen exposing the lives behind the code, dirty little secrets can't just be hidden behind player avatars anymore. When his two worlds blur, he must decide which is more important: his freedom, or the game. The right choices will be rewarded with fame, fortune, and adventure. Wrong calls could cost him both lives. Still, playing the game is what Owen does, and he's good at it...as long as his real-life adventures don't prove more perilous than his digital swordfights. title: The Bet : A Rosewood High short story
description:
"Here is your first thousand." 

"The bet was for two thousand dollars.

"True, but you get the rest when you break up with her."

"And it has to be public. I want Ivy humiliated in front of the entire school. That'll teach her where she belongs."

"The trash?" 

"Of course, with the rest of the filth."




When she started dating the heartthrob of New York City's most exclusive boarding school, Ivy's social life had taken a turn. Invited to parties she never had access to before, sitting at tables she could only gaze at from afar, and making friends with Rosewood high's richest elite. But one conversation she wasn't supposed to hear brought the dream crashing down around her. 

Now, as she struggles to avoid humiliation and plots to turn the tables on her ex and his clique of backstabbing snakes, she finds herself in the middle of an unexpected whirlwind romance.

Kieran is the richest, hottest, and most desirable of all of Rosewood's students, and he has had his eye on Ivy for years. But his rivalry with her ex Theo leaves Ivy in a worse predicament that she started with. 

Will she focus on her revenge and finish her senior year unscathed? or will Kieran's persistence finally break down her walls?

title: The Badboy, the Catfish & Me
description:
A crush on the popular boy at school sounds tough enough...

Gorgeous, charming, and captain of Maxwell High's soccer team, Valentino Rosas is every girl's dream. And Inaya Muhammad, despite being head-over-heels in love with him, knows she can't do much about her feelings---as a Muslim, she can't have a relationship. 

So when Inaya's life as Maxwell High's next valedictorian completely changes, it isn't because of an arranged marriage; she doesn't take off her hijab, become internet famous, or anything like that. No---it all starts with a harmless catfishing scheme in the video game CrusadEon Online.

Playing under her friend's profile, Inaya thinks she's snagged Valentino without breaking any rules. But with the unraveling of her family's secrets and uncovering Valentino's, Inaya's life offline starts to blur with her online persona. Can Inaya confess the truth about the redheaded warrior Valentino plays alongside before it's too late? Or is she doomed to lose his heart---and her own?

YOU DON'T HAVE TO BE MUSLIM TO RELATE TO THIS BOOK!

authorBio:
Hello and assalamualaikum!

A little bit about me:
💚I'm Muslim. Alhamdullilah

YOUNG ADULT

I hope you enjoy my stories :) All of them will feature Muslims in some way. No matter their personality (from shy to smirking to angry or stubborn) my characters are morally good. So we don't do virgin or modesty shaming here 💛 And as my white, Christian high school English teacher once described to me, my religion is a millennium-old honor. I will uphold that honor through my stories.

Also, if you want to read something Islamic, I suggest reading: the Qur'an, Faza'il al Amal, and/or Deliverance from Error. Or watch Sheikh Shadee Al Masry or Sheikh Abdullah Mullanee. They will teach you the laws and spirituality of Islam. My books won't-- they'll only show you the Muslim experience.

title: The Sunflowers Beyond
description:
He said, "if you wish for it, you may have it."
But Kit could only listen to his words, not sure if he could do it, but to just listen, was enough.


Kit Shaw wakes up one morning, standing before the wooden gates that lead out to the Bare Forest. He does not know how he got there, he does not know why he is there. All he knows is what he sees; and what he sees, is a plump cat on the other side of the gates, beckoning him over with a playful little grin. 

So he follows mindlessly into the forest his mother told him to stay away from. He does not exactly what to expect when he enters. A field of tall sunflowers was the least of his expectations. The boy that calls him out is a pleasant surprise too.

Away from his mundane and monotonous life, Kit explores a world so unlike his. A boy with foreign features and a cat named Sunny. How different could this place be? He thinks it can't be all magic, but sometimes, he isn't always right. 



Mars King
First Draft; June 2021
The painting in the cover does not belong to me.

title: Dreamcatcher | ONC 2020 Honourable Mention | ✔
description:
❖ ''We're at six thousand feet, Cap'n. There shouldn't be land at six thousand feet.'' ❖

Rav is apprenticed by his father's wishes on an airship as unsettling as the deliveries it makes. Dreamcatcher's owner is the only captain on the continent who will sail any cargo through any part of the sky. Even parts nobody else will go. 

So when the ship gets caught in a storm and left rudderless in the Khaalee Navachandr, a ship-eating crescent in the middle of the ocean, nobody is coming to rescue them. Their only hope is to reach land to make repairs. 

The land they find, though, might only bring more trouble.


❖❖❖


Entry in Wattpad's 2020 Open Novella Contest. Shortlisted. Honorable Mention: Stunning Worlds. Complete.

Comments and critiques are both welcome and appreciated. I write characters from many different backgrounds, with many different experiences. If you share those traits and find that I have misrepresented anything, please let me know! I am feedback-friendly and here to learn  :)

authorBio:
✣ ┅ ABOUT ┅ ✣

Wattys 2023 Winner
Multi-Featured Author
5x Wattys Shortlister
2x ONC Honourable Mention

You can call me August, but I will also be summoned by cool pond bugs and/or pictures of cats.

I'm a queer spec fic writer with a fondness for tossing characters into things they think they aren't prepared for. Most of my work is Dark Fantasy or Horror, but I cross paths with Sci-Fi, Paranormal, and Romance more often than not.

If my books have anything in common, it's wild settings, happy endings, casual rep, and kickass disaster queers being disasters but also kickass!

In the normal world, I work for the UN, wait on two cats, and keep Carassius and Corixidae in outdoor aquaria. I am five years old inside.

I wasn't kidding about the pond bugs.

✣ ┅ BOOKS ┅ ✣

I have a lot of books. For update schedules, quick synopses, series order, and more, check out the link below─it should have the most up-to-date info!

title: Children of Sol
description:
(Posting to RoyalRoad)

The price of loyalty is pain. 

After a vastly destructive war, Terra has been obliterated and humanity forced to spread through known space, outsiders in the galactic community that fears their talent for violence. 

A servant of the alien Hegemony, the psionic sensitive Shay finds herself torn apart, left to bear the blame of an atrocity she did not commit. With the clock ticking on a stolen biological weapon, she becomes a fugitive hunting the traitors who would do the unthinkable. The pursuit comes with the aid of an eclectic starship crew, but when worlds collide, loyalties blur.

When all she wants is the truth to be known, Shay must confront a much larger web of lies  and danger than she could have ever expected.

authorBio:
I do not do well writing about myself, which is why I live in fictional worlds instead of writing much in a journal. I've been writing for a while now (read: years) and I unfortunately don't have as much time to read or write as I'd like at the moment. As their paths intertwine, they navigate a journey filled with heartache, the complexities of emotions and love.

Westmont High's infamous man whore, Trevor Jettison, just got slapped with karma's wake up call.  After swiping away V-cards and breaking hearts, the legendary 'devirginator' encountered something that made his life turn upside down: a diary.
      
However it wasn't just any diary.  It was the diary of one of his former bedmates; and what's the catch?  He's already forgotten who she is. But getting hooked by the writer's wit and charms, Trevor sets out for an epic quest to figure out who the owner is.  
      
Along the way, he bumps into past lovers, rollerblading imps, juvenile parolees, his best friend and his best friend's sister. So, who is this mystery writer? Care to guess?

title: Chasing Charlie [REWRITE]
description:
Normally starting your last two years of high school means getting your drivers license, adventures with friends and an experience you'll never forget. 

Charlie wasn't expecting to start Year 11 off in a new home, suburb and school. She wasn't expecting random panic attacks and trauma to consume her life. She wasn't expecting to have nobody by her side. 

Chase thought he was fine. Well, as fine as an energetic teenage boy who, just so happens to use a wheelchair, could be. Life was back to a somewhat normal state after the incident, apart from the nagging curiosity of having a grief-stricken teenage girl upstairs. 

 Rising from the destruction caused by the storm that is life can be a struggle, especially when you're a teenager. Sometimes a little friendship can make all the difference.

title: Behind the Books | ✔

[ completed; unedited ] When Rylie Henderson starts her dreaded senior year of high school, all she wants to do is hide herself from the rest of the world and read, her favorite hobby. She finds it as her distraction from what happened to her in the past. Rylie is encouraged to branch out, but she doesn't know which step to take. When she meets Elias Greene, a cute aspiring artist, she begins to feel different about everything and possibly changes her mind about hiding herself from the world. Elias has his own set of goals for the school year like Rylie, but will they both achieve what they truly want at the end?

Love, friendship, diversity, betrayal, and pride all wrapped into one in a high school coming-of-age story.

title: (#2) Girl By Day, Villain By Night,
description:
WARNING: CONTAINING EVEN MORE SASS THAN THE LAST BOOK. IF YOU ARE EASILY BUTTHURT, DO NOT READ. 

TRIGGER WARNING: Containing mentions of depression and related topics. If you don't feel comfortable reading this material, don't. 

So, this time, we're not in New York City. Well, kinda. We're on two opposite ends of the country, if that makes any sense at all. San Fransisco and New York City. Nice cities, huh? For all you people who liked the last thing I wrote, this is for you. The story just couldn't end with one book, we all know that. Anyways, this one is a bit different, so I hope you like it. Now we have two people, on opposite ends of the country, both searching for answers in the wake of a tragedy. Did that sound cliche enough? I hope so. 

Anyways, our two ever so lovely heroes are a bit messed up, but then again, so am I as I tell there story to you. Let me tell you, it's not all pink and rainbows, I hate pink. Strictly a black kinda girl. What happens when the mask comes off, and what's under neath is revealed? Sorry, that sounded perverted. I didn't mean for it to sound that way. Just, what happens in the aftermath of what people discovering who they are?act So, now our heroes must deal with people trying to kill them, and tasks more difficult than the ones at the Triwizard Tournament, all while fighting these without each other. 

So many questions, so little time to answer them all. They will be answered, I'm just not going to say when. Buckle your seatbelt, use the bathroom, and don't get off guys. I'm going to take you on a roller coaster ride of emotions and plot points. I hope you enjoy, and those who got the references, pat on the back. 

Fangirl out.

title: Writing Styles
description:
Every genre of writing has its mindset and set of expectations. Genres are the tool for creativity and provide various perspectives to tell your story in different ways. Writing can make you to go into different worlds.
.
.
.
X     x      X
About the creator x.villam

One day, as I was scrolling through my music library, I stumbled upon a song that caught my attention. It was a very superficial pop-style music, but with an instrumental that was surprisingly pleasing to the ears. At first, I was hesitant to listen to it, as I usually preferred more meaningful and deep music. But then I thought to myself, why limit myself to just one genre? From that day on, I decided to open my ears to all kinds of music. I started exploring different genres, from Latin to rock, to country. It was quite amusing four my friends when they rode in my car and heard the music switch from one genre to another. I also started listening to music in other languages. I found that I enjoyed the sound of different languages and how they added a unique element to the music. Sometimes I would listen to songs that were bilingual, blending two languages seamlessly. I discovered a whole new world of music that I never knew existed. Each genre and language brought a different emotion and vibe, and I loved experiencing the diversity in music. It was like traveling around the world through music, discovering new cultures and sounds. So, what genres do you listen to? And what language do you like to listen to in music? Let's keep exploring and expanding our music horizons together.

 P.S
This is a place with music and writing!
If you follow me, I will follow you whenever I am active.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
⋆.˚✮🎧✮˚.⋆                                        
I am a multifan, which means I have a lot of different interests and fandoms that I am a part of. I enjoy a wide range of things from books to movies to TV shows to music. There are some things that I like and some things that I don't like, just like anyone else.

Overall, being a multifan means that I have a lot of different interests and things that I enjoy. While there are some things that I don't like, I try to focus on the things that bring me joy and make me happy. Being a multifan allows me to experience a wide range of emotions and adventures, and I wouldn't have it any other way.

title: When Last Night Didn't End: Before Story
description:
🏆 CONTEMPORARY ROMANCE WINNER - THE NANOWATT AWARDS 2024 🏆

Nagara Rin's life is a simple line---get a job, save up, find a wife, start a family, retire, and be happy. Until he gets stuck in a dead-end job with responsibilities, and living from one paycheck to the next, he finds out life isn't as simple as he thought.

Joon Hye-Jin's life is a complex wave. As an aspiring game developer, she is prepared to ride the currents and achieve her dreams. But when she gets trapped in a chaotic house with real problems to mind, she finds out she is drifting from what she wants out of life.

As resentments build and the love they thought they shared crashes and burns, Rin and Hye-Jin are left with a choice: to salvage their ties or save themselves. Either way, something vital is meant to break.

From the author of 𝘐𝘯 𝘖𝘶𝘳 𝘛𝘪𝘮𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘞𝘢𝘳, this companion book to 𝘞𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘓𝘢𝘴𝘵 𝘕𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘋𝘪𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘌𝘯𝘥 tackles the war between love and life. The only thing standing between saving or losing them is a choice; and there is a path where one loses everything.

title: Her Indigenous Surrender
description:
Whilst on vacation in St. Lucia for school holidays, three teen siblings, Amaziah, 18, Ariel, 16, and Ashhur, 14, decide to sign their widowed mom, Charlene Anthony-Desiré, up for a singing contest. The prize is an outing of the winner's choice with the celebrity representative for The Indigenous Community Charity Foundation, Kitchi Adams. The fact that he is an actor, model, and humanitarian extraordinaire cements the "Triple A's" secret plan-they want their mother to know that her being in a new relationship is well with them. 

But what happens when Kitchi, who loves children and is secretly wishing for some of his own, is impressed with Charlene and genuinely wants to date her? The poor sucker gets blown off when she publicly rejects his date proposal. Will Kitchi succeed in changing her mind and winning her heart? Or will life and all its tribulations get in the way? 

Despite hurricanes, worried mothers, crazy fans, a concerned publicist, a vengeful ex, an adoption, and newborns, Charlene and Kitchi overcome life's challenges to find love in paradise.

title: The Gifted (ONC 2023)
description:
What if having superpowers was not a gift but a curse? Would you still choose to use it?

Aleksandra Leszczyńska works as an agent for a secret government organisation training people with superpowers - the Gifted - to work as a police support force. Working as a public servant to keep peace and order was always her dream, but she struggles as her gift is not as valuable for the field. Still, she refuses to be turned into back-office support. The situation changes when she rescues a cute Gifted from kidnapping and stumbles upon a deviant who dies in excruciating pain, consumed by his own power. 

After confirming that it's a fate awaiting most of the Gifted, every agent must question if they still want to remain in the organisation and keep using their powers. 

However, as deviants scheme to kidnap more innocent people and use them for their repulsive experiments, only the Gifted can stop them.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Falling
description:
Bailey Smith, a straight-A student, doesn't have time for fun. Until she takes a summer internship at Bay Turf Resort, where she meets bad boy Jayden Lemmy. He's not the type of person so she can bring home to her father, so she knows she should stay away from him, but his beguiling grin and risky ways are too alluring.

Despite his lack of formal education, Jayden Lemmy sees Bailey as someone who is ambitious, motivated, and dedicated, much as he was before the accident that changed his life forever. He pledges to stay away from her, but when a co-worker forces him into a bet he can't reject, he's forced to face his demons.

It is not long before Bailey and Jayden are into each other. The flames they spark are wild and devouring, but as terrible secrets are revealed, can he prove himself worthy of the girl who can heal his broken heart, or will it all go out of control?

title: Phantom Hunters | Saphir Casters Academy
description:
No room for failure, an ancient brewing secret, and perfecting magic art.

In a world where magic can only be cast through a vessel, an ongoing battle between good and evil encircles the lives of all casters, whether it's fighting corruption of the soul or ridding evil auras from the world.

After seven whole years apart, Kael Smaradine finally meets his brother who comes with news that Kael will attend the only academy in the world that teaches casting.

Saphir Casters Academy is a prestigious academy that only a select few will have a chance to graduate. To learn how to eradicate phantoms - casters corrupted by their power - Kael leaves his home country for the first time in his life.

Once in the melting pot of cultures, Kael learns what it takes to become a phantom hunter - and the dangers that follow. With friends and enemies alike, Kael must survive his class or face elimination.

Kael believes he's got what it takes to attend the academy, but as his skills are tested, surviving even the first semester of this harsh academy proves to be difficult. And the possibility of elimination strikes too close for comfort.

*Cover by @loopsydaisys*
* Updates every Saturday*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
One day, I want to go to the deepest part of the ocean, where it's pitch black, lit only a few meters ahead by artificial lighting, and come face to face with a creature so massive that its eye is at least twice the size of my submarine.

🍷 Here's to hoping that sea monsters really exist, since 95% of the ocean still remains undiscovered. Cheers!

But, since I know it's highly unlikely (😢), I lose myself in fiction where reality doesn't need to crush my dreams.

Fantasy has taken over to be my favourite genre to read and write in, though I do also enjoy decent horror, crime, mystery/thrillers, and adventure with a healthy dose of humour and sometimes romance.

title: REDEMPTION (THE LONDON CRIME KING)
description:
⭐️ Wattpad's Fiction Award Winner for The Best Protagonist, The Best Plot, The Best Supporting Character & The Best Friendship. ⭐️ 

It was just us, my sister and me. At age nineteen, I was content to live within Kathy's shadow to evade facing the demons of my past, where I felt safe, protected and blinded from everything I had run away from. But then Kathy left for work one night and never came home. Lost in hope and forced to leave the impenetrable shield I built around myself, I traipsed in my sister's footsteps, desperate to uncover the truth behind her disappearance. Not a clue left unturned, I grappled possibilities and found myself sat in a familiar spot, gazing out of the same window to watch the only person I knew had the answers, Kathy's former boss, Liam Warren, the most ruthless crime lord in all of London. You don't approach a man like him, or solicit favours from a renowned criminal. You didn't lie to get a job at his club, or portray to be someone you're not. And most importantly, you do not fall in love with him. Follow Alexa's journey of devastating love and emotional heartbreak, where she finds out everything she once knew turned out to be a lie.

(Written in British English).

Copyright © Lindsey Marie 2018

title: Losing Rene?
description:
This book is written from the point of view of a father raising a child alone. It's an emotional journey through past life experiences and present life acceptances that takes place in one single scene with flashbacks that fill the reader in on how we got to that point. 

The following is an excerpt from one of the flashbacks:


" Who is this woman and the kids in your drawing," I asked my son. 

He sat the crayon down and picked up another without looking up. 

 "Those are mine from before." 

I raised my eyebrows. "From before when?" 

"From before I was born." 

Intrigued, I pulled out a chair and set down beside him as he continued to draw. 

"Rene, before you were born you were just a twinkle in the eyes of your mother and me." 

"I had a family back in a time before my life was cut short and I was born this time." 

"Well from the looks of your drawing, you sure had a beautiful wife." 

"That's not my wife," he informed me sternly. 

He began to color again, trading one color for another. I smiled and inwardly congratulated my late-wife Renee for passing on to our son such an imagination. 

I fought the urge to pepper Rene with questions, but once I had really thought about what he said, many of my assumptions about him up to that point were beginning to make some sense. 

That evening, long after Rene had gone to bed I fired up my laptop and began to research Past Life Experiences. I found that Rene's story was not all that uncommon, and there were countless thousands of children across the globe had insisting that they'd had a past life. 

Only, this was MY SON.

*This story was written by Sabrynabrooklynne on Wattpad. If you aren't reading it there, it's been stolen. Please report the website. It's probably not the final version either.*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A mildly popular Wattpad writer, Sabrynabrooklynne puts her heart and soul into her writing. Once you take the plunge into one of her books, you'll  finish it and  want to read another.
You'll find she likes to intertwine her stories, setting several of them in the same area and time frame, causing events and characters to overlap.  It's a unique approach that has the potential to surprise and delight.

You won't be disappointed.

                              - Laindzy

title: The Girl Who Carried the Sun
description:
Daniel was just ten years old when he moved into Ronghei's household and became the son Ronghei never had. When Ronghei's only daughter Lily was born, she filled the house with her fiery cries and Daniel's heart with her smile that seemed to carry the Sun. She was the little storm that he loved.

When tragedy hits the family, Daniel finds himself in the position that was always meant for him - a big brother to protect and care for Lily. And he would be there for her through thick and thin. Only that he hadn't expected her to grow up one day and enchant him heart and soul.

It was in the way she laughed, the light in her soul, the way she'd come knocking on his door at midnight when nights are rough. But he can't love her. That was never the plan. And he does not have it in him to let her know. He would never let her know. He'd take it to his grave with him.

But how far could he take loving her from afar, very deeply and truly for that matter...


[2nd July 2022]

Will and Leo are on the road, both the Frights and walkers close behind them. When feelings begin to arise within the duo, things start to get messier.
                                                                                           |||
Will is fighting with his feelings, the echo in his head, and the constant fear that he might not be human. Leo is certain that the Frights are simply confused, that everything will be fixed once he gets the chance to talk to them.

Oh how wrong he is.

Confronted by nightmares they hadn't thought possible, secrets better left buried, and old friends and enemies -- the two boys suddenly find themselves in very deep shit.

title: True love waits
description:
Instantly my face becomes straight in dead seriousness  as I clear my throat."You shouldn't be seen with me anyways."

Arching his beautiful eye brows you could tell he was generally confused, almost like he wasn't aware of the rules. 

"Why not?" Noah questioned.

"Oh, come on don't pretend you don't notice I'm black!"

"I'm fully aware that you're black, but that doesn't tell me why I can't be seen with you!"

Sighing as I rolled my eyes I explain. "Certain folks around here don't take to kindly when our people mingle!"

"Oookkkaaayyy-who cares what certian people around here thinks?"

Shaking my head as I rolled my eyes once again, he just didn't get it."Look, I've seen what happens when certain people catches guys like you, talking to girls like me, I don't know you all that well, but no one deserves that type of beating."

"I don't like being told who I can and can't be interested in."

"Nobody does."

In this love story Scarlett a black woman 

unintentionally goes against the social 

norms when she falls in love with Noah 

a white man in a town that is 

permanently stuck in the 1950's 

segregation in the south type era, only 

thing is, its not the 1950's, it 2018.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: "And no, we're not all the same, we have differences, and that's okay, having differences is not the problem, it's the negative reactions to those differences that is the problem." - Noah  - True love waits

title: The Last Black Unicorn
description:
When Ebony finally decides to seize every moment, she realizes it may be too late after her crush, Brandon Lockwood's perception of her changes forever.

                                                                               *******

Seventeen-year-old Ebony Philips spends most of her time lying on her bed, fantasizing about the day she turns into an adult. Then, she can finally dance in the rain, scream from the rooftop, and confess her undying love to Brandon Lockwood. The boy that always occupies Ebony's mind in her bedroom's four space grey walls, the last refuge she has left. It's the only place Ebony can laugh out loud and dream of changing the world. Then, in an instant, Ebony's aspirations and her family's home burn to the ground.

Now, the Philip's have to bunk with an old family friend, Robert Lockwood, better known as the father of Ebony's crush. Desperate for an escape, Ebony realizes she has to face her fears with the obnoxious boy right across the hall and directly in front of her teacher's smart board. However, her fairytale gets even more complicated after Brandon's perception of Ebony completely changes forever.

How can a golden boy descend into mad love when our fire-spitting heroine keeps her heart locked away? How can Ebony conquer high school when her leading man discovers her greatest weakness and most kept secret? 

Can a crooked soldier love a halfwit?

WARNING: THIS STORY CONTAINS STRONG LANGUAGE NOT SUITABLE FOR YOUNG READERS!

CAUTION: THIS IS A FUN, LIGHTHEARTED BOOK. DO NOT EXPECT THE SAME DEPTH OF A SOPHISTICATED NOVEL. MY CHARACTERS ARE 100 PERCENT WACKY!

title: HaveYouSCENEMe?!
description:
In a small, judgmental town, Quinn Stars doesn't fit in-and she's not trying to. With her neon hair and alternative style, she stands out like a sore thumb at her new high school. Bullied for her differences and misunderstood by everyone, Quinn turns to her blog and music as an escape. But when the pressure of fitting in gets too heavy, Quinn must find the strength to stay true to herself. Can she embrace her individuality in a world that demands conformity, or will she be forced to change who she is to survive?

"Have You Scene Me?" is a raw, emotional coming-of-age story about one girl's fight for self-acceptance-and the secrets that lie beneath the surface of even the most popular students.

After being stolen as a gift for the faerie prince, Eulalia gets embroiled in a brewing civil war when she befriends the handmaidens who are secretly a part of the rebel army. title: The Brightest Star in a Constellation
description:
Seeking an escape from his overbearing mother, Evan McKenna fills his free time with hockey practice and extracurricular activities, counting down the days until he graduates. 

Hoping to keep a routine, and after being diagnosed with severe anxiety, Peter Delacroix hides behind the front desk of his father's quiet hotel. When his best friend starts an astronomy club to help him socialize, nobody expects Evan McKenna to walk through the door. 

As Evan struggles with acceptance and his ever-changing plans for the future, Peter slowly forms a bond with his club members and attempts to reconcile with his past. With the astronomy club's preparation for a meteor shower and an eclipse on the horizon, Evan and Peter have two hundred days to make sense of their hectic lives before parting ways forever.

|| Content Warning:
Descriptions of abuse, alcoholism, and homophobia as well as discussions of mental health and sexuality. Please use discretion while reading. ||

title: The One Without Words
description:
"Go ahead," I said, backing up against the pink wall of the shop. "Do something other than glare at me."

I waited. One, two, three seconds... and nothing. 

I raised my chin at him. "You're boring me, mute boy."

He stepped closer. Leaned toward me as his gaze burned into mine. Then...  

❀ ❀ ❀

After three months in juvenile detention, it's time for Romy Pereira to help out with her family's flower shop. And it's not all bad... until they hire Jack Michel to work beside her. 

He doesn't speak, communicating with glares and scowls instead of words, and seems to be more interested in literal rocks than other human beings. And with an ex-convict mother, her friends drifting away, and the flower shop falling apart, the last thing Romy wants to deal with is Jack's attitude. 

She'll forever praise the day he screws up big time and gets himself fired, but until that day comes, it's mostly one cold-hearted girl, her silent (but still infuriating) coworker, and a whole lot flowers. 

[word count: 100k]
[originally written in 2014-2015; re-write completed 2020-2021]

title: You Feel Like Home
description:
"OH MY GOD." I quickly remove my hands from Ethan's face, but he keeps his arms around me. It was Lorena. "I leave you...outside for  two hours.....and you're already fucking someone. I love this for you. I love.....college for you." She slurs her words and drunkenly stumbles towards us. 

Callie and her boyfriend Cameron come out, not two seconds later. I push Ethans arms from around me softly and get up and out the pool. I know my face looks guilty as hell. 

"What's going on? Why is Lorena screaming?" Cameron asks, looking at us both, and the guy in the pool questioningly. 

"Nova...was fucking that hot guy." Lorena grins at Cameron and Callie gapes at me. 

"I was not!" 

"She was not!"

Ethan and I scream in unison. But how am I supposed to plead my case if I'm standing here, wearing nothing but his shirt, and both of us have a pile of clothes on the floor outside the pool. I look guilty. 

"Nova you sly dog." Lorena smirks and stumbles towards me, putting her hand on my shoulder.

title: Stellina
description:
France, 1937.

It only takes a single snowstorm for Lina Fontaine's family to fall apart. 

When an accident in the snow kills her brother and renders her speechless, Lina and her family move to Marseilles, France in order to escape the painful memories. Disillusioned and disgusted with her new reality, Lina yearns to hide away from the world. Yet when her father abandons them and threatens to take her beloved sister with him, Lina realizes she can no longer ignore her own struggles. 

It is only when Lina meets Luka Fuhrmann, a German-Jewish pianist with a mysterious past, that she begins to have hope again. At the same bookstore she encounters him, she receives a book with a letter tucked between the pages, written by a father pleading for help to find his missing daughter. When she learns there is a monetary reward, Lina realizes this may be the key to saving her own family.

Yet as Lina becomes obsessed with finding the missing girl and spends more and more time with Luka, she finds her frequent absences may only be destroying her crumbling family further. And when Lina's plan ends up endangering her sister as well as Luka, Lina is forced to decipher what is most important: her family, the boy she loves, or her own desires.
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
An aspiring writer who happens to be a pansexual and BIPOC. My preferred pronouns are She/Her/They/Them/Sir but go by any and all pronouns outside of he/him. 

My name is Ana but my friends in the writing world call me Wry. I write colorful worlds filled with moral grey areas and l̶i̶t̶t̶l̶e̶... okay a lot of sex. My books fall under the genre of literary fiction and I like to implement a lot of Black mental health and LBGTQ rep into my work. 

If you yourself are a writer feel free to check out my Guides Write Diversity a how-to-guide for writing people of color with thousands of words, phrases, and real opinions on rep from people in those communities and Write Perversely my little smut bible for those who want to write smut and don't know where to start. 

I also like to read novels with similar and vast premises so feel free to check out my libraries for books from some other amazing writers.

title: Best Fiends ✔
description:
Final Book in the Opulence Series!

♢♢♢

❝Forgive me❞

♢♢♢

 After Nora left him, Oliver was sad and angry.

Then Charlie came back into his life.

Now he's sad, angry and confused.

♢ ♢ ♢ 

Oliver Scott. A name synonymous with entitlement. The golden child. A plutocrat with good intentions but horrible actions. As his debauchery begins to catch up to him, Oliver begins losing the threads that keep him grounded. When Nora leaves him, his dream life begins to dissipate.

  However, Oliver soon finds an unlikely ally in Charlie Kingsley, his dealer and 'sort-of friend'. But, when Charlie becomes more and more important in his life, Oliver is left with some very difficult decisions to make.

♢♢♢

IF YOU ARE CURRENTLY READING TKOM, PLEASE ENSURE YOU HAVE READ THE EPILOGUE FIRST BEFORE READING THE SYNOPSIS HERE.
