title: ~Special~
description:
Leo had an inkling as to why Don Andrés and Alebrije were giving him a look. 

Yes, he knew. Very well in fact. 

"Just get it out already." He groaned, opting to close his book and turn to them with an unamused expression. 

"Teodora's a special girl to you, isn't she?" Alebrije asked, walking over. 

Leo frowned. Wasn't it obvious to them? Of course she was! She pushed her spirit back into the past, HIS time, just to help and be with him. She was a great ally. 

"Of course, she's a great ally-" 

"Don't do this to yourself Leo! We put ourselves in danger every single day! You don't have time to keep putting it off! If you don't wake up and figure out your feelings sooner or later, I swear I'll detach my own tail and hit you with it!" 

Leo's eyes widened. Okay, he wasn't expecting THAT...


This takes place right after they time travelled to Paris to retrieve Godofredo's book. Little relaxation time inbetween as they make a stop in Europe to fix their time hopper machine. 

Might make this into a one shot book if requested!

title: Legacy to Zero
description:
Three sorcerers. Three keys. A dying magic. When Aeris, a hero and leader of a powerful squadron called the Tetra, collapses, three sorcerers set out to finish her final mission--find a set of keys bound with an ability that claims to rewrite the rules upon which magic is built.

Accused of poisoning Aeris, Harlow Neale is thrown out of her polytechnic and back into the villainous history she's been running from, believing the keys can prove her innocence. 

Given the opportunity to become a hero, Lars Rozsa, a new sorcerer from an outer city and Harlow's best friend, accepts, if only to help clear her name... until his team begins to pursue Harlow, even as he draws closer to the Tetra.

Stranded with an uncontrollable power is Eli 'Crash' Drewitt-Ortega, formerly a squadron member alongside Aeris. When their lack of missions leads to self-doubt, Eli seeks to change their ability, only furthering the destruction around them.

In a race for the keys, magic herself attempts to reunite the three. But each sorcerer must make a choice between their own desires or saving her from fading.

* Cover by @ziwepalma !! *

authorBio:
She/her, demiromantic ace, technical editor and Wattpad Creator with cerebral palsy

When it comes to fiction, I primarily write fantasy stories for both adults and children, often involving animals, baking, and tons of puns. I also dabble in other genres, and have posted hundreds of bite-sized poems that are the perfect read if you only have a minute to spare.

My short stories and poems have appeared in Daily Science Fiction, Bronzeville Bee, Cicada, Short Édition, and various other publications. I'm a proud member of Rainbow Book Club, Dreamland Raid, and Dreamland Hunt. I'm also the founder of the Triple A Community.

My stories:

title: Holiday Away
description:
'Home for the Holidays' takes an unexpected flip when Alicia has to spend the christmas break of her freshman year on college campus due to travel complications.

Celebrating christmas by herself shouldn't be much of a big deal, but when it's on another freaking continent-- thousands of miles away from her family-- it's obvious Alicia will catch the 'Scrooge and Grinch' syndrome this season.

Maybe if the long-haired girl with the extra chunky boots and goofy, lopsided smile decided to invite her over instead of roaming outside without a coat like a psychopath, she'd have a merry Christmas after all.

But things like that take miracles, Alicia doesn't believe in those.

title: The Rogue Pureblood Vampire | 18+✔
description:
[COMPLETED]✔ 

The Blood Magic Series |Book 4|

2017 Fiction Award Winner for Best Series. 

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

Looked upon as evil, Maverick is forever tormented for stealing his mother's blood magic ability before he was born. Unable to even control whether he wanted it or not, his father, Lucca, blames him for this action.

Constantly being blamed for everything that goes wrong and without the proper guidance to develop the blood magic trait, he is sent to train with Orion.

With Orion, he learns not only how to control his blood magic, but learn why the past should remain buried and dead. Brought back, tempers only escalate between Lucca and Maverick to the point he attempts to end his father's life.

Exiled from his coven, Killian takes him away via Evicka's orders, training him alongside his very talented daughter, Tamsin in secret. For years he spends with Tamsin, growing a very fond bond between them, it makes it harder when they are torn apart.

Through his hatred, he becomes the first rogue pureblood vampire and with it, the desire to look out for only himself. Death is on the horizon and Maverick at the helm, ready to take down anything that stands in his way, including a very attractive succubus.

⁃⁃⁃❖⁃⁃⁃

title: Like Orion & Spark
description:
Riley Comeau has terrible luck. Lightbulbs shatter in his presence, stoves catch on fire (more so than usual) and microwaves explode. 
He doesn't have superpowers--at least, that's what everyone tells him.

When an old acquaintance unexpectedly invites Riley to join a fraternity with three other guys, he expects a little chaos.

What he doesn't expect is to witness a superhero emerging for the first time in Astral City, nor does he expect to have to take matters into his own hands. But life with a secret identity might give him the boost he needs to finish his research for university, while slowly bringing him closer to the one hero who Riley can't seem to resist.

title: The Descendants - A Wattys Award Winner!
description:
❇️  2018 WATTYS WINNER! The Originals category ❇️ - "The Breakfast Club" meets "Nancy Drew" in this most unusual YA Mystery.

SUMMARY: Five high school students, with little in common other than being descendants of the town founders, are forced to work on a history project together. But when their history project uncovers evidence of a long-buried town secret, the kids must piece together the clues behind their discovery before its legacy comes back to haunt them.

*****
Using ACTUAL, archival material (some dating as far back as 1776), The Descendants weaves a tale of mystery and intrigue, constructed entirely from real photographs, documents, and snippets of history from a small, rural town in New Hampshire.

What Dan Brown did with conspiracy theories in "The DaVinci Code" and Ransom Riggs did with historical photographs in "Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children," I will attempt to do in "The Descendants," but with teen protagonists and the Cheshire County Historical Society. :-)

Why? 'Cause I'm crazy like that!

Yeah, I know...History?! Blah! But it actually turned out really fun! :-)
Tous Droits Réservés

The 3rd draft of this story is slowly being updated. If all goes according to plan then it should hopefully be completed somewhere early next year. Please check the forward and additional information page before proceeding.

When Jack, Hiccup, Rapunzel, and Merida go to Hogwarts, they find more than magic - they are given the chance to change their lives.

Thrust into a new place filled with new opportunities, all of them must learn to adapt so that they may thrive. For each of them the task poses a different set of hurdles, and while some adapt well, others do not. Mischief, learning, and duty all mingle into the daily lives of the students of the prestigious school full of secrets hidden in plain sight, and through it all the children grow and change in an environment teeming with concentrated magic and the charming eccentricities of magical society.

In a tale filled with new discoveries, forged friendships, trials, and heartaches, four children from very different backgrounds will make their choices and face what comes, thus setting the stage for the adventures that will soon come to follow.

title: Surrounded But Alone
description:
Presley Qiaodi is a reserved 17-year-old boy of Asian descent and his best friend and now roommate Mitchum Charles who is African American since the first day of high school moved to attend college in H.I.D.C.A city. Including being the name of the city and College, HIDCA has a darker meaning in slang by the locals which the two only realize the hard way.

So though the college itself is a technological advancement and a known safe place for students human problems still exist. The city isn't all fun and games and precautions need to be taken. The underside of crimes that happen every day is easily overlooked by others but mixed in with teen drama wouldn't blend well. Even though Presley seeks to avoid getting involved, he may find it harder to do so because of those around him and the direct linkage to those at his school which is supposed to be their safe space.

How Presley copes with city life through his experiences he never talks about may be just what it takes for him and his friend to survive their college experience.

authorBio:
Dark-skinned black women are underrepresented in literature. I'm here to rectify that.

Call me Tempest. I am unapologetically black, an islander, a lover of video games, music and sleep. I began my writing journey on the 16th of December 2015. I've been Wattpading since 2014 but didn't have the courage to upload anything until 2017. I'd like to call myself an author, but I don't believe I'm quite there yet.

I am a lover of Fantasy, but I plan to venture into Paranormal and Sci-Fi in the near future. Feel free to browse my selection of stories. Or not, it's your life.

No Solicitors.

Interesting factoids about me:
- when I was 12, I wanted a prosthetic leg
- I studied constitutional law for four years, but I'm not a lawyer

- I used to work in a morgue

title: FLICKER
description:
I think I'm going insane.

My dreams consist of a guy who's face I can't see clearly but somehow I know he's breathtakingly beautiful. The moles on his body only seem to accentuate his honey skin even more, I can't help wondering if it's soft.

In every dream he tries to tell me something but I hear nothing. Silence fills my dream then my mind forces me to wake up.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A world where every single human being is born with  a soulmate.

Follow a pair of soulmates, Adira and Takashi, in their journey to meeting and learning how to love each other.

Watch as two completely different people fulfill their destiny...

title: Waiting for Sunday
description:
An up-and-coming poet and struggling grad student, 24-year-old Lillie Glass has enough to worry about in her life. Yet a new discovery that the words in her poems are becoming eldritch -- and sometimes outright dangerous -- realities threatens to destroy what little routine she has. It isn't long before Lillie becomes afraid to do the very thing she's passionate about, the pages before her remaining blank. 

27-year-old Felix Montenegro is the latest bearer of a curse that has plagued his family for decades: his right eye holding a ceaseless storm within it that obscures his vision and can influence the weather around him if he isn't careful. He's never considered before that there might be a way to break the Montenegro curse or understand it differently, until he meets a certain poet whose words show him a new horizon.

Spurred by chance and circumstance, Lillie and Felix set out to achieve what seems to be an impossible feat: to see their magical afflictions for what they truly are, and at last, to break the cycle.

Updates Sundays!

title: CAN WE HAPPEN?
description:
Neha Jashiri Dereje, aka Shiri, is your no-stress girl who takes life as it comes. An intern at Salpetriere Hospital juggles with her part-time job as a waitress at The Rimbaud nightclub and her hospital rotas to pay the colossal loan she took for her studies. She has no time for trivial matters such as love.

Dominque Larez Miguens, aka Dom, is the supposed heartbreaker who got his red piece broke. Still, he believes in love, and he's looking for the big one that lasts a lifetime.

Dom and Shiri find themselves in an odd friendship, and when feelings start to surface, doubts begin.

Knowing the rules doesn't necessarily mean one knows how to play, especially when you get your dose of the troublesome baby ma and you meet the woman Dominque still sees as his future.

Can they get involved knowing that Dom isn't emotionally available and Shiri is a rookie to romance?

Read and see if they can make their story happen.

This is a Beauty Marks spin-off. You might want to read that first.

title: VIKTOV LIVES! (ONC 2023 HONORABLE MENTION) ✓
description:
Everyone knows Zenith, but nobody knows how the band managed to rock Zerkovkia's youth into starting a revolution... until now.

Tolya Viktov is coming of age in the 1980s to the tune of spinning records, cheap liquor, and Zerkovkia's nine year war with neighboring Blivdova. The perms and denim jackets are hip, but it's the underground music he's most excited about. By the time he enters university, his lyrics and his talent have helped him break through on the student musician scene.

Tolya, a duo of genius guitarists, and a bandless drummer soon come together when a producer realizes the key to achieving radical change in Zerkovkia is getting them to make music. What happens next is the stuff of legend and a whole lot of love, revolution, and rock and roll.

title: Distorted Lands | Book 1 of the Telepath Cycle
description:
Ghosts of past tragedies haunt the town of Kavo after decades of neglect. Fantastical creatures desiring nothing but fear and destruction hide in invisible tears in reality. Gangs and the police are at constant war with one another, there's a shapeshifting monster running amok, and the mayor's assistant suddenly wants a disabled orphan kicked to the streets.

A year ago, Gene was discovered in the forest on the outskirts of town, half dead, amnesiac, and unable to even speak the local language. As he had nowhere to go, he was brought to the orphanage of Kavo for a place to stay. Now Caspar, the assistant of the mayor and the man who funds the orphanage, wants him kicked out. When Gene's left to navigate the cold, cruel streets of Kavo on his own, he has to navigate through a town ravaged by decades of neglect and intrigue. Has the corruption truly been purged from the government? Why are godly forces active in Kavo, a small town in a backwater country? And most importantly--will Gene survive?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A writer of over 8 years who specializes in fantasy, mystery, horror, and stories about trauma--whether it be the experience itself, the aftermath, or the recovery thereof. I'm an autistic woman who's lived through a variety of experiences and places, and like to include things reflecting that. Diverse characters, cultures, environments, and politics (different within each in-story location!) appear in my writing.

I like weaving life lessons--through the experiences of relatable characters--into the stories I tell. Many people see themselves or the people around them reflected in the characters they see in books, so I think it's helpful for people to be able to see those same kinds of people within fiction so they can reflect on the relationships within their own lives.

Interested in genuine read-for-read offers, but only if I'm interested in your story! As much as I'd like to accept everything to boost my own readership, I also need time to write, so I hope you'll be understanding. 😊

If you'd like to support me, please also (or primarily) check out my Tapas, which I intend to update more frequently than Wattpad. Additionally, I'll eventually be uploading an audiobook reading of TPC over there! Thank you regardless of your decision. 🤗
https://tapas.io/aubarlowe

title: A Girl's Guide to Being Jilted | ✓
description:
Denise Webster thought her life was perfect.

Until the man she was supposed to marry fails to show up for their wedding.

Broke, distraught and heartbroken, Denise has no choice but to move back to her childhood home with her eccentric mother and stepfather to lick her wounds.

Hell-bent on avoiding as much human contact as possible, the only person who seems to see past the nonchalant veneer behind which she hides her pain is her childhood best friend, Mateo Ramiro.

But with a history of self-destructive behavior and a knack for making the wrong choice, will she ever let him in?

FIVE FEET APART meets 13 GOING ON 30 in this lighthearted chick-lit about heartbreak, discovering oneself and the thin line between friendship and love.


* * *

Written for the Open Novella Contest 2020.




Highest Rankings:

#2 in saveblackcharacters out of 516 books on 24/02/2022

#26 in realistic fiction out of 6.75K books on 24/02/2022

| Featured in Wattpad's FreshReads Spotlight on Black Writers! |
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Never let the truth get in the way of a good story, kid. - Varrick, The Legend of Korra.

❤️❤️❤️

Hey there and welcome to my YouTube channel.

My name is Christiana and I'm 22 years old. I'm asexual 🌈 and Nigerian 🇳🇬

I'm a psychologist who moonlights as a romance writer. When I'm not taking a nap or stopping criminals as my city's resident Batman, I'm usually fantasizing about writing or discovering a new Netflix reality series. I'm fueled by cake and the desire for inclusion of mental health themes in fiction.

My religion is Selena Gomez and pineapples are my favorite fruits. I dislike chocolate cake. Sue me.

Fun fact about me: coffee doesn't work for me. I can take a giant mug and go right to sleep.

I'm not afraid to stand up for what I love. I believe in inclusivity and I'm passionate about mental health.

Some of my favorite TV shows are Beauty and the Beast, Stranger Things, Haven, Abbott Elementary, Nancy Drew, Bob ❤️ Abishola, Stitchers, CSI:NY, The Legend of Korra (she's the best Avatar. Argue with your screens.) and many others. I also really love Kdramas. I'm currently watching Marry My Husband.

I love movies particularly animation. The last movie I watched was Her.

I listen to a wide variety of songs. Some of my favorite singers are Ruth B., Ed Sheeran, Olivia Rodrigo, Selena Gomez, Taylor Swift and James Arthur. Best Song Ever by One Direction is my current obsession.

I love books. I'm currently reading With Love, Miss Americanah by Jane Igharo.

I write a wide range of things but my favorite thing to write is romance centered around black Nigerians because I don't think there are nearly enough out there.

While you're here please check out my books and give me a follow. Thank you!  Send me your thoughts here: author.christianacherry@gmail.com
Did I also mention I love puns? I'm also a social vegan. I avoid meet.

What happens when she can't get enough of the famous badboy she just met? What happens when she is thrust into the public eye? 


Victor and Cass are as different as ice and fire, but what happens when they can't stay away from each other? Will their differences make or break them?

This can only end badly.

However, co-parenting with his estranged ex-fiancée proves to be more difficult than he ever imagined, and Jaxon must confront the rollercoaster of emotions that has been bubbling under the surface for years. With his daughter's future at stake, Jaxon must find a way to move forward and create a brighter future for his family.

A sad blow on Nathan's family throws Keren, their teenage daughter off balance.

Fate caused their paths to cross at a time when Addison battled with his traumatic past. For some special reasons he was spellbound to Keren, the girl whom he found solace in.

 Thus, he offered her the needed support to achieve her dreams and reunite with her family.

That was the plan, but it all changed, when simple lies turn deadly and every heart bore deceptive secrets. The unimaginable, wrecks not just her romance with Addison but her sole objective.

title: The Debut Diaries
description:
"Wow! Sounds like a lot of fun!" he exclaims and my heart dies.

"What did you say?" 

He cannot be serious right now. He is not supposed to think that this is going to be fun. He is supposed laugh in my face then head downstairs to his group of friends and distract every girl in the cafeteria with his freaking face. That is how it's supposed to go.

"Yeah, I'll be your date thing."

NO. This is not how it's supposed to go.

***

Carmen Estrella is NOT a party animal. No, no, no. She'd much rather stay home on her couch or hang out with her friends in a much more "low-key" manner. If she's feeling adventurous, maybe she'll even make it past her driveway.

Definitely not interested in the party scene.

So when Carmen's family and persistent 70-year-old grandmother insists on her having a Debut party for her 18th birthday, she doesn't hesitate before disagreeing.

Unable to back out of the Filipino tradition, Carmen finds herself in a compromising situation of trying to find her Court of Honour and personal Escort when she hasn't spoken to the male population since birth. The plan? Ask Brennan Coleman, the most popular boy at school, get rejected, and fake being heartbroken so that her family will back off.

However, when "the plan" doesn't go as planned, and Brennan miraculously agrees to be her date, Carmen finds herself pushed into the world of Filipino chaos, party planning, and handling Brennan Coleman at the same time.

Meanwhile, they might even learn a thing or two about what it means to live in a diverse society.

TW: some parts dealing with racism and racial slurs, colourism, homophobia and transphobia, mental illnesses (eating disorders and suicide), and acts of violence. READ AT YOUR OWN RISK.

title: Insecure - Tom Hiddleston Imagines Geared Towards Battling Insecurities
description:
This book will be specifically for combating insecurities we face.  I'm doing this for several reasons:
	
	1. In the event I do close and retire the other Tom Hiddleston imagine book, there will be one still going.
	2. Everyone is hurting.  Everyone is struggling. We're trying so hard, but it's difficult to stand when society keeps kicking us down.  So to stay empowered, I would like to dedicate a book on the things people tease us about, the things we may not like about ourselves and are too afraid to say.
	3.  In harmony with the previous point, having Tom's point-of-view can be heart-strengthening, a friendly reminder that you are so much more than what society labels you.

Hopefully I can update at least once a week.

Please, don't be afraid to contact me if you just want to talk.  I'm always willing to give a listening ear.  Many of these things I went through alone, and I'd hate for anyone else to go through them too.

On a side note:  I put this under the category of "random" because I don't feel it's right to call this fiction.  Yes, although they are imagines, the problems are real.  And I'd like to think that Tom would be 100% helpful and supportive in any case.

|| Highest Ranking: #4 in Hiddleston, appropriate for the being that is so amazingly kindhearted to everyone.

title: How to write  an autistic character
description:
How to write an Autistic character through the eyes of one. How to word it with examples. And learn a bit more on Autism. Autistic characters in books are actually rare. There is never a love story for us. Or part of a group on an adventure to find ancient hidden treasure. No dysfunctional crazy adventure in a comedy. And when books turn into Films or  TV series where are we?. If you have noticed this too then come on in. If this surprises you and want to make a change also come on in.

title: Raven Girl
description:
Nadine is an 18-year-old thief living in a nation of darkness. The people of Ravenna never come out during the day - not unless they want to be killed by the daylight horrors: unseen flying monsters that plague the skies. When a plot to steal Ravenna's Crown Jewels goes terribly wrong, Nadine finds herself teamed up (against her will) with a group of hostile allies, some from neighbouring countries, and forced to pull off an impossible heist for her freedom. 

They must journey across the country and break into an impenetrable stronghold. Steal an item that no one has seen and lived to tell the tale. Nadine is convinced they will tear one another apart before they find the artefact. But when secrets become revealed and they find out exactly what the flying monsters are, their mission gets even more complicated. Despite all the odds, Nadine and her gang might be forced to work together.

**My oldest work on Wattpad. Please check out my other books for much better writing!**

title: A Bartender's Guide to Paying it Forward || ᴏɴᴄ 2023
description:
{ ᴏɴᴄ ʜᴏɴᴏʀᴀʙʟᴇ ᴍᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴ & ᴀᴍʙᴀꜱꜱᴀᴅᴏʀꜱ' ᴘɪᴄᴋ }

Tate has been the bartender at The Imp's Bottle for years. The dive bar attracts a trickling array of unusual patrons, but due to his social anxiety, Tate avoids conversation and interaction.

...Until a random encounter with a beautiful girl causes Tate to open up in a way he never imagined possible. Unbeknownst to Tate, the girl's kindness plants a seed, inspiring him to abandon his wallflower nature.

The changes are subtle at first, but rather than hyperfocus on his beloved retro music and impulsive need to clean, Tate begins to converse and interact with the bar's patrons. He becomes more outspoken, engaged, and confident. And his positive changes inspire changes in those around him.

However, not everyone is thrilled with Tate's newfound confidence. Ali, the bar's prickly lone waitress, has a bone to pick with Tate. And she plans to come out on top of their little workplace rivalry, no matter the cost to her coworker.

|| A story about how the tiniest pebble can create the biggest ripples, this is my entry for ONC 2023. ||

title: What She Left
description:
"I just want you to know that I love you, and that will never change. I just want you to know that even if you don't remember me, I will always remember you." I stood there for a few more minutes looking at her grave, wishing she could actually hear the words I was saying. I didn't know what else I was supposed to do or say so I walked back to my car. And as I was walking, I could have sworn I heard my grandmother's voice say, "I love you too, Marina."

   Marina's grandmother passed away due to dementia, but Marina is determined that no one will ever forget Wren Jennings, even if dementia took the memories from Wren.

title: Perturbed Kind | ONC 2023
description:
Four strangers are trapped in an elevator and forced to reveal details about their most malicious deeds within the hour to prevent a fall to their death. But as secrets are exposed, tension escalates, leading to a reality no one is prepared for.

*****

Tasha Pierce receives an anonymous invitation she believes is from her ex-boyfriend hoping to see her in the high-rise building where he resides. 

But upon ascending in the elevator with three strangers, one of them hits the emergency stop and demands they share details of their most malicious deed within the hour to prevent falling several stories to their death.

As secrets are revealed and the hour closes in, who the people are and why they are trapped in a precarious elevator together soon becomes the least of her worries. 


*****


ONC Prompt 56: You are on a typical awkward elevator ride with a group of other people, and suddenly someone says, "So, I bet you are wondering why I've gathered you here," before hitting the emergency button.



*****

title: A Love So Wicked | (Complete)
description:
Thanks to a dare gone wrong, Maggie Brumfield finds out the hard way that Heaven and Hell are real. 

Prince Laudon, Lucifer's son and the current ruler of Hell, has locked Maggie into a sinister deal that grants him temporary ownership of her soul. With no other choice but to play nice with Lucifer's handsome spawn, Maggie is forced into a dangerous situation where defiance leads to death. Meanwhile, supernatural beings who previously only existed in her wildest dreams become visible to her. 

It isn't until after Maggie uncovers a damning secret about Prince Laudon, one that could get him kicked out of Hell and her released from their deal, is when she gains the strength to fight back for her soul. 

But what happens when destiny intervenes, essentially pulling the two opposites together rather than apart?

title: An Unfading Desire
description:
♡Hawaon ki aawaz jaisa tu 
Ruhani kisi Saaz jaisa tu 
Jo sun ke khush ho jaaye khuda 
Ussi alfaaz jaisa tu

Ishq mujhe raas aaya hai
Jab se tu paas aaya hai
Teri khushboo se har taraf
Naya Ehsaas aaya hai♡

♡Saaz X Ehsaas♡  ~ ♡Ehaaz♡

Saaz Ahmad : A Kind hearted boy, studying in BSc. Second year. Belongs to a decent wealthy family, he is devoted to Music, his charming smile masks his pain.
His scarred past made him immune to every sorrow.

Ehsaas :  A Simple middle class girl, devoted to 'Lord Shyam' and 'Sangeet'. She enjoyed life despite belonging to a strict family. Saaz's kindness made her fall for him.

She embraced every moment of her life
He regretted taking birth in this world

She claimed him like nobody else did
But he found him unworthy of her love.

She was the Sunlight of her shadowed life
Will she able to make him love himself? 
Will they end up together?

What made Saaz 'special' them everyone else?

He is Magical she said, but what if she is literally right, What if he is really 'magical'

Please enter in a Story of An 'Ordinary' Girl and 'Extraordinary' boy
Backbencher Ehsaas X Topper Saaz

title: The Girl Who Kept Running
description:
He ran into her at street theater.

She was a force of nature, not a casual first time hire.

She brought the house down with her performance, literally pulled the audience to their feet in standing ovation.

Her performance was too real, unnerving, deeply unsettling to him. He spent all his energy keeping up with her.

At the end of the play, she snatched her earnings from the director's hands and ran away, leaving a trail of questions behind her, the most burning one in his mind was:

Would he ever see her again?
____________________

This ongoing novel imagines a world that our younger generations inherit after a series of successive presidencies in the same vein as the current model. There is no need for erecting walls, as the biggest divide created by humanity - that of social class - takes care of a post modern segregation. The poor are literally marginalized into slum-like townships and tend to be of color. The names of these townships would be enough to tell you their story. The rich, well, remain happily oblivious in the big American cities. 

In this world find a mysterious girl whose identity must be hidden or she would be hunted down and a young street actor who falls for her intrigue. Discover how they survive, born into a society not prepared to give them a chance.

For them, the dystopia came without an apocalypse. 

Copyrighted 2018
_________________________________________________
Updates every 5-6 days. Currently on hiatus for revisions.
Most impressive rank: 
#87 in dystopia/dystopian 
#90 in future (17/09/18)

Thanks are due to the amazing New Zealand artist Shane Rebenschied who allowed me to use one of his illustrations on his portfolio at http://blot.com. I used basic photoshopping to add some shades and used the awesome text effects from http://picturetopeople.com

Famous rockstar, Christian Roumery and is in need of a singer. He stumbles upon Rose Jinwell. Rose was born and raised in a small town and has never explored her talent of singing. That is until Christian makes her an offer of a life time. 


Christian is a calm and collected rockstar. Rose is a woman who is always worried and can't sit still for more than five minutes.

authorBio:
━━━━━♔━━━━━━━━━♔━
I try to follow back. Not very successful most of the time but I try I promise.

I'm Denise Williams (Actually,  my pen name. Only weird people know my real name.) And I am a Christian, opinionated, female writer.

Everything I write is the exact opposite of who I am. I've actually never felt the touch of a man romantically and I can't even order more ketchup without giving myself a pep talk. When I'm not creating imagined worlds, I am usually reading or having a race with my pet turtle.

If you ever need anything or someone to talk to, I encourage you to send a private message or leave a comment on Message Board.

Okay, I'm done. You can leave now.

title: Brother Wolf
description:
Brother-to-All-Wolves is the new name given to the naturally born werewolf, Little Wolf, by his spirit guide, the Spirit of the Wolf itself.

Alpha King is the title given to him by his newly adopted sister. Within her human, weak, cancer-riddled body beats the fierce heart of an alpha wolf. Because of her, he has a way to connect the created, bitten werewolves in Spirit Wolf's earthly pack.

With the help of friends, both human and werewolf, he hunts for those leaders who use what they are to abuse and control others.  

When he is one with the Spirit of the Wolf and howls, his song echoes across the sky and is heard by all wolves. 

Those who are his prey...shiver!

title: Darker Places
description:
[#887 in Short Story- March 13, 2016]

This is a story about the deep web, but it's more than that- this is a story about human beings. 

It's about the popular girl who stumbles into a world she never knew, the sick teenage deep web obsessive who's always craving something darker, and the seen-it-all hacker left a mess after seeing unspeakable things put to film. 

This is about the fallout scars and the court cases, the lost innocence and the therapy sessions. The consequences of what they saw will be permanent, and Mia Randolph, Drew Coleman, and Kendra Monroe know it. 

It took one video to change their lives forever. 

A trio of short stories about the untraceable internet.

°↝ ∵。❅ Keerthi Ayer wants to change the world. She aches to be revolutionary, dreams of making a stand in the world. But it doesn't feel like she's making any headway, stuck in the same old same old with only her imagination, books, and creativity to fall back to. Until an incident involving a mysterious tarot reading catapults her into a world she believed only existed within the pages of one of her favorite book series. Somehow she's in the Heroes of Olympus alongside its characters. The thing is she knows exactly how it will all end and the last thing she wants to witness is her favorite character dying up close and personal. She'll do anything to prevent it―even if it means changing the world she's now a part of. Keerthi Ayer wants to be revolutionary, maybe she'll find her peace challenging the Three Fates about what's already set in stone.

title: Unhealthy Coping Mechanism
description:
Stay-at-home mom Harriet has just about had it. As her husband puts in more and more hours at the office, she's stuck with six-year-old Sam and the looming insanity of the holiday season. Along with the usual event planning panic, fall brings constant reminders of her father's failing health and the limited time they have left together.

When her friend and renowned caterer Carol invites her over for a baking session, Harriet jumps at the opportunity to destress and learns Carol's secret ingredient to her stress-free lifestyle: venting her negative emotions into everything she bakes. 

As Harriet's love for baking warps into an addiction to the comforting warmth of the oven, her new coping mechanism starts to look more and more like a recipe for disaster.

Cover by @meha-k
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
She/her, demiromantic ace, technical editor and Wattpad Creator with cerebral palsy

When it comes to fiction, I primarily write fantasy stories for both adults and children, often involving animals, baking, and tons of puns. I also dabble in other genres, and have posted hundreds of bite-sized poems that are the perfect read if you only have a minute to spare.

My short stories and poems have appeared in Daily Science Fiction, Bronzeville Bee, Cicada, Short Édition, and various other publications. I'm a proud member of Rainbow Book Club, Dreamland Raid, and Dreamland Hunt. I'm also the founder of the Triple A Community.

title: In the Shadows of Reality
description:
The Backrooms 

They're a labyrinth. Random halls, rooms, anything you can imagine is there. But what's in them is what you should be worried about. No one truly understands them. No one knows what all they contain. No one knows if there is truly an end. A few stragglers who are determined to find an escape, will figure out what lies in the shadows of reality. 

Arny, a young adult with a troubling relationship with his parents, finds himself stuck in a room which seems to go on forever. When he learns there are more floors to explore he is set on finding an exit. Arny, accompanied by a few comrades, sets off to find the true end of the Backrooms, if there even is an end.

Note: The idea or the levels featured in the book are not my idea. I tried to make this as self explanatory as possible so you won't need to do any prior research. However, the Backrooms are creepy pasta stories I recommend checking out in your spare time!

(This isn't all canon! I did make some new stuff and new creatures in there to move the plot along!)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: YAGA | ✓
description:
2018 • [ A CROOKED TALE, a phantom's whisper, watch it burn, feel it blister. ] •

A forest. A hut on chicken's feet. A fence of blood and bone.

Before she was Baba Yaga, she was just a girl. 

Fuelled by spite and hatred for the world around her, Yaga Izeva has always had two faces. A beautiful one, the tailor's girl and a perfect wife, and the other, far darker than anyone could've ever imagined.

Because things like that didn't happen in their village - until they did.

With the blood of her village on her hands and nowhere to turn to, Yaga runs to the open arms of the forest, where the water runs black and the trees are haunted by ghosts of the past.

Power is a pretty thing - before it consumes you.

Go to sleep, children.

And watch out for Baba Yaga. 

(cover by @wanderess_4)

title: FACE CLAIM
description:
This accumulation was made some while ago with the intent to make it easier for me to pick the perfect face for my characters, however, I have chosen to remove the hackneyed for it seems Wattpad lack cognizance in select areas. I, personally, aim to handpick those I deem fit of a role and in ways bound to play my OCs, furthermore, characters I feel have been dismally depicted. Seeing almost nothing but played out Caucasoid faces and a meager alternative (not to mention the disturbingly irksome repetition of white actresses, singers, etc. but that is a matter for another time) I believe it is needed to bring some attention to other phenomenal people.

In this book, you will be provided with a list of faces for your fictional characters. They will be presented in a category displaying the person's age and sex (as of when they were added), where you will find a face, a name, date of birth, background, etc.

Just doing my part in keeping up the diversity, so soldier on; you do yours and feel free to recommend anyone I have not yet mentioned!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Another Name (SU fanfic)
description:
A pearl too small to fit in, an alien betrayed by his own people, a peridot punished for being too kind, and a separated couple. These apparently unconnected characters will end being linked up by the consequences of an event that will ultimately trigger the unveiling of Homeworld's most well hidden secrets.

This story is a Steven Universe fan fiction that wants to create an alternative point of view on the original show without changing the canon events. For that, I use big amounts of speculation to fill the gaps the show left when it ended.
The action is presented in short chapters and is told almost entirely told from my original characters perspective, the one of gems, and some other alien races, curious about their existance, their origins, and their possibilities beyond serving their superiors.
I assume you've seen the cartoon before reading this fanfiction. Beware of the spoilers if you haven't seen all Steven Universe, the Movie, and Future.
(CC) Attribution - Pas d’utilisation commerciale - Partage dans les mêmes conditions
authorBio:
I write to explore possibilities and put some order in my mind. It's also a healing process and a way to disclousure what hope is to me.
Please note I'm not a native English speaker and my drawings are more a reference than a form of art.
Questions, comments, suggestions and criticism are welcomed.

title: Slut | | Kim Taehyung AMBW
description:
ㅡ "..if you think that calling me a slut is meant to be an insult, then you're honestly a fucking middle schooler."

ㅡ "Oh my fucking god. I just kissed my best friend's girlfriend." 

ㅡ "I never felt that way about you."


: : 

In every cliché love story, there's the slut who tries to take the main character's love interest away. The slut is usually a bitchy, secretly insecure, provocative dresser who is jealous of the main character's beauty and personality. Basically, she's the "villain" of any romantic drama.

Then there's the main character's second love interest. The one who chases after her no matter how many times she claims to be in love with another. He loves her, and she manipulates his love however she wants. He's the second choice, the rebound, the sinking ship, the one who stays in a one sided love forever. 

If my life were a story, I wouldn't be the main  character; I'd be the slut. 

And Taehyung would be the second choice. 

And this would be a love story about how the slut and the second choice got tangled in a web of lust, lies, hate, and love.

: :

HIGHEST RANKINGS

1 in #vtaehyung
1 in #rebounds 
8 in #stereotype

title: Sadie Stranded
description:
Sadie has everything going for her- she's the pretty, party girl with straight A's and a cute, older boyfriend. Until one night she gets dragged out of bed by two men her parents hired and taken to middle-of-nowhere Utah. She's told that her parents enrolled her in a 3-month long therapy program where she'll be forced to live under a tarp in the desert, be sober, and have no contact with the outside world. 
Is this really the opportunity to heal and grow that her parents and therapist say it is? Or is it a make-shift jail to hold the rebellious daughters who won't do as their told?

title: Between the Shades
description:
Love, legacy, lies. 
We'll all burn for something.  
•••
"So, how would you want me to do it?"

My gaze flicked up to Matteo's, a sinking feeling in my stomach as his words incited torrents of perturbation through my veins.

The murkiness of his eyes were foreboding, like the ominous signs of a storm, but I couldn't break his gaze even if it might lead to my damnation. I may just drown if it meant I could ease the heat from the coals he sent searing against my skin. 

"Would you like to burn, like the Indigos did?"

He stood to his feet, rounding the desk as I kept my eyes low, feeling my chest rise and fall much faster than it had been moments ago. 

"Would you like a slow, painful death, Miss Osikani?"
•••
Morals would be their downfall, not the absence of it. 

As her lawyer, Matteo Riqueza had to defend everything he had ever detested: an affluent killer with insufficient remorse and an ability to submerge him in thoughts he ought to never speak aloud. 

As his client, Marigold Osikani had to tolerate the embodiment of her distaste: a judgemental hypocrite with obstinate self-righteousness and a way of making her wish she had just burned instead.

title: Ice Massacre (Mermaids of Eriana Kwai #1)
description:
A mermaid's supernatural beauty serves one purpose: to lure a sailor to his death.
 
The Massacre is supposed to bring peace to Eriana Kwai. Every year, the island sends its warriors to battle these hostile sea demons. Every year, the warriors fail to return. Desperate for survival, the island must decide on a new strategy. Now, the fate of Eriana Kwai lies in the hands of twenty battle-trained girls and their resistance to a mermaid's allure.
 
Eighteen-year-old Meela has already lost her brother to the Massacre, and she has lived with a secret that's haunted her since childhood. For any hope of survival, she must overcome the demons of her past and become a ruthless mermaid killer.
 
For the first time, Eriana Kwai's Massacre warriors are female, and Meela must fight for her people's freedom on the Pacific Ocean's deadliest battleground.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I'm Tiana Warner, a sapphic romance author best known for my critically acclaimed, Amazon bestselling series, Mermaids of Eriana Kwai. I have several other sapphic romance stories, both YA and adult, so please check out my books on my website and wherever books are sold!

title: The Marked Heroes
description:
Zach was the leader of Unit Twelve, a government crime fighting team. When the country's most feared criminal enters the city, Zach becomes faced with a terrible secret that will shake the very core of his identity. And with it, he must make a choice.

Full Summary:

To the chief of police, he was just a number. To his classmates, he was a freak. To his friends, he was their anchor. Zachary Bennet was the Leader of Unit Twelve, one of the thirteen elusive crime fighting teams across the country for those with 'special' gifts. 

But his position as leader was on shaky ground. The threat of losing his friends, his family, hangs overhead with ominous weight.

When the country's most feared criminal enters Zach's city, the already fragile structure of his life crumbles around him. As the stakes rise higher, as lies unfold, Zach becomes faced with a terrible secret that will shake the very core of his identity.

And with it, he must make a choice.

title: Spectra: The Mark of Eden
description:
Valentine has awoken with nothing but a name. Note awakens with nothing but a doctrine. Each has found themselves in Spectra, a strange galaxy with a unique and mysterious history. 

Spectra is home to many different forms of life, all of whom revere a long-dead race of beings they call the Architects. Though they are now gone, there are still remnants of them left behind in the forms of their creations, the Sentinels, autonomous drones that enforce tenets all must follow. Then there's the enigma of Eden, an unknown anomaly in the center of the galaxy which the Sentinels fiercely protect.

As Val and Note are hunted down by a species of gene-splicers known as the Cell for reasons as of yet undiscovered, it will only be through the friendships and alliances they forge that they'll survive. They'll find purpose in one another through exploring the wonders of Spectra, taking it upon themselves to stop the Cell, and unraveling the hidden truth of their origins.

Highest Rankings: #6 in Adventure, #8 in Mystery

BOOK II: WHEN YOU LOVE

Sana is on the brink of her 35th birthday. She's in love but not married and without kids. No biggie; still, it doesn't stop her from wishing she had a ring on it. Concerning kids, it's another frustrating story that has her drowning her sorrow in food. To top things off, she hates her job, and her body keeps getting thicker.

Our girl is in mental turmoil. If only she could have one wish.

title: Going Back To You
description:
"It all changed the day, news of Arin's death confined me in an unsolicited nostalgia of the star- eyed boy with bright sun-reflected brown hair who adorned a mind so untouched by socially constructed realities. My first love. The man who taught me that there were plenary truths of life that were inexplicable and yet, complexly logical."

In which a forty-something year old man, named Naksh,  reminisces the veiled stories of two lovers after the death of his beloved. 

~co-written with @Merakioni~
---
A/N: All rights to the original owner of the picture in the cover.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
(✪‿✪)ノ

I write LGBTQ+ themed short stories. I'll delve into more and real diversity once I accumulate qualifying knowledge on the ever so many identities spanning the beautiful multicultural spectrum of sexualities and genders.

I'm twenty two years old, and I'm a graduate in law and sociology.
I identify as agender, so pronouns aren't of importance to me. However, if you're someone who cares, then call me they/them.

I identify as an aromantic asexual. I understand that romance and sex  have been extravagantly overplayed in mainstream media, but somehow, even I haven't been immune to amatonormativity (my characters fall in love). I promise to write on aroace characters in the future.

I'm an Indian. Yes, the south asian country with a population of 1.3 billion. There's cut-throat competition here and I always try to increase my marketability.

I love discussions on philosophy and psychology. I love the oceans and their unvanquished mysteries. I love cats and elephants. Kafka is my spiritual soulmate. My spirit animal is the Octopus.

If you've read any of my works, thank you so much for giving it a chance. If you've voted and/or commented on any of my works, thank you so much for your express support. It really helps me when I see feedback. Thank you so much!

Thank you for taking time to learn about me! Have a good day! :)

♤♧◇♡

title: Tattooed Illusions (BxB)
description:
"Go to hell," Zeus snarled, his brown eyes narrowed into slits. 

"Where the fuck do you think I came from?" Nika laughed dryly. 

Scars wrapped around their arms, hidden beneath tattooed illusions and cruel smirks. Anger clouds their eyes. Blood stains the bathroom tiles and cigarette smoke paints the walls. Silence engulfs the bedrooms. The students mask their fear with terrifying emotions, afraid of letting their true colors show. 

Because at Meadowsville High, a pair of metaphorical handcuffs encircle their wrists, a haunting memory of their pasts.

Warning: sexual themes, mentions of abuse, alcohol, drugs, selfharm, sleep disorders, eating disorders, and panic attacks. 

The characters will cry more than most do on Wattpad, they will hit rock bottom, they will break down, and they will feel like they're suffocating. If this bothers you in any way, refrain yourself from reading.

title: Thousand Dollar Friend
description:
"Make friends with my daughter, and I'll pay you a thousand dollars."

Tara's junior year of high school is turned upside down after she collides into the life of Aurora Rosenberg, the autistic teenage heiress to Rosenberg Technologies. Mr. Rosenberg's offer feels wrong... but he says his daughter has no real friends, and Tara's family is desperate for cash. Now what?

Tara needs to make this work. It doesn't matter that her best friend moved away. Or that she may lose her house. Or that her other friends no longer like her.

Oh, yes: and there's a cute boy involved. And the mystery of why Aurora's dad is so desperate to buy her a friend, when Aurora is hardly a social pariah... As Tara watches pieces of her life fall apart, and new things come together, she must figure out what she values most.

Notes:
Rated mild PG-13.
The discussion space is meant to be friendly and safe for minors. Hate towards people with disabilities, any letter in the LGBTQIAPN+ community, or other groups isn't welcome.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Luna (she/her), the writer of Silent Voice and Thousand Dollar Friend.

I'm not super active here due to work and being an auntie.

I'm autistic and I study autism a lot. I also really enjoy illustrating my work! (All art is by me unless specified otherwise.) Writing fiction has always been a dream of mine, so feel free to poke around and enjoy what I've placed here.

My stories are inclusive for people with disabilities, LGBTQIAPN+ people, people of all religions, people of color, and others. Combative or intolerant behavior will get a warning (if your intent is unclear to me) or an instant block.

title: The Palace Of Darkness
description:
(Timeline - 1960s)
"I knew you would be here" she said walking towards her and then making space for the tray , before placing it on the table. The tray as usual had a steaming cup of tea and a newspaper on it. Karuna's features contorted in displeasure on seeing the mess she had created and the mess she had become.

"Why don't you take care of yourself, Meera? How long would you torture yourself?" asked Karuna, her voice laced with concern . 

"I am fine kaki sa" , Meera said nonchalantly, opening up the newspaper and skimming through it while taking small sips of the hot tea.

Karuna knew speaking any further would not yield any better results, so she continued to clean the table quietly. Taught by experience , she purposefully avoided looking at the displayed masterpiece on easel, for it was not a new sight . 

Meera turned the page of 'Indian Express' only to have her eyes freeze over the bold headline.

"King of Mewar engaged to the princess of jodhpur"

title: Godspeed
description:
The moment Marley Mason moved to the United States of America he stopped speaking. Dislocated from his mother, friends, and culture, Marley found it impossible to voice his thoughts to anyone but his father. Thereafter, he gave up on himself and his happiness. What else was an alien to do?

Until he meets Ava DeLoughery and she makes him want to give this world a second try.  To put his headphones down and experience everything that life has to offer one at a time again, and again, and again. For the first time in a long time, Marley Mason feels like himself. But the Miami summer-time heat must be getting to him because Marley Mason should know better than to find a home in fickle people, like Ava DeLoughery.

title: BOY KING (CFTM Prequel)
description:
FROM THE AWARD-WINNING AUTHORS OF THE CHEATER.FAKER.TROUBLEMAKER SERIES (WATTY'S 2016, FICTION AWARDS 2016, HACHETTE AUDIO 2017), JENNY ROSEN & KRISTEN MAGLONZO.

After bullies, braces, and brutal heartbreak shatters his faith in love, soon-to-be freshman & former geek, Elias King, spends the summer growing into his new good looks. 

To seal the deal on his sudden rise to popularity, Elias puts his virginity up for grabs online, hoping his antics will skyrocket him into the ranks of social royalty. After becoming the most notorious bad boy at Mission Bay High, getting any girl he wants is just a matter of keeping his inner-romantic a secret. 

At least, until her.

When a shy girl on the softball team falls for the real boy behind the bravado, Elias discovers that his first real shot at love just might be worth risking his reputation for.

But dating a social media king comes at a price, and when an obsessed stalker exposes the most intimate secrets of Elias's love life online, it's a race against time to catch the culprit before a viral video rips his relationship apart.

(This is the prequel to the award-winning CHEATER.FAKER.TROUBLEMAKER SERIES (Watty's Most Voracious Reads Winner 2016, Fiction Awards Winner 2016) published by Hachette Audiobooks in 2017. The first two books of the CFTM series, CHEATER.FAKER.TROUBLEMAKER and LOVE HER, LEAVE HER are available on Amazon, Target, Walmart, and Audible)

title: Emery Red
description:
"You're all I ever wanted, so in whatever form you take, you will always be perfect to me."

Emery Snyder is a completely average boy with completely average goals and dreams. However due to a childhood trauma, he has an extreme fear of animals- specifically dogs.

So one late afternoon, escaping to his grandmother's, his worst nightmare is realized.

*

More wolf than human, Adelaide Young is the most calm, blindingly happy person one will ever have the pleasure of meeting, so really it's no surprise the confusion she's placed in when a boy actually fears her.

As fate would have it, it's this very boy that she just can't get off her mind leading to the chase of the century- well, the greatest chase of Jameson Ridge. A hot topic for housewife gossip, Adelaide's first love will experience all the ups and downs of a new relationship with an old tale's spin and a dash of supernatural.

[Disclaimer: this summary is wildly misleading as I've changed the direction of the plot quite a bit, so proceed with caution from this point forward.]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My name is Anna, but you can call me Ann. I write mediocre novels that I take forever updating and I love talking about my OCs.

Music heavily influences my writing as well as the rest of my life. I like bands such as Metric and Pvris or ones like Iron and Wine and even at time Nico Vega.

I spend a lot of time drawing and creating characters and procrastinating on Tumblr, but I do plan on writing more soon, so if you're one of the few that have stuck around, thank you so much for your support. I hope I can begin updating my books again in the next few weeks.

title: Accidentally Married To The Mafia Boss
description:
Lyvia Burns is left at the altar when her moody, socially withdrawn groom goes missing the morning before her wedding. Luckily, she bumps into the snarky, charismatic, and ridiculously sexy Nick Madigan in her would-be husband's dressing room. She agrees to walk down the aisle with him to avoid embarrassing herself in front of all her friends and relatives. Little does she know, he's actually a mobster who might have had something to do with her husband's disappearances. Now, Lyvia finds herself married to a man who is the embodiment of danger. Will she find a way out of this arrangement? Or will she lose her heart to a mafia don?

title: AMANDA
description:
Amanda Madsen has spent the last seven years living an unbearable nightmare. Her parents made a deal with the devil and she has suffered because of it.  She was forced to do everything her parents boss asked of her .  After being forced to be a slave in the house of her captors she is now free. 

She spent the last seven months staring at four walls until her friend Princess Isabelle gave her the chance to start over again. 

She moves to Italy and meets Prince Franco Laurent who  offers to protect and care for her. She ends up in a marriage of convenience with him but  will love blossom?

Now free to do whatever she wants she decides  to study to become a doctor. Something she has always wanted to do.

Marriage brings with it family and friends suddenly Amanda finds herself  with a great mentor and life seems to be going well. 

Naturally her ordeal has scarred her and her self esteem is low.  Amanda will find out that she is more capable than she thinks she is.

She maybe free but still feels like damage goods. She will go on a journey of self discovery that will make or break her.

title: Mimi's Guide to Definitely Not Being Kidnapped by Faeries
description:
Mimi knows that faerie rings = danger.  So why is it that she just can't seem to stay away?

When a faerie ring appears in her garden, Mimi must make a choice: remain stuck in her monotonous life of medical school, or travel back to Faerie with the two guides who have come to seek her out - the handsome, obnoxiously flirtatious Quinn and the sweet, stunning Celeste.  The choice should be obvious, but is everything as it seems in the realm of Faerie?  And why has Mimi, an average everyday human, been summoned by the Faerie King?

title: Disaster Class
description:
Disgraced honor student, Nico Gray-Gomez, falls from top of the class to bottom of the food chain. He has a disastrous plan to reclaim his academic status, but just how low is he willing to go to claw his way back up?

• • ● • •

Nico has been demoted to the lowest class in school. In an attempt to put himself back on top, he forms a ragtag group of brilliant idiots to go against the academic elites. Soon enough, it becomes a cutthroat competition between honor students and motley misfits -- book smarts versus street smarts, brains versus bravado.

It's already gearing up to be a disastrous senior year. And on top of that, Nico also begins to question his sexuality, his relationship with his best friend Mack Porter, and his feelings for the new kid Chipp Rivera. 

Grab a seat and mind the chaos. Disaster Class is in session.

title: LOST II
description:
Salma seemingly closed the chapter with Zayn once the court proceedings ended. However, fate had other plans. Or maybe it was prayers? Silent pleas whispered in the loneliness of the night by one heartbroken man. 

A storm of threats, bullets and a baseball bat, smashed whatever she knew of peace. A kidnapping attempt, or two . . . maybe it was three? Lies and Secrets. And many more murdering plots hit her like a tornado, forcing her back to square one with only one way out. Zayn.

She could be with him till she was no longer held at a gunpoint, but was it fair that once she was free to breathe in peace, she would walk away and ruin his life? What would it cost to give him a chance? If she opens her heart to him, what would be lost?


                      ~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~



You better not be secretly leading me to my death, Alex!

Barely had the though completed in her mind that she felt the barrel of a gun press into the back of her head. She froze in fright, her nails digging into the palm of her hands inside the pocket of her coat.

"Make a move bitch, and they won't even find a body to bury," he warned. The levelness of his voice scarier than his threat.

Salma gulped, too petrified to even breath.

"Hands where I can see them!" He nudged her with the gun. Salma unclenched her fists inside her coat. "Now!" She felt the gun poking her head sharply.

Slowly, she brought her trembling hands out, and held them above her head.

"Turn around," he ordered.

Salma swallowed her fear again. Her mouth felt dry. She had a feeling she did not have long to live. If she were to make it out of here alive, Agent Alex would have taken him out already. A dry, ragged sob raked through her body when she realized this. She was just a bait. And baits don't survive. 

At what felt like a snail's pace, she turned around to face her death. Salma's eyes zeroed on the barrel of the gun pointed at her.

title: The Progress
description:
Somewhere, surrounded by a seemingly impenetrable blockade of trees lies a summer camp. Its name: 𝐂𝐚𝐦𝐩 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐠𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬 and its goal: 𝙧𝙖𝙞𝙨𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙣𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙜𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙤𝙛 𝙡𝙚𝙖𝙙𝙚𝙧𝙨.

𝐒𝐭𝐞𝐩𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐞 𝐉𝐨𝐡𝐧𝐬𝐨𝐧 had no plans to gain a sibling, much less arrogant 𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐚𝐠𝐨 𝐆𝐮𝐳𝐦𝐚𝐧. When her retaliation lands them at Camp Progress, they soon realize neither of them are supposed to be there. 
Her goal: 𝙈𝙖𝙠𝙚 𝙞𝙩 𝙝𝙤𝙢𝙚 𝙖𝙡𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙩𝙤𝙜𝙚𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙧

𝐌𝐢𝐧𝐡𝐲𝐮𝐤 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐤 knows exactly why he's at Camp Progress, but that doesn't make him like it any better. Suddenly, he not only has to deal with the reason he's there but also the new threat of death.
His goal: 𝙃𝙤𝙥𝙚𝙛𝙪𝙡𝙡𝙮, 𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙞𝙙 𝙙𝙮𝙞𝙣𝙜

Run by: @caligonight

✩｡:*•.─────  ❁ Hello and welcome to this community/fandom. Here people who enjoy the marauders era of the books series Harry Potter can talk with other people in the same fandom.
❁  ─────.•*:｡✩

𝙏𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙜𝙨 𝙬𝙚 𝙬𝙞𝙡𝙡 𝙙𝙤

‣ 𝘚𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘥𝘤𝘢𝘯𝘰𝘯𝘴
This fandom is almost entirely based off headcanons and it would be good to spread the word about fun ones and hear other people's opinions.

‣ 𝘍𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘧𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘢𝘴𝘵
Many people like to use fancast for edits, aesthetics, as references, etc. It can be difficult to find newer ones that aren't outdated, as well as remember to add diversity. Being in a community can make it easier to find new fancast.

‣ 𝘔𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘧𝘢𝘯𝘥𝘰𝘮 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘭𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘦𝘳
No fandom is perfect and likeliness is there never will be a time that it is, but that doesn't mean that we can't try to make it a healthier and less toxic place. I want to bring attention to the issues I've noticed and how we can start fixing them.

‣ 𝘚𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘳𝘺 𝘪𝘥𝘦𝘢𝘴
This one is similar to the first, but sometimes people just really need inspiration for a story to write. Sometimes we really want to read something but can't find it anywhere.

‣ 𝘔𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘧𝘳𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘥𝘴
The most important part of this is to make new friends that share similar interest with you.

𝗡𝗼𝘁 𝗧𝗼𝗹𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱

•Death threats or threats of any kind

•Transphobia or homophobia

•Racism or colorism

•Antisemitism, or shaming of any religion for that matter

•Sexism or misogyny

•Bullying or harassment

title: 𝐀𝐓 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐄𝐃𝐆𝐄 𝐎𝐅 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐑𝐈𝐕𝐄𝐑 ⟶ Original
description:
In the small town of Moorwood, Pennsylvania, everyone knows everyone. Rumors and news spread like wildfire, and when a secret of a high school girl by the name of Keira Walters is leaked, the following days gradually get worse for her as they progresses. Keira constantly finds herself under a spotlight no matter where she goes, and she's the one the town is buzzing about this time around. 

At the end of a week, the drama stops - forever. On the night of December 5th, 2016, a gunshot rang out in the cold air, and a week later, Keira was proclaimed dead after turning up missing. Because of everything she went through in the week leading up to her death, the police first deem it as a suicide, but as the story unravels, that may not be the case. 

In a confusing network of people and stories that become looped in with Keira's death, only one thing remains true; Keira's death could very well have been a homicide.

title: WALKING DISASTERS
description:
Four years ago, Charlie Reyes and Jonah Cavalcanti promised to die together.

Four years ago, they promised to jump. He did; she hesitated, and she watched him fall to his death, too afraid to do the same herself.

But little does she know, Jonah survived. He's spent all this time recovering from his injuries as well as her betrayal, but now he's back. The mysterious, haunting boy from Charlie's past is back from the dead, more confident than ever, and set on bloody revenge.

When forgiveness isn't an option, the only way to stop him is to start thinking, acting like him. And maybe that's what will kill her in the end. 

✦ A New Adult Horror ✦

✦ Full e-book out now! ✦

title: Look but Don't Choke
description:
After Evie Harper spends the day pining after her unrequited childhood crush, Harley, she drowns her sorrows in a bottle of stolen wine. But the next day, and one glorious hangover later, Harley is found with a very naked-very strangled stripper in his bed. Naturally the police assume that it's some kind of erotic play gone terribly wrong, but Harley swears that he left her alive and "orgasmically" happy when he went on the ill fated booze and condom run. And Evie knows Harley isn't a violent man. When the Chos ask her to investigate the murder, and possibly clear their son's name, she reluctantly agrees. But as Evie digs deeper into the dead woman's life she discovers that the exotic dancer had quite the past; one that involved drugs, prostitution, and gangs. Who knew the life of a stripper could get so dirty?

Who will save them,  if serving the continent isn't saving yourself?

title: Unspoken
description:
It has been almost 250 years since the nuclear World War VI that wiped out the majority of humanity ended. Since then, a government has risen, calling themselves the New Society. It's leaders have told the citizens that their only goals are to achieve absolute perfection, and to repopulate humanity. 
      For almost two hundred years, the people have been told that life outside of the domed society is impossible, because the nuclear and atomic bombs destroyed most of the earth, and tore holes in the atmosphere during the war. The leaders say that the society is all that's left, and justice must be served. 
      It was this that led to all descendants of WWVI leaders to be placed into institutions, where they are tortured and trained to serve their future masters. They are termed entertainers, and at the age of eighteen, they are auctioned off, left to the mercy of their owners. 
       Entertainers are essentially concubines, but any relationship beyond slave and owner is strictly forbidden, and punishable by death. It's a risk many people are not willing to take, but there are exceptions to every rule. 
       Nevaeh Williams has a past unlike the majority of the other entertainers. She's forbidden from sharing her past, but her experience has led her to both fear and despise the New Society. After two years in the institution, she's auctioned off to a young billionaire. Noah Ivanov is withdrawn and mysterious, hiding a secret of his own.
       As things heat up between them, a shaky truth comes to light that forces them together.  A person from their separate yet intertwined pasts comes seems to haunt their every move, and they must secretly fight against the New Society, in order to discover their government's true plans. 
        Can Nevaeh and Noah overcome the odds they face, and bring justice to someone they've both lost? Will they fall in love in the process? And most of all, will they be executed for learning of the New Society's true nature?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

( Book V )


Maxine Rich was adopted by one of the wealthiest and most respectable families known all over the world when she was just a teenager and she has spent all her life being worthy of them. At a young age of 24, Maxine handles most of her parents' overseas business while living under the supervision of her strict but loving grandparents in London. 
It was a fateful evening when Maxine met a strange girl who stole her heart with her stunning eyes and even after telling herself to stay away from love many times over the years, Maxine found herself falling hard for the girl she knew nothing about. 
It was all roses and sunshine until everything changed and Maxine learned the hard way that she had always been right to stay away from love. 
Let's follow Maxine's journey of finding, defining, and understanding what love truly means and if it's all worth it in the end.

authorBio:
🍉🍉🍉
28 y/o
Pronouns; She/They
Just another person who likes to write... The characters in my books aren't perfect because I don't believe that anyone is. They're broken, like us, but they find their strength in each other, the bond of their friendships and family ✨  All of my books are interconnected and old characters keep appearing in new books on special occasions. I know I'm nowhere near a good writer but if you do read my work, I really hope you find it worth your time and that it makes you smile.  I'd really appreciate it if you don't leave mean comments or comments with spoilers in them because then I'll have to remove them which is the last thing I ever wanna do...  To the readers who leave their kind and sweet words for me: Thank you very much. I really appreciate your words and I hope that I don't disappoint any of you in the future.   Be kind to one another and always respect each other.  If you're reading this, hope you're having a good day.  Regards, Phoenix.

title: CLOUD NINE
description:
A budding writer with a bunch of ingenious rebels risk their lives to try and overthrow an oppressive government to earn back their liberty of expression. They need to unify and put aside their differences, interests and pasts, and race against time to snatch back their rights to express freely in the kingdom of clouds. 

|Wattpad India Awards 2020 Winner|

************

What if there was no freedom of speech and expression in your world? What if every writing, every art and all pieces of creation were censored with an iron hand? The defectors disappear without a trace, the free press is gagged and suffocating and the government had no opposition whatsoever. Set in a world of trust and betrayal, CLOUD NINE is a 'fluffy' tale of darkness. 

After the long drawn World War 3, people are shifting to the Cloud Kingdom of Audra to escape from the radiations in the atmosphere. Alizeh is looking forward to her stay on 'Cloud Nine'. But what she finds there beggars description. Will Alizeh be able to live there, or will she sacrifice her passion for a chance at a better life?

[50,000 - 60,000words]

title: The Bottom Line (Book #2 of the Lights, Camera, Romance! Series)
description:
They'll never make it. 

Ren Kurosawa and Mikayla Davis will kill each other before Ren's latest film sees the light of day. He's sure of it. After Ren's previous assistant cracks under his demands, he begrudgingly accepts Mikayla as a replacement. Yet, the two have a history deeper than a fractious working relationship. 

For years, the two have been in each other's social orbits through acquaintances. However, their mutual contempt once boiled over in a kiss. One Ren tries to forget until Mikayla walks back into his life and quickly derails his passion project. Mikayla isn't happy about their circumstances either. The only reason she signed up to help was for the cash and a trip to Japan. She's determined to get through filming and then get out of Ren's life forever.

Despite their efforts, the memory of their kiss lingers...until there is another kiss. And even more after that. The two soon find themselves enthralled in a passionate relationship. Nevertheless, the disdain remains because they both know they have nothing in common. Mikayla's all about fun and freedom and Ren only cares about box office dividends. So the two of them definitely won't make it. 

There's just no way.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I attended NYU's Tisch School of the Arts, majoring in film and television.  As a screenwriter, I have been a quarter-finalist twice in the The PAGE Awards. I have also worked as a literary editor on several series and as a blogger, with my work featured on sites like Collider.com.

While I love screenwriting, television, and these other vocations, working on novels has always been close to my heart. All my life, I've been dreaming up make-believe worlds that I love to write about.

He now must juggle his spectral companion, a blossoming new romance, and scholarly pursuits to get through the end of the school year despite a tragic death pointing all fingers at Arthur.

description:
Life was simpler for Suzume Hamada before she knew gods and monsters were real. The night her cousin was murdered by a frost giant was the night Suzume learned that Norse gods were not the stories she'd believed and that there were realms far beyond her own filled with creatures of dreams and nightmares alike.  Saved by Lady Sif, Suzume is offered a chance at a new life and a chance to find the creature that killed her cousin. Taking her place among seven other women, Suzume will have a chance to gain the immortality and magic that belongs to Asgardians if she can pass three trials and win the heart of the Crown Prince, Thor.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Cure Of The Heart
description:
In a dystopian future on the distant planet of Novarex, a deadly disease known as the Nexos Plague ravages the population. Pharmaceutical corporations profit from treating the illness, perpetuating a cycle of suffering. When a brilliant scientist, Dr. Ivan Fuller, discovers a genuine cure, he becomes the target of these corporations. An unlikely alliance forms with Zephyr, an assassin initially assigned to kill Dr. Fuller. Together, they navigate a world rife with corporate greed and political corruption, fighting to release the cure and save their society. Their journey unfolds in a gripping tale of love, rebellion, and the battle against insidious forces that value profit over human life.
I'll post updates as I write the chapters if you have any constructive criticism I'd love to hear it. The first two chapters ate fairly short but they'll get longer as the story progresses.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Nerd in the Corner
description:
No, this story isn't about a nerd falling in love with a bad boy who's made her high school life hell for years.

This is the story of an AroAce nerd who conveniently fits the stereotypes. A+ grades, glasses, books, and the most despicable of all, pimples. Eliza Avellins has it all. But instead of being the damsel in distress, she is her own knight in shining armor. Instead of late-night chats, she finds herself crying under the moon because the author killed her favorite side character. Instead of playing mind games with the school's big shot, she'd rather turn around and leave without a word.

All she ever cares about is money, books, and grades. So much so that she would willingly challenge even fate itself if it begs to believe otherwise.

Magnificent book cover and banner by @bookishnxrd.

CURRENT STATUS: REWRITING
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
- long hiatus atm

Hi, so I started this account because I wanted to further partake in the writing community again. To cope and process a very traumatic event of my life, I started writing "The Nerd in the Corner" to gain some sort of validation that there's nothing wrong with me being AroAce and having no goals of marrying someone I "love". It's been a year ever since, and things have been better for me.

Having gained a new perspective in life, I've decided to accept that while fantasy, action, thriller, and horror were my favorite genres, I'll be leaning towards writing more slice-of-life stories in this account from now on. I used to dream of writing series and novels back then, but the most feasible for me to write now are short stories and novelettes. Then again, I'm no serial writer. So I'll probably only be able to finish one book a year.

For now, I plan on continuing "The Nerd in the Corner" after editing it for a while and publishing a <10-chapter book before my college life officially starts.

title: Electric Feel 🌩
description:
"I told myself quite sternly that I wouldn't be doing this, dancing with you tonight." 

Weston's voice was soft against the pounding of the rugged, obscure music that filled the club they danced in. 

"And why's that?" Celeste tried holding his eyes in an effort to study the emotions they held in the dim light- to no avail. His expression was completely unreadable.

He stopped dancing and stiffened abruptly as he slowly wrapped his arms around her, placing his head in the crook of her neck.

"Somehow, I thought I'd be able to handle it. Now, I'm not so sure of myself."
---
While staying the summer with her best friend in her old childhood town, Celeste realizes that the quaint little lake town has more secrets than she ever would've thought-especially about Weston Granstone, whose name had become synonymous with 'a bad idea.' One night two years ago changed his life completely, and nothing had been the same since. 

Everyone has an opinion on what happened with him, and none of them are good. 

But when Celeste encounters him in a moment of vulnerability, she decides to do the last thing anyone has done in a while: give him a chance, and attempt to get to know the town pariah and what he's really like. He invites her into his world and learns that there are always two sides to every story. 

But when more surrounding his enigmatic past comes to light that could prove dangerous, Celeste may be in for more than she can handle.
Tous Droits Réservés
