title: Amber Dusk | OLD Version
description:
Rage is like wildfire. 

Princess Sonya Reinove is no stranger to rage; in fact, it is the very thing that drives her. 
After the disappearance of her older sister and the murder of her mother, the Elders of the Unknown World force Sonya to the Protector's Academy in Siberia to be placed under their protection. Sonya sees this as the perfect chance to train to become a Protector so she can exact revenge on the man that killed her mother. 

In her final year of training, Protectors and Novices begin to be murdered near and on campus--all Royal supernaturals, just like herself. 

Sonya quickly realizes that not only is the Academy not as safe as it appears to be, but that she must also question those that she has come to trust with her life over the past six years.

title: The Miracle Clinic
description:
[NEW CHAPTER EVERY THURSDAY!]

Do you believe in miracles?

Well for two high school students named Marcus Veridan & Ronnie Everst, they certainly do as they've managed to make a club all about making miracles happen. Despite the club struggling to find its footing, they manage to quickly find two new members in the form of Elizabeth Moore, a shy nerdy girl that somehow gets into drama pretty easily, and Alex Smith, a hot heated athletic dude that thinks with his fists. Together the four of them and their club named "The Miracle Clinic" will slowly but surely begin to shake the entire groundwork of the city they live in, one miracle at a time.

title: X-Marks: Stealing Shadows
description:
Children are disappearing. And their parents don't want to find them.

After Valen is taken from her home she is used for government plans never spoken aloud. Only the mark of an "X" on her forehead is left to tell her past. When her new home is overtaken by rebels, Valen and her group of friends are forced into the outside world they know little about. Together they must hide from those out for their marked blood.

Begin this trilogy, and learn why some secrets are better left in the shadows.

They can run, but they'll always be marked.

K-Pop bands / artists that can take all my money: BTS, Exo, MonstaX, BigBang, B.A.P., Got7, NCT127,  Block B, Shinee, 2NE1, Girls Generation, Twice, 4Minute, AKMU, Jay Park, Dean.

-----

People that just get me: Marina and the Diamonds, Posh Spice, Kim Taehyung, Helga Pataki, anyone who appreciates a big baggy sweater, the girl at Chipotle who always gives me extra toppings.

-----

What one event in your childhood had the greatest effect on your life?

Choked on a CapriSun my first day of 3rd grade at a new school and threw up. Really set the mood for the rest of my time in school.

-----

Who is your best friend and what do you like best about them?

My best friend Anita because we can be BTS trash together and reminisce about when we were smaller 8-year-old dorks.

-----

What "lesson from mom" do you still live by today?

Always wash my fruit before eating and always have a plastic bag full of other plastic bags handy.

-----

If you could spend a week anywhere in the world, where would it be?

Anywhere Britney Spears is.

-----

What's the most unusual thing in your desk drawer?

One of those novelty plastic rulers with your school picture on it. I can't throw my face away.

-----

What's the worst mistake you ever made?

Put the mac and cheese box in the trash before reading the directions. I'll never learn.

-----

What's the most unusual place you have visited?

NYC. Not unusual except the really suspicious knife on the dresser when the host was showing me the room. I saw my life flash before my eyes for a quick minute.

-----

What's the craziest thing you have done?

Not looked both ways when crossing the street.

-----

Favorite Quote

"Radda radda radda radda ra!" - Schnitzel (Chowder)

title: Free Minds
description:
A 5x Wattpad Featured Novel✨!

Consider this: You make a life altering decision not too long ago that you reconsider everyday and as if that isn't enough torture, it has the nerve to violently dangle two other decisions before your eyes. Want to guess the first? 

Well, the first decision is a step in the right direction but with highly probable danger to you and colossal doom to everyone else.  

And the other? The other is the best way to play it safe...until definite danger to you and colossal doom to everyone else. 

This is what Beth has to face after what appears to be a memorable night for the school of Zavlon Academia, morphs into a nightmare etched in the minds of the whole student body. 

Obviously, it's not easy. Especially when she's not only supposed to save, but unite with the other lucky few who manage to escape the incident. The very people who either contributed to or ignored the treatment she received as the 'other' Zavolonian. 

Particularly the enigma of a boy she's particularly torn as to whether to like or detest, to trust or suspect.

Whichever decision isn't going to change one thing though; the lurking evil that's cutting corners, coming for the ones who got away. 

Fast.

Ready or not.

title: Worrying Winters
description:
Maddison, James and Charlie Collins have just broken up for their Christmas holidays, and they're looking forward to celebrate the festive season, however, things don't go as expected.


Their parents, Mr and Mrs Collins, are arguing a lot more frequently than ever before, and they've discussed the decision to get divorced. They are both having affairs behind each other's backs.


Maddison, fourteen years old, is opinionated and has a strong sense of justice. 


James, just one year older than Maddison, wants to come out as gay to his parents, he's not sure if his parents are homophobic, he doesn't know whether his mom is, but his dad is heavily religious, and believes homosexuality is a sin, so, James can only assume he is homophobic. He has told his sister, and Maddison is helping him the best she can with this.

Charlie is four. He just wants to be four, but after learning of his parent's dying love for each other, he matures at a rapid pace. 


Can they emerge victorious over their struggles? And make Christmas feel like Christmas again? 


Worrying Winters explores relationship dynamics, and inspires critical thinking among its readers.

title: I Want To Know (ON HOLD)
description:
Ahlam Zayan was 18 when she discovered that best friends can in in fact betray you. No matter how close they are. She was 18 when these wounds were sliced against her being and for the first time in her sheltered life, she felt pain.

Ahlam Zayan was 22 when she began to heal. She dealt with the pain and the wounds and tried to forget about the betrayal that had slapped her face. She wanted to smile and laugh and just forget.

Ahlam was 26 when the protective walls she had built around her were bombed. The false mantras she'd built to save herself were of no use, and the one person she detested was about to be thrown into her life again, and this time unwillingly. 

///

Ahlam Zayan, a Pakistani muslim teenager living in the States, takes pride in her friends and her family. They've stuck with her through and through and she's a 100% certain that they always will. Except, life is at play once more, and happiness is short-lived. When the one person Ahlam would bet her entire life on leaves her with a hurt she's never felt before, she is thrown down to Earth from the skies and must build herself up once again, this time, alone.

This is the story that she writes for herself, the painting she paints, and the song that she sings. These are the stars that she lights up and the flames that she ignites. This is the pain she feels and the tears she cries. This is her.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tell me, if you knew someone who made sure you ate whenever you were hungry so you'd never die of starvation, made sure you could cry and let out the hurt, when your eyes were heavy, literally destroyed whatever ailed you, kept you warm when you were cold, kept you cool when you were burning up, wouldn't you want to love them?

Then why don't you love your body?

Why won't you love your body?

//////////////////
I am me, and I change everyday. I grow and I learn. I make mistakes and I forgive myself. I have finally learned to love myself. I smile, and I laugh, and I even cry. That's me. I'm the girl I was, the girl I am, and the girl I will be. Isn't that great?

/////////////////

A friend, a sister, a daughter, a scientist, a writer, an avid reader, an army, a potterhead, a batfam and DC enthusiast, and hopefully a good person.

/////////////////

So if you've read this far done: congratulations. This is a special note I wrote for my reading list to the right. I am very particular with the books I add here and they are a blend of both incredibly adept writing skill as well as a heart touching themes and amazing creativity. title: In Your Dreams
description:
One thing is certain. You can never escape it. DEATH. A five-letter word. But what if you could escape it. Well, Templar May is about to find a world where you have unlimited time. A place where your wildest dreams and biggest fears come to life.

 
-----------_---------------
I know I am dreaming but I can not keep my eyes from the vibrant trees and amazing green that surrounds me. Heavy blankets of moss cover the trees in beautiful green layers. Clovers dominate the forest floor in thick bunched patches. My eyes gaze at the unfathomably tall pine trees that seem to touch the heavens. I know I am dreaming but I can feel the cold creep up my spine and my breath comes out in thick foggy clouds that reach for the heavens.  My mind slips into a foggy haze that mirrors the fog blanketing the forest when I see it. At first, it is just a glimpse of black.  Then I realize that this black is a thick mass of hair attached to a person. Whoever it is, their back is to me. From the stature and muscle tone, they appear male. Tan skin shines as a bright contrast against the various shades of green that blanket everything.  A force pulls me in like a siren's call. Pinpricks manifest under my skin as a growing sense of danger fills my body. The magnetic force continues to draw me in as if I do not have any choice in the matter. Something deep inside my body, deep inside my very soul screams at me to run away and never return but, the siren's call continues. Tension tightens my muscles as an alarming desire within me registers. I want this. I do not know why but I want to know whoever this is. But as I come within yards of the stranger, my dream changes.  I am outside of my body watching the color drain from my still body and blank eyes as my blood soaks the once bright green foliage on the forest floor.

Editing later on

title: What Summer Brings
description:
Sixteen year old Tinsley Mathis seemingly has a good high schooler's life. She's dating Manuel Rivera, who is one of the hottest guys at school, has three best friends, and has a good relationship with her mom. But on the last day of school, her and Manuel go to a party, and she catches him flirting with a girl, which is a continuous problem with him. After the party, she confronts him, and breaks up with him. Although she was sad, her friends were there to cheer her up. When one of her friend's invites the group to join her and her mom to go on a summer vacation to Greece, they decide to go. In Greece, Tinsley meets another guy on vacation named Caleb Reed. They hang out, talk, and kiss, just like how any other summer fling goes.

When she gets back from vacation, Manuel apologizes and begs for her back, claiming he was very drunk, so she takes him back. On her first day of junior year, she was having a typical normal day, until she coincidentally sees Caleb at school. Manuel has no clue what happened in Greece, and she definitely doesn't want him to find out, even though they were broken up at the time. Will she be able to keep that a secret? Will she continue to date Manuel or will she catch feelings for Caleb?

title: Classes
description:
In the land of Sevaran, the world is divided into six nations, each unique in its people, culture, and natural resources. Among them, Vel rises as the most infamous and prosperous nation, now basking in the spoils of a recent and brutal war. Its cities glimmer with wealth, reflecting the cold, ruthless nature of its leader, King Dave, who wields the element of metal with a power unmatched by any other ruler.

The war, a decade-long clash over control of resources, ravaged the lands of Ruki, Mason, and Cinder Moor. Vel's insatiable hunger for dominance was fed by its allies, Aura and Jenta, who provided supplies, soldiers, and intelligence in exchange for Vel's promise of wealth and territory. Together, the three nations formed a triumvirate of power, conquering their enemies with brutal efficiency. While Aura and Jenta thrived as Vel's subordinates, Ruki and Mason fell into economic despair, their people struggling under the weight of forced tribute and constant surveillance by Vel's iron-clad soldiers.

Cinder Moor suffered the worst. Their people, known for their resilience and unmatched strength, put up a fierce resistance. 
 Stories of rebellion spread through the downtrodden lands, passed from village to village in Cinder Moor, Mason, and Ruki. They speak of an uprising that will challenge Vel's dominion. Among the ruins of Cinder Moor, a group of villagers gathers in secret, their eyes burning with the promise of vengeance. They vow to fulfill the prophecy and ignite a rebellion that will turn the tide against Vel's metal-fisted rule. And so, the seeds of resistance are sown, with hope igniting in the hearts of those who have lost everything. 

Unbeknownst to King Dave, a storm is brewing-a storm that threatens to dismantle the very foundation of his empire. As the prophecy foretells, the nations will rise against him, and a new leader will emerge from the ashes of Cinder Moor. The question remains: who will answer the call and become the harbinger of change?

title: Our Colours
description:
South England, the 3rd July.

Summer fills the town with sunrays and midsummer rain, when Iris moves to the so called "Rainbow Home" for disabled teenagers. 
While she starts to get used to life in the Rainbow Home, her flatmates still deal with their own problems... 
Hating to see them having so many problems, Iris tries her best to help them, but realizes soon that some of their problems are more grave than expected.


A/N: This story is written in British English. If you don't understand some words, ask kindly or look them up! I'm just more comfortable writing British English and speaking something like an Oxford accent (yes, I chose that myself, I'm German.)


-TRIGGER WARNING-
This story may contain abuse, mild ableism, discrimination, bullying and amongst others depressive thoughts. If you have issues with the listed themes, I recommend you not to read this story. If you do anyway and end up feeling depressed or triggered, don't say I didn't warn you. Thanks!

I'm a boy, pre-testosterone.

title: At His Beck and Call
description:
People don't know much about the Graceffa household maid. What they do know could easily be fact or fiction. One thing is true of An Price, however, she doesn't give off the working-class vibe. Growing up in a shattered home taught her how to be fierce and cunning. Her family's treachery and scandals taught her to be secretive and loyal. As an adult, love will teach her that the secret life of a sinful maid will always lead to ruin.

A mistress's life isn't easy when it's shadowed by a completely different life of its own. In this world of wealth, deceit, and business, being at your lover's beck and call isn't the only job at hand. And when two lives blend to form one, they either merge or rip each other apart.

title: Hemagiri
description:
Eighteen year old Vrindha is ready to finish her last few days at Hemagiri and leave the kingdom that took everything from her behind. With a final heist, she will be free to live out her life the way she wanted to. Until she begins meeting a man who challenges her ideologies and future. She can't outrun her past to forget her history forever, and with an unrequited childhood love, maybe leaving her home is not what her heart wants. Maybe all she and her home needs is to be saved.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Lady Baby
description:
Max, a carefree artist with next-to-zero sense of responsibility is forced to "grow up" when his wife develops amnesia and thinks she's a five-year-old. 
---------- 
After two years of marriage, Sharon and Max are contemplating going their separate ways due to their differences. She's a perfectionist, he's not. She's mature and responsible, he's childish and carefree. 

A little vacation to Sharon's home country and an intervention from a jovial uncle help reignite their spark until Sharon's little accident causes her to develop amnesia and Max is forced to grow up and take care of her. 

When Max's doubts resurface and Sharon's absentee mother comes into the picture, things are about to get a whole lot worse-or just maybe, a whole lot better.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Female writer of stories.

Cheers to reading novels way into the night and feeling like a zombie the morning after. Worst best feeling ever.

I hope you enjoy my stories enough to read them way into the night. ❤
.
.
.

On the other hand...

Imagine chilling in your house and a stranger bursts in, yells some random bs, flings a flyer at your face then buzzes off all the while confident you'd do exactly what their flyer says. Hilarious huh? 😐

That's how advertising stuff on my message board or stories feels like. Hella annoying.

I will say this gently: I do not accept reading requests nor wish to check out your fantastic new writing platform. All I want is world peace.

You're free to hop into my message board to say hi, tho. I'd def say hi back and see how you're doing. *huggies*

title: Sandstorms (On Hold)
description:
After a life-threatening situation forces Amani out of her homeland, she must come to learn the ways of the royal Mamluk court. With her people at the brink of war with the powerful Arab empire, she must fight annexation and political turmoil. However, not all is well in either large kingdom. Defamation, missing persons and betrayals are the norm in this cutthroat environment. Dinars accompany deceit, murders occur after maghrib and schemes as fatal as sandstorms are common in the empire. Her future and the fate of her people rest in her hands, will she save her people or will her efforts be in vain?

title: Fiction Forger
description:
<< Shadows of the Shattered Veil >> is a beloved story about a young hero that captivated many. But then, inexplicably, it vanished from the face of the earth. All traces of its history and existence disappeared, leaving no memory of it-except for one person. A young aspiring novelist, determined to succeed, seized the opportunity and recreated the entire story in his own way to profit from its mysterious disappearance. title: Rocks Can Dance | SAMPLE | ❍
description:
❖ When a sentient planet turns hostile after 150 years of quiet, two rival research groups must join forces to find out why---and to stop it before it kills the people who call it home. ❖ 

For five generations, Jenu has been a shining example of planetary colonization done right. Its surface boasts three cities---with a fourth on its way---and its history of amiable weather and hospitable citizens land it high scores on livability indices. The people who live there love it dearly. 

Lingmei Liu sees a different picture. In recent years, violent dust storms on the planet have been on the rise, threatening the cities' aging infrastructure. Just why is a mystery, but one clue looms large: Jenu is conscious, and might be able to control its surface weather. Commissioned to investigate, Lingmei and her scientific colleagues team up with a rival research group to put data and sense to Jenu's vagaries. 

What starts out as a simple study, though, soon veers into politics, the media, and shady business practices that may or may not be connected to the planet's new behavior. And all the while, the storms keep building. As half-answers multiply, three core questions remain in the scientists' hands:

Can Jenu's cities be convinced to take action to protect themselves?

Is the planet sending its own storms to strike those cities?

And if so, why?


❖ ❖ ❖ 

Patreon exclusive. Updates on Fridays. Free sample on Wattpad. Keep reading here: 

https://www.patreon.com/collection/349787?view=expanded
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
✣ ┅ ABOUT ┅ ✣

Wattys 2023 Winner
Multi-Featured Author
5x Wattys Shortlister
2x ONC Honourable Mention

You can call me August, but I will also be summoned by cool pond bugs and/or pictures of cats.

I'm a queer spec fic writer with a fondness for tossing characters into things they think they aren't prepared for. Most of my work is Dark Fantasy or Horror, but I cross paths with Sci-Fi, Paranormal, and Romance more often than not.

If my books have anything in common, it's wild settings, happy endings, casual rep, and kickass disaster queers being disasters but also kickass!

In the normal world, I work for the UN, wait on two cats, and keep Carassius and Corixidae in outdoor aquaria. I am five years old inside.

I wasn't kidding about the pond bugs.

title: Deal with the Devil
description:
"Are you sure this is what you want?" he asked as he dragged the gun down the side of her arm.  

"N..Yes." She said. "Just do it now." 

His laughter sent chills down her spine. He flicked the safety of the gun and then aimed it at her heart. 

"Remember, you owe me your heart." The words that came from him laced with evil intentions. 

"Deal-" She was barely finished with her sentence when the gun went off. 

Bang! 

The bullet sliced through the air with lightening speed.  A smirk forming on his lips as he eyed his prize. 

"Now this was a heart worth killing for." He said. 

♤♡◇♧
Rae made a deal with the Devil, a simple contract where an exchange was needed. 
But now she has to deal with the Devil.

title: If I Could Spend a Moment With You || ONGOING
description:
❝Yours Forever and Always❞, //

With her newfound disability, Jasmine Wahlia, a half Punjabi-half white, 19 year old girl is the Indian society's reject. Thankfully,  her best friend protects her from the insane Desi community that is hell-bent on punishing her existence.  

So when he dies, she is left heartbroken. Grief-stricken, Jasmine finds herself unable to move on until she accidentally stumbles on his wish list called '21 things to do before I die'. 

In 21 things, Jasmine reflects on the final moments with him prior to his death whilst attempting to make a better version of herself.

title: Locked in Love [on hold]
description:
Luna just broke up with the love of her life. Alex can't believe the girl he thought was his forever is now a thing of the past. 

Before they've had even a day to mourn their losses, a nationwide quarantine is announced. This pandemic news would probably be easier to bear... if the once-upon-lovers weren't also living together. Yikes. 

Luna sees this as a  chance to work things out with the guy she's still in love with. Alex wants nothing to do with the girl that broke his heart. 

What will happen to this pair of star-crossed lovers during their 20-day quarantine? Will they find their way back to each other or completely fall apart?

title: Heaven From Here
description:
All his life Saif thought that he never needed love; that he never needed faith. Hell, he didn't even know the first thing about either one. He didn't even know what an act of kindness was.

He was fine living alone, without any commitments other than to his job and to having fun whenever he could. Meeting one woman, who put her faith above her own needs, above her own happily ever after; completely changed his world. It threw him for a curve but as much as he wanted to be with her, they were never meant to be.

Now, he was flailing; trying to take what he had learnt from her and move on. Not only did he learn faith, he learnt that he needed love in his more than ever. 

Saif had always felt that hell was right here on earth. He was about to realise that with the right kind of love, it could be heaven from here on. 

*UNEDITED*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I really hate this whole writing about myself bit. It's honestly the hardest thing to do especially since I still catch myself wondering what should I be when I 'grow up'. I am pretty much an adult child.

I can't be the only one who drafts and plots stories while in the shower right? So instead of sitting in an office and trying to bang out words, I should probably try writing in the shower. Yes? No? Oh well.

I have finally located my balls of steel and published my very first book on Wattpad in 2018.

COMPLETED BOOKS

authorBio:
Hi Sapphic readers and thank you for reading this bio! I'm Boe Blue and I'm a writer of sapphic fluffy (and sometimes eeek, very sexy 😳) love stories. I write the kind of sappy sickly sweet books that as a teen I always wanted to read but could never sadly find. I have a love in of all things cute, fluffy, fairytale and sweet and I enjoy writing the badass meets cinnimon roll type of trope the most.... As you can probably tell if you've read any of my stories 😝.

I hope that within my profile you can find a cozy safe space to read lesbian fairytales to your hearts content 💕 so curl up, grab a hot choccy with extra marshmallows and an oversized sweater and prepare for all the feels.

Your feedback and support means the world to me, and it always makes my absolute year when you leave me a review. Any special requests for that sapphic story you've always wanted to read? Please drop me a comment and let me know, it might just be that next thing I'm inspired to write.

Have a fan fairy tastic day, and thank you once again for stopping by my cozy writing cat cafe 🐱 💕 🥰


P.s most of the media that I use in my stories I do not own, and I would have found on Canva, Unsplash and Pixabay or gotten made through free AI platforms such as Imagine Art AI. I always credit the photos from there in my books, but again, I just want to say that all credit for any of those images goes to the talented people who created them or to the AI platform. If anyone ever needs me to take an image down, please let me know and I will do so asap.

title: Tatsu - The Threat
description:
People experience pain in their lives. Some need it to live and find pleasure in it, but most run from it, they avoid it. Yet pain catches up to some of them. Just like it caught young Brian and destroyed his soul and consumed it with hate and avarice.

Our world is a world of super powers blaming each other, competing to be number one and looking down on the little guys. A world of major religions hating each other yet professing love. A world of racial differences where races are not understanding each other, not appreciating each other. We see our world consumed in hate, ambition and greed throughout history. In all of this we see the threat to the world, the one that we as the people, the human kind, are always facing. Our differences should make us stronger and not divide us. There is an urgent need to stop pointing fingers and start working together. The lying needs to stop and the truth needs to be told. The people of the world should not be manipulated or limited in their vision of life. The new generations are kinder, more considerate, smarter. Equipped to fight the threat. The older generations have the experience, the wisdom. What can stop the peoples of the world.

Tatsu - The Threat, is a journey into life itself. A melting pot of cultures, races and spiritualism in 95,000 words. Written for the young and old. It will make you see just how powerful people can be, and also how dangerous they can be. But the good news is, no matter what form or shape it takes - science or spiritual, love will always win. Let us change the world together.

Enjoy this action packed, romance and crime filled story with a dark inspirational twist!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I recently learned there was such a thing as Wattpad. How fortunate we are to have such treasure. I have much to read and much to share. Glad to be here!

Tatsu - The Threat is my first novel.  It's dark yet inspirational. It's criminally passionate. The pain in young Brian will make him see. The world needs to be transformed.

title: Scar Tissue
description:
After being broken up with and ghosted by her neighbor and boyfriend the summer before she leaves for college, Shira Levi was ready to never see, speak to, or think of Noah Li again. 

That proves itself to be a difficult challenge, however, when she finds herself back home after graduation. Avoiding her ex-boyfriend would be a lot easier if they didn't share windows that face each other. 

And, of course, if Noah wasn't dead set on making everything up to Shira. No matter what it takes.

title: The Shadow Heirs ★ Catalyst Saga Book Three
description:
The Empress of HellFire. The Emperor of Ice Storms. Together as one, they will tear the world apart. Stranded in a kingdom with their paths intertwined, the fight to reclaim what was once lost will draw nothing but blood and fury.

***

Venix Draywin and Lucien Northorn have ventured far to the abandoned kingdom of Exben. Located in a small isolated area, there is barely any life to protect them. Creatures of the dark lurk in the shadows and hungry eyes watch them with vengeance.

Desperate to uncover the truth of their past and rebuild what was once lost, they must turn to an unlikely ally who will either lead them to their triumph or demise. On a mission to find Esmeralda Northorn, the only one that can help them, Venix and Lucien must face the demons of their past and unforeseen enemies before they are defeated by the territorial, wicked, and damned.

 However, they are not alone.

Yagein Washli, Queen of the SilverClaw Witch Clan, is on the hunt to complete the mission she sought out to do nineteen years ago and she will stop at nothing to destroy their plans and their future. Turning the entirety of the clan against Venix and Lucien, she is prepared, skin and bones, to defend her crown and bury those who dare defy her. 

But, only one can emerge victoriously. 

With the entirety of their future and their legacies resting on a thin pedestal, Venix and Lucien must come together to reclaim what was once theirs and destroy those who come in between before their enemies catch up to them. 

After all, the fate of everything and everyone they love rests in their hands.

@Ideologically Thank you for the gorgeous cover!

title: The Collision Of Chances
description:
Nine years ago, Ada watched Kyle leave with a guitar and a promise to come back for her.

Now, seeing his face on billboards in NYC reminds her that she's not the pathetic sixteen-year-old he left behind. She's not sure if it's okay to hate your first everything, but there is one thing she's certain of - she despises Kyle Hunter.

Her hard work finally pays off when the rights of her book are sold to become a movie. Although she's trying to keep her expectations as low as possible it's hard when a new factor is put in place.

When Kyle agrees to work on the movie's soundtrack, he's thrust far too close to Ada's heart. She's not the girl he fell in love with all those years ago, that's clear. But he's determined to win her back.

It almost feels like a second chance.

ALL RIGHTS RESERVED ©

title: How I'd Remember You.
description:
Andrea Meyers has never had a home for longer than a year. Moving around from state-to-state has become her reality- until LA. It was the last destination and this meant everyone she meets wouldn't become a stranger and all the decorations she hangs up in her room wouldn't be shoved into a box after a few months. This was it. It's LA or nothing, but sooner or later she'd realise with everything becoming so permanent, she can't hide everything like all the other times she moved around. She won't be a passer-by, instead she'll have to face the consequences she's been packing into a moving box every other time.

title: To The Moon And Back | ON HOLD
description:
What do you do when the bright future which you had expected ahead of you is enfolded by a backdrop of misery, terminal illness and impending death? Surely, such inquiries should be the last of any 17-year-old's problems, but for Ellie Green, she was left without a choice. 

The final chapters of a novel is expected to be written with a traditional happy ending. But for Ellie Green her final chapters are blank, leaving her to write her own destiny. 

When Xavier Guzman - a rock band guitarist with a heart of gold enveloped within a dark tunnel of responsibilities, anger and a life of mental torment - stumbles into Ellie's rewired world, he changes her philosophy of the meaning of life, giving her the one gift she despised the most; a novel called To The Moon And Back, hoping that Ellie's eyes are open to a world which has much to offer; love, friendship and most of all, happiness. Only, he has been in search for those himself. 

Will both Ellie and Xavier be able to find what they have been in search for, or will they succumb to a dark road ready to swallow their entire future? 

Copyright © 2021

title: Her Majesty: The Swan Princess
description:
Later that day, long after the party had ended, William and Uberta met up again to discuss their plan that they had been brewing. After a long hour of discussion, they were in agreement that when Odette was of age, the young princess and prince would meet up every summer in hopes that they would fall in love and in time lead to a marriage that would combine the two kingdoms. 
                                                                                                  ******  
Odette is the princess and future ruler of her great kingdom of Ropia. For years her father had pushed her to befriend the young prince of the neighboring kingdom in hopes that she would fall in love with him and unite the two kingdom. To the kings displease,  the young royals didn't get along  for most of their lives until one day they started to not mind each other a company as much. Unbeknown to them an exiled sorcerer who is seeking revenge on the king, conjures up a spell to transform the princess into a swan and keeps her prisoner. Forced to embark on a dangerous quest to reverse the curse, the princess is on a mission to free herself  and unknowing discover her feelings.

Inspired by the 1994 animated film

title: The Moon on a Frozen Lake
description:
Jihoon hasn't slept well in years. 

Not since he survived the accident that killed the woman he loved.

Yingyue never leaves her house.

Not since her parents died in a car crash two years ago. 

Both crippled by their own fears, the two of them should never work out. After all, two wrongs don't make a right. Yet somehow, perhaps each recognizing they are kindred spirits bound by the things that haunt them, they are drawn to each other like the moon pulls the ocean tide. 

Can their blossoming romance help them break through the confines of their fears or will it pull them further down under like a leaf trapped under the surface of a frozen lake?

---
Update schedule: Once a month.

title: Arranged
description:
{Dialogue Story}

Life for Hela Noonan, an Indian-American model turned aspiring actress, is about to get shaken up when she signs up for a livestreamed reality show called Arranged. Unbeknownst to her, her perfect match according to the algorithms is Hollywood's bad boy, Asher Gasko. Known to be a loose cannon, he just wants someone who will fall for him for him and not because of what they've read about him on the blogs or because he's a famous actor. Hela also has similar reasons for signing up. Dating can be exasperating as a model turned actress and she's tired of dating guys who just see her as a trophy. They both hope doing it this way will lead to a great love, but their family and friends think otherwise. 

In this unconventional reality show, contestants will spend two months getting to know each other via chat without seeing their face or hearing their voice to secure their identity until the wedding which takes place after the second month is up when they will decide if they want to go through with it based on their two months of chatting online. If they make the decision to go through with it, they're married life will be livestreamed on YouTube for eight months. At the end of the eight months, they will then have to decide whether they want to stay together or go their separate ways.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Aurora of the Phoenix (Book 1) (Under heavy construction)
description:
Teenage life is a rollercoaster ride, with school, crushes, and the social scene that can make you feel like you're walking on eggshells. Meet Aurora, just your average teen, struggling to find her place in the world while dealing with bullying and harsh criticisms from all sides.

But then, everything changes when she moves to a new city with her family. She finally makes friends who make her feel like she belongs. But wait, something feels off. Aurora starts to sense something strange about her new crew, her family, and even herself! Secrets, lies, romance, adventure, and a sprinkle of magic are about to change her life forever.

P.S. * WARNING May contain TRIGGER SCENES!*

authorBio:
Hi, my name is Aini, I love reading books, especially books that contain romance and also maybe some fantasy werewolves or age gap stories.

I used to like bad boy stories and maybe I still do but with certain limits to them, I would like stories with more equity between men and women with a sense of fairness to it, but I would like to read more stories that have good guys or guys with dominant traits but are not bad boys since I feel that the bad boy element in stories have become a little of hand.

I have 3 books in my work right now, and one of them is just full of short stories. Please read them if your are interested in fantasy or romance.

If you are new here and want to start writing but you don't know where to start, please feel free to message and I can help you get started on your stories as a helping guide.

I know that starting your first story can sometimes be frustrating so I can help you guys get started.

So I think that's all I wanted to say heheheheheh :)

title: Twist(BWWM)
description:
Cory is an 18-year-old freshman in college at Emory University, looking for a new beginning from the past that always tries to come back to haunt her. She's a strong woman for her age trying to finally have a "normal life." However, she meets this new guy named Adam who helps her see life differently.

"Maybe... Just maybe, two toxic people can be pure together."

title: Where we went wrong
description:
Arlene and Velvet; the two silver-spoon fed girls that dropped out of college just to runaway and start a new life. A life where they weren't tied down to their toxic parents. 

Little did they know running away, wasn't as easy as it looked in the movies. 

A single misfortune bringing them into a beautiful town, inhabited with the most beautiful and kindest people alive. It was the perfect town to ever exist. Until it wasn't. 

Filled with dangers lurking around the corner and monsters that are hiding behind a mask, Arlene and Velvet try to restart their life in the intimidatingly beautiful town. Experiencing fears they never know they had, love that could break them and uncovering the slightest  possibility of magic. 

Everything is not what it seems . 

_____________________________________________


WARNING: Contains strong language and weird things that makes no bloody sense. Read at your own risk. 

Also, poor attempt at writing. 

Happy reading 💕

title: If We Exist
description:
✨2018 Watty Winner✨

Two men in love torn apart by war.

Yuri Karamov's existence is like Schrödinger's cat, simultaneously both dead and alive. In Ru Konstantin's mind, Yuri's still the same vibrant young man he was when their lives diverged. But the question, the one Ru is too afraid to acknowledge, is whether his best friend turned first love is still alive.
  
In the span of eighteen years, their hometown of Dronesk goes from a quiet, humdrum town to a besieged territory of the BKA; a radical militia group who wants to eradicate the Arash--people like Ru--from Rujga Province. Yuri Karamov is one of the recruits fighting for a Brommian liberation. After years of lost contact, Ru returns to Dronesk in search of his best friend, confronting not only the ruins of his ancestral home and the new realities of a post-liberation movement, but questions about love, freedom, and the price of self-governance. 
  
If We Exist, is a coming-of-age story that examines friendship, sexuality, class struggles and ethnic tensions through the lens of Ru Konstantin; desperate, anxiety-ridden, and awfully nostalgic.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Autism 101
description:
Curious about autism? This resource for writers talks about what autism is and how to write an autistic character.

Autism is a lifelong neurodevelopmental disability that affects around 1 in 59 people. Every autistic person is different. Most autistic people typically experience some or all of the common autistic traits, which include developmental delays, difficulty mind-reading, sensory issues, need for routine, stimming, and difficulty understanding and coping with emotions.

This resource is intended to be autistic-friendly.

This is a space for good-faith learning and positivity. It is OK to have questions and to not know things. People commenting in bad faith will be blocked, and possibly reported. (Please do not try to debate mean people.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
She/her
Hi, my name is Luna, I'm autistic, and I'm using this account to post information about autism.

I don't check messages here much, so if you want a quick response, please leave me a comment at @MissLunaRose or drop a mention!

To learn more about autism, check out wikiHow's autism articles, the Autism Acceptance Month website, and #AskAnAutistic or #AskingAutistics on social media.

title: Sunflower [Face Claims]
description:
"𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙖𝙪𝙩𝙮 𝙤𝙛 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙬𝙤𝙧𝙡𝙙 𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙙𝙞𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙨𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝙤𝙛 𝙞𝙩𝙨 𝙥𝙚𝙤𝙥𝙡𝙚."

The place to go for underused and diverse FCs

Actors, singers, models, you name it can all be used as face claims. You just need to know which ones are the best to use. People use Nina Dobrev and Selena Gomez way too often in their stories. Not to mention there's not a lot of diversity going on. In order to have an interesting and diverse character you need an interesting and diverse face claim. And that's where I come into play. 

This book can be used as a resource to help authors find the perfect face claim for their story.

Also, don't forget to vote for your favorites and leave comments with any fun facts you might know about the person.

Cover Made By @JamieLynn28

title: Camp Half-Breed
description:
She's the vampire who murdered his parents.
He's the wizard that cursed her. 
She seeks revenge, and he desires war.

They violated the first rule ever written. 
They broke the law that separates their world from ours.
As a consequence, the Grand Magic Council enrols them into the prestigious Camp Half-Breed.

· ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ·

Elysia Bloodvial is a hybrid vampire, half-vampire, half-witch. Her life was far from perfect, but she loved it, that is until the dreaded Charmstar family moved next door.

Steve, the eldest son of the Charmstar family, had a perfect life, but when his family move next door to the Bloodvials, his life is changed forever.

· ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ▬ ✾ ·

Welcome to Camp Half-Breed, an Academy for the wicked, twisted, evil-hearted, mythical criminals. Creatures ordinary people believe don't exist. 

If you find yourself in dark halls of Camp Half-Breed, then you've just signed your death warrant. Unless, of course, you're already dead, then welcome to hell, in that case.

title: green light
description:
On depression, and recovery. 

❝Perhaps this is our kingdom, perhaps our crowns are the green specks of light that fall into our hair.

And perhaps this is our fantasy, and perhaps we have no crowns but collars, collars that bind us to our differences and drive away the threat of being alike.

Or perhaps we have both crowns and collars. Perhaps these two are in a constant war against each other, just as we are all in a constant war against ideals.❞

title: The Humiliation Of The Dark Sorcerer
description:

title: The Quality of Mercy
description:
{✨Book 2 excerpt✨} (highest rank in scifi: #20) 
Four years ago, Dylan met her partner, her match: Levi Hark. The poetry spouting is endearing after all. 
***
Now, he's still in cryo, and the Canary is still heading toward the planet, and no one is doing anything about it.  Four hundred people are heading towards their deaths; they have no idea where the base is located.
Can Dylan go against everything she's ever known for a ship of people she's never met? Is there a 'right' thing to do? Or is she doomed to failure fighting a system that is rigged? 

Even if she succeeds, what will it cost her?

title: The Tremendous Turmoil of Indigo
description:
[Watty's Longlist 2018]

Eight years have flew by and Indigo Clark has all the things she hoped for. A successful boutique-check. Husband-check, check. Children-although they're a handful, check! Life is good, things are going fine until the biological father of her eldest daughter comes to town, Tate's cousin surfaces with a secret and her sister is facing  a battle for her life.

Will Indigo be able to keep weather this storm or will she get lost in the wind?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Colorless Land
description:
Far to the north lies a land in black and white. A curse lies upon it, robbing its people of their courage, free will and emotion to lock them in three pendants in the hands of their leaders.

Jolette has lived just south of that land for all thirteen years of her life. But never once has she seen one of its people-until the day a Colorless boy turns up in her village, carrying one of his people's most prized possessions: the pendant of Free Will.

She quickly becomes his friend, but she has barely had time to get to know him and name him Edmian when the Colorless come for him. By sheer luck she and Edmian escape. But her village, with everyone she knows, is captured and taken to the Colorless Land.

Left to their own devices, the two set out to rescue the villagers while outrunning their own pursuers. Aid comes from a secret prince trying to save his own family from the Colorless, as well as his warrior bride. And yet the clock keeps ticking. For the Colorless' magic is slowly destroying the villagers' humanity, and the Colorless People are preparing a war against all the world.

What can two teenagers, a hidden royal, a military commander on leave, an old lady spirit, an elf and a dwarf possibly do against a power on the rise?
And what about the two married women who were captured without their daughter?
But sometimes the smallest individuals can change the course of history...

COMPLETED 9-8-2019
Tous Droits Réservés

title: From Ash and Gold [ ongoing ]
description:
❝ 𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗬 𝗪𝗘𝗥𝗘 𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗘𝗗 𝗧𝗢 𝗠𝗘𝗘𝗧. 𝖮𝗇𝖾 𝗋𝗈𝗌𝖾 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖺𝗌𝗁𝖾𝗌 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗇𝖾 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝗀𝗈𝗅𝖽. ❞


After being forced to assassinate the king and queen of Usdean, Akira goes into hiding as an underground boxer for criminals, and five years later, she's ready to celebrate her 23rd birthday, pack her bags and leave the kingdom, hoping to redeem herself and her blood-stained hands. But something strange inside of her unfolds, and Akira discovers she is an Acara, a person with special magical abilities. Those strange events lead to a discovery, that a mythical artifact exists: a golden chain. And when news reaches that someone is on the hunt for it, Akira is on a journey to find it fast, or the lives of all Acaras will be in life-threatening danger.

Manikarnika, the heir of Usdean, has been at war with her rivaling kingdom for five years, and their prince won't surrender until she accepts his marriage proposal. She won't accept of course, but when a fortune-teller shows her a vision of destruction, Darius and a mysterious artifact at the center, she has no choice but to rethink her decision and accept, hoping to find the chain before he does, and destroy it. There's just one problem, there's a girl in her way, and she may not be at all who she seems. And now, Mani must choose: her heart, or her duty.

title: Looks Matter
description:
Popular disfigured teen Toby has been rejected by over 50 girls for a simple reason: they can't get past the way he looks. Fed up with being rejected, Toby gives up on finding love until one of his classmate's idea gives him hope to find someone who will see past his scars.

Warning: This book is for the uggo's, The ugly but funny friend and the Shreks. The story will make you cry, the characters will make you laugh, and the music will make you sing. The book deals with self-worth and disfigurement in an entertaining, yet very realistic way. It is not just an ordinary love story, but a tale of someone learning to love themselves, who they are and how much they are worth.

Disclaimer:   The story was inspired by my own accident that caused me to be disfigured and look like a damn snack. Everything is pure fiction. Any resemblance to other books/ real life is purely coincidental  I'm not a psychic. 

Maturity Level: PG-13.  No explicit sexual content or  explicit Language

[word count: 50,000-60,000 words]

1. I love tv and movies. I have seen every good show out there. If you don't believe me quiz me.

title: A Guide to Being a Superhero...Therapist? (Guide to Being, Novella Two)
description:
If you think this is what I ever thought I would be doing, you ought to look at the question mark at the end of this title. No one in their right mind would ~ever~ purposefully become a superhero (yeah, you heard that, Eric and Amrita!) 

Hey, you don't know me, but you think you do. I'm Kim, Kimberly Nguyen. A Vietnamese Canadian girl, trying to graduate grad school and become a therapist. I am also the famed American superhero...Firebird. Talk about a divide, I know. But here's the thing, I really wish I could have had a guide when starting this superhero-ing business. So, I am writing it. Think of this as a little how-to-book . . . but actually don't, because I am pretty sure no one else is going to find themselves in my situation. Think of this as my autobiography, except not because my autobiography would be even saltier. 

Whatever this thing is, by the time you finish, you will never look at a Marvel movie the same. You will give up all desires of power hunting. Your superhero dreams will crumble in the dust. And you may find that a snarky Asian-Canadian has infiltrated your consciousness. Don't say I didn't warn you!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Whoa. I had not updated this in a hot second.

Hey, everyone! I am Mags. I am a college student, getting my Masters in Counseling. I grew up in Africa but moved back to the US for school. I love writing and reading (kinda self-explanatory). Currently, my most significant work is my Bucky Barnes fanfic, Certainty, but I also have self-published original works on Wattpad and Amazon. Check them out at the link to my website! I hope you like my writing, and I hope that you have really good reasons if you don't like it. (And please tell me all the things in the comments. ;))

title: The Girl In Black [On Hold Till Further Notice]
description:
He was now inches away from her. A wave of confidence surged in him, urging him to cross the metaphorical sea between them. The need had never been more urgent, his love... never so pure.
Raising her face to his, David looked into her eyes and said, "I know you wouldn't believe me, but I need to tell you that-- I---- 'you are being followed!'" 
Some things... are better left unsaid.

And hearing those words, Zahra awoke, as if from a stupor. So the gang had reached her too. But her mind buzzed from his proximity, and her thoughts whirled. 
Yet she was determined to be in denial. About everything. And deny she would.

 "I'm surprised at your 'concern', Mr. Walworth!" she replied acidly, "yet I never heard such nonsense in my life. And it would be better if you keep your distance from me, because I do not entertain what vile thoughts you're conceiving in your mind."

Being just a 23-yr old hijab-clad, conservative girl, and working at the HQ of highly coveted bank of 'Walworth & Co.' breaks all sorts of stereotypes. Or does it? 
Because like every other man of the world, the Bank's short-fused CEO, David Walworth scrunches his nose every time he sees her. To him, her 'robe' is outrageously primitive.

But as inexperienced as she is, Zehra has never been mocked for her beliefs before. At their very first meeting, sparks fly, since she is 'impolite' enough to retaliate to his jibes.
The result: Zehra is an instant enemy and David is determined to hate her. And being his enemy means - 'trouble for eternity.'  

Although hating the girl is  unavoidable, falling in love with her gentleness & naivety is unavoidable too. 
But jewels like her don't come easy. 
Will David be prepared to pay the price?

Cover by @soundthealarm.

title: Cancun | AMBW
description:
Eris, a young and impressionable fashion assistant finally leaves the fast paced city of New York City and gets to take on the vacation of her dreams in Cancun. 

Keaun, a tight-fisted businessman is dragged out of his stressful desk job by his friends to do the same. 

The two cross paths and it becomes their escape to paradis. But will this oasis last forever?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Sweet Boy
description:
Aquila Arbor grew up next door to Quill Sable, the starboy of Wickley Springs, their quaint little town. Polar opposites, they rarely interacted except for when they were kids, as with age they grew apart. 

When their classmate, Moss Oberyn is murdered, their burned out friendship begins to rekindle, the two soon beginning to realize just how intertwined they are in the whole debacle, more than they could have ever imagined. 

As they race against the clock, the deaths of the townspeople are piling up and secrets are beginning to unravel. 

In due time, Aquila begins to agnise, that Quill is no longer the sweet boy he used to be. But you know what they say, be careful when you pull the curtains, you never know what's behind them.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Forgotten Ones
description:
Seventeen year old Elias is less than happy when his family decides to up and move to a small, dreary town. Of course, his opinion doesn't matter. Not when all his dad cares about is his dutiful stepmom and do-no-wrong little sister.

Compared to them, Elias' feelings are worth about as much as dust in the wind. 

But he quickly discovers that his new home is much more than it seems...when he stumbles upon a dead body-the morbid work of the local serial killer, La Mort Noire. 

Suddenly, Elias finds himself locked out of his comfort zone; tutoring a creepy rich kid that draws skeletons, hanging with a bubbly boy who sticks to him like glue, staking out criminal houses, and taking the biggest risks he'll ever take in his life, all in an effort to solve the towns mysterious deaths.

Because to gain his fathers favor, Elias will do anything. 

Even hunt down and unveil a twisted murderer.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Last Great War
description:
I live in a world where everything is perfect. You're either a human or gifted. Everyone knows where they belong. The world has overcome a lot. They literally overcame what was then thought to be the end of the world. People in this century know only peace and happiness. But I've never known either. 


Living in constant pain, trying to fit in where I know I don't belong. Being ridiculed constantly. Silently hating the world. This is what  led to another end of the world. Now, people can barely smile. They've lost all that peace and happiness they had that used to make me angry and jealous. 


I think the world deserves what is happening to it now. There are some people who genuinely hate me and blame me for the state of the world now. There are some who have no feelings towards me and there are the few who know exactly what I am and how I created the disaster that is on all of their hands. No one really thinks I'm innocent except the one who really started all this. I hate the world and it's people but I'm too much of a coward. I could never burn it to the ground. I haven't got that power. 

I don't know how this would end. Hell, I don't even know how it started. But maybe, you can. Maybe, you'd be able to see something I can't see...............


_________

I really suck at summaries but I do hope you give the story a try.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Arranged Boyfriend Project
description:

Dates, holding hands, living under the same roof ... the lot. They even vow to share sundaes without batting a flirtatious eyelid.

But, for the duration of the experiment, neither one can know how the other is truly feeling about throwing themselves headlong into a guy on guy relationship. 

Follow the transcript of their private vlogs here on Wattpad as they chronicle what it means to Try Before You Bi.

title: Astania Guidebook
description:
Discover what the Astania Community is all about! This guidebook includes our Reading Lists and a guide to them, explains our activities, and shows all the lovely people who make up the team.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Tempering the rising flames of writers to reach their brightest blaze.

We are a community for both writers and readers looking to improve their craft, explore new worlds, and to form friendships. All are welcome!

Here we aim to provide a safe space for people of all backgrounds to bond over literature. Share your stories for the world to see. Check out our members' stories in our reading lists to find your next obsession. Keep an eye out for contests, clubs, and other opportunities to engage with the community.

Our Discord server is also a great place to connect with other Wattpad users, along with writers on other platforms and publishing paths: https://discord.gg/authors

We no longer affiliate with other communities, but we may be open to occasional promotions for promotions. DM us to find out more!

We do NOT accept work written by AI as a representation of our community; this includes in our reading lists and contests. Please do not submit AI-assisted work to anything in our community.

Use the hashtag #AstaniaBooks or #AstaniaCommunity on your stories to show you're a part of our community!

Curious? Take a look around our profile or Carrd, and we hope you can find a home with us in the wonderful world of Astania!

Please note: If you message us on our message board without a specific question or comment regarding the community, we will likely not respond.

Account primarily run by @laurendoubleu.

title: Minion
description:
Minion is a regular guy: he's got a wife, a kid, and an app ruined his career as a henchman.

Being a villain's sidekick used to be a good job: risky, sure, but well-paying and with top-notch life insurance. But Henchr has brought the tech revolution to the supervillain business. Now it's uncertain schedules and no worker's comp. No villain is evil enough to have dreamt up the gig economy.

After one too many jobs gone wrong, Minion decides to retire. This is fine. His self-worth isn't tied to his job. But it is a little humiliating when his wife starts talking about going back to work as the supervillain Dominatrix, a career she retired from a decade ago. And now their daughter is dating a girl that Minion suspects goes out at night in a mask - as a hero, no less.

Only a supervillain can sort out Minion's problems, but he can't ask his wife when she's, well, part of the problem. There's only one thing to do: it's time for Minion to become Villain.

THE INCREDIBLES meets DOCTOR HORRIBLE'S SING-ALONG BLOG with a dash of THE VENTURE BROS

*****
Contains profanity and cartoon violence

title: Forever Glamorous
description:
"I put on makeup to express myself. I could care less about my so-called insecurities."

Aura Chandler was so sure she had her life figured out. After securing a photoshoot gig with up-and-coming musician Lacey Redd, she was convinced she would get discovered for her makeup artistry. But all that crumbles when her parents force her to go on a trip to the other side of the country to visit her Grandma Ruby. Now what could've been the opportunity of a lifetime ends up in the hands of another. Distraught, she wonders what to do with her life when she's stuck thousands of miles away from her home for the entire summer. All she needs to do is find her way to make the proper connections in order to get the spotlight she so desperately yearned for. 

And that's when the perfect opportunity presents itself in the rich and handsome form of Zachary McBane: the son of the beach clubs' owner in Cornelius. She thinks that if she could be around those with heavy pockets, she could be better recognized in the future.

Alas, her old childhood best friend, Tyson Smith, sneaks back into her life to remind her that money isn't the secret to life. But she can't help but be enticed by the glitz and glam of the luxury life.

Ambitious, determined, and glamorous, the tale of a woman who holds nothing back to get what she wants.  

******

title: Something Unexpected
description:
Alana Mitchell came to accept that her life was destined to be a hard and miserable one. In her mind it was only fair. After all, it was her fault her dad was dead and her mother turned to drugs and alcohol. So she was determined to protect her little sisters and spend her life making up for her mistakes.

But things get difficult when her mother's condition worsens and tragedy strikes again. When her past and forseeable future threatens to tear her apart, she's forced to fight to keep the promise she made to her father.

This is the tale of how one dark night sent Alana Mitchell down the path of pain, misery, and self-hate. The very same path that also leads her to the road to peace of mind, acceptance, and love. 

Caution: This isn't a story for the faint of heart.

ღ My Wattpad Goals ღ

When I first started writing on Wattpad, all I wanted to do was get reads and likes. But now, all I want is for someone to stumble upon my stories and love (or hate) my characters just as much as I do.

Campaigns:
I like to discuss and include issues that bother me in my day to day life in my stories. I don't mind telling the truth or writing about the not-so-glamorous parts of life and real world events. Therefore, I'm involved with several campaigns like:
#FreeMentalIllness #FreeYourBody #DiverseLit #ProjectCharacter

title: Fake Paws | C.S 2025
description:
COMING 2025

When Brooklyn Liu is asked by her best friend Malcolm to take care of his dog for a whole month, she agrees to do so. On just one large condition.

Malcolm has been wanting to enter his dog in one of the most prestigious dog shows in existence-but he's been unable to for the past few years. Since then, he's suspected the dog show has something going on behind the scenes that he does not even know about. And he needs Brooklyn's help to investigate.

And so, Brooklyn comes up with the most craziest idea she can think of: Pose as a fake ultra rich family with Malcolm being her ex-boyfriend that she was going to marry-all while investigating the dog show from both the inside and the outside.

All within a month.

All making sure the plan goes smoothly and nothing ends up backfiring on them.

And making sure not to deviate their attention from the plan.

Even if a cute billionaire's son starts to get in the way of things.

title: RAIN
description:
Looking for a thrill? Jet surely wasn't!

All Jet wishes to do is to get away from the problems plaguing his life but while on vacation visiting his grandparents, a car crash lands him in a terrible situation. He is stranded in a desolate area and a typhoon is swiftly approaching.

When all hope seems to be lost, he is discovered by a strange local named Rain, who offers him shelter from the storm at his family's home in an unknown village. Reluctant but desperate, he follows Rain to his home. 

As the night grows older, he begins to become restless as strange things about Rain and his family begin to surface, from an uncle who went missing the day before to children who may or may not exist or who might even be in danger. Jet soon begins to realize that he has placed himself in a dangerous situation and in the middle of an unusual family dispute. As he starts planning his escape he realizes that he has no way out and his only chance of survival is to trust a man who seems to be something other than what he claims to be. 

RAIN by Merneith Taylor

authorBio:
She/her, demiromantic ace, technical editor and Wattpad Creator with cerebral palsy

When it comes to fiction, I primarily write fantasy stories for both adults and children, often involving animals, baking, and tons of puns. I also dabble in other genres, and have posted hundreds of bite-sized poems that are the perfect read if you only have a minute to spare.

My short stories and poems have appeared in Daily Science Fiction, Bronzeville Bee, Cicada, Short Édition, and various other publications. I'm a proud member of Rainbow Book Club, Dreamland Raid, and Dreamland Hunt. I'm also the founder of the Triple A Community.

title: What if I can't save the world?
description:
STATUS: COMPLETED.  Their worlds have been shattered by evils they weren't able to stop. Their powers, a reminder to all that they have lost. But when the fate of the world hangs in the balance once again these four heroines receive a second chance to become the heroes that they were destined to be all along. Can they come together in time to stop a futuristic threat or will the villain prove to be too powerful all over again?

EXCERPT
---------------------------------------------------------------
"You think she'll take the bait?" I asked

"I have no idea," she admitted.  Kadima opened up the portal and we stepped through. It was the only place she could be sure would have no civilians around. The office was stripped and abandoned. It was an old, basic, nondescript building that was set for demolition. It was dark and dusty.

"How long until you think they come, if they come."

"I don't think it will be long before they realise. I'm sure she must have some way of knowing when the timeline changes."

"Suppose the timeline hasn't changed and this was apart of the plan all along," a voice said in the darkness. "What if something as small as this doesn't change the outcome of this timeline," Mistress Mind snickered as she emerged from behind the wall. Her visor glowed in the darkness. She leaned against the wall. "Did you think something this small would be able to stop us."

"We had hoped," I fired up my pendent.

authorBio:

Other times you want to burn everything you've ever written.

Shahzad Ahmed. Your typical player. Girls chasing after him, both angry and love struck. A Muslim one at that, so he plays by different rules. He's struggling with his studies but his family are preoccupied with his sisters wedding. Until an accident leaves his father in a coma and the family in tatters. 

Circumstances change people, don't they? He's tired of seeing his family cling together on the threads holding them together. He takes matters into his own hands, builds himself up, ready to take his father's business back from his brother-in-law. He's told to wait; enraged he stumbles across clues that bring up forgotten suspicions. People in his life aren't actually who they seem to be. 

To top things off, a girl is thrown into the mix. His brother-in-laws sister, Waliha, who seems to hate him.  But maybe they are written for each other, just not the way they had planned...

Yes, a she.

Then he realizes, she's not so different from him after all.

title: #DiverseLit
description:
Information regarding the DiverseLit campaign.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
We need #DiverseLit!

Show your support for existing Wattpad stories, or write your own, in which a character is part of a minority group not ideally featured in a novel by joining this movement.

This is a campaign is led and created by Layla N. (@earthian) [est. October 17th, 2015] to promote and support books and characters of minority groups including, but not limited to, disabilities, body types, illnesses, disorders, sexual identities, religions, and nationalities that are not usually featured in current literature. Book characters who are in a minority group do not have to be central characters or even main ones - they merely need to exist in the story.

#DiverseLit Sticker:
https://m.imgur.com/xUDtljO

To join the campaign simply add the hashtag #DiverseLit to your bio on your Wattpad profile. If you would like to do even more you can write a story of any genre that includes a character who belongs to any minority group. Add the hashtag to the tags on your story and add the sticker to your story cover. If you already have written a book including a minority charachter(s), simply add the sticker (found above) and the tag!

On this profile stories that have joined the movement will be added to our Reading List, and read by me.

If you have any questions regarding the campaign contact me on this account, or on @earthian, and I will respond to you as soon as possible.

Thank you for your support~!

Best of luck writers,
Layla N.

title: Jawbreakers
description:
"First rule of getting the girl - no jawbreakers."

"What the hell are jawbreakers?"

"The things you can say to a girl that will you get a fist right to the face. Once you drop a jawbreaker you're done, game over. So don't do it."

-

Eli has never been one for drama but a sudden boost from puberty in his final year of secondary school pushes him and his romantic feelings into the limelight. After trying (and failing miserably) to confess his feelings to the girl that he's hopelessly in love with, his best friend, Cam, takes it upon herself to help him win her over.

Only problem is, the girl he's in love with is her.

As adulthood creeps closer, Eli and his friends grapple with complicated teenage feelings that threaten their friendship as they struggle to accept the endless possibilities of their fast approaching future.

title: Dust
description:
There are monsters out there.

16-year-old Gemma Armistead has grown up in Maris her whole life, thriving amongst the strange and unusual. Since she was small, she's been training to hunt in the Ancient Forest, and even after her father's death, she still continues to do what she loves. She doesn't know that what she thought was myth is true, not until she meets the human.

When Gael Echeart is thrown into her life, he turns it upside down. He is a human in a community of the inhuman, and Gemma must try to protect him, even if it endangers herself. But when things seem to take a horrible turn, Gemma finds she must fight to save her nation before it and everything she loves crumbles to dust.

title: Detective Freak
description:
Ariana Holmes's life was mainly consisted of helping ghosts figure out how they died, following her uncle to almost every crime scene, practically stealing the police's thunder and her unhealthy, undying obsession with Sherlock Holmes. 

However, this everyday routine of Ariana's life is disturbed when an unexpected letter arrives from London directed especially to her. The content of the letter puzzled her, for it wasn't a mere coincidence that she was invited to attend a boarding school in England, not when that school housed special kids with unnatural abilities like her. 

Deciding that she would go, Ariana faces more than she bargained for when many mysteries surrounding not just herself, but her newly made friends lay there waiting for her.

Will she be able to unveil them? And what possible dangers would arise from doing just that?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: What's up! My name is Massara, an Iraqi girl who wants the world to read her books! I tend to stray away from the typical books here on Wattpad, and I have an account on Inkitt as well. My book The Flames That Bind Us has been published on Galatea, for those of you who knew me during my early Wattpad days know what book I'm talking about. My stories don't have alpha werewolves or "not like other girls" clichés that have become the backbone of Wattpad (no shade to those who write stuff like this, you guys are the blueprint of fanfiction and online writing). I guess what I'm trying to say is I hope you find my books as refreshing as I hope they would be. Please enjoy and give me a follow if you like my books.

title: Why Don't You Want to Get Murdered?
description:
"What the hell is chasing us?!" I screamed at Marcus as we're running for our lives.
"Oh, you know," he turns to me with a breathtaking smile on his face, " just your average ghoul." 
                                                                                    *****
Tailia 
I didn't expect any of this to happen. You know I'm supposed to be an average teenager. I'm not supposed to have to deal with curses and demons and fate. I'm most definitely not supposed to deal with Marcus Trent. 
I didn't want these powers.
I didn't want to have my reality ripped from me.
And I most certainly did not want to fall in love with Marcus Trent.

Marcus 
This wasn't my plan whatsoever. I wasn't prepared for what life was going to throw at me.  I wasn't supposed to feel lost and confused and different. I definitely wasn't supposed to go blind at the age of ten.
I didn't expect to be blind.
I didn't expect to have the weight of the world on my shoulders.
And I most certainly didn't expect to meet a spitfire like Tailia Waddell. 

Marcus and Tailia
But I guess life likes to deal us a hand we'll never understand.

Follow Tailia and Marcus on their journey to discovering themselves and each other in the first installment of the Murder series.

Warning: Does contain foul language and scenes of abuse
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I'm 21 years old and love reading, writing, singing,  dancing, crafts, and helping others. I am here to share my creativity with the world as well as read others creative works.

title: The Class Reject: A Pariah in Purgatory (Book II)
description:
Just when it seemed like life couldn't possibly get any worse, Miren Eze dies - literally and figuratively. Caught in a limbo of deception and destruction, she realises her problems have only just began. Like the fact that her "death" has only sharpened Penelope's prep school popularity, while emotionally devastating Parker and Artemis. 

But what's even more confusing is Miren's relationship with Jeno - if they can even call it that. As they and their fellow Revengers - Wallace  and Chara - try to come up with a new scheme, it becomes increasingly evident that taking down a Queen Bee is a lot harder - and dangerous - than they could have ever imagined. Especially when Miren's identity as Miles is still on the line. 

MEAN GIRLS meets SHE'S THE MAN in a humorous, but darker tale of identity and redemption.

title: A Heart of Stone with a Coat of Gold
description:
"I steal smiles, Anu. That's how I live. I stole the smile of an innocent cherry tree. One who I brought in my life only to then burn it to the ground. You, Reema, my mother all are the same for me. And I am afraid, soon, I will steal it from my son too,"

*****************************************

'Even after Anu's marriage to Neel, her husband, remained an enigma to her. His myriad faces that she saw over time. The man of the house. The stone. The facade. And yet, the forlorn.'

Anu, a free-spirited 21-year-old woman, forced by circumstances, agrees to marry a  widower with a child. But what surprises her is that the man is not what she thought of him. As she gets to know him, she finds out his scars, both on his back and his heart. Battling her own demons of the past, can she help a wretched man, one who is without any hope, see the light in the world? Two unlikely people lost in their own lives are joined by fate in an unlikely union. Would they be able to find themselves amongst their own doubts, fears and sadness?


Note - 

Let me ask you, what's a typical story that you have heard, my friends? 
Rich guy marries a poor girl? The guy is dashing, the girl is gorgeous. And they live happily ever after. Familiar tale right?
This is not that tale. It is a tale of life, of understanding the meaning of silence, and of trying to move forward breaking the chains of past

The story is set in India but the context is very simple. Wherever necessary I have added details hence the story can be understood by everyone, anywhere in the world.
Another thing, dear reader, I am not hungry for votes. I am hungry to learn. I would love if you can share your views with me, so I can grow while writing this book. This book is a journey and I am inviting you with me to embark on the ride.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Since childhood I was in the habit of reading books. These books took me far far away in a place which transcended race, religion, color, place, time etc etc etc. It was beautiful there. But I was alone. 
Now I wanna take you there with me. Join me in this unique journey.
Neel
