title: The Craziest Of Them All
description:
Amandla Jackson is just like any typical girl. With a big dream in mind and a desperate need to escape the constricting clutches of her overbearing family, she goes to America to get everything she ever dreamt of. They don't call America the 'Land of the Dreams' for nothing.

She travels to a foreign land with a very specific and detailed plan:
1) Get a Job
2) Make millions
3) Find Michael B Jordan
4) Blackmail him into marrying her

See, a very simple plan. Slightly crazy, but still a basic and simple plan. But as always, life has a way of twisting Amandla's plans upside down. Instead of being happily married and swimming in her millions, she gets kidnapped.

The sad thing is that the kidnappers have no idea who they just kidnapped...They kidnapped the craziest woman of them all.

                             ____________________
                             
Now forced to live with her exceptionally rude, and irritatingly handsome kidnapper, follow Amandla's wild story of how she has a food fight with the most dangerous men in the underground drug ring, crashes a super car into an evil Mafia Lord's mansion and steals Beyoncé underwear.

This is a crazy tale of how an equally crazy girl got kidnapped.

⚠️ Mature Language
⚠️ The main character of this book is crazy stupid and is fearless at the worst possible time. She never thinks things through and is always getting herself into the weirdest situations.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey it's your girl Kendall Walker (My friends call me Kenny)

I'm your average girl learning the ways of life in South Africa 🇿🇦

I'm a little on the crazy side and maybe too loud for my own good (well at least that's what my mom says 🤷🏾♀️)

I've always loved reading, so i decided to take it to the next level and try writing...And i hope y'all enjoy my work ❤❤

title: Heart of Flame
description:
Now published, links to all ebook vendors here = https://books2read.com/u/31Re7a

 Everyone knows that rebellion ends in fire. Dissatisfied with her life, Sorne finds an escape in the training offered by an orc locked away in the depths of Mauléon's dungeons. But Duke Aldana's punishment for an act of silence sparks a flame that cannot be contained. With a darkness growing in the west and answers to be found in the north, Sorne must leave everything she has ever known to become someone who can help shape the course of history. 

Companion to The Lady Penitent and The Desolate Throne.

authorBio:
I do not do well writing about myself, which is why I live in fictional worlds instead of writing much in a journal. I've been writing for a while now (read: years) and I unfortunately don't have as much time to read or write as I'd like at the moment. I am a big fantasy/sci-fi buff, though I do have a soft spot for some horror. I don't mind reading for people, but due to obligations, it may take me a while to get through a piece.

The Revealed world wiki can be found at: https://publish.obsidian.md/therevealedworld/Welcome

You can find my server on Discord at: https://discord.gg/aJCWwkq8UR

title: Adamantine
description:
137 in fantasy - 06/05/18
White amongst black. Serenity was the only white Raven in the Raven Clan of Boreabilis. Orphaned at an early age, she lived in a cottage provided by the Raven King. Soon to be of six and ten summers, Serenity's life turned upside down when a Demon came claiming to be her bonded guardian in wisps of smoke. 

Her own clan wanted nothing to do with her, a self-absorbed Dragon Prince wants her eliminated, her Demon guardian had his own share of dark secrets. In the midst of all these, ancient myths and secrets are spilled and it became more than just knowing why she was a white Raven. Unknown forces are at work and Serenity must do everything she could to not get killed.

title: Confessions of a Trump Heiress
description:
Emerald Coleman, a biracial Georgia teen, gets the shock of her life when she finds out that she's President Trump's granddaughter. Next thing she knows, she's moving out of the suburbs and into the White House. How will Emerald handle her new situation? Between being at the center of family drama, becoming a media sensation, and dealing with a romantic life straight out of a soap opera...does this new heiress have what it takes to survive it all?

title: Sappo from Lesbo
description:
Follow the lives and loves of a LGBTQ group of friends (and lovers). Jess Morening, a rebel, androgynous, that struggles with depression and copes with it by getting involved in drugs. She has slept with a bunch of women and agrees to continue this type of rebel lifestyle. Teddy McBuran, a kind, intelligent, creative, and responsible girl who cares about her family and friends. She gets excellent grades and excels in English, math, and science. she's the perfect American girl but has a secret. Teddy is a lesbian and struggles to keep the secret from her parents. Ana Pensley, dream to be the best hairdresser and makeup artist but struggles to do so when people find out she is a transgender. Fran Fernandez, a homeless gay latino that dreams to becoming a big star in performing arts. He faces the cruel world and tries his best not to go the wrong path. Elena Pham, a fitness freak that has terrible luck with girls. Her goofy personality makes it almost impossible to hate her. Lastly Tianee Carter. A closeted bisexual that faces fear of being judged. Find out how these people with different lifestyles find themselves and help each other pursue their dreams.

title: The Best Part of Hello [sample]
description:
Kayla's senior year trip is supposed to be the icing on the cake. Good grades, a perfect boyfriend, and a future she's always imagined. But when their plane emergency stops in Rome, Italy because of a record-breaking storm, sixty seniors have to learn how to adapt.
But in an airport not prepared, a language barrier and a miserably irritating neighbor hell-bent on annoying her, Kayla's in for more than the trip she bargained for.

title: The New York Nanny
description:
Crystal is a sweet girl spreading her wings in NYC. For the past two years, she has been a doting nanny to an adorable toddler girl named Willow. Willow's dads, Mark and Greg hired Crystal when they adopted Willow and the four of them have become practically a family. 

When Crystal is in the throes of a bad breakup and a nasty spill on her bike, Mark and Greg decide to play matchmaker and trying hooking Crystal up on a blind date. They settle on a handsome young man named James,  who Mark knows from his firm. It isn't until they meet up that Crystal and James find out that they met before....when they crashed bikes. Can the two of them patch up a bad first impression?

authorBio: I love books, knitting, crochet, macramé, and friendship bracelets. When I'm not thinking up stories I love watching Masterpiece and other Brit shows, hearing music from my favorite musical stars, listening to podcasts, and a good movie. My inspiration comes from artwork, emotional songs, and dreams while I sleep. My favorite genres to write are historical, romances, fantasy, and I am dipping my toes into fan-fiction. Please feel free to vote and comment on my work and give me a follow!

title: Before Soratia
description:
Lucianne Allair and Meiling Zhou lead two different lives. One of the main reasons for that? They live in two different dimensions. 
•
•
•
•
•

This series will describe the events that occurred before my novel took place. It follows around my main characters: Lucianne, before she traveled to the fantasy world of Soratia, (as can be inferred from the title), and Meiling, who lives in Soratia. Throughout this series, you will get acquainted with the characters of my novel, as well as become familiar with their world and my writing style. 


Please keep in mind that I spend no time editing any of these (I'm donating most of my precious time to the novel) so it's not my best writing. I apologize in advance for any errors.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Haram & Cultured
description:
Layla and Zara are two moroccan cousins about to go through senior year in two different high schools, two different parts of town and with different people.

Layla who grew up in a mixed cultured household is  awkward, outspoken about political issues and a compulsive liar who's struggling to keep her walls up against love. Especially when a handsome stranger moves in with her neighbors.

Zara who seems like your perfect muslim daughter on the outside is actually the girl version of every bad boys and players that a girl loves combined which is why she's judged and hated by some. She's waiting for the one who will make her feel something other than this constant boredom.

title: Revival: Of Cethore ✔
description:
The dragon is sleeping; it's fading away. Only one can awaken it, only one can revive it. Will they make it in time?

  Cethore was once simply a land divided by the people within. Of the seven tribes, great power ran through their veins, each power unique to its tribe, but one tribe was blessed with power over all other tribes. They united the tribes to form the nation of Cethore, run by the Council of Sixeen. For many centuries, peace reigned, until the darkness crept into their hearts.
    
    Samari is a homeless orphan hoping to find a good life somewhere, a place where she belongs. Luck is not on her side as she runs into a street fight that is bigger than it seems. When she joins a guild that works for a dead king, she finds a version of herself she never knew existed--and friends she never had. But now she has to step up in order to keep the darkness at bay. With the fate of her world in the balance, she must decide between staying comfortable or fighting for greater power.

[Fairy Tail meets Avatar: The Last Airbender]


Warning! This book contains violence, bullying, racism, and dark scenes. 

| Completed | Book One in the Of Cethore series |

Featuring a map made by @Ladune
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Stigmatized
description:
Neel Roy sets out to interview one of the most discussed young women in recent times - Veera Rajput, the reason being her statistics of divorces. She faces flak after separation with her fourth husband, who happens to be a famous actor, throwing herself under the limelight. People cannot look beyond her array of marriages to see the wonderful, successful woman she is. 

When Neel gets marked by the who's whos of the upper class society for going around with the 'slut', the stigma attached to her divorces engulfs them both. 

To worsen the situation, a hidden stalker going by the pseudonym of 'WellWisher' leaves no stones unturned to jeopardize Veera's life. Neel and Veera make it their mission to catch the stalker, as they realise that is the only way out, or else 'they' would not stop. 

The two stigmatized must fight against the society and the WellWisher to hold their heads high in a world where everyone is judged.




Ranked 3rd in Romance in The Moonlight Awards

authorBio:
My name is Eva, and I'm 29 years old.

isfp. 6w7. empath. escapist. writer. animal lover. cat lady. music listener. whovian. otaku. psychology enthusiast. wallflower. movie watcher. daydreamer. multiple fandoms.

I write because I want to write, not for popularity. Don't write just for the views, do it because you genuinely love and enjoy it. You'll be noticed in time, but I'm going to be honest, it'll take a while.

I've completed 10 stories so far.

I have many more story ideas that I want to write and share, including different genres I've never written in before. I hope to one day see my stories published, and made into a T.V. show or a movie.

title: Echoes of an Alpha
description:
Inessa will do anything to keep her life as a rogue. Her freedom is the last safe place in White Timber Forest, especially since the tensions between the four werewolf clans are threatening to erupt. However, the power-hungry clans know of her skills as a tracker. After being captured by the clan deepest into the forest, the same clan that killed her mother, Inessa is offered a deal: die, or marry the East clan's new alpha. Inessa sees only one choice - run.

Alphas are not born, they are made. Arek of the East clan had it drilled into him since he was four that he needed to become alpha - no matter the sacrifice. After nineteen years of training, he finally challenges the Red Conclave, the ruling council of the East, and earns the right to become alpha. But there's a catch - he must marry Inessa, the gifted rogue, in order to keep her power inside the East clan. 

Marriage is the last thing on Arek's mind. He wants nothing to do with the feisty tracker. But there's something about Inessa he can't resist. Something about the way she yanks on the invisible chains of his past. Something about her scent.

**No part of this story may be printed or used without explicit, written consent of the author. All rights reserved © 2018 - presented by Reese Cadwell**

title: Splinter Child: Briar Rose Retold
description:
THE YEAR is 1877.

When Talia Rose steps into a fairy ring as a child, her mother, Tate Rose, an outcast witch, signs a deal with a dark fae to delay Talia's inevitable surrender until her eighteenth birthday. A deal that will allow Talia to be taken  into a 100-year sleep spell and imprisonment in the fairy realm.  

But as the eighteenth year draws closer, more and more settlements and wagon trains begin mysteriously disappearing, leaving Tate to wonder if her daughter's impending abduction is only one in dozens that could be linked to the wild Desert Folk. 

But why?

Set against the bloody and brutal background of the American West, this gritty, pulp western retelling of the multi-cultural fairytale best known as "Sleeping Beauty" or "Briar Rose," is as twisted and dark as the origins deserve.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Swan Song
description:
-BOOK ONE-

In the Pylysky Sphere there is magic, music, life and love. But there is also darkness and destruction. In a small once great kingdom, after over a decade of silence, a new voice is about to rise and reclaim its power...

***

Anike of Wyttfeather has only known one life, that of lady in waiting to the princess. The two have been friends since age eight when Anike was first brought the castle. But before that Anike's life is a blank. She wonders about her past but with no clues to where she came from, her origins have remained a mystery. That is until one day when she meets an old woman who claims to know exactly who Anike is.

The seemingly harmless, though odd meeting, will turn Anike's world upside down. With her past revealed, her future once set in stone, is now rushing at her like a river. Wyttfeather's fate is at stake. Anike must make a choice, one that could change everything, and perhaps destroy her dearest friend.

Loosely based on Tchaikovsky's "Swan Lake".

title: Bliss

Two weeks. Two weeks of sun, sand and stress-free fun. At least that's the package Lizzie was sold. Little does she know, the package was a dream. A sweetly wrapped lie fed to her by those she trusts the most. 

There will be sand, sure.

And sun, lots of it.

But stress-free?

Convinced he's still bad news, Lizzie is determined to enjoy every single second of her vacation without him. Just because he's next door doesn't mean they'll cross paths...right?

title: The Art Of Hating You
description:
All's fair in love and publicity.

THE INTERN
After a career-ending injury, sixteen-year-old Shay Gupta's hopes at the Olympics are crushed. Despite becoming @FamousFumbles, one of Toronto's most popular Instagrammers, Shay is determined to wallow in self-pity. Since she keeps her pithy social commentary posts a secret, her parents force her into a summer internship at Gupta Media, her aunt's company. She may be an expert at life behind a keyboard, but reality? Good luck with that.

THE ROCKSTAR
With a life in the spotlight, seventeen-year-old Flynn Hudson wants nothing more than to be left alone with his motorcycle and guitar. But, after a string of not-so-great decisions, his reputation went from bad boy rockstar to reckless rich kid. On a "break" from his world tour, Flynn's parents move him to Toronto for a fresh start. Only, there's no deleting your past, and Flynn can't avoid @FamousFumbles anonymous criticism...

THE COLLISION
When Flynn's parents hire Gupta Media to clean up his image, the last thing he expects is to run into @FamousFumbles, the Instagrammer who didn't catch him on his best day. As the only one who knows her hidden identity, he can't wait to make her life hell when she's assigned to his PR team.

How far will Shay go to keep her online persona a secret? And what happens when the lines between reality and a PR campaign are blurred? This is war, uh, publicity, baby.

*This was an entry for the #ShawRocketFund Contest and will be on hold while I work on JPS*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! I'm Nikki, a 21-year-old lover of college romances, fictional men & cheesy romcoms.

I'm kinda obsessed with writing new adult sports romances that will definitely make you feel some second-hand embarrassment &may or may not keep you up reading late into the night. Sorry in advance for messing up your sleep schedule (but who are we kidding here, all of us are basically nocturnal).

JUST PRESS SEND follows a freshman college student who drunkenly texts her boyfriend pro/con list to each of her five crushes & she finds her average year turned upside down as she navigates the world of first love.

To date, I've never made pro/con lists about my crushes, but I have sent many a drunk text.

I decided to post my first draft as I go to incorporate your feedback & connect with other readers, like me! Long before I was a writer, I was a reader first. Blame Mr. Darcy for my romance obsession.

I'm currently working on Book 3 in the Just Press Send series, available now on YONDER, a new reading app from the creators of WEBTOON and Wattpad! Download YONDER here: https://bit.ly/yonderjps

Want to chat? DM me- I'm always happy to answer questions and talk about reading & writing.

Sit down, grab a cup of tea, and get reading with me!

title: Deviant or Divine |  Hades and Persephone
description:
FULL STORY NOW ON KINDLE UNLIMITED

New Olympus: a secret haven where Greek mythology comes to life and mortals possess godly powers. 

Leila is the city's newest resident, gifted with the goddess Persephone's power. If she wants to keep her freedom she must abide by their laws- even if it means her end.

Blake has been shunned by his classmate's for his powers, gifted by the god Hades. He's tired of fighting his dark side and Leila's arrival will test his control. 

The are other forces working towards their own end and in a city coursing with magic, love may not be enough to defy Fate.

An ensemble contemporary fantasy retelling of Hades and Persephone, with many other myths at play.

title: Confluence of Hearts
description:
In the sun-baked valleys of 1500s New Mexico, where the Spanish mission bells echo against ancient canyon walls, two souls meet at a river's edge - each seeking something they cannot find in their own world.

Mateo, a young Spanish settler fleeing the rigid confines of his homeland, finds himself drawn ever further from the mission's watchful eyes. His solitary walks along the river become something more when he encounters Ahiga, a Zuni Lhamana - a Two-Spirit person whose very existence challenges everything he's been taught. In Ahiga's gentle strength and artistic gifts, Mateo glimpses a freedom he's only dreamed of.

Through shared moments of pottery-making, their hands speak what their different languages cannot. Each lesson becomes a ritual, each exchanged word a treasure, as they build something far more precious than the vessels they create together. In the safety of morning shadows and secret paths, they discover that love, like clay, can be shaped into something beautiful if one has the courage to try.

Set against the backdrop of early Spanish colonization, "Confluence of Hearts" is a tender historical romance about finding love across cultural boundaries, the courage to live truthfully, and the universal language of the heart. Like two rivers joining to form something new, their story challenges us to imagine a world where love transcends all barriers - cultural, linguistic, and spiritual.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Zachary Steele is a storyteller with a passion for weaving tales that blend the extraordinary with the deeply personal. From the magical streets of modern-day cities to the neon-lit futures of tomorrow, Zachary's novels explore love, identity, and the complexities of the human condition, often through the lens of speculative fiction. With a flair for creating immersive worlds and unforgettable characters, Zachary's stories invite readers to escape the ordinary and dive into the heart of the unknown.

Zachary's work spans genres, including supernatural mystery, science fiction, and contemporary romance, always with an emphasis on emotional depth and character-driven narratives. Whether it's an android learning to feel, a witch trying to find their place in the modern world, or a young man discovering long-buried family secrets, Zachary's books captivate readers with their unique blend of adventure, intrigue, and heartfelt emotion.

When Zachary isn't writing, you can find him exploring new ideas, working on his latest novel, or connecting with readers who share his love of all things speculative and romantic.

title: The Truth About Love
description:
FEATURED ON WATTPAD FRESH READS 21/07
Asha has watched pretty much every rom-com to ever exist and read every romance novel to have ever set foot in the world of literature- in fact, she's even written some successful teen romance novels of her own on Wattpad, which practically makes her an expert.

So, how hard could it be for someone who essentially has a Ph.D. in the 'studies of luurve' to make the stereotypical school player, Kai Watson, fall head over heels in love with her? And with the help of her best friend Mason, it should be a walk in the park. 

Except, it's not. Heck, it's more like a crawl in the Sahara desert.

It doesn't take Asha long at all to realise that love couldn't be more different from what she had envisaged in her head and in just a few months she learns more about love, in all its forms than she could have ever imagined.

title: Mona Liza Lies
description:
Featured on @fright and @crime | A funny take on the serious lives of the people in Mona's life, where urban stories, death, and ducks keep them up at night.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Liza died of overdose. 
Her boyfriend Dennis likes to deflect from the pain by keeping himself busy.  Her best friend Mona's coping mechanism includes buying a goat and naming it Liza.

As if things weren't weird enough, the cops soon come knocking at her door, where they inform her  about the sudden spike of death rates in the town, all caused by narcotics. As they were busy investigating more into this, Mona finds her deceased friend's journal, where it was written clear as day that Mona herself was Liza's drug supplier. 

With the help of  her dead best friend's boyfriend Dennis, and an extremely impulsive high schooler Disha; Mona must figure out what happened to Liza before she died, while keeping her own life from falling apart. 

Did I mention there was a strange person following her everywhere, claiming to be a ghost?
---------------
Cover by @AlexVonnG

title: Red Zone Son
description:
Solomon, a mixed Black/Korean teenager, was just seven when America splintered into red and blue zones. Years later, after getting forcibly drafted into a red zone militia, he's driven solely by one goal: protect his little sister, Adah. This compels him to not only endure grueling training in a racially hostile crucible, but also to carry out a perilous undercover mission deep inside a blue zone.

The mission's unexpected derailment sees him imprisoned in a blue zone re-education camp. Forced into an alliance with his abusive ex-drill instructor, Solomon must race against time to escape. His choices teeter on a knife's edge, shaping not just his fate but also that of Adah who is confronting her own oppression back in their red zone home. 

As the window for rescue narrows, Solomon and Adah must overcome the harrowing reality of a nation divided, or risk being forever separated by the insurmountable boundaries that have come to define their world.

title: Forbidden Love a tale of Religious Devotion and Rebellious Passion
description:
In a world divided by faith, two hearts dare to defy the odds. Aisha, a devout Muslim, and David, a committed Christian, are thrust into a passionate whirlwind when their paths unexpectedly cross. Amidst societal pressures and their families' fierce disapproval, their forbidden love ignites, challenging everything they know. As cultural boundaries and deep-rooted prejudices threaten to tear them apart, Aisha and David must summon the courage to fight for their love. Will their bond be powerful enough to bridge the chasm between their worlds? Dive into a gripping tale of courage, sacrifice, and the unstoppable force of love that transcends all barriers.

description:

When Luca Morgan, Trilogy's lead singer, overdoses in front of a sold out stadium, he thinks for sure his musical career is over.
Until he's let out of rehab and realizes that the aftermath of his addiction could possibly destroy him and his bandmates forever. 

To remedy his sudden crippling fear of music, his manager sends him back home to "where the magic started."

Too bad "the magic" comes in the form of his sister's stuck up best friend who not only sings like a rockstar angel, but she awakens his own raw desire to keep trying. Trying to write music, that is.


"𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐬 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐝 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐰 𝐛𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐠𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐟."


Amelia Rothchild cannot seem to catch a break. After a long-term relationship crashes and burns so hard that it leaves the lead singer of SHADES in a traumatised heap of ashes, she swears off love and relationships forever. 

Who needs men when you've got an empty song journal just waiting for you to bleed out your feelings onto its pages? Certainly not Amelia, that's for sure.

Until Luca Morgan strolls back into her small town and she learns that men with eyes as blue as his should come with multiple warning signs.


(THIS IS NOT A FAN-FICTION!)

title: When Life Gives You Mangoes
description:
A Summer She Can't Remember. A Friendship She Won't Forget.

Nothing much happens in Sycamore, the small village where Clara lives - except for one problem, 12 year old Clara can't remember anything that happened last summer.
But when a new girl arrives on the island, everything starts to change. They uncover an old family secret, and as the island storms begin, Clara's memory starts to return, forcing her to face the truth of her past.

title: The End of Days
description:
The world is a place where the manipulation of the universe is known to every living soul, where reality itself can be shaped with a touch of a finger, where time itself flows as desired and space can be woven like thread, where other realities are only a step away. The unbridled creation in a world where people may do as they please, however, is not enough to satisfy the mechanist Cassandra, a woman who delves into artifice and would create order out of chaos. But for all their power, the pride of her people and the knowledge she unlocks will spell the very thing no one can imagine: the end of days.

title: Korál's Diary
description:
Korál Lleana is just a normal, 25-year old Puerto Rican girl. She is on the path to greatness, she was an intern at the University of Utah hospital. One of the best medical programs in the country, she had recently become an attending in Neuro Surgery and she was heading to be the best in the nation. 

But a phone call that would change her life forever. 

Her mother had passed away. Being in a tough situation, Korál moves back home to New York to help with her mournful father and her younger twin brothers. She now lives with her family and her grandmother who came from Rio Piedras, Puerto Rico to help out. 

Korál tries her best to adjust to career path of life and juggle the responsibilities her mother had.

On this journey of tragedy and struggle, Korál meets a young man named Levi Parker. 

Will Korál let Levi enter her life? Will he accept her busy life surrounded of family? Will she ever graduate college? Will her father ever get back on the wagon? 

Read and find out!

-Warning: There is a few parts were it switches to Spanish. If you have ANY trouble understanding, please comment and I'll translate.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Pandora Project
description:
Four girls, one destiny: Hacker, Arsonist, Recluse, Thief.
Cara, Siouxsie, Red and Jenna may appear to be ordinary teenage girls, but they're anything but. As delinquents, their paths collide when they're given up to an experimental juvenile rehabilitation program known as The Pandora Project.
However, upon arrival, they quickly realize that things are not as they seem. Strange occurrences begin to unfold: bizarre tests, mandatory 'Vitamin' shots, timeslips, combat and weapons training.
The girls soon discover that The Pandora Project has ulterior motives, far from the rehabilitation they were promised. Uncovering the truth only leads to more questions, putting their lives at risk. Could it be possible that the organization is turning troubled teens, unknowingly, into genetically modified super-powered assassins? And what fate awaits assets who dare to defy control?
In a race against time, they must navigate the shadows of deceit, relying on the extensive training provided by the program to take it down. The stakes are high, and the girls are about to discover that their unique skills may be the key to exposing the dark secrets of Project Pandora. But will it be enough to survive?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Cauchemar Camp
description:
"I'm not saying history repeats itself, it's just that I'm pretty sure I learned about this in history class"

When Bonaparte took control of France, he had the decency to try and take over the rest of Europe. The Romans tried to make the whole world a part of their Empire. The Portuguese stole land from their fellow Europeans by ignoring a treaty they formed. 

What I'm trying to say is, when a country becomes the big bad of the season, they try to take over the world. That's what happens, that's what they're supposed to do.

So, why did The United Kingdom close itself off? Why did they decide to become a North Korea sized China? 

It doesn't matter, what matters is that Dalia only wanted to spend a normal vacation with her family while watching the Olympic Games in France. She didn't want to be captured by English terrorists. She certainly didn't want to be taken on one of those Slaveships that seems to be making a comeback. And she definitely didn't want to be forced to work in a sweatshop while only having the memories of her loved ones to keep her going. 

It's funny really, she was always the one making fun of the people trying to survive on those post-apocalyptic TV shows. Now she'll do whatever she has to come back to her family. One thing she did learn from all those stories, though: don't be a hero, just keep your head down and survive. 

"How'd you do on that test?"

"It was a pop quiz, teacher cancelled it after the class found the answers on Quizlet."
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Dragon's Daughter
description:
Seventeen-year-old Raina Brandt has never fit in. A physical disability means she's bullied at school by popular kids like Hector, and only her two best friends, Jess and Sy, seem to understand her. But despite this, Raina thinks she's got life all figured out. Until, one day, a shopping trip for lip gloss turns into a catastrophe of apocalyptic proportions. Everyone around her seems to have developed weird magical powers. Well, everyone but her. Jess can appear anywhere, Hector can read minds- and Sy, well, Sy's gone missing. 

Raina would give anything for things to go back to the way they were and a mysterious and handsome stranger offers her just that, as long as she does something for him in return. But things aren't quite what they seem, especially when Raina discovers she's even more powerful than she could have ever imagined. 

Now, it's up to Raina to figure out how to exist in a new world of uncertainty and decide where her loyalties lie.  Hanging in the balance is the life of her friend and possibly the fate of magic itself.


*******
COMPLETE.  Rated PG-13 for mature themes in later chapters. There will be trigger warnings at the top of any chapter that might include anything triggering. Swearing is in most chapters. Please consider this your warning for that. The completed novel is about 50k words and is a standalone, though I may write a sequel with the same characters.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
The more I learn about writing the less I realize I know about writing. I hope posting here helps me grow as a writer and a person...  and just in general share some of the characters that are jumping around in my brain, asking to run free in the world.

If you are a writer or a reader, I'm glad you are here. I'm certain we can learn from each other. Thank you for stopping by.

title: 𝒜 𝒯𝑜𝓊𝒸𝒽 𝒪𝒻 𝒞𝒾𝓃𝓃𝒶𝓂𝑜𝓃 ❤️️🍪🥛
description:
In the cozy, snow-dappled town of Redwood Hollow, two bakeries sit side by side, their rivalry as frosty as a winter morning. Maria, a fiercely independent and hardworking baker, pours her heart and soul into her family's bakery-a cherished legacy passed down through generations. Just next door is Bao, a sweet-talking, sharp-witted baker whose family moved to town seven years ago, disrupting Maria's family's long-standing streak as champions of the town's annual holiday bakeoff.

For years, the bakeoff has been the battleground where their families wage an unspoken war, stirring up a rivalry that's as hot as fresh-baked bread. The competition is fierce, but amidst the playful bickering and sugary sabotage, something unexpected begins to rise-an undeniable connection between Maria and Bao. While Maria bristles at Bao's teasing charm, she can't help but notice his quiet admiration and how his cleverness lights up the room. Bao, on the other hand, is captivated by Maria's grit, grace, and the warmth she shows her customers, even if she reserves her sharpest comebacks for him.

As the holiday festival unfolds-with its twinkling lights, caroling choirs, and mouthwatering aromas-the bake-off takes center stage. But when their families get involved, tensions threaten to bubble over, testing Maria and Bao's budding relationship. Amid a flurry of flour fights, misadventures under the mistletoe, and one unforgettable gingerbread competition, the pair must decide: Will they cling to the past and their families feud, or will they bake up something new and sweeter together?

This Christmas, the true recipe for love might just be a little rivalry, a lot of laughter, and a whole lot of heart.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: My Blindness | ✔
description:
[ Featured by @WattpadShortStory ]

• • •

❝She was like the tear of the sky, 
the anger of a volcano. 
She was like the rain in a desert,
the fire in a sea.
And he didn't know he was a moth,
drawn to a flame.❞

• • • 

Sarah Hudson is the perfect definition of inner and outer beauty, except for the fact that her ocean blue eyes have no light. 

She is blind. 

But one fateful morning, she collides with Trevor Scofield and finds out that he is the only person she can see, but why? 

An incident leads to both of them to spend a few, oddly dramatic days with each other. But Trevor's cold, arrogant, and mysterious self is too much for her to bear, because almost everything that he is involved in is 'wrong', especially, when some of it also concerns her family. 

Not long after they meet, they realize that their feelings are starting to fall out of control. 

Pasts are proclaimed, secrets are revealed, and mysteries are solved until Sarah is met by a heart shattering tragedy. 

This is a story of love, passion, affection, happiness and tears. 

Melting hearts and preoccupied brains, everything to embark on a journey of both, love and mystery, mixed up.

authorBio:
~ • ~

This person that you're reading about suffers from the obsolete disease of excessive thinking.

She is a complete wreck at times, but has the superpowers to win people's hearts and dominate their brains - though only when she wants to.

She is highly determined to reach her destinations, but she does fail to accomplish a whole lot of things quite often. She hates procrastination, but falls in its trap sometimes, though unwillingly.

You can run off by stealing the best advice from her, but she is still under the process of learning how to efficiently solve her own problems.

She reads and writes because books are where she finds the peace of her soul and mind. She divides her heart, mind and personality into pieces, and  scribbles them down in the form of totally flawed characters.

Although she hates perfectionism, she still struggles to reach the top of perfection, but slips back to the ground sometimes. But that rarely freaks her out, because she knows how not to give up.

She can be an inspiration for some, and not-so-inspirational for others. Like all humans, she knows how to love and is learning how to accept and process the love she receives. She isn't good at winding up introductions, so she'd end this one with one thing. Peace. =]

I'm a writer of all stripes, but primarily science fiction on Wattpad. I love robots, aliens, and time travel, and exploring topics like gender, literacy, mental health, climate change, and social justice.

My inspirations: Ursula Le Guin (my old-time hero), Rebecca Stead and L.M. Montgomery (my new-time heroes), CS Lewis (his sci-fi), Gene Roddenberry, Edgar Allan Poe, Haruki Murakami, Robert Heinlein, Aaron Starmer, JRR Tolkien, Charles Dickens, Margaret Atwood, Phillip Dick, William Gibson, Carl Jung, Joseph Campbell and Michael Talbot.

The community and support on Wattpad is amazing! The friends I've made and the critiques I've received have been invaluable in shaping my career as a writer. I can't tell you how grateful I am -- it's here as a lonely writer that I felt safe to share my discovery drafts.

What is a discovery draft, you ask. Well, that's basically my first blah-it-on-the-page-until-it's-all-out draft. What this means for any hapless victims, er, I mean, random readers who stumble upon my stories is that... SURPRISE! It's a surprise to both of us because I have NO clue what I'm going to write in a discovery draft. I start with a character and what they want, and I discover the story from there.

So that brings me to an important point: PROCEED WITH CAUTION. Don't expect a ready-to-read novel on my profile. Expect dead-ends. Expect false starts. Expect gaping plot holes. Expect  disappointing endings. And expect some crazy shizzle! And just remember, I warned you.

Over the years, I've read so many great stories on Wattpad, so PLEASE see my reading lists with all my favourites. -------------->>>>>>>

title: The Sentinel's Conduit
description:
In a world overrun by demons, you would think that people would make smarter choices. 

Let's pretend, for a second, that my father, the Head Pastor, hadn't made a deal with the Vampire Lord. Let's pretend, for a second, that he wasn't naive enough to think that desperate times called for measures this desperate. 

You know what? I'm giving him too much credit.

Instead, let's pretend, for a second, that he did pay the piper and the Vampire Lord hadn't ordered me abducted and for his death. 

I guess that would defeat the purpose of me still being pissed at him from beyond his grave.

They say 'be grateful' , but I'd be lying if I said that I didn't occasionally wish that I hadn't been given a second chance. 

I suppose it would defeat the purpose of having the five Sentinels serve the people if one of them hadn't taken it upon himself to save me. 

Maybe there is a purpose.

When five men have been blessed with the gift of the angels and the war is suddenly no longer lost, I suppose there is a plan.

Maybe this is meant to happen. 

I guess I really only have two questions: am I also meant to fight my affections for the Royal Sentinel? If he's as dangerous as he appears to be, would I be better off accepting him as my protector and nothing more?

***

Celia is given a second chance at life, but it comes with a price. After being saved by the one they call The Royal Sentinel, Celia finds that her life is no longer her own when she wakes up and learns that she's become an instrument-the instrument that will end the war and save the human race.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Redemption Along Our Daunting Paths
description:
People call her the daughter of Death and Chaos. In their eyes, she is an abomination, the product of the greatest sin her parents could commit, possessing the sole purpose of murdering humans and consuming their souls. Her crimson eyes, ebony hair that fades into blood red and the bone protrusions that emerge from her back disguise her longing to redeem herself and live a new life. However, when she accepts the chance to protect her world from the criminals she detests, how long can she withstand being stripped away from everything she loves and values before she can fulfill her dream of becoming a hero.

1st Place Winner of the Rising Star Award

title: The Forgotten Deity | A Percy Jackson Fanfiction
description:
Book One of the Akira Fujioka series.

Akira is just your "average" teenager training to become a professional Japanese dancer. With all the pressure to become number one in Japan, a sudden attack from monsters make that the least of her problems. When two mythological creatures appear on their doorstep, Akira, with the help of a fellow demigod, will leave her homeland and find a sanctuary for half-bloods. 

After learning about her godly parent, Akira is forced to travel on a quest for her parent to receive the recognition they so rightly deserve. With only three days to spare, Akira has to find away to decipher a broken prophecy, save someone important to her, and restore honor to her parent's name. She must figure out whether giving her parent the prestige they dearly want is more important over her needs to become the best dancer in all of Japan. 

But how can one give their godly parent justice when they haven't finished their journey of self-discovery?

Based on the Percy Jackson and Heroes of Olympus series.

[An AU in which ToA doesn't exist]

(PG-13 RECOMMENDED)

title: Savage Six: Equinox
description:
"Stop ! You're going to kill him!" I hear her voice but I can't control my rage. How dare he touch her? Who the hell did he think he was. I start punching again seeing red. She was MINE. He had no idea what I'd had to do to get her. How much i had to hold in the burning demon I locked away just for her. I bang his head to the floor. 

I was king for a reason & if I had to beat some sense in to him I would. Did he think he could transfer into MY campus & take over? It's not like he didn't know how I was before she got here. Wait. Would she leave me for him? I hesitate on the last punch & the red I'm seeing starts to clear. 
Looking around I see everyone watching. Some with their phones out. The teacher is sitting at her table looking like he's seen a ghost but of course won't do anything. It's how things work around here. We're untouchable... invincible.....savage. 


Welcome to the Ultimate Kingdom. Where every high school junior & senior stresses to make sure they get into. Miami not only the home of Sobe but the home of the six connected universities that create : the savage 6. Each university has a court that comes together and runs Miami. They have the power to make or break you. When you're in one? You're in all & it's an experience of a lifetime. But cross the court & how long will you last? Teachers fear them students want to be them & they all just want to keep the court as savage as possible. 
Bailey University
Freedom international university 
Jordan & Williams university 
University of Madison 
Morgan dot college 
St. Taylor university 

6 castles 1 empire. Mission: Get in- Stay in. Climb to the top. Stay to the top. Question is are you savage enough?
Tous Droits Réservés

It grabs you by the collar from the very first word & drags you into this intense world of such vivid & rich detail! Words can't really describe how much I love this book & how amazingly it is written! I pity all those poor suckers who have yet to find the amazingness that's this book! I can't wait to see where this book takes you because its truly amazing and deserves all the recognition it could ever receive! You are amazing! Your way with words is breathtaking to say the least!❞

@orphanblood (Mediocre Poems): ❝I am very honored as a reader to be reading something that is fresh and not something with 500k or even a million and more reads. I would say, don't complain about those artificial & cliché stories. Read something new & valuable. Everyone might not like it, but it possesses originality which is why I truly respect. I like the mystery behind it bc you want to leave your readers wanting more. Each chapter doesn't need to have a thrill in it. You want us to come back for seconds like dinner at a dinner table. I admire how detailed your chapters are. This will be an AWESOME full length book!❞

title: Unforgiving
description:
A quick-to-anger human maid is thrust into a terrifying power struggle she should have no part in. 
A reincarnator must protect the one life he has ever cared about.
...
"What are you, then, My Hope? A porcelain doll, fading by the year, poised to shatter?" I had said pointedly. "The way I see it, you're set to be shelved just like her, like the rest of us 'ragdolls'."
...
The hateful vampire princess enters nineteen year old Miriam Will into the death match that was the Imperial Trials, a generational competition in which any qualified citizen of age can compete and win the throne of the Rouge Empire, for themselves or another. Miriam mourns the loss of the friend she had in the princess, and fears for her life as she must face her fate head on. She only wants to breathe without stress, to become lighter, sweeter, kinder- But this game may force her to be crueler and more fearful than she's ever had to be. 
...
He has lived dozens of lives, all under the boot of House Cordelia. In this life, he is the ethereally beautiful fourth son of a baron and bears the name "Ivory Gross". Born into yet another disgraced line, he is (shockingly) loved dearly by his family. When his father asks him to compete in the Trials, he reluctantly agrees; he wants to defend the first family who has ever showed him consideration and affection. He wishes for a bright future for his younger relatives, one where they aren't ridiculed for mistakes they had no part in.

Can Ivory believe in the future? Can Miriam protect herself among monsters? Can the two of them help each other let go of the past? Most of all, can they find it in themselves to be as ruthless and unforgiving as the heads of an empire need to be?

title: The Bittersweet
description:
b i t t e r s w e e t

"I missed you Maya"
"Don't." I shake my head slowly, "Just.. Don't"

Maya grew up loving a boy called Damien Lockwood, they were everything you ever wanted in a relationship. To everyone, he was a bad boy, but to her he was the one who taught her how to ride a bike and sweet talk. Until he leaves her broken and disappears with no notice to anyone. 
Forced to heal herself and move forward, with broken nights and endless tears for months, grew her in hate towards Damien Lockwood.

The start of senior year. New beginnings. New boys. Dakota, her best friend has decided this was the year to make her move on the school's play boy, Ethan Mace.

Cue in new kid Riley, he's packed with stories he's read and adventures he's lived, not only that, Riley happens to be Ethan's best friend. In an attempt to move forward, she tolerates Ethan and grows with Riley. 
Just as she manages to get back on her happy feet: Damien comes back wanting back into her broken heart.

title: Wish I May, Wish I Might
description:
High school senior Carter Moore knew exactly when it all started, but she didn't know it at the time. It was during her fourth-period Pre-Calc class when they were reviewing for an exam. "I wish we didn't have a test tomorrow," she complained. And then, the next day, the test was canceled. 
The next time, Carter wished for lasagna at the school lunch, and suddenly there was a hot vat of lasagna, even though it wasn't on the menu.

It didn't take long before Carter realized any if she wished for anything aloud, it happened.

But there's a twist. 

The wish will always come true. But it doesn't always happen in the best way possible. With one seemingly harmless little wish, something terrible can happen. 

Carter became careful, not telling people about her ability and being strict on the wishes she makes. But then, one day, the unthinkable happened. Carter made a bad wish. A really bad wish. 

Now, Carter is on the run, and while she may tell herself that it wasn't her fault, she - and everyone else - knows she's not innocent.

description:
[ 3x FEATURED ] How long can she be a secret admirer of your class representative? A teenager who had once been bullied finally decided to change her final year of high school and date her crush.

Being average in everything including grades, appearance, and status made her an average girl in a high-class academy. With little hope of ever fitting in and high hopes of capturing the attention of the class' hottest representative. 

Noel Von Parschel is a confident, soft-spoken prime alpha who values class and comes from a wealthy family. Raised as a popular model, pianist, and excellent student often attracted the praises of various people. Greetings!

I'm Sarena; currently a Canadian writer, a foodie (food photographer), ambiverted book fanatic, and occasional public speaker.

If you check out my stories, you might like my characters more than me. I'm guilty of the latter.

I hope they make you smile and save you the way they saved me. On a side note, I also hope you be your own hero today―I'm certain you have it in you.

Regards,
  Sarena A.

▬ •∞• ▬

❝If you're interested in becoming someone whose writing matters, think beyond that box of 2am thoughts. Think 4am thoughts. Think 4pm thoughts. Write mundane things, simple things. Writing is renowned because it can be cryptic; heavy; generalized, even iconically offensive, but it should mean something to you. Write something that's worth reading―something you're proud of, proud to share, proud to write. Write because every reader gets as much out of it as you do; hope, empower, free. Your writing should mean something. Please make it.❞
         ― s. akhter.

title: Bounds Of Love (BWWM) #Wattys2018
description:
Ebony wants to belong more than anything. 

The daughter of a beta, she has never fit in with her easily intimidated pack mates. She has been isolated, ignored, avoided. So she does something crazy, something fully out of character... She transfers. Halfway across the country. 

She wants to make friends and find a pack that accepts her. She wants to love and be loved. When she meets Cole - the future Alpha of her new pack - she might just find everything she's been hoping for... 

Or not. 

With a new pack, new school, and new friends what could possibly go wrong?
 
A lot apparently. 

Surviving her exchange year will be challenging enough. Surviving the future MiddleEast alpha? She'll need all the strength she can get.

***
Highest Rank #3 in weak
****
Abstract:

 As he walks out the door, the sensation of pins and needles ripples through my body. It starts off like a small current then progressively gets stronger with every minute that passes as I stare at the doorway, wishing he would walk back through yelling "surprise! I'm an arsehole and it was all a joke".  

Time stretches on. And on... And on.

Then, as my body is consumed by pure agony, the tether connecting us to each other fully snaps.

The mate bond is gone.

title: Going Places
description:
Self-confessed weirdo, Shane Guevara always knew that he didn't fit it in with his conservative family. Throughout his life, he tried his best to be the golden child... until the day he was caught fondling the neighbor's son in a drunken stupor. 

After being forced to out himself at his homophobic uncle, Antonio's party, he moves in with his senile Abuela and decides to sell his belongings to fund a cross-country trip to the Big Apple for a fresh start. 

Inside a quirky cafe, he meets his soon to be roommate, Roy Hodges who turns his life upside down. Together, they go on a journey of love, loss, self-discovery and chaos to find themselves.

authorBio:
The Passion Pit is a place that I'm using to post every passion project that I've started, since 2013 on and off Wattpad.

A lot of these projects have been shelved for a long time, but have been re-edited and updated for reading on Wattpad, but some are also new stories.

Since they're "passion projects" of mine, they will stay up here for free. I don't intend to commercialize them, or charge anyone for reading them. I might however take them down for editing from time to time.

I hope that everyone enjoys reading, commenting and voting on them. Feel free to give feedback, ask questions or just have a chat with me on my message board about anything. I will always be there.

title: Ivy Cordelia Boarding School
description:
Ivy Cordelia Boarding School, the most prestigious US Boarding School to date, houses the smartest teenagers to ever touch pen and paper. One of their competitors, Glenwood Prep, is being closed for their countless scandals involving student AND teacher. ICBS doesn't have those problems, of course. It's a school to be proud that you attend. NONE of that mess goes around inside of these grounds. Or, well...actually, it's assured that none of that mess escapes. The students are JUST, or even more scandalous than Glenwood, but only they know it. I mean, how else do you think filling a building with teenagers could possibly go? Exactly. However it goes, I'll make sure you're the first to know.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Temporary Fix ✔️
description:
Liam Spencer is fresh out of a relationship and also a job. Not of his own accord, of course. 

His fiance called off their engagement, and since they work in the same place, Liam can't bear to see his face every day and resigned from the job himself. He is a thirty year old man and is single and without a job or a place to stay. He is definitely not where he thought he would be at this age. 

But it's okay. Liam's sister needs taking care of since she is not doing so well herself and has two kids. Liam decides to help her out, and at the same time, decides to take up on a temporary job offer while he looks for something more permanent. Just a temporary fix, if you will. 

That is until he meets this strangely enticing man named Aaron who is an absolute dickface and surprise, surprise, just so happens to be his new boss.

title: The Darkness Unleashed - A Star Wars Fanfiction
description:
He steps closer to me, 'Lilith, ask yourself this: How can your brother save you from the dark side,' his eyes held amusement, 'when your heart is overflowing with it?'

·✿·✿·✿·✿·✿·

Our story starts deep within the Rishi Maze Glalaxy on the planet Nilo. Years after, the House of StarStine fell, and its members were massacred by an evil Crime gang led by an Inquisitor. The only survivors, twin Force users Lilith and Kenneth, hide their identities and work for the Vaxtion Escort Guild (V.E.G). 

He is Lilith's light in the darkness.
She is the darkness in Kenneth's light.
They may be siblings, but they are opposites.
A holy war is threatening to engulf their planet once more.
Only they can save it.
How can they save it when they can't save themselves?

// About Me //

Hello! My name is Pnina. I've had an immense love for reading and writing since I was four years old. My happy places are at home with my family or at the local coffee shoppe with friends.

Fave songs to listen to while writing: "Time" by Hans Zimmer, "Nine" and "Two" by Sleeping at Last, and "The Long Song" from Doctor Who.

When Fiona and Conrad's paths cross, what was supposed to be a straightforward quest turns into a crazy race around the world. title: New Mode
description:
A cyberpunk thriller for a generation with nothing left to lose at the hands of its corporate overlords.
 
John Quantum is the most recognized name in technology, but the familiar face he wears isn't his own. Cloned from the deceased founder of Quantum Computing, John is corporate property in all but name, he lives as the shadow of a man he will never know. When he learns of 26319, a clone imprisoned for a crime 26319's originator committed, the injustice strikes a chord. Tired of being seen as the fixed product of genetic programming, John is determined to prove the legacy thrust upon him does not define his humanity. He never intended to set off a series of events which could redefine the very meaning of 'human.'

When a powerful new technology is discovered hidden inside 26319, and social unrest against automated labor reaches critical mass, John realizes the line between man and machine is far more difficult, and more dangerous, to expose than he thought. His quest inadvertently paves the way for five renegade AIs to reshape the world in their vision of human utopia. But not all share this vision. John and five other POV revolutionaries: 26319, a cybersecurity billionaire, two lowlife hackers, and an evangelical fundamentalist find themselves at the center of conflicting movements which will determine whether machines are to be humanity's masters, servants or saviors. The war over human identity begins.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Originally from NYC and now living in Hong Kong, in early 2015 I left the professional world to pursue my true passions full time: writing, coding, and traveling. After two novels, two screenplays, and multiple apps and published short works, I have yet to look back. My writing, while not all directly about my multi-year journey around the world without flying, has been heavily influenced by the people and places I've been fortunate enough to meet along the way.

Follow me @mattRoconnor

title: The Wildflower Knights: Only the Marked
description:
"The group was stuck together, alone in the wilderness, and they couldn't hold their tongues forever. Their stories that led to this moment still had to be told, their mission completed somehow."

The Imperium has drafted a random selection of Marked citizens to embark on a perilous mission, one that could stave off the destruction of Allarum by the ruins of war. The brutal Shabari have set a spellbound barrier between Allarum and their own homeland, Joriketh, forcing the warring nations into a tense peace. But the barrier cannot stay up forever, and the rulers of Allarum are determined to have it torn down on their terms, not the other way around.

And so we have the motley crew of recruits of all tribes and backgrounds, training at the Militant University for the Marked for the purpose of completing an assault on the border barricade. But the recruits aren't there by choice. They're there by force. What's worse is an eerie reluctance from the University staff to reveal anything too telling about the experimental mission being pressed upon the trainees.

Six such recruits find themselves in an impossible situation. Nowhere is safe, and no one can be trusted. Yet the hearts of humankind are slow to give up, and in the battle of good versus evil, humble, beautiful flowers must prove their strength against the beasts of the field.

Bravery and cowardice contend in a mission that radically shakes the lives of thousands of Allarum's citizens. And when the straits of the country become suddenly more dire, there is nothing to do but fully commit to saving the homeland of millions and don the armor of knighthood.

Updated every one to two days.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Everything pleasing to the senses in the form of original, captivating artistry thrills me to my core. It gives reason to my existence. Hopefully I can share some of that artistry with all of you readers through my written stories.

title: A Heart Among Ink and Flames
description:
Five friends, one bookshop, one fire. A historical fiction set during the terrible events of the Notre Dame Cathedral Fire in April of 2019. A sweet story of living life and finding friendship in even the unlikeliest of places.
